the GOP is desperate to defend her

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. name: =?utf-8?Q?Todd=20Watson?=
subject: Today’s Heartbeat Act vote delivers another win
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
body:
Celebrating each moment of victory TOGETHER is essential | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/850e370b5913/n41kepo7ku-468746?e=25844e23a8)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=deffe55ca0&e=25844e23a8)
---
| | Peter,
---
| Today a historic victory for the sanctity of life was achieved in Nebraska!

Following today’s debate on [LB-626](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=f0a2bddb2d&e=25844e23a8), The Heartbeat Act passes!

We are thankful that Senator Joni Albrecht brought forward this bill. We are also grateful for this governing body moving from unaddressed legislation in 2022 to stepping up and being BOLD in 2023! Babies, the innocent unborn, will be saved from this action!
---
| [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=7d824e078a&e=25844e23a8)
---
| We continue to build momentum by fighting for our shared values! We continue to push forward with an impressive list of triumphs on big issues!

_**Celebrating each moment of victory together is essential**_**. **We also know that we cannot allow ourselves to lower our guard when it comes to protecting the innocence of unborn children, our Constitutional rights, and our fight for limited government.

Thank you to everyone who has taken a stand for the sanctity of life, which has brought us past this first hurdle in making the Heartbeat Act a reality! We have two more bill phases to go. We cannot let up!

The Nebraska Republican Party will always fight for the rights of _all_ individuals to pursue **Life, Liberty,** and the **Pursuit of Happiness.**
---
| Sincerely,
---
| Todd Watson
Political Director
Nebraska Republican Party
**[NE.GOP](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=0e4f604a25&e=25844e23a8)**

body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=2097%2E5257348%2EPAVnET ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek, today California voters are hearing about the new
Republican candidate in this Senate race, Eric Early — many for the first
time. Not me, though. Or the hundreds of thousands of Southern
Californians I currently represent.

While folks across the state will be hearing from Eric Early much more
often — and soon — I’ve faced him before. He’s the MAGA Republican who ran
against me for Congress in 2020, and now he’s running again to defeat me.

— with a thorough rejection of his extreme, far-right beliefs by
California voters at the ballot box? Chip in $10 or any amount to our
campaign today.

Early raised well over $4 million to defeat me the last time. He called
the impeachment proceedings that I helped lead against Trump a “hoax” and
a “witch hunt.” He went on TV and radio with ads attacking my character.
He sent vicious attack mailers with false smears. And he spread lies and
conspiracy theories about me across our district, on Fox, OAN and on
Twitter.

The Republican money machine is desperate for a candidate like this, who
has built his entire reputation on lies, attacks, and political smear
campaigns...against me. After all, Trump, Kevin McCarthy, and virtually
the entire Republican Party have made me their national boogeyman — and
their attacks will only grow more vicious with an extreme candidate like
Eric Early in this race. It’s been their playbook for years now.

And with a Republican Speaker from the Golden State, Republicans have new
resources to pour into California. McCarthy raised over $12 million in one
night this year from corporate PACs and lobbyists, and told a reporter who
asked about the California Senate race, “I think a Republican could win.”

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=apr2023_abs_em.eR9sXr&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC30_20230412_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=2097%2E5257348%2EPAVnET ]Derek, can you rush any amount to my campaign right now so
that we can respond to my 2020 MAGA opponent joining this Senate race? We
cannot let Republicans gain any momentum — especially on Day One of Eric
Early’s campaign.

Eric Early’s entire political career has been about parroting Trump’s lies
and attacks and trying to destroy my character. Now he’s taking those
efforts statewide, and he will have the entire Republican political
establishment cheering him on and supporting him financially.

I have this grassroots team. So let’s fight back.

Thanks team,

— Adam

subject: Join us at one of our exciting Heart of the Party events near you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Join us in the fight to move Washington State in the RIGHT direction!

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .
Contact:
Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party
(425) 460-0570
steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org)

body:
Attend our Town Hall Against Child Mutilation... | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/1f35d3ddcdbc/defend-our-children?e=3ebdc747e6)
---
|
---
| | |
# **_DEFEND OUR CHILDREN_**
---
|
---
| **Across America and our Great State of Ohio we are seeing a coordinated effort to confuse and harm our children through dangerous and irreversible medical procedures.

April 26th in Medina, we will be joined by State Representative Jennifer Gross, State School Board Member John Hagan and a panel of medical experts for our Town Hall Against Child Mutilation! **
**Every child is created in the image of God and deserves our protection from radical ideologues attempting to alter their true nature.**
**This Town Hall will benefit HB68 (The SAFE Act) which will ban dangerous puberty blockers and sex reassignment surgeries on minors in Ohio. Panel members will discuss their views and area of expertise followed by questions from the audience.**
**Come show your support for ending child mutilation in our state!**
---
| | |
---

| This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[_why did I get this?_](https://jonahdschulz.us21.list-manage.com/about?u=fca39b236a4d3fca484c28fd6&id=d0d068d055&e=3ebdc747e6&c=776c904d07) [unsubscribe from this list](https://jonahdschulz.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=fca39b236a4d3fca484c28fd6&id=d0d068d055&e=3ebdc747e6&c=776c904d07) [update subscription preferences](https://jonahdschulz.us21.list-manage.com/profile?u=fca39b236a4d3fca484c28fd6&id=d0d068d055&e=3ebdc747e6&c=776c904d07)

**Peter, the situation at our Southern Border is dire.
**
We have seen a surge of illegal crossings, many of them unaccompanied minors, risking their lives to cross the border illegally. This is not only a humanitarian crisis, but it also poses a threat to our national security.

Lori understands the gravity of this situation and is committed to finding a solution that works for all Americans. She has been working with her fellow congressmen and women to come up with a comprehensive plan that addresses border security, immigration, and the rights of those seeking asylum.

clean_body: | | | | \- - -| Peter, the situation at our Southern Border is dire. We have seen a surge of illegal crossings, many of them unaccompanied minors, risking their lives to cross the border illegally. This is not only a humanitarian crisis, but it also poses a threat to our national security. Lori understands the gravity of this situation and is committed to finding a solution that works for all Americans. She has been working with her fellow congressmen and women to come up with a comprehensive plan that addresses border security, immigration, and the rights of those seeking asylum. | | | | Lori has been working tirelessly to find bipartisan solutions to this urgent issue. Donate today and let her know that YOU care about the well-being of our country. Thank you, Team Lori | | | | | | | | | Even as a Congresswoman, Lori’s most important title is mom. That’s how she knows the issues your family faces, and that’s why she fights everyday to make life better for every Oregon family, and every American. Aside from that, all you need to know are the issues she’s fighting for in Congress: If that sounds like the kind of agenda you can get behind, If you’d prefer to give by check, please use the below address: Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress 13203 SE 172nd Ave Suite 166 #399 Happy Valley, OR 97086 Forward This message to FIVE FRIENDS AND FAMILY to spread the word on how to achieve a better future for Oregon and America → ** Also text “LORI” to 71800 or click here to receive all of Lori’s messages | | | | Team Lori 13203 SE 172nd Ave, Suite 166 #399, Happy Valley, OR 97086 \- =

name: Margaret Mary Dunn
subject: My hero son is facing life in prison
body:
I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael.

I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael.

Michael is a police officer who dedicated his life to keeping our community safe in Farmers Branch, Texas.

_**But now he might be facing a life sentence in prison for shooting a dangerous career criminal who tried to run Michael down in a stolen truck.**_

[**Will you help my son?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zub8s9bkn12j8h2sbkk8jd83g9n23lntbdhratig_rp22sh2s8i66o74cpge0o32c9h2bs)

That's Michael in the photo.

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z940bht4evgmj447vq79euhmqqlaol11c6mjun10_rp22sh2s8i66o74cpge0o32c9h2bs) [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcraodfjvpj2mr1nfdss46ftk5qp5mudqf9ifbj0_rp22sh2s8i66o74cpge0o32c9h2bs)

In addition to being a police officer, Michael is also a Master Gunnery Sergeant in the United Stated Marine Corps Reserve.

I knew when he joined the police department that it was a dangerous job.

Every night on the news I saw another story of a police officer ambushed or killed in the line of duty.

It's been a heart wrenching time for the families of police officers in recent years.

What I didn't expect was that so many Americans would turn their backs on Michael in his time of need.

I now realize that it's all about fear. Fear of being attacked as a racist.

Fear of going against woke politicians and bureaucrats.

Fear of losing their jobs.

I assumed that the police department, the prosecutor's office, and everyone else in the government and the community would have Michael's back.

**But I was wrong.**

_So_ _now_ _Michael 's_ _life_ _is_ _at_ _stake_ _for_ _simply_ _doing_ _his_ _job_ _and_ _we_ _have_ _nobody_ _to_ _turn_ _to_ _except_ _for_ _good_ _hearted_ _strangers_ _like_ _you._

**[Will you please help me save my son Michael?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z99obojstqnqarbb8q9atk3lbgvvh3c0qc7k3eho_rp22sh2s8i66o74cpge0o32c9h2bs)**

Let me give you some more of the details...

Michael and other Farmers Branch Police detectives tracked a stolen pickup truck to the parking lot of an "adult arcade."

The truck was stolen by a convicted felon who was well-known to the police.

Michael was assigned the task of arresting this man.

When the suspect came back to the truck, Michael pulled up and stepped out of his police car.

The criminal sped the stolen truck toward him.

Michael had to do what every police officer hopes they never have to do: he drew his weapon and fired.

The man driving the stolen truck died at the scene.

My son suffered back and leg injuries.

Michael had a split-second to think about if the career criminal speeding toward him was going to crush him to death with that stolen truck.

In that split-second, he did what he needed to do in order to save his own life and the lives of his fellow officers and community.

There's no doubt in my mind, and many others, that Michael made the right choice that day.

He should be considered a hero for putting his life on the line to protect others.

But right and wrong seem to have been turned upside down in the last few years.

Why else would they be trying to put my son in prison for murder for what he did?

That's why I'm willing to do whatever it takes to clear his name. **[Even if that means asking folks like you for financial support to help my son afford the best possible attorneys and legal advice.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3m50l0hlpfs0cesdprmjshs88jd1oo923dnunho_rp22sh2s8i66o74cpge0o32c9h2bs)**

After the incident, Michael was distraught to hear the criminal died.

But the other officers assured him the shooting was justified.

And then our whole world was rocked.

**Just 8 days after the incident Michael was indicted.**

Experts described the indictment as "unusually swift." The president of the Dallas Police Association said:

"We have never had an investigation completed in less than eight days ready to hand over to the District Attorney. Never."

I knew in my heart something was wrong - and we would be facing the fight of our lives to defend Michael in court.

We started a fundraising campaign on the internet site "GoFundMe" to raise money for a proper legal defense.

After a few days, "GoFundMe" shut down the fundraiser.

They claimed Michael's actions as a police officer were an "act of hate" \- and helping him violated their terms of service.

So in this anti-police climate, politically woke climate, the case was closed in their minds.

No "innocent until proven guilty." No due process.

Instead, my son was smeared as a "murderer" who committed a "hate crime."

Since then, my husband and I spent half our life savings on legal fees and bills to help Michael.

_With the investigation devastating my family... seeing Michael, an American hero, being smeared on the internet... and our family quickly running out of money to pay mounting court fees... hope was fading._

Until we heard about the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). **LELDF is the best friend a police officer could ever have.**

LELDF defends good officers, like my son, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty.

The group's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department.

And praise the Lord, LELDF saw it fit to help my son!

**[Will you please consider sending a tax-deductible contribution to the LELDF so they can help my son beat his charges?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdirkipgtnqbrihj0sj1v67qa0qca38vd9biqt0g_rp22sh2s8i66o74cpge0o32c9h2bs)**

You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. It doesn't receive any funds from the government to help our police officers.

Or, if the Lord has blessed you with the means to help with a **[gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more,](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zga3v746g1i53dmfh7n7i442n1rh8rp322larc90_rp22sh2s8i66o74cpge0o32c9h2bs)** I pray you will consider doing so.

Please know any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing.

If you can't help financially today, I understand. And please keep Michael and our family in your prayers.

My son Michael is an American hero who served our nation and his community. He shouldn't be locked behind bars for defending his life from a career criminal.
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhpnfvqihnpn7cdfqkdk2paic1dre9cm8becu56o_rp22sh2s8i66o74cpge0o32c9h2bs)
_That 's a picture of Michael with his daughter - my granddaughter - Mary-Kaitlyn_
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrdgc80tpu9u65sbrmcvbilmk6qatpikbl5u9bdo_rp22sh2s8i66o74cpge0o32c9h2bs)
_That 's a picture of Michael with his Son - my grandson - William_

I pray you never go through something like this. But if you do, may God touch the hearts of kind people to help you - just as I'm praying He'll touch your heart to help my son today.

Sincerely,

Margaret Mary Dunn

PS: LELDF relies on caring people like you to send donations so they can fight tooth and nail to help wrongly-accused police officers like Michael. And because LELDF is a non-profit, all donations are tax-deductible. Your kind **[donation today of $35, $50, or $100](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zp40hiqd52i0f0d4ronn2kh30spclu87i0e5g8o0_rp22sh2s8i66o74cpge0o32c9h2bs)** to help Michael will mean so much to my family.

\----------------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit **www.leldf.org**. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | www.PoliceDefense.org
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

ICYMI News

_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5le9gai16ckpai67idu3ukuutb8dvq079isi3h0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkir39tdkmeqjetjjkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8o30spgm9o3246h22sh2s8i66o74cpge0o32c9h2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2p35p2mo7bcprgstc6urf7m1m4pplb54rdmlvco_rp22sh2s8i66o74cpge0o32c9h2bs)_

name: Kash Patel
subject: New J6 Choir song with Donald Trump
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgts52khrsk6q467bii6e0fvjp50oerhashscei8_rp22sh2s8i66o74cpge0o36cph2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z87vnde4q1281cppr14bra9uvi2mhqllakmgdgh8_rp22sh2s8i66o74cpge0o36cph2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zs9sflhbfdud64hha07s33q1i9nd882fnvihvnkg_rp22sh2s8i66o74cpge0o36cph2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

subject: Gov. Katie Hobbs is targeting school choice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Federation for Children
body:
I don’t know what I’m more outraged by, the fact that Gov. Katie Hobbs is blatantly lying or...

| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16627%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=E6dgDYsCUJImRMwmWERDbg&sysid=1)

| | Friend, did you see this recent Fox News interview with Arizona Governor Katie Hobbs?
---
| | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16628%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=K%2buI9rli3NsNEo%2fhBU1rvg&sysid=1)
---

---
| | She was called out for attending a private Catholic high school. While there's nothing wrong with her and her family choosing the education that’s best for them, it’s very hypocritical that **she’s trying to take away the same choices from Arizona families.** The American Federation for Children is stepping in to ensure that doesn’t happen. We are standing by to protect school choice in Arizona. **[_Friend, will you join us by signing our petition today. >>> _](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16620%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=U93jkDl8bl%2bgqS%2b21rRmiA&sysid=1)**
---
| | [**SAVE AZ SCHOOL CHOICE****→****SIGN NOW**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16621%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WHOfLde6T7QM2pTJIWdGWw&sysid=1)
---
| | School choice is already law in Arizona, and it’s working for Arizona families. But Hobbs wishes to roll back those programs and deny families education freedom. **[_Stand with the American Federation for Children - add your name to defend school choice in Arizona. >>>_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16622%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IUcf%2bYU4kezmBDgh6m8iFg&sysid=1)**
---
| | [**SAVE AZ SCHOOL CHOICE→SIGN NOW**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16623%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FMa4ERvqG4PTQbsgVPPDTg&sysid=1)
---
| | Thank you,
Elizabeth BeShears
American Federation for Children

name: Sean Spicer
subject: I’ll cut to the chase.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
| |
---
| | | Hey - this is Sean Spicer:

With a heavy heart, I just announced I'm parting ways with Newsmax. My show reached millions and helped viewers see what's _really_ happening in our country. Something the Mainstream Media fails to do time and time again.

_**[But with that in the rearview mirror, I'm thrilled at what's coming next...](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62552869:JGeZV4GNY:m:1:3365131770:C51EB3280313AD6B072C7DDCCE197C10:r "But with that in the rearview mirror, I’m thrilled at what’s coming next... ")**_

---
| | | [READ MY FULL STATEMENT >>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62552869:JGeZV4GNY:m:1:3365131770:C51EB3280313AD6B072C7DDCCE197C10:r "READ MY FULL STATEMENT >>")
---

The 2024 election will be the single most important one in the history of our country. Joe Biden and Democrats in Congress have set our country into a tailspin. It's an emergency situation and we're running dangerously short on time to change course.

We have our work cut out for us ahead of 2024:

- Fire Joe Biden and retake the presidency
- Expand our razor-thin Majority in the House
- Win back the Senate and send Chuck Schumer into retirement

**The Democrats aren 't going to give us an inch... so we have no choice but to 1) outwork, 2) outsmart, and - most importantly - 3) outraise them. **

Unfortunately, that last point is the most important. Why? Because no one works harder than strong Conservatives like you. And Republicans are WINNING on the issues - they can't outsmart us when we're the ones fighting for freedom, defending our country and flag, and resisting their radical woke agenda.

But Democrats have a MAJOR advantage in fundraising thanks to their armies of Hollywood megadonors and woke Liberals whipping out their credit cards whenever they flip on MSNBC.

_**[Look- if we want to win in 2024, it's going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62552868:JGeZV4GNY:m:1:3365131770:C51EB3280313AD6B072C7DDCCE197C10:r "Look – if we want to win in 2024, it’s going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW. ")**_

That's why I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME THIS YEAR. We ran the numbers on what it'll take to outraise the Democrats and pull off an overwhelming victory.

We came to the conclusion that if every last one of you donated, we would have the resources to MAX OUT all our voter contact budgets, GOTV operations, and volunteer recruitment efforts.

_In other words ... if everyone here steps up RIGHT NOW, the Democrats would suffer a defeat like nothing we've ever seen before._

**But that 's a big "if" - it requires 100% participation. **

This plan falls apart if too many folks sit out. We need everyone on board to pull this off.

So I'll cut to the chase.

_**[From the bottom of my heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution? If we can pull this off, we'll make history.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62552868:JGeZV4GNY:m:1:3365131770:C51EB3280313AD6B072C7DDCCE197C10:r "From the bottom
of my heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution between $27 and $54? If we can pull this off, we’ll make history.")**_

Are you in?

---
**[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62552868:JGeZV4GNY:m:1:3365131770:C51EB3280313AD6B072C7DDCCE197C10:r)[**YES >>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62552868:JGeZV4GNY:m:1:3365131770:C51EB3280313AD6B072C7DDCCE197C10:r)_[**NO >>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62552868:JGeZV4GNY:m:1:3365131770:C51EB3280313AD6B072C7DDCCE197C10:r)**
---

More from me soon,
Sean Spicer

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62552868:JGeZV4GNY:m:1:3365131770:C51EB3280313AD6B072C7DDCCE197C10:r "image")
---
* * *
---
|
---
| Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC.
---

name: Secure & Prosper
subject: Free eBook from Victor Davis Hanson: Dueling Populisms
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTAzLTA1ZDE5N2JmY2JkMjRkNGE5Y2Q2ZjZlN2NmNjBlZDk4IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3Jlc291cmNlcy5ob292ZXIub3JnL2R1ZWxpbmctcG9wdWxpc21zLXNpZ251cC8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWR1ZWxpbmdwb3B1bGlzbXMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFFX1NQTzM3NzA2Jm9sYz0zNjk5MSJ9/xCmDcmPhj9QFT-2EQ_hOzA)
---
| | Dear Friend,Populism is nothing new to world history. While it can be easy to think about American politics as being divided between the Left and the Right, the reality is much different. What we’ve really been seeing is two sets of populist backlash against both the Democrat and Republican establishment.
---
| [](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTAzLTA1ZDE5N2JmY2JkMjRkNGE5Y2Q2ZjZlN2NmNjBlZDk4IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3Jlc291cmNlcy5ob292ZXIub3JnL2R1ZWxpbmctcG9wdWxpc21zLXNpZ251cC8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWR1ZWxpbmdwb3B1bGlzbXMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFFX1NQTzM3NzA2Jm9sYz0zNjk5MSJ9/rfldsn8mxqKvobZ35XPmeg)
---
| | And believe it or not, these tensions actually trace their roots back to Roman times.

That’s why I’m sending you this email today.

I want to make sure you get a free copy of one of our popular eBooks: **[Dueling Populisms by Victor Davis Hanson](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTAzLTA1ZDE5N2JmY2JkMjRkNGE5Y2Q2ZjZlN2NmNjBlZDk4IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3Jlc291cmNlcy5ob292ZXIub3JnL2R1ZWxpbmctcG9wdWxpc21zLXNpZ251cC8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWR1ZWxpbmdwb3B1bGlzbXMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFFX1NQTzM3NzA2Jm9sYz0zNjk5MSJ9/L-vYDyEAfpdAiVsWV3B6ow)**.

Hanson is a Hoover Senior Fellow and world-renowned historian, and I think you’ll get a lot out of his insights. Inside this important eBook, you’ll learn more about:
* What we can expect from a political climate ruled by movements that rebel against both the establishment—and each other.
* The important parallels between these ancient movements and their modern counterparts in both progressive and conservative populism.
* What lies ahead for America as we revive these ancient tensions in our culture.

name: Margaret Mary Dunn
subject: My police officer son is facing life in prison
body:
I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael.

I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael.

Michael is a police officer who dedicated his life to keeping our community safe in Farmers Branch, Texas.

_**But now he might be facing a life sentence in prison for shooting a dangerous career criminal who tried to run Michael down in a stolen truck.**_

[**Will you help my son?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq21vffarkagkdcc0louj679bs014poi4pu990s8_rp22sh2s8i66o74cpge8o76chh2bs)

That's Michael in the photo.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkk7scub2nd96oh03s0oglo7fh50u732jk6lanfo_rp22sh2s8i66o74cpge8o76chh2bs) [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8pjs7kopo1hi79gldtevkfadfp8a4qi650tl48g_rp22sh2s8i66o74cpge8o76chh2bs)

In addition to being a police officer, Michael is also a Master Gunnery Sergeant in the United Stated Marine Corps Reserve.

I knew when he joined the police department that it was a dangerous job.

Every night on the news I saw another story of a police officer ambushed or killed in the line of duty.

It's been a heart wrenching time for the families of police officers in recent years.

What I didn't expect was that so many Americans would turn their backs on Michael in his time of need.

I now realize that it's all about fear. Fear of being attacked as a racist.

Fear of going against woke politicians and bureaucrats.

Fear of losing their jobs.

I assumed that the police department, the prosecutor's office, and everyone else in the government and the community would have Michael's back.

**But I was wrong.**

_So_ _now_ _Michael 's_ _life_ _is_ _at_ _stake_ _for_ _simply_ _doing_ _his_ _job_ _and_ _we_ _have_ _nobody_ _to_ _turn_ _to_ _except_ _for_ _good_ _hearted_ _strangers_ _like_ _you._

**[Will you please help me save my son Michael?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg4teefspqbfv3ve62gj5500ahfj2fhtkvk4e7t8_rp22sh2s8i66o74cpge8o76chh2bs)**

Let me give you some more of the details...

Michael and other Farmers Branch Police detectives tracked a stolen pickup truck to the parking lot of an "adult arcade."

The truck was stolen by a convicted felon who was well-known to the police.

Michael was assigned the task of arresting this man.

When the suspect came back to the truck, Michael pulled up and stepped out of his police car.

The criminal sped the stolen truck toward him.

Michael had to do what every police officer hopes they never have to do: he drew his weapon and fired.

The man driving the stolen truck died at the scene.

My son suffered back and leg injuries.

Michael had a split-second to think about if the career criminal speeding toward him was going to crush him to death with that stolen truck.

In that split-second, he did what he needed to do in order to save his own life and the lives of his fellow officers and community.

There's no doubt in my mind, and many others, that Michael made the right choice that day.

He should be considered a hero for putting his life on the line to protect others.

But right and wrong seem to have been turned upside down in the last few years.

Why else would they be trying to put my son in prison for murder for what he did?

That's why I'm willing to do whatever it takes to clear his name. **[Even if that means asking folks like you for financial support to help my son afford the best possible attorneys and legal advice.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zusgvcce6h1t5t2njifq1elsu6hhsaq7apa3v7f8_rp22sh2s8i66o74cpge8o76chh2bs)**

After the incident, Michael was distraught to hear the criminal died.

But the other officers assured him the shooting was justified.

And then our whole world was rocked.

**Just 8 days after the incident Michael was indicted.**

Experts described the indictment as "unusually swift." The president of the Dallas Police Association said:

"We have never had an investigation completed in less than eight days ready to hand over to the District Attorney. Never."

I knew in my heart something was wrong - and we would be facing the fight of our lives to defend Michael in court.

We started a fundraising campaign on the internet site "GoFundMe" to raise money for a proper legal defense.

After a few days, "GoFundMe" shut down the fundraiser.

They claimed Michael's actions as a police officer were an "act of hate" \- and helping him violated their terms of service.

So in this anti-police climate, politically woke climate, the case was closed in their minds.

No "innocent until proven guilty." No due process.

Instead, my son was smeared as a "murderer" who committed a "hate crime."

Since then, my husband and I spent half our life savings on legal fees and bills to help Michael.

_With the investigation devastating my family... seeing Michael, an American hero, being smeared on the internet... and our family quickly running out of money to pay mounting court fees... hope was fading._

Until we heard about the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). **LELDF is the best friend a police officer could ever have.**

LELDF defends good officers, like my son, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty.

The group's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department.

And praise the Lord, LELDF saw it fit to help my son!

**[Will you please consider sending a tax-deductible contribution to the LELDF so they can help my son beat his charges?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zefng1n0o8kjja2ngl1hdf3uer78f9v78h8gtmso_rp22sh2s8i66o74cpge8o76chh2bs)**

You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. It doesn't receive any funds from the government to help our police officers.

Or, if the Lord has blessed you with the means to help with a **[gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more,](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z27t043vgd427v52mlv1u1sdobk1gc97sc4jlpi0_rp22sh2s8i66o74cpge8o76chh2bs)** I pray you will consider doing so.

Please know any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing.

If you can't help financially today, I understand. And please keep Michael and our family in your prayers.

My son Michael is an American hero who served our nation and his community. He shouldn't be locked behind bars for defending his life from a career criminal.
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjm0pvbmtvgiuvda8bnnlp7jcegn14qni799qkj8_rp22sh2s8i66o74cpge8o76chh2bs)
_That 's a picture of Michael with his daughter - my granddaughter - Mary-Kaitlyn_
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztoua8p8ofa0fl1a26qgc7g0m8838o6e8naadbk8_rp22sh2s8i66o74cpge8o76chh2bs)
_That 's a picture of Michael with his Son - my grandson - William_

I pray you never go through something like this. But if you do, may God touch the hearts of kind people to help you - just as I'm praying He'll touch your heart to help my son today.

Sincerely,

Margaret Mary Dunn

PS: LELDF relies on caring people like you to send donations so they can fight tooth and nail to help wrongly-accused police officers like Michael. And because LELDF is a non-profit, all donations are tax-deductible. Your kind **[donation today of $35, $50, or $100](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4sktln6d0bglaak34vc6ninbn4mclo7hag9i68o_rp22sh2s8i66o74cpge8o76chh2bs)** to help Michael will mean so much to my family.

\----------------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit **www.leldf.org**. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | www.PoliceDefense.org
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

American Action News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvg6fu5m3i85l1url27rr2sq0v2bule9npmlbk5g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni60o76c5ie9oh1k8gn48n24hhm1p36c3i61pj4c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi0eu9asc5i9obp0aj09bs9hfota2emidcnusnkg_rp22sh2s8i66o74cpge8o76chh2bs)_

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze9ia1nogldku43crpsora2i3021uq6qbrt5fqb8_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or0shj61p30spi649fg)

name: Weiss Ratings
subject: Banking Nightmare
body:
During and after the Great Financial Crisis of 2008, 485 U.S. banks went under.

| | | | | Dear Subscriber, During and after the Great Financial Crisis of 2008, 485 U.S. banks went under. We warned about 484 -- an accuracy rate of 99.8% Now, I have a new warning. But this time, it’s not just about a few hundred banks. It’s about nearly every single bank in America, whether large or small. A veritable banking nightmare! name: Dave McCormick
subject: It comes down to Pennsylvania
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pennsylvania Rising PAC
body:
Pennsylvania is the most important battleground state in our country.

|
---
| | | Friend,

Pennsylvania is the most important battleground state in our country. The Pennsylvania House has a razor-thin one-seat Democrat Majority.
**On top of that, take a look at registration breakdown:**
| **Democrat**| **Republican**| **Unaffiliated**| **Other**
---|---|---|---
**45%**| **40%**| **11%**| **4%**
| | [HELP REPUBLICANS TAKE BACK PENNSYLVANIA](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmnqabe6mjgr6f2pgbe3uksa7o08srv0tdbnu76o_rp22sh2s8i66o74cpge8o74cjh2bs "HELP REPUBLICANS TAKE BACK PENNSYLVANIA")
---
We believe that we have the message to win in Pennsylvania, and frankly, **we have to win Pennsylvania if we want any chance to save America![We need every conservative reading this to commit to saving Pennsylvania to renew America's greatness.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5nusao935hi6tsv7org09unatdpeqg28s3c6sc8_rp22sh2s8i66o74cpge8o74cjh2bs "We need every conservative reading this to commit to saving Pennsylvania to renew America’s greatness.")**
---
| | [COMMIT TO SAVING AMERICA](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zopg8ub2kb8t0lqkms6b52bfggakipgo3unu04ag_rp22sh2s8i66o74cpge8o74cjh2bs "COMMIT TO SAVING AMERICA")
---
This is the first time since 1944 that Pennsylvania has elected two Democrat Senators, so we know Pennsylvania has deep roots being a swing state, but it's on the verge of becoming a solid blue state. Let that sink in - the last time in history that Pennsylvania elected 2 Democrats to the Senate was during WWII.

The only way to save Pennsylvania is at the grassroots level. We have to start electing quality Republican leaders at the state level if we want to get the state - and our country - back on track. **We can 't renew America if conservatives cede the battleground state of Pennsylvania.**
---
| | [SAVE PENNSYLVANIA, RENEW AMERICA](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zo3jhmjokfp48575n8iah1ncvk4s7ev0o7468t2g_rp22sh2s8i66o74cpge8o74cjh2bs "SAVE PENNSYLVANIA, RENEW AMERICA")
---
**[I hope you don't give up on our country.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zj62galper831ejrbnbefgsuuqg90sa34l0iojbo_rp22sh2s8i66o74cpge8o74cjh2bs "I hope you don’t give up on our country.") America has proven its ability to renew its greatness even when our backs are up against the wall. I hope you'll do the same to renew conservative values in Pennsylvania and America. **

Thank you for saving our country today,
Dave McCormick

name: Sean Spicer
subject: I’m parting ways with Newsmax. Here’s what I’m up to now:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
| |
---
| | | Hey - this is Sean Spicer:

With a heavy heart, I just announced I'm parting ways with Newsmax. My show reached millions and helped viewers see what's _really_ happening in our country. Something the Mainstream Media fails to do time and time again.

_**[But with that in the rearview mirror, I'm thrilled at what's coming next...](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62550791:6wlJG4GlN:m:1:3331421248:AACA97838705BCF7635466CF6C18F407:r "But with that in
the rearview mirror, I’m thrilled at what’s coming next... ")**_

---
| | | [READ MY FULL STATEMENT >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62550791:6wlJG4GlN:m:1:3331421248:AACA97838705BCF7635466CF6C18F407:r "READ MY FULL STATEMENT >>")
---

The 2024 election will be the single most important one in the history of our country. Joe Biden and Democrats in Congress have set our country into a tailspin. It's an emergency situation and we're running dangerously short on time to change course.

We have our work cut out for us ahead of 2024:

- Fire Joe Biden and retake the presidency
- Expand our razor-thin Majority in the House
- Win back the Senate and send Chuck Schumer into retirement

**The Democrats aren 't going to give us an inch... so we have no choice but to 1) outwork, 2) outsmart, and - most importantly - 3) outraise them. **

Unfortunately, that last point is the most important. Why? Because no one works harder than strong Conservatives like you. And Republicans are WINNING on the issues - they can't outsmart us when we're the ones fighting for freedom, defending our country and flag, and resisting their radical woke agenda.

But Democrats have a MAJOR advantage in fundraising thanks to their armies of Hollywood megadonors and woke Liberals whipping out their credit cards whenever they flip on MSNBC.

_**[Look- if we want to win in 2024, it's going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62550792:6wlJG4GlN:m:1:3331421248:AACA97838705BCF7635466CF6C18F407:r "Look – if we
want to win in 2024, it’s going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW. ")**_

That's why I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME THIS YEAR. We ran the numbers on what it'll take to outraise the Democrats and pull off an overwhelming victory.

We came to the conclusion that if every last one of you donated, we would have the resources to MAX OUT all our voter contact budgets, GOTV operations, and volunteer recruitment efforts.

_In other words ... if everyone here steps up RIGHT NOW, the Democrats would suffer a defeat like nothing we've ever seen before._

**But that 's a big "if" - it requires 100% participation. **

This plan falls apart if too many folks sit out. We need everyone on board to pull this off.

So I'll cut to the chase.

_**[From the bottom of my heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution? If we can pull this off, we'll make history.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62550792:6wlJG4GlN:m:1:3331421248:AACA97838705BCF7635466CF6C18F407:r "From the bottom
of my heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution between $27 and $54? If we can pull this off, we’ll make history.")**_

Are you in?

---
**[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62550792:6wlJG4GlN:m:1:3331421248:AACA97838705BCF7635466CF6C18F407:r)[**YES >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62550792:6wlJG4GlN:m:1:3331421248:AACA97838705BCF7635466CF6C18F407:r)_[**NO >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62550792:6wlJG4GlN:m:1:3331421248:AACA97838705BCF7635466CF6C18F407:r)**
---

More from me soon,
Sean Spicer

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62550792:6wlJG4GlN:m:1:3331421248:AACA97838705BCF7635466CF6C18F407:r "image")
---

name: Weiss Ratings
subject: Banking Nightmare
body:
During and after the Great Financial Crisis of 2008, 485 U.S. banks went under.

| | | | | Dear Subscriber, During and after the Great Financial Crisis of 2008, 485 U.S. banks went under. We warned about 484 -- an accuracy rate of 99.8% Now, I have a new warning. But this time, it's not just about a few hundred banks. It's about nearly every single bank in America, whether large or small. A veritable banking nightmare! [See what it is here](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfto1ah3p6ffogeet9npvkrr94oashnsh375vsr8_rp22sh2s8i66o74cpgecor1cdh2bs). Good luck and God bless! |

| Peter,
Wanted you to be the first to know: I've officially declared that I'm **[running for re-election in 2024.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62553029:6fzaI4GCN:m:1:3391001263:0984916AA072AC8D82B6F811BD4F40C4:r)**

---
Our country is in crisis...and it's because Joe Biden and the Far-Left are attempting to turn our country into a socialist nation.
* **Democrats oppose Parents** being the primary stakeholder of our children's education and support teaching radical gender fluidity theory _to our young kids_.

* **Inflation wallops our family finances**...and the Left passes trillions in **_crushing new spending_** to fund their socialist woke agenda.

* **Our Border is overrun** with drugs, crime, and illegal immigration...and Joe Biden and Kamala Harris **_won 't even bother to visit._**

We can only stop the socialist takeover and save this nation if we fight back together.

I've proven to be a strong **conservative fighter** serving in Republican Leadership...and I've proven I can get a **TON of conservatives elected to Congress**...even in New York, even in a tougher than expected Republican year.

But I can't do it alone. **[I need your help to make sure I start my re-election off as strong as possible.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62553029:6fzaI4GCN:m:1:3391001263:0984916AA072AC8D82B6F811BD4F40C4:r)**

**[Pitch in $24--or any amount, big or small, to make SAVE this country.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62553029:6fzaI4GCN:m:1:3391001263:0984916AA072AC8D82B6F811BD4F40C4:r)**

Thanks for your help!

Elise Stefanik

name: Jim Jordan
subject: I'm being sued
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JIM JORDAN FOR CONGRESS PO BOX 355 Delaware, OH 43015
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62550905:J8wCw4GmN:m:1:3331421248:51FDB0914A6138AF4B0BC2F346CC6EFD:r)
|

Peter,

From the Russia Hoax to multiple failed investigations and impeachments, to the latest legal actions from NYC, the left has been trying to destroy Donald Trump every day since 2015.

**But today, the stakes just got higher ... **

That's because the same District Attorney who is using his prosecutorial power to destroy Joe Biden's likely opponent **HAS JUST SUED ME!**

**He wants to intimidate us!**

That's right - instead of fighting actual crime in New York City, **Alvin Bragg appears to be using federal tax dollars to target Trump.** And now he's targeting me!

But what Bragg or other Soros-backed liberals might not know about me: I've squared off against MUCH bigger and tougher opponents in my career. I didn't back down then...and I'm not backing down now!

[**HELP ME FIGHT THE LEFT'S POLITICAL TARGETING
CHIP IN A COUPLE DOLLARS TODAY»» **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62550905:J8wCw4GmN:m:1:3331421248:51FDB0914A6138AF4B0BC2F346CC6EFD:r)
This lawsuit shows me one thing: **Alvin Bragg doesn 't think the Constitution applies to those who use their position to target political opponents on the right!**

He's wrong! And **[with your help](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62550905:J8wCw4GmN:m:1:3331421248:51FDB0914A6138AF4B0BC2F346CC6EFD:r)** , I'll fight his bogus lawsuit with everything I've got!

[**LET ME KNOW YOU'RE WITH ME » »**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62550905:J8wCw4GmN:m:1:3331421248:51FDB0914A6138AF4B0BC2F346CC6EFD:r)

We will not be intimidated. We will not be deterred. We will not be stopped from doing our job on behalf of the American people, **no matter what.**

God Bless,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62550905:J8wCw4GmN:m:1:3331421248:51FDB0914A6138AF4B0BC2F346CC6EFD:r)
Jim Jordan

P.S. Our legal battle could become extremely costly, draining the resources we have earmarked toward helping us hold onto our majority in next year's election, which is why I'm asking for your financial support today. **[Will you kindly chip-in right now to help ensure we're able to mount the best possible defense against this purely political lawsuit?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62550905:J8wCw4GmN:m:1:3331421248:51FDB0914A6138AF4B0BC2F346CC6EFD:r)**

**About Jim Jordan:** | Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

** [ ** JOIN JIM ➞ **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62550905:J8wCw4GmN:m:1:3331421248:51FDB0914A6138AF4B0BC2F346CC6EFD:r)

---

Greetings!
There are still a few spots remaining for tonight's FREE Meet & Greet, at Colonial Italian Grill in Colonial Heights.
You still have time to RSVP to attend in support of Senator Amanda Chase for re-election to the Virginia Senate. We encourage you to bring a friend.
If you'd like to financially support or help Senator Chase by pitching in to help pay for the event, you can serve as [an event sponsor or purchase a ticket to the VIP Reception](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HAjkdNJSa3U4WIuPHdU_rRJc7efYVwxTjIOsnKkGE0KeY5ELzuWXIw6SVt-Vi-JPdA2fjFr4sd26ArOoTUAbvEIIJYfI5ftVTbz3S4p-HpXOoVSeE6UINAKJd2i3cAQ7TBuPim1Cm9_m608mrWBYbz4l8u4i8v5mXZFL60XvvdYaD2yf977e-_2FBH7KN9LMqPNEg7IvmjMXqb5jlAQGWQ==&c=3le588FOvjAuOg0NHYK5GWIIBYH_ZOY0WptslH_tOABSisX9LtI1dg==&ch=v4GqzS4sRXK7XDPowkgPHunQXNcmwO_vTAlUVkhpsxaWjP97JSzT8Q==).
If you haven't had a chance to meet Senator Chase or funds are tight right now, [attend the FREE event from 6:30-7:30pm that is open to the public. RSVP to Chris at chris@chaseforva.com.](mailto:chris@chaseforva.com) We look forward to seeing you tonight!
RSVP online [here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HAjkdNJSa3U4WIuPHdU_rRJc7efYVwxTjIOsnKkGE0KeY5ELzuWXIw6SVt-Vi-JPdA2fjFr4sd26ArOoTUAbvEIIJYfI5ftVTbz3S4p-HpXOoVSeE6UINAKJd2i3cAQ7TBuPim1Cm9_m608mrWBYbz4l8u4i8v5mXZFL60XvvdYaD2yf977e-_2FBH7KN9LMqPNEg7IvmjMXqb5jlAQGWQ==&c=3le588FOvjAuOg0NHYK5GWIIBYH_ZOY0WptslH_tOABSisX9LtI1dg==&ch=v4GqzS4sRXK7XDPowkgPHunQXNcmwO_vTAlUVkhpsxaWjP97JSzT8Q==).

body:

| | Friend, As the chief law enforcement officer for the Commonwealth of Virginia, I feel responsible for the safety of ALL 8.6 million Virginians. **But due to the close proximity of our communities, Washington, D.C. 's crime problem has become Virginia's crime problem.** **_[I AGREE >>](https://click.email.miyares-for-virginia.com/?qs=08da6fbef06bea169bfb08e1c5dc0bdaa35efd352d0f6e85cabc52a4e3f567408a5e2b270db210b3ec9424f1320bd7bcfa4bf390251a005d "I AGREE >>")_**

**D.C. name: Larry Kudlow
subject: The New York Sun is saving journalism
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTAzLTI5ZTBmNmI0ZGM4ZTQ0MThiMmQyN2UzZmVjNGVlNWZhIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvZ25zb2Z5Y2NxaD9zcmM9RkZPMzc2OTgifQ/D3ElUc5gMUTJEl0kyv_vaQ)
---
[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTAzLTI5ZTBmNmI0ZGM4ZTQ0MThiMmQyN2UzZmVjNGVlNWZhIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvZ25zb2Z5Y2NxaD9zcmM9RkZPMzc2OTgifQ/h7qfPjpwLnb0MFbf5as1uA)
---
Dear Friend, **I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns.**

**I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism.**

But there's also far more to what the Sun is building.

As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be.

I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust.

The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored.

The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way.

**The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun.** A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.
**My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly.**

I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths.

They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. **Joining the Sun costs as little as $0.01 per day.** I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts.
---
[**Join the Sun Now →**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTAzLTI5ZTBmNmI0ZGM4ZTQ0MThiMmQyN2UzZmVjNGVlNWZhIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvZ25zb2Z5Y2NxaD9zcmM9RkZPMzc2OTgifQ/-fOSdap1O3ZW3H2e9LX2lg)
---
**Please join me in the fight to restore America's journalism.**** ** This is one mission that our country desperately needs.
---
---
**Larry Kudlow** Columnist for The New York Sun
---
[**Join the Sun Now →**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTAzLTI5ZTBmNmI0ZGM4ZTQ0MThiMmQyN2UzZmVjNGVlNWZhIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjMiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvZ25zb2Z5Y2NxaD9zcmM9RkZPMzc2OTgifQ/aFBhZjleqyKZ0o2jPANdsg)

name: Tyler Yzaguirre
subject: Tyranny must be stopped
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62553368:J1OY-4GsN:m:1:3365131770:507D2771BFD2BDCE2559C8045721DCB8:r)
---
| | Fellow Patriot, The radical left is doing everything they can to keep law-abiding American citizens from carrying firearms. This tyranny must be put to a stop. I'll get right to the point - Washington D.C. has banned all magazines capable of carrying more than 10 rounds of ammunition. **This means that several commonly carried handguns used for self-defense are totally prohibited in D.C. - where crime has been SKYROCKETING for the last several years. ** We're fighting back with a critical lawsuit, in fact **_we have a hearing THIS WEEK,_** but we need your help immediately. [**Which is why I 'm asking you to make an urgent donation to the Second Amendment Institute to help fund our lawsuit against Washington D.C.'s tyrannical magazine ban.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62553368:J1OY-4GsN:m:1:3365131770:507D2771BFD2BDCE2559C8045721DCB8:r) Let me take a moment to introduce myself. My name is Tyler Yzaguirre and I'm the Founder and President of the Second Amendment Institute (SAI). The Second Amendment Institute is a 501(c)3 organization that fights at the frontline in defense of your 2A rights. No other 2A rights organization in the country possesses such a diverse team and unique opportunity to effectively combat the radical gun-grabbing agenda. I happen to live in Washington D.C. So, when I found out about the radical left's plan to ban commonly carried magazines, I knew SAI had to leap into action. Without hesitation, we joined a lawsuit to stop this tyranny before it gets any worse. **But with the preliminary hearing scheduled for THIS WEEK, I 'm coming to you for support. ** You see, these lawsuits aren't cheap to file, but they're our only defense against the repeated encroachment on our right to keep and bear arms. [**So, I hope you 'll join the fight with an urgent, tax-deductible gift today as we head into the court room in just a couple of days.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62553368:J1OY-4GsN:m:1:3365131770:507D2771BFD2BDCE2559C8045721DCB8:r) Washington D.C.'s magazine ban is dangerous for two reasons. First, as you may have seen in the news, violent crime in D.C. is rising, and the prohibition on the magazines places law-abiding American citizens at risk in the event of a deadly force criminal attack by limiting the number of rounds they may rapidly bring to bear to protect their lives. Second, if this ban is allowed to stand, it's only a matter of time before it spreads to other states and the limit is taken down to 5, then 2, and then guns are banned completely. It's a slippery slope to tyranny and it's up to you and me to make sure it stops here and now. [**Take a stand with SAI today by making a critical gift and help us defend the Second Amendment.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62553368:J1OY-4GsN:m:1:3365131770:507D2771BFD2BDCE2559C8045721DCB8:r) Thank you in advance for standing with us. In Freedom,
---
| | Tyler Yzaguirre Founder & President Second Amendment Institute
---
| | [**DEFEND 2A TODAY**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62553368:J1OY-4GsN:m:1:3365131770:507D2771BFD2BDCE2559C8045721DCB8:r)
---

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Far-Left, extreme trans activists are pushing a new "Trans Bill of Rights"
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62551029:JEVf-4GqN:m:1:3331421248:AEB1A52233091742AB9EB425829D9C49:r) Peter,

Far-Left, extreme trans activists are pushing a new "Trans Bill of Rights" in Congress.
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62551029:JEVf-4GqN:m:1:3331421248:AEB1A52233091742AB9EB425829D9C49:r) | | [ STOP THE TRANS BILL OF RIGHTS](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62551029:JEVf-4GqN:m:1:3331421248:AEB1A52233091742AB9EB425829D9C49:r)
---

This "Trans Bill of Rights" is 10 pages of mentally unstable wokeness and will completely warp reality in our country. Here are just a few of the INSANE things they are trying to push:

* Amend the Civil Rights Act, the Fair Housing Act, and the Equal Credit Opportunity Act to ban discrimination based on gender identity... **_That means Trans become a protected class and women's rights are totally and completely annihilated._** Men pretending to be women would not just be equal to women in all areas, they would be preferred and above all women, essentially replacing women.
* It also says to improve conditions for trans in jails and asylum facilities, create community services to support trans abuse survivors, **_and give priority to trans asylum seekers. Key word there, "priority."_**
* Calls for a ban on conversion therapy, a type of therapy many former trans and detransitioners have undergone to successfully change their life.
* Calls for **_codification of Roe v. Wade_** which would make abortion legal in all 50 states, destroy state rights, and ensure the murder of babies all over America.
* Calls for prohibiting the withholding of services to trans people on religious grounds, **_which destroys religious liberty._**
* Calls for education laws to ensure students have the right to participate in sports that best align with their gender, and use facilities that correspond to their preferred gender, **_which destroys Title IV and women's rights._**
* Also calls for trans in schools to have access to curriculum and books that accurately portray the "substantive history and identity of LGBTQI+ people and Black and indigenous people of color." **_Access to those grooming and brainwashing books means grooming and brainwashing for all children, and parents could not stop it._** _This would undo the Republican's recently passed Parent's Bill of Rights_.
* Also calls for getting rid of government restrictions on access to gender affirming care for trans adults and youth. **_This means the great laws Republican states have been passing that protect children from Trans surgeries, puberty blockers, and hormones would be wiped out and kids would not be safe anywhere._**

We MUST launch an immediate and overwhelming response to this evil masquerading as "equality." If you just read that entire list of bullet points, **[I absolutely need you to sign my petition in opposition to the"Trans Bill of Rights" immediately](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62551029:JEVf-4GqN:m:1:3331421248:AEB1A52233091742AB9EB425829D9C49:r).**

If patriots like you fail to take action after learning what's happening, we will lose the fight against gender insanity.

**[So please, sign my petition and share it with your friends - it will only take a moment](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62551029:JEVf-4GqN:m:1:3331421248:AEB1A52233091742AB9EB425829D9C49:r).**

_In Liberty,_

MTG

name: Caleb Max
subject: Need your help with my new venture
body:
Please consider a donation today.
| | |
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001puZ_gTFi0RDA5RFYYPOveWjYBWiierEbZ0tIbUa3A-dyIscBFrx7TArt8kgBG-JZhXP5lOX0bYUynIkmIGrU2Ctzu-qJb6xvbxlaTUC50fFBMeUy5GlTQJ3aP3DnyeqIBnLPGmE0500=&c=S-OVQlfDdk2bAR0PfZRGCVmTcMMUPsu3miJ_lGiUVzIWYGzWrxrFDw==&ch=nSYBh0B4onfOel-uramY-7qphz2ZGJ7iWyT8FHDmPE0dR-NNlf-7rA==)
---
|
---
| Please Support Virginia Faith & Freedom
---
| Dear Peter,
For nearly 40 years my grandfather, Former Congressman Frank Wolf, traversed the globe and back here at home in Virginia was a prodigious advocate for religious liberty. It makes me incredibly grateful and humbled to be able to carry on that torch as a Board Member with the Virginia Faith and Freedom Coalition. [Join me in supporting the Virginia Faith & Freedom Coalition](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001puZ_gTFi0RDA5RFYYPOveWjYBWiierEbZ0tIbUa3A-dyIscBFrx7TArt8kgBG-JZsQ1Nd7Skmaou3NnGGAnQrL6xtxyjN9rwS2BWlHbjHPjtzVMptWEc1k-yDvrBhz7FIilDlQLc7wonv9-uuTxaxxz3WGZJm-Bb0N1ZuOag9oxOHhcYClX7pcSlRD0uZSkwyz2El9SI7Co=&c=S-OVQlfDdk2bAR0PfZRGCVmTcMMUPsu3miJ_lGiUVzIWYGzWrxrFDw==&ch=nSYBh0B4onfOel-uramY-7qphz2ZGJ7iWyT8FHDmPE0dR-NNlf-7rA==).
It was the persecution of people of faith that sparked my grandfather's career in public service. Today it is a different type of persecution of people of faith that has sparked my own journey in religious liberty advocacy. People of faith in Virginia have not always had the loudest voices, but FAITH undergirds the strength of our arguments. That FAITH gave way to the establishment of our Nation, sustained the resolve of the Founding Fathers, and allows our Country and Commonwealth to thrive and endure.
Today, more than ever, it is important that as people of FAITH we are not just a part of the public discourse, but play an active role in the policies that determine the future of our Commonwealth. That is why I am so proud to take up the mantle of ensuring values and faith-based involvement in public discourse as a member of the Board of the Virginia Faith and Freedom Coalition. I am honored by this appointment, but I will need your help. [Please consider donating to the Virginia Faith and Freedom Coalition today.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001puZ_gTFi0RDA5RFYYPOveWjYBWiierEbZ0tIbUa3A-dyIscBFrx7TArt8kgBG-JZsQ1Nd7Skmaou3NnGGAnQrL6xtxyjN9rwS2BWlHbjHPjtzVMptWEc1k-yDvrBhz7FIilDlQLc7wonv9-uuTxaxxz3WGZJm-Bb0N1ZuOag9oxOHhcYClX7pcSlRD0uZSkwyz2El9SI7Co=&c=S-OVQlfDdk2bAR0PfZRGCVmTcMMUPsu3miJ_lGiUVzIWYGzWrxrFDw==&ch=nSYBh0B4onfOel-uramY-7qphz2ZGJ7iWyT8FHDmPE0dR-NNlf-7rA==)
In partnership with the national Faith and Freedom Coalition, we have revitalized the movement for Faith and Freedom in the Commonwealth. The cornerstone of our approach is Faith in Action. How we build upon this cornerstone depends upon you.
We have hired a professional staff to manage field operations to engage and equip voters of faith. Additionally, we have hired a Virginia-based public affairs firm to handle advocacy and educating Virginia legislators on the issues we champion. We will rely on your contributions to maintain this professional staff, as we work with the Virginia General Assembly to pass values-based legislation. That's why I'm personally asking you to [click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001puZ_gTFi0RDA5RFYYPOveWjYBWiierEbZ0tIbUa3A-dyIscBFrx7TArt8kgBG-JZsQ1Nd7Skmaou3NnGGAnQrL6xtxyjN9rwS2BWlHbjHPjtzVMptWEc1k-yDvrBhz7FIilDlQLc7wonv9-uuTxaxxz3WGZJm-Bb0N1ZuOag9oxOHhcYClX7pcSlRD0uZSkwyz2El9SI7Co=&c=S-OVQlfDdk2bAR0PfZRGCVmTcMMUPsu3miJ_lGiUVzIWYGzWrxrFDw==&ch=nSYBh0B4onfOel-uramY-7qphz2ZGJ7iWyT8FHDmPE0dR-NNlf-7rA==) to partner with us in getting these important tasks done.
The Virginia Faith and Freedom Coalition believes that the greatness of America lies not in government but in the character of our people - the simple virtues of faith, hard work, family, personal responsibility, and helping the least among us. We need people of faith to have a seat at the table to ensure that America and Virginia never lose sight of these values. This is not just a political pitch; rather, it is a request for [your investment](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001puZ_gTFi0RDA5RFYYPOveWjYBWiierEbZ0tIbUa3A-dyIscBFrx7TArt8kgBG-JZsQ1Nd7Skmaou3NnGGAnQrL6xtxyjN9rwS2BWlHbjHPjtzVMptWEc1k-yDvrBhz7FIilDlQLc7wonv9-uuTxaxxz3WGZJm-Bb0N1ZuOag9oxOHhcYClX7pcSlRD0uZSkwyz2El9SI7Co=&c=S-OVQlfDdk2bAR0PfZRGCVmTcMMUPsu3miJ_lGiUVzIWYGzWrxrFDw==&ch=nSYBh0B4onfOel-uramY-7qphz2ZGJ7iWyT8FHDmPE0dR-NNlf-7rA==) in an organization that will go to work every day for the values that you and I share - values that mean so much to the longevity of a strong, prosperous America and Virginia.
[Contribute today](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001puZ_gTFi0RDA5RFYYPOveWjYBWiierEbZ0tIbUa3A-dyIscBFrx7TArt8kgBG-JZsQ1Nd7Skmaou3NnGGAnQrL6xtxyjN9rwS2BWlHbjHPjtzVMptWEc1k-yDvrBhz7FIilDlQLc7wonv9-uuTxaxxz3WGZJm-Bb0N1ZuOag9oxOHhcYClX7pcSlRD0uZSkwyz2El9SI7Co=&c=S-OVQlfDdk2bAR0PfZRGCVmTcMMUPsu3miJ_lGiUVzIWYGzWrxrFDw==&ch=nSYBh0B4onfOel-uramY-7qphz2ZGJ7iWyT8FHDmPE0dR-NNlf-7rA==) and let's go to work on behalf of Virginians of faith and the values that we hold dear! Thank You! Caleb
---
| | [LEARN MORE ABOUT VAFFC HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001puZ_gTFi0RDA5RFYYPOveWjYBWiierEbZ0tIbUa3A-dyIscBFrx7TArt8kgBG-JZhXP5lOX0bYUynIkmIGrU2Ctzu-qJb6xvbxlaTUC50fFBMeUy5GlTQJ3aP3DnyeqIBnLPGmE0500=&c=S-OVQlfDdk2bAR0PfZRGCVmTcMMUPsu3miJ_lGiUVzIWYGzWrxrFDw==&ch=nSYBh0B4onfOel-uramY-7qphz2ZGJ7iWyT8FHDmPE0dR-NNlf-7rA==)

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Clarence Thomas is a walking conflict-of-interest. His seat on this current Supreme Court gives him vast power over all our laws and lives. We need to do something.
disclaimer_text: paid for by a Hitler fetishist by giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Demand Justice?_**](https://default
body:
Judicial corruption in plain view
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T58b8013d-70e3-4bef-a976-031544da50c0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **Clarence Thomas is morally, intellectually and emotionally unfit to be a Supreme Court Justice.** __It's long been clear, from accusations of sexual harassment during and since Anita Hill to his cozy retreats with the Kochs, lack of understanding of our Constitution, statements to clerks that his mission was to "make liberals miserable" and refusal to recuse from cases involving sedition by his wife, Ginni.__ _Yet, as we recently discovered, it gets...worse. _**Harlan Crow, Texas billionaire who finances Republicans, has been taking Clarence & Ginni on extravagant yacht excursions and ultra-luxurious trips for years. One trip to Indonesia--one trip!--cost Crow $500,000! None of this was EVER reported in Thomas' financial disclosures, while Crow and affiliated orgs have had cases before the Supreme Court.** **_Also, I almost forgot, Crow has a Hitler fetish.__He owns two of The Fuhrer's paintings, a signed copy of Mein Kampf, Hitler's teapot with his engraved initials and a set of Nazi table linen. Crow proudly shows off these items._** _So, to be clear,_** Thomas has taken millions of dollars in undisclosed trips from a Nazi lover who has business before his court. Ya know, normal stuff!** **_Thomas must be impeached._**_ But, we don't have the numbers in Congress right now._ [**_So, Demand Justice is fighting to add members to The Court to dilute his power._** **_Will you join us in fighting a corrupt extremist bought & paid for by a Hitler fetishist by giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Demand Justice?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta8c0c879-ed1c-4ce7-8541-084bea8c8adf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for fighting to take corruption and hate out of our courts._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. subject: I just heard Joe Biden’s FBI got caught SPYING on Catholic organizations and even sending in an UNDERCOVER AGENT to collect intelligence on churchgoers.

body:
| |

---
| | | I won't mince words with you...

**My blood is boiling.**

I just heard Joe Biden's FBI got caught **SPYING** on Catholic organizations and even sending in an **UNDERCOVER AGENT** to collect intelligence on churchgoers.

**I'VE HAD IT!**

The Radical Left and Deep State operatives are targeting religious Americans like me, undermining our freedoms, and ripping apart the very fabric of our nation.

_I won 't let them get away with it._

_**[And I'm PLEADING with you to join me. I have a plan to defeat them but it relies on the support of strong Conservatives with the courage to stand up to the Radical Left and their Deep State allies >>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62553579:64HlK4GNv:m:1:3365131770:58141E24EC56178C4B45A943DF7F6D0B:r "And I’m
PLEADING with you to join me. I have a plan to defeat them but it relies on the support of strong Conservatives with the courage to stand up to the
Radical Left and their Deep State allies >>")**_

Listen:

If they're willing to deploy the FBI to infiltrate churches, then we have to be willing to stand up to them. They have rich and powerful friends so I'll admit this won't be easy, but it'll be worth it.

By my calculations, I'll need **AT LEAST** 10,000 strong Conservatives to step up to the plate or we won't have the resources to prevail.

_Can I count on you to be one of them? _

_**[There's no time to think. I need to hear from you right here and right now >>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62553579:64HlK4GNv:m:1:3365131770:58141E24EC56178C4B45A943DF7F6D0B:r "There’s no time to think. I need to hear from you right here and right now
>>")**_

For America,

Steve Scalise (Majority Leader)

name: Kash Patel
subject: BREAKING - J6 Choir tops music charts
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=57894ee3724b4c4aba9cc8c10e7f9254&_e=tvE8Jzsth_fz8VswanAFdNG5GRCN0Gdl_tQvimCHZfE8gnjlmopQEvaKSiyZpf0kV6bCiNeUAzvpzTl8MlCuH-KFUOMNA0meqbhkkwIWxrJINEMs2nFBvMvywQu90VvDp6An_KzAHqLf9jDIDHqCthiBD5B6iHmz9I2T4VMj8gJfcaydfY-tLcTdDs1efLoQUutT62pmL3FLZe4FK9It56EJSSnLyYBcJXU3XutOrvENBUxTuhj-OchGQo9pJJDyEJFqgaRLfD663JE5wDEH2g%3D%3D)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=57894ee3724b4c4aba9cc8c10e7f9254&_e=tvE8Jzsth_fz8VswanAFdNG5GRCN0Gdl_tQvimCHZfE8gnjlmopQEvaKSiyZpf0kV6bCiNeUAzvpzTl8MlCuH-KFUOMNA0meqbhkkwIWxrJINEMs2nFBvMvywQu90VvD3Enj4of9L-BO3ITbOCjH_vc0hNfw_q_jUH4CEeAFKQODwt86OaZGZKpQaceacAJUg6YR-eaYLB5vzPv0kdxDgv9-_zEtAshxLTya7OSgR7hI7mIIZxDpUl2rDdx9sT-d76zb0GF_vYqkSpQCUWUpTg%3D%3D)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=57894ee3724b4c4aba9cc8c10e7f9254&_e=tvE8Jzsth_fz8VswanAFdNG5GRCN0Gdl_tQvimCHZfE8gnjlmopQEvaKSiyZpf0kV6bCiNeUAzvpzTl8MlCuH-KFUOMNA0meqbhkkwIWxrJINEMs2nFBvMvywQu90VvD9SbbjC-7dpyLs7IL7HUVvZMrLnqHvDMCKaSHZVkdl4aTQ_0rFPz-RhMVfJJgh6QZjn2BsByIMcUHkX0cYO8Y-ljrCofRegmHtBTw1TisKDlCmfWRHsgEKeRpLkOFGm1-lhRVBSiaHbAkc7ypCOD3xg%3D%3D)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

Friend, Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? They sing the national anthem. And they have sung this song proudly every night for more than 700 straight nights. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag. We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need. The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts! We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.
