name: Karen Greenhalgh
subject: Barricaded, Berated, and Biased: Shame on them!
body:
| | |
---
Friend, Last week Riley Gaines, the rightful NCAA All American Champion female swimmer, was invited to speak at San Francisco State University. Instead of her presentation, she was relentlessly pursued by ‘open minded’ protestors who forced her into a room and assaulted her.
---
[| | |
---|---|---](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/cde31b14fc911578/e0946c50f4e464dac3d6b838967d376c/37923 "Swimmer Riley Gaines 'ambushed,' 'physically hit'")
| | It’s shameful! Assaulted and Barricaded because you have a political disagreement? The left will stop at nothing to silence conservatives. I was proud to stand with Riley this year to help protect women’s sports. Riley spoke on behalf of my bill to protect our girls and young women from being forced to compete against biological males. Riley shared her traumatic experience as I introduced **[HB1387, Fairness in Women’s Sports.](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/cde31b14fc911578/25a7f29e6ae642dac3d6b838967d376c/37923) **

[| | |

Our girls deserve better than to be shamed by the woke mob. This is common sense, women and men are different and girls deserve to train and achieve on their own merits. It’s science: women and men are not the same! I was proud to support Riley, proud to stand up for our girls and young women by keeping girls and boys sports in Virginia separate. I will be bringing the bill back in 2024; I will continue to speak up for our women and girls. We know the left will stop at nothing to prevent my re-election! Can you help ensure I get re-elected so I can stand up for common sense in the General Assembly?

| Governor Glenn Youngkin Endorsement
---
| Dear Friend,
I'm honored to have the support of my friend and our great Republican Governor Glenn Youngkin. I have spent two years fighting to get his agenda passed in the house only to watch much of it die in the Senate. We need to regain the majority in the Senate next year and send those bills to Governor Youngkin's desk and bring common sense back to our Commonwealth.
---
| | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001RBJplqt7mjfth3Pz8HHZ5CnEcOQjjS_Py09J7QObqyKaZ-LPBu06_YfR0x4lG4K9KgjG2DqQ-K9XC-yzyHIBnqVb7v28B9AAeG7gjvvEWLHVQmvw_gKn0t_sHeTleyKTz9Gb2faKgar-V3eAKoLRmyxkxKVgiu15SO5jsO3bobcumZaip98LDQ==&c=RE1Du-0K1T_R1C82Eh8ziq6Se83Vm7ElR2ZGXMiD71ZDxmfB-Tb52g==&ch=xPI8w6GoA_1ETPKiYdKSpZbhlLMdvj7RGWm9cXPyUWKdAV-n15nYUQ==) |
---|---
|
"Since day one, John McGuire has been a steadfast fighter for our agenda to restore parental rights and bring common sense back to the Commonwealth. John's a Navy SEAL who has gotten results for Virginians in the House of Delegates. In the Senate, he will help us deliver on our kitchen table conservative agenda. I trust John, and Virginians in Senate District 10 can trust him too. I ask everyone to join me in supporting John McGuire in the convention on May 6th."
| SD 10 Convention Update
---
| All delegates are asked to be at Buckingham H.S. on May 6th between 8:30-10am. Arriving early will ensure that you are able to get in to vote before the doors close. Please send an email to john@mcguireforvirginia.com if you have any questions.
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001RBJplqt7mjfth3Pz8HHZ5CnEcOQjjS_Py09J7QObqyKaZ-LPBu06_cDQRCZFdCctg7VR2PEvJyVP518oImvrCVboC2SlUi_YTfIbWkCFamfaYWAgjWr2FkWfIIBCnH-B4BJEHA1eLsOnxeQyoION7eo_lY8dfO3Rp9TxvDm00YAGqFNxxY02yOjLPpGjbFTzdcprg9Rzo-OawnpIaF4s13jtzRI_OSUkN4Uxfzdg9-_nQRKjxPLIPwCdL1FGEd1x&c=RE1Du-0K1T_R1C82Eh8ziq6Se83Vm7ElR2ZGXMiD71ZDxmfB-Tb52g==&ch=xPI8w6GoA_1ETPKiYdKSpZbhlLMdvj7RGWm9cXPyUWKdAV-n15nYUQ==)

| I'm running for State Senate so we can un-California Virginia. It starts with election integrity. For a better future, we must win back the Virginia State Senate in 2023 and stop the madness. I invite you and your friends to join me in this cause.
I am committed, as your Representative, to adhering to the principal duties of government, as stated in our Declaration of Independence, i.e., the protection of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness.
Thank you, once again, for allowing me to serve you in the Virginia House of Delegates. Take care, please spread the word and I look forward to seeing you around the district!
---

I have spent two years fighting to get his agenda passed in the house only to watch much of it die in the Senate. We need to regain the majority in the Senate next year and send those bills to Governor Youngkin's desk and bring common sense back to our Commonwealth. | | == | ---|--- | "Since day one, John McGuire has been a steadfast fighter for our agenda to restore parental rights and bring common sense back to the Commonwealth. John's a Navy SEAL who has gotten results for Virginians in the House of Delegates. In the Senate, he will help us deliver on our kitchen table conservative agenda. I trust John, and Virginians in Senate District 10 can trust him too. I ask everyone to join me in supporting John McGuire in the convention on May 6th." | SD 10 Convention Update | All delegates are asked to be at Buckingham H.S. on May 6th between 8:30-10am. Arriving early will ensure that you are able to get in to vote before the doors close. name: Sean Spicer
subject: With a heavy heart, I just announced...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
| |
---
| | | Hey - this is Sean Spicer:

With a heavy heart, I just announced I'm parting ways with Newsmax. My show reached millions and helped viewers see what's _really_ happening in our country. Something the Mainstream Media fails to do time and time again.

_**[But with that in the rearview mirror, I'm thrilled at what's coming next...](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62552851:JXCnD4GNd:m:1:3391001263:12A73C2D7210249C5FF4889FFD38225E:r "But with that in the rearview mirror, I’m thrilled at what’s coming next... ")**_

---
| | | [READ MY FULL STATEMENT >>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62552851:JXCnD4GNd:m:1:3391001263:12A73C2D7210249C5FF4889FFD38225E:r "READ MY FULL STATEMENT >>")
---

The 2024 election will be the single most important one in the history of our country. Joe Biden and Democrats in Congress have set our country into a tailspin. It's an emergency situation and we're running dangerously short on time to change course.

We have our work cut out for us ahead of 2024:

- Fire Joe Biden and retake the presidency
- Expand our razor-thin Majority in the House
- Win back the Senate and send Chuck Schumer into retirement

**The Democrats aren 't going to give us an inch... so we have no choice but to 1) outwork, 2) outsmart, and - most importantly - 3) outraise them. **

Unfortunately, that last point is the most important. Why? Because no one works harder than strong Conservatives like you. And Republicans are WINNING on the issues - they can't outsmart us when we're the ones fighting for freedom, defending our country and flag, and resisting their radical woke agenda.

But Democrats have a MAJOR advantage in fundraising thanks to their armies of Hollywood megadonors and woke Liberals whipping out their credit cards whenever they flip on MSNBC.

_**[Look- if we want to win in 2024, it's going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62552850:JXCnD4GNd:m:1:3391001263:12A73C2D7210249C5FF4889FFD38225E:r "Look – if we want to win in 2024, it’s going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW. ")**_

That's why I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME THIS YEAR. We ran the numbers on what it'll take to outraise the Democrats and pull off an overwhelming victory.

We came to the conclusion that if every last one of you donated, we would have the resources to MAX OUT all our voter contact budgets, GOTV operations, and volunteer recruitment efforts.

_In other words ... if everyone here steps up RIGHT NOW, the Democrats would suffer a defeat like nothing we've ever seen before._

**But that 's a big "if" - it requires 100% participation. **

This plan falls apart if too many folks sit out. We need everyone on board to pull this off.

So I'll cut to the chase.

_**[From the bottom of my heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution? If we can pull this off, we'll make history.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62552850:JXCnD4GNd:m:1:3391001263:12A73C2D7210249C5FF4889FFD38225E:r "From the bottom
of my heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution between $27 and $54? If we can pull this off, we’ll make history.")**_

Are you in?

---
**[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62552850:JXCnD4GNd:m:1:3391001263:12A73C2D7210249C5FF4889FFD38225E:r)[**YES >>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62552850:JXCnD4GNd:m:1:3391001263:12A73C2D7210249C5FF4889FFD38225E:r)_[**NO >>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62552850:JXCnD4GNd:m:1:3391001263:12A73C2D7210249C5FF4889FFD38225E:r)**
---

More from me soon,
Sean Spicer

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62552850:JXCnD4GNd:m:1:3391001263:12A73C2D7210249C5FF4889FFD38225E:r "image")
---
* * *
---
|
---

---

body:
Today marks 100 days since extreme MAGA Republicans took control of the House.

I need you to read this very closely, Peter.
Today marks 100 days since extreme MAGA Republicans took control of the House.
That’s 100 days of anti-choice extremists working to eviscerate reproductive rights. 100 days of House Republicans scheming to cut our Social Security and Medicare. 100 days of the GOP undermining our democracy.
[_**But Peter, if I can gather 1,937 gifts before midnight, we’ll outraise and overshadow Republicans on their 100th day in the majority. We are working tirelessly to protect our progress, but we need your help. Will you chip in $15 in this defining moment? **_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61735905/401012835/1662333042?refcode=20230413_em_fr_b1_jeffries_30_op_v1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Nzc1ZTZhNi0wN2RhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VovYz_eyBiE0uJb_uoq_wYjAFSwaUfC5BDg20QS7jSA=)
In just 100 days in the majority, extreme MAGA Republicans have tried to:

– Cut Social Security and Medicare
– Ban books, bully children and bury American history
– Explode the deficit with tax breaks for billionaires
House Democrats are working day and night to stop extremism in its tracks and continue getting things done for the American people.
But extreme MAGA Republicans have wasted no time amassing $35 million to defeat House Democrats and hold onto their razor-thin majority.
[_**If we’re going to compete with Team Extreme’s war chest and reclaim the House, we need to build a massive network of grassroots supporters to protect every battleground seat and recruit strong candidates. That’s why I’m relying on 1,937 people like you to step up before midnight and help Democrats outraise and overshadow Republicans on their 100th day in the majority. Extreme MAGA Republicans stand in the way of progress. Too much is on the line for us to miss a single goal. Can you chip in $15 before midnight? >> **_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61735907/401012839/1662333042?refcode=20230413_em_fr_b1_jeffries_30_op_v1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Nzc1ZTZhNi0wN2RhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VovYz_eyBiE0uJb_uoq_wYjAFSwaUfC5BDg20QS7jSA=)

name: Jon Tester
subject: I’m running for reelection
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Montanans for Tester
body:
|
#
_Jon Tester relies on grassroots folks like you to help fuel our movement. But if you would like to unsubscribe, you can[**here.**](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/9Vvzbq3f4k2zOTCiWhTGJA2?unsubscribedata=lVrSMiwQmKm5h6u0F9IFsPZJ%2FsuZ%2B8%2BT9a7S61YyBTlpFEklbF0U55s%2BEK7bqb54g%2FwTnm2wom0UWBk69G48bhIYasgt40HAzJfeYRafsqZGihsshK4yxsg4NqQn0L60tVkPz1vSU4WC5DwesvOdoP0uN%2Fsc0jCIs%2BnVXqfZ28Ck1dxNuzDuW4ZRp0Ezh2%2B%2F%2B2Jr%2Fns8tnzonY26PzMvihlz0ZShzpopIxRt7zD%2FWS4X1Y4VIeoWUAbnIhQWZkQzMs6n%2BzVA%2FG2RWq3raTCxXe7872aXELtiEMZo%2BZzIxPpcNjLDjKmvqIwr4dDslSRdzMBR0KXvr2VGMTIZ6jkVVWDCvszoPBZSk%2F6vrwQjJ0DwVLUBW6S6ajNf4WC%2Bs9EZ0%2B6lxYQwwbM%2BXkK2IswE%2BOnjnWb0SNdW33wEMg2gZftYsv9PW%2BQKD78d7lbXJG6E)_ Peter: **I’m officially running for reelection here in Montana. ** I know this race won’t be easy, but my fight for working families isn’t done yet. [_**Will you sign on right now to become an official endorser of my campaign? If I’m going to win this thing, I’ll need you by my side from the start.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61738453/401021950/-1486329510?refcode=AU_RJT_EG_WEL_PET_NTL_202304_SR1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTA4Nzg3Ni0wY2RhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HCjGNsyyyu2YbC4UPjTs8fsXUu8A97r57agPwSACRKM=&emci=4d072b41-8ed5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=6a087876-0cda-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=26274988) | | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61738454/401021951/-1486329510?refcode=AU_RJT_EG_WEL_PET_NTL_202304_SR1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTA4Nzg3Ni0wY2RhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HCjGNsyyyu2YbC4UPjTs8fsXUu8A97r57agPwSACRKM=&emci=4d072b41-8ed5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=6a087876-0cda-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=26274988)
---
I first ran for office because I didn’t see anyone sticking up for dirt farmers like me. In the years since, I’ve demanded that Washington work for the people, fought to get veterans the health care they’ve earned, and ensured Montanans have someone defending our values in the United States Senate.
**And that’s exactly what I’ll continue to do when I’m reelected. **
I’m not like most of my colleagues, and it’s not too hard to spot the differences. I’m the only working farmer in the U.S. Senate, and damn proud of it. My wife Sharla and I still work the very same land my grandparents farmed more than 100 years ago.
They didn’t know the meaning of the word “quit.” And neither do I. Our work in the Senate is not done. That’s why I’m running.
**I’m running to fight for rural America.** I live on a farm without reliable cell service, and home is a town measured in the hundreds of people — so when I say I understand what rural Americans face, I mean it. I am focused on delivering real results for small towns across Montana, and am excited to see the impact of increased access to high speed internet in rural Montana as a result of my _Bipartisan Infrastructure Law_ — but there’s still work to be done.
**I’m running to make sure our veterans get the health care and services they’ve earned.** Our nation’s veterans held up their end of the bargain — defending our democracy and protecting our freedom. Too often, they return home and don’t receive the benefits they’ve been promised. **Enough is enough.**
**I’m running to get the job done for working families.** At a time when the economy’s just not working for regular folks, and your bills are too high, you need a Senator who knows the price of a gallon of gas — not some out-of-touch politician who spends their free time cozying up to Republican special interests.
It won’t be easy. Mitch McConnell and his allies see me as a top target in their fight to take back the Senate — they’re _already_ running ads attacking me. I’m the most vulnerable Senator running for reelection right now, and experts are rating my race as a toss-up. **But I know how to win tough fights. I’ve done it before as one of the only Democrats in a red state to win in 2018 — and I’ll do it again. **
[_**I can’t do it without your support, Peter. Can I count on you to step up and add your personal endorsement to my campaign today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61738455/401021952/-1486329510?refcode=AU_RJT_EG_WEL_PET_NTL_202304_SR1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTA4Nzg3Ni0wY2RhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HCjGNsyyyu2YbC4UPjTs8fsXUu8A97r57agPwSACRKM=&emci=4d072b41-8ed5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=6a087876-0cda-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=26274988)
| [ADD YOUR ENDORSEMENT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61738456/401021953/-1486329510?refcode=AU_RJT_EG_WEL_PET_NTL_202304_SR1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTA4Nzg3Ni0wY2RhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HCjGNsyyyu2YbC4UPjTs8fsXUu8A97r57agPwSACRKM=&emci=4d072b41-8ed5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=6a087876-0cda-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=26274988)
---
The truth is, whether you’re from our cities and towns or live on a family farm like me, we all want the same thing from our elected officials: Someone who listens to us and stands up for our values.
It’s been the honor of my life to represent Montanans in the United States Senate. I’m fired up and excited for the road ahead, and I’m grateful to have you by my side through it all.
Thanks,
Jon

Paid for by Montanans for Tester
---
We believe that emails are the best way for us to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, click [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61738457/401021954/1929306984?refcode=AU_RJT_EG_WEL_PET_NTL_202304_SR1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTA4Nzg3Ni0wY2RhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HCjGNsyyyu2YbC4UPjTs8fsXUu8A97r57agPwSACRKM=&emci=4d072b41-8ed5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=6a087876-0cda-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=26274988). Click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/9Vvzbq3f4k2zOTCiWhTGJA2?unsubscribedata=lVrSMiwQmKm5h6u0F9IFsPZJ%2FsuZ%2B8%2BT9a7S61YyBTlpFEklbF0U55s%2BEK7bqb54g%2FwTnm2wom0UWBk69G48bhIYasgt40HAzJfeYRafsqZGihsshK4yxsg4NqQn0L60tVkPz1vSU4WC5DwesvOdoP0uN%2Fsc0jCIs%2BnVXqfZ28Ck1dxNuzDuW4ZRp0Ezh2%2B%2F%2B2Jr%2Fns8tnzonY26PzMvihlz0ZShzpopIxRt7zD%2FWS4X1Y4VIeoWUAbnIhQWZkQzMs6n%2BzVA%2FG2RWq3raTCxXe7872aXELtiEMZo%2BZzIxPpcNjLDjKmvqIwr4dDslSRdzMBR0KXvr2VGMTIZ6jkVVWDCvszoPBZSk%2F6vrwQjJ0DwVLUBW6S6ajNf4WC%2Bs9EZ0%2B6lxYQwwbM%2BXkK2IswE%2BOnjnWb0SNdW33wEMg2gZftYsv9PW%2BQKD78d7lbXJG6E).
Montanans for Tester

Helena, MT 59624

name: Allen West
subject: We’re suing Washington D.C. and we need your help
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62553371:61bXW4GJN:m:1:3391001263:D856A0E613F3267E50E15A6743ED1F99:r)
---
| | Peter, The radical left is doing everything they can to keep law-abiding American citizens from carrying firearms. This tyranny must be put to a stop. I'll get right to the point - Washington D.C. has banned all magazines capable of carrying more than 10 rounds of ammunition. **This means that several commonly carried handguns used for self-defense are totally prohibited in D.C. - where crime has been SKYROCKETING for the last several years. ** We're fighting back with a critical lawsuit, in fact **_we have a hearing THIS WEEK,_** but we need your help immediately. [**Which is why I 'm asking you to make an urgent donation to the Second Amendment Institute to help fund our lawsuit against Washington D.C.'s tyrannical magazine ban.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62553371:61bXW4GJN:m:1:3391001263:D856A0E613F3267E50E15A6743ED1F99:r) The Second Amendment Institute is a 501(c)3 organization that fights at the frontline in defense of your 2A rights. No other 2A rights organization in the country possesses such a diverse team and unique opportunity to effectively combat the radical gun-grabbing agenda. When we found out about the radical left's plan to ban commonly carried magazines SAI leapt into action. Without hesitation, we joined a lawsuit to stop this tyranny before it gets any worse. **But with the preliminary hearing scheduled for THIS WEEK, I 'm coming to you for support. ** You see, these lawsuits aren't cheap to file, but they're our only defense against the repeated encroachment on our right to keep and bear arms. [**So, I hope you 'll join the fight with an urgent gift today as we head into the court room in just a couple of days.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62553371:61bXW4GJN:m:1:3391001263:D856A0E613F3267E50E15A6743ED1F99:r) Washington D.C.'s magazine ban is dangerous for two reasons. First, as you may have seen in the news, violent crime in D.C. is rising, and the prohibition on the magazines places law-abiding American citizens at risk in the event of a deadly force criminal attack by limiting the number of rounds they may rapidly bring to bear to protect their lives. Second, if this ban is allowed to stand, it's only a matter of time before it spreads to other states and the limit is taken down to 5, then 2, and then guns are banned completely. It's a slippery slope to tyranny and it's up to you and me to make sure it stops here and now. [**Take a stand with SAI today by making a critical gift today and help us defend the Second Amendment.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62553371:61bXW4GJN:m:1:3391001263:D856A0E613F3267E50E15A6743ED1F99:r) Thank you in advance for standing with us. In Freedom,
---
Lieutenant Colonel Allen B. West (US Army, Retired) Member, 112th US Congress Board Member, Second Amendment Institute
---
[**DEFEND 2A TODAY**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62553371:61bXW4GJN:m:1:3391001263:D856A0E613F3267E50E15A6743ED1F99:r)
---

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Tell Kroger no more toxic pesticides on food
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1718847?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | Friend, right now, people are picking food grown with _**TOXIC PESTICIDES** _off store shelves to feed their children and family members. They might not know that these chemicals have been linked to **cancer, learning disabilities, hormone disruption, and more!** Imagine spending your hard-earned money at the grocery store, carefully selecting fresh produce to create a nutritious meal for your family, only to later learn that the food might be contaminated with harmful pesticides. This is a reality that none of us should have to face. **Despite mounting evidence that toxic pesticides are harmful to people and the planet, Kroger, one of the nation’s largest grocery retailers, continues to sell pesticide-contaminated food to its customers.** Rather than commit to selling more sustainably grown, healthy, and organic foods and shifting away from toxic pesticides, Kroger continues to prioritize profit over the well-being of people like you and me. **We need your voice to be heard, Friend. Kroger is having its Annual General Meeting in just a few months when it will make important decisions -- NOW is a critical time to make your voice heard! [Friend, please demand Kroger stop selling food grown with TOXIC PESTICIDES and protect the health of families across the country by 11:59pm TONIGHT!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1718848?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1718849?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Glyphosate, a chemical found in many foods, has been linked to severe health impacts. A recent study found that _**80% of U.S. children and adults had traces of glyphosate in their bodies. That’s a staggering figure -- and children are especially vulnerable to pesticide health impacts.**_
It doesn’t have to be this way, Friend. Our food can be produced without toxic pesticides sustainably and at-scale, protecting our health and the health of our planet. **We need YOU to help push Kroger to act![If just 1 of every 8 people reading this email takes action, we can send Kroger a POWERFUL MESSAGE before its meeting this spring. Act now and FIGHT toxic pesticides!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1718850?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1718849?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Paolo Mutia
Food and agriculture campaigner,
Friends of the Earth**
|

name: Sean Spicer
subject: I’m parting ways with Newsmax. Here’s what I’m up to now:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME THIS YEAR.

| |

---
| | | Hey - this is Sean Spicer:

With a heavy heart, I just announced I’m parting ways with Newsmax. My show reached millions and helped viewers see what’s _really_ happening in our country. Something the Mainstream Media fails to do time and time again.

_**[But with that in the rearview mirror, I’m thrilled at what’s coming next...](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79850%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jL70WW9trxQrwgcLMzB1Rw&sysid=1 "But with that in the
rearview mirror, I’m thrilled at what’s coming next... ")**_

---
| | | [READ MY FULL STATEMENT >>](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79851%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Hk9PzAYq0wDDUaICiXIskA&sysid=1 "READ MY FULL STATEMENT")
---

The 2024 election will be the single most important one in the history of our country. Joe Biden and Democrats in Congress have set our country into a tailspin. It’s an emergency situation and we’re running dangerously short on time to change course.

We have our work cut out for us ahead of 2024:

- Fire Joe Biden and retake the presidency
- Expand our razor-thin Majority in the House
- Win back the Senate and send Chuck Schumer into retirement

**The Democrats aren’t going to give us an inch ... so we have no choice but to 1) outwork, 2) outsmart, and - most importantly - 3) outraise them. **

Unfortunately, that last point is the most important. Why? Because no one works harder than strong Conservatives like you. And Republicans are WINNING on the issues - they can’t outsmart us when we’re the ones fighting for freedom, defending our country and flag, and resisting their radical woke agenda.

But Democrats have a MAJOR advantage in fundraising thanks to their armies of Hollywood megadonors and woke Liberals whipping out their credit cards whenever they flip on MSNBC.

_**[Look- if we want to win in 2024, it’s going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW.](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79852%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OuHbVxRnGPWsAFgV1BizpQ&sysid=1 "Look – if we want to
win in 2024, it’s going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW. ")**_

That’s why I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME THIS YEAR. We ran the numbers on what it’ll take to outraise the Democrats and pull off an overwhelming victory.

We came to the conclusion that if every last one of you gave between $27 and $54, we would have the resources to MAX OUT all our voter contact budgets, GOTV operations, and volunteer recruitment efforts.

_In other words ... if everyone here steps up RIGHT NOW, the Democrats would suffer a defeat like nothing we’ve ever seen before._

**But that’s a big “if” - it requires 100% participation. **

This plan falls apart if too many folks sit out. We need everyone on board to pull this off.

So I’ll cut to the chase.

_**[From the bottom of my heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution between $27 and $54? If we can pull this off, we’ll make history.](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79853%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=sgRkQsemamNcr2hzwvGc8w&sysid=1 "From the bottom of my
heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution between $27 and $54?
If we can pull this off, we’ll make history.")**_

Are you in?

---
**[](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79854%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZhNuDKCIybWop1kQ9hL0Sw&sysid=1)[**YES >>**](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79865%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6ZUrYA3zEj6BxWkz9hKBnA&sysid=1)_[**NO >>**](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79866%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=sZZ%2fwLafs6jKeKt5ZiQxSg&sysid=1)**
---

More from me soon,
Sean Spicer

---

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Lauren Boebert has a Republican primary challenger. But why replace her with only a slightly-less-bad version? Why not an experienced, intelligent, hard-working Democrat, Adam Frisch, to protect abortion rights, ban assault rifles and fight MAGA attacks on democracy?
body:
Boebert, go home
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc55a9463-eaff-4461-bd6b-0c6dd280dc83/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **A right wing challenger jumped into a primary race to take on treasonous ignoramus, Lauren Boebert, in her reelection attempt. **_The conservative challenger, Russ Andrews, is wrong about pretty much everything. _ _But he did describe her pretty well to the Aspen Daily News:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T411c52bf-ae75-4c96-bc07-164e20244600/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _All true. Definitely the "moving on" part.**_ _**_**_But why replace Boebert with only a slightly-less-bad version? Why not an experienced, intelligent, hard-working Democrat, Adam Frisch, to protect abortion rights, ban assault rifles and fight MAGA attacks on democracy?_** **_Boebert will likely survive her primary challenge, as the craziest MAGAs turn out. Yet, with less money and more baggage by the time Andrews is done with her._** **_You may remember Frish came within 546 votes of ousting her last time. This will help us finish off the job!_** [**_So, will you give Adam Frisch $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can so Boebert can "move on" and be replaced by a patriot & statesman in Congress?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbd0013b7-1770-4a0c-8bef-6d0024d27792/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for staying in this fight._ Cliff

---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T23d5a6d0-be81-4a50-abf8-fecd26732476/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Sean Spicer
subject: I’m parting ways with Newsmax. Here’s what I’m up to now:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME THIS YEAR.

| |

---
| | | Hey - this is Sean Spicer:

With a heavy heart, I just announced I'm parting ways with Newsmax. My show reached millions and helped viewers see what's _really_ happening in our country. Something the Mainstream Media fails to do time and time again.

_**[But with that in the rearview mirror, I'm thrilled at what's coming next...](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9ieto79e4080up5f14c9elhgcmqr60o08pfn4jg_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5g68or2c3h2bs "But with that in the rearview mirror, I’m thrilled at what’s coming next...")**_

---
| | | [READ MY FULL STATEMENT >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zi8nfq545bje5jhq4u937r0ap22cmomincvphtj8_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5g68or2c3h2bs "READ MY FULL STATEMENT")
---

The 2024 election will be the single most important one in the history of our country. Joe Biden and Democrats in Congress have set our country into a tailspin. It's an emergency situation and we're running dangerously short on time to change course.

We have our work cut out for us ahead of 2024:

- Fire Joe Biden and retake the presidency
- Expand our razor-thin Majority in the House
- Win back the Senate and send Chuck Schumer into retirement

**The Democrats aren 't going to give us an inch... so we have no choice but to 1) outwork, 2) outsmart, and - most importantly - 3) outraise them. **

Unfortunately, that last point is the most important. Why? Because no one works harder than strong Conservatives like you. And Republicans are WINNING on the issues - they can't outsmart us when we're the ones fighting for freedom, defending our country and flag, and resisting their radical woke agenda.

But Democrats have a MAJOR advantage in fundraising thanks to their armies of Hollywood megadonors and woke Liberals whipping out their credit cards whenever they flip on MSNBC.

_**[Look- if we want to win in 2024, it's going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zu0m933othsie4c0pd69kdho4e8reuhci03vbvfo_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5g68or2c3h2bs "Look – if we want to win in 2024, it’s going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW.")**_

That's why I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME THIS YEAR. We ran the numbers on what it'll take to outraise the Democrats and pull off an overwhelming victory.

We came to the conclusion that if every last one of you gave between $27 and $54, we would have the resources to MAX OUT all our voter contact budgets, GOTV operations, and volunteer recruitment efforts.

_In other words ... if everyone here steps up RIGHT NOW, the Democrats would suffer a defeat like nothing we've ever seen before._

**But that 's a big "if" - it requires 100% participation. **

This plan falls apart if too many folks sit out. We need everyone on board to pull this off.

So I'll cut to the chase.

_**[>From the bottom of my heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution between $27 and $54? If we can pull this off, we'll make history.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zp1nvdg5i6bmkdvtvjgbel9inrae14fhoanaqsjo_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5g68or2c3h2bs "From the bottom of my heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution between $27 and $54? If we can pull this off, we’ll make history.")**_

Are you in?

---
**[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z84nnr0v85vr9gd8gpsb5p2l7cd8g9uel4pfjul0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5g68or2c3h2bs)[**YES >>**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zethe7mv3vlqa3eqfnjju1mofbmq8cten5etj4k8_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5g68or2c3h2bs)_[**NO >>**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1i19l2qh3f95m5t933gjdns72quph7cbn8css8o_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5g68or2c3h2bs)**
---

More from me soon,
Sean Spicer

clean_body: I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME THIS YEAR. | | | | | Hey - this is Sean Spicer: With a heavy heart, I just announced I'm parting ways with Newsmax. My show reached millions and helped viewers see what's really happening in our country. Something the Mainstream Media fails to do time and time again. "But with that in the rearview mirror, I’m thrilled at what’s coming next..." | | | "READ MY FULL STATEMENT" The 2024 election will be the single most important one in the history of our country. Joe Biden and Democrats in Congress have set our country into a tailspin. It's an emergency situation and we're running dangerously short on time to change course. We have our work cut out for us ahead of 2024: - Fire Joe Biden and retake the presidency - Expand our razor-thin Majority in the House - Win back the Senate and send Chuck Schumer into retirement The Democrats aren 't going to give us an inch... so we have no choice but to 1) outwork, 2) outsmart, and - most importantly - 3) outraise them. Unfortunately, that last point is the most important. Why? Because no one works harder than strong Conservatives like you. And Republicans are WINNING on the issues - they can't outsmart us when we're the ones fighting for freedom, defending our country and flag, and resisting their radical woke agenda. But Democrats have a MAJOR advantage in fundraising thanks to their armies of Hollywood megadonors and woke Liberals whipping out their credit cards whenever they flip on MSNBC. "Look – if we want to win in 2024, it’s going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW." That's why I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME THIS YEAR. We ran the numbers on what it'll take to outraise the Democrats and pull off an overwhelming victory. We came to the conclusion that if every last one of you gave between $27 and $54, we would have the resources to MAX OUT all our voter contact budgets, GOTV operations, and volunteer recruitment efforts. In other words ... if everyone here steps up RIGHT NOW, the Democrats would suffer a defeat like nothing we've ever seen before. But that 's a big "if" - it requires 100% participation. This plan falls apart if too many folks sit out. We need everyone on board to pull this off. So I'll cut to the chase. "From the bottom of my heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution between $27 and $54? If we can pull this off, we’ll make history." Are you in? More from me soon, Sean Spicer | "image" * | | | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. Team Scalise is committed to defending our Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement. Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without “green cards,” and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of each individual who contributes over $200 in a calendar year. 1600 Daily 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

Fellow American, _"Racketeer for Life"_ That's what the Abortion Cartel has labelled me and unfortunately for them, it's a title I wear proudly. I'm a racketeer for a reason. I wake up each morning with a God-given mandate to save the unborn - and also unfortunately for them, I'm very good at it. I've shut down hundreds of abortion clinics, uncovered dozens of devil-worshipping abortionists, and exposed Planned Parenthood for selling aborted baby parts. Now, the Abortion Cartel is suing me for $18,000,000 and the case is heading to the Supreme Court... I need your help to fight back! name: Jon Tester
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Hey folks, Jon Tester here.
I’m not like most of my colleagues in the Senate, and it’s not too hard to see why. All you have to do is look at my $12 flattop haircut and my collection of dirt-stained t-shirts.
I’m the Senate’s only working farmer, and damn proud of it.
Yes, it can make for early mornings and late nights during planting and harvest seasons — but it keeps me grounded, and gives me a unique perspective on issues. Like how climate change affects my farm, or how rural communities like mine need high-speed internet.
These are real challenges that deserve real solutions, and that’s what I’m fighting for in Washington. But political experts rank my seat as one of the most likely to flip red, so I need your help to beat the odds and win this critical race:
Can you split a donation between Seth Moulton and my campaign? We need to raise another $1,000,000 to reach our goal. Anything you can give helps. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
This will be one of the most competitive races of 2024, and I’ll need your help from the very beginning to build a team strong enough to win.
Thank you,
Jon
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]

body:
This is your LAST chance.

---

**Are you there? I still haven 't heard back from you...**

Friend,

It's Kevin McCarthy. Because you are one of our _**TOP**_ patriots, I am giving you _**one last chance**_ to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership and confirm you are a patriot willing to fight for the future of our country. **[Will you please confirm before the deadline passes?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1a88qq4r59nbgbcnhfcbdv5lc5a91fi6nqqoef8_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5g64pb6cph2bs "Will you please confirm before the deadline passes?")**

| | **I’m coming up on a mid-month deadline in just two days, and I need every patriot to step up.**

**Let me go over why this deadline is so important:**
* I won my last election with less than 1% of the vote - and this election could be even closer.
* Florida is PROOF that conservative policies work, and that makes us a top target for the Left.
* If we fall behind on our fundraising now, we’ll be starting 2024 off on the wrong foot - and we may never be able to get our footing back.

Mariela Roca here – It's a new year, new district, with new challenges, but I'm still fighting for the same conservative values that I believe can get America back on track. _**I am running to Represent Maryland's 6th District in the House of Representatives in 2024.**__****_ Peter, after seeing radical left-wing ideals creep into every facet of our society, culture, education, and economy, I decided that I couldn't wait around. _**I****t's up to us to be the change that we want to see. **_ I can't sit back and watch the left topple the foundational values that make America the greatest country in the world. I'm committed to creating a better America for my two kids and millions of others who, like me, have taken hit after hit under the Biden administration's **"regressive** " policies. [_**Will you be a part of my team by helping me kick off my campaign with a donation of $6 or more to get us started?**_](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=270ad825d56a49ba87f38e53284ca32a&_m=711190f6fc0f4868a68abc80ed136053&_e=b8kYUW3wu9mQ8fRcAQPTPWZJDIaI5Oz2gO4V2zKYldi1XxFaWXaXT1BR9383YJ0QIG7bEyjseW5BSpT_yVjgv23a7v3X1cfq0T_b9eowNRxxwJgInMs4m3JHf2IRenPe3Hvf89XWEt3EvMypMnPnlHyPhbgocjX3A1jBX4FVKcl_FogFLTtsMqdjh74RjQwNE6aEkW5j5YPpPtzj17kgC9hIctuB4Mj7LVCr2EOr0iUG5OhgNwF7vFHcDuNMwTxODXGlGj7IMxIv24ZeqqJdUw%3D%3D)
---
[Rush $6 Today!](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=270ad825d56a49ba87f38e53284ca32a&_m=711190f6fc0f4868a68abc80ed136053&_e=b8kYUW3wu9mQ8fRcAQPTPWZJDIaI5Oz2gO4V2zKYldi1XxFaWXaXT1BR9383YJ0QIG7bEyjseW5BSpT_yVjgv23a7v3X1cfq0T_b9eowNRzpxMdzOHnTFHmcJFkSnGHbjNv-7on1ZBDL9gZ4hEI-Y57UvTy3Md7vqxMFDLbotwwYs3VJV3L6yQVbOk3m2_pSDREkRpVJPc3R1oLs8lLf09u53sFYc11SfBf6rSgGtnyQsZs9NlFJ6omjNCQsxLpGkHiJnPG3Ez0HJOSiI4EogA%3D%3D)
---
_**My story embodies the American Dream.**_ For those of you still getting to know me, I was born in Puerto Rico. I served in the U.S. Air Force, completing my tour of duty in 2010. After the Air Force, I moved to Frederick and earned my Doctorate in Business Administration from the University of Maryland Global Campus. For years I worked at the Department of Defense supporting our troops with Medical Logistics support. Then at the Department of Veteran Affairs, I worked to ensure that our often forgotten and overlooked Veterans are taken care of – something that I still fight for. I'm now running for Congress because Maryland and America NEED strong leadership. [**_This is your chance to be a crucial part of the change that Maryland needs by chipping in just $6 today!_**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=270ad825d56a49ba87f38e53284ca32a&_m=711190f6fc0f4868a68abc80ed136053&_e=b8kYUW3wu9mQ8fRcAQPTPWZJDIaI5Oz2gO4V2zKYldi1XxFaWXaXT1BR9383YJ0QIG7bEyjseW5BSpT_yVjgv23a7v3X1cfq0T_b9eowNRzpxMdzOHnTFHmcJFkSnGHbCp50e94jU5uuAUkGD0qiGD65z37sI3fCw-yDBVQSDNqRvhrCZ77HoV0Zmzg5eeZeK2bp728n1NsornOrOGoDc0ENVPr54WZzsl2aN7lva11JEkCqXT64LTOZRRIf4NnJ6Kz1NNA_iZuwrZ3cmygYsQ%3D%3D) I'm fighting for YOU! clean_body: | | | | | Mariela Roca here – It's a new year, new district, with new challenges, but I'm still fighting for the same conservative values that I believe can get America back on track. I am running to Represent Maryland's 6th District in the House of Representatives in 2024.** Peter, after seeing radical left-wing ideals creep into every facet of our society, culture, education, and economy, I decided that I couldn't wait around. I**t's up to us to be the change that we want to see. I can't sit back and watch the left topple the foundational values that make America the greatest country in the world. I'm committed to creating a better America for my two kids and millions of others who, like me, have taken hit after hit under the Biden administration's "regressive " policies. My story embodies the American Dream. For those of you still getting to know me, I was born in Puerto Rico. I served in the U.S. Air Force, completing my tour of duty in 2010. After the Air Force, I moved to Frederick and earned my Doctorate in Business Administration from the University of Maryland Global Campus. For years I worked at the Department of Defense supporting our troops with Medical Logistics support. Then at the Department of Veteran Affairs, I worked to ensure that our often forgotten and overlooked Veterans are taken care of – something that I still fight for. I'm now running for Congress because Maryland and America NEED strong leadership. I'm fighting for YOU! Thank you, Mariela Roca Candidate for Maryland's 6th District P.S. - Please help me spread my message of common-sense conservative politics by forwarding this email to friends and family. | | | | | | |

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Trust
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
I understand the value of a dollar. There will be Marine efficiency with these donations. No wasted dollars.
#

I grew up poor.
I understand the value of a dollar.
So I do not take these fundraising asks lightly.
That’s why I want you to know you can trust me when I ask you to contribute $3.
You can trust that we actually need that $3 to reach our goals.
You can trust that we need to reach our goals to win this race.
And you can trust that we will put that $3 to good use. Marine efficiency. No wasted dollars.
I thought that was important to share with you, Peter.
Especially since we are short of our goals and just a few days away from our mid-month fundraising deadline.
So please:
[**Can you use this link and make today the day you make your first online $3 contribution to our campaign. Please do trust I would not ask if it were not so important.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-apr23.gQdVKi&refcode=em230413-1-onb&t=1&akid=551%2E734936%2ELZsBhp)

name: Riley Gaines
subject: Ambushed and assaulted
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Nine PAC
body:
There is a disturbing trend on the left

| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z7rqf3q38eam4q8j4ke52l9i9crv98stsv4gi80o_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5g66p32c9h2bs)
---
Fellow American,

There is a disturbing trend on the left-- Transgender activists are increasingly emboldened to attack those who oppose them. Time after time, we watch the left enable the rhetoric and justify the violence-- **ENOUGH IS ENOUGH!** This weekend, I was ambushed and assaulted by a transgender activist after speaking to a group of students at San Francisco State University. Students gathered wanting to hear the pro-woman side of the sports debate but were impeded by transgender activists, shouting, cursing, and threatening. name: Jim Jordan
subject: The stakes just got higher
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JIM JORDAN FOR CONGRESS PO BOX 355 Delaware, OH 43015
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62553909:JXpYa4GSN:m:1:3365131770:1F8D3136A13A76A847C978B8EFEBEDF3:r)
|

Peter,

From the Russia Hoax to multiple failed investigations and impeachments, to the latest legal actions from NYC, the left has been trying to destroy Donald Trump every day since 2015.

**But today, the stakes just got higher ... **

That's because the same District Attorney who is using his prosecutorial power to destroy Joe Biden's likely opponent **HAS JUST SUED ME!**

**He wants to intimidate us!**

That's right - instead of fighting actual crime in New York City, **Alvin Bragg appears to be using federal tax dollars to target Trump.** And now he's targeting me!

But what Bragg or other Soros-backed liberals might not know about me: I've squared off against MUCH bigger and tougher opponents in my career. I didn't back down then...and I'm not backing down now!

[**HELP ME FIGHT THE LEFT'S POLITICAL TARGETING
CHIP IN A COUPLE DOLLARS TODAY»» **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62553909:JXpYa4GSN:m:1:3365131770:1F8D3136A13A76A847C978B8EFEBEDF3:r)
This lawsuit shows me one thing: **Alvin Bragg doesn 't think the Constitution applies to those who use their position to target political opponents on the right!**

He's wrong! And **[with your help](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62553909:JXpYa4GSN:m:1:3365131770:1F8D3136A13A76A847C978B8EFEBEDF3:r)** , I'll fight his bogus lawsuit with everything I've got!

[**LET ME KNOW YOU'RE WITH ME » »**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62553909:JXpYa4GSN:m:1:3365131770:1F8D3136A13A76A847C978B8EFEBEDF3:r)

We will not be intimidated. We will not be deterred. We will not be stopped from doing our job on behalf of the American people, **no matter what.**

God Bless,
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62553909:JXpYa4GSN:m:1:3365131770:1F8D3136A13A76A847C978B8EFEBEDF3:r)
Jim Jordan

P.S. Our legal battle could become extremely costly, draining the resources we have earmarked toward helping us hold onto our majority in next year's election, which is why I'm asking for your financial support today. **[Will you kindly chip-in right now to help ensure we're able to mount the best possible defense against this purely political lawsuit?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62553909:JXpYa4GSN:m:1:3365131770:1F8D3136A13A76A847C978B8EFEBEDF3:r)**

**About Jim Jordan:** | Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

** [ ** JOIN JIM ➞ **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62553909:JXpYa4GSN:m:1:3365131770:1F8D3136A13A76A847C978B8EFEBEDF3:r)

name: Official Republican Leadership Notifications
subject: Sorry to bother you SO MUCH, but we really need your attention…
body:
We’re really hoping you do not ignore this

| |
---
| | | Hey, Friend,

Sorry to bother you SO MUCH but we really need your attention...

Now that we're over a couple of months into our NEW House Majority and have a new class of determined Conservatives, we're eager to have you fill out our _**[Official Republican Leadership Survey.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z04cqbps0fk2tal7hqqhm36spstv3e1r9vp6grqo_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5g6eo37c1h2bs "Official Republican Leadership Survey.")**_

Look, Friend, we've already asked a handful of times, so we're REALLY hoping you will take this by the end of the day for us. Can you promise us that?
_**Please reference the questions below and respond before**5 PM** **_
---
| | | | **OFFICIAL REPUBLICAN LEADERSHIP SURVEY

FOR: _[Friend](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z69bvokjo14qfmfvqrf54v8iji1ql3834td1v6p0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5g6eo37c1h2bs "Friend")_
SUBMIT YOUR RESPONSE BY 5 PM**
---
| |
** 1.) Do you support closing our Southern Border and building the wall?**
---
**[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zb44gb0nsmkf7j49vgbb29qo7elv8lvg9ja91l58_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5g6eo37c1h2bs)[**YES**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6dj94engu7nhujgnh4gjkvtldn8gjfbuc145of8_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5g6eo37c1h2bs) _[**NO**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zh4ka4h2v7jble548l2k56jof9pibnjv6cp0so2g_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5g6eo37c1h2bs)**
---
** 2.) Do you believe that the U.S. should reopen the Keystone XL Pipeline and regain energy independence?**
---
**[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhg160nsqilav3fv4prjn21mkpspqgej0qb63cno_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5g6eo37c1h2bs)[**YES**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zs15pvi7nlulb878dnimqfr1dcqtnivm4r52mlfo_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5g6eo37c1h2bs) _[**NO**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2za8mtopmoiva4r67770d1itmgn301d6o6u9a4i1g_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5g6eo37c1h2bs)**
---
** 3.) Do you think that Joe Biden has weaponized his IRS, DOJ, and FBI?**
---
**[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfl9o6ahu9b29rkkiov1cr0sum7ub20ni03ep5b8_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5g6eo37c1h2bs)[**YES**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8g1qoqmpn4r6m8qtpshuup4a68d3r6vkqa9i150_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5g6eo37c1h2bs) _[**NO**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2a5u3hr5nhn0vg0m9ai6jt33u825vch9kcc2n70_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5g6eo37c1h2bs)**
---
** 4.) Do you think that our military is strong?**
---
**[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zf5rb877tmdqb3bs0nrlhbl6vj0ho2n21dbiha58_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5g6eo37c1h2bs)[**YES**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0pr2lre32f9l6va2hqm0a2ca3ebgqae934n9m30_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5g6eo37c1h2bs) _[**NO**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zr035kpco49dpcg5p9iuthu81rgrl8n0b9icmju8_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5g6eo37c1h2bs)**
---
** 5.) Do you believe that Congress and the Biden Administration should END reckless spending?**
---
**[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zf5n4ovfvvesc1emm7nn57st49plq2q4nl0uviro_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5g6eo37c1h2bs)[**YES**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zgkcr4aeo1gmvko7rmk12qs9l8i2bs0m5ajvc9u8_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5g6eo37c1h2bs) _[**NO**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zterjg4faavsag503ipnhojj40sa4qohca32d3q0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5g6eo37c1h2bs)**
---
** 6.) Do you think that parents should have a say in their child's education?**
---
**[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zicgk5337419q00ia4rvkb02260r200sski6ovp0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5g6eo37c1h2bs)[**YES**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zul70o8silmgthcdu4dkfgjarfprqiis8advjr88_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5g6eo37c1h2bs) _[**NO**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfr516m5bmh1864oto9rjmoimekc4kgu0u9jkku0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5g6eo37c1h2bs)**
---
** 7.) Do you believe that Communist China should be allowed to purchase American farmland?**
---
**[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z01icjl8vlv58hv3j8l9hm0is9e9vebard8bu928_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5g6eo37c1h2bs)[**YES**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zrm721okmt73lovtsp70g2jpgd07v27cqjpp3ul8_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5g6eo37c1h2bs) _[**NO**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zpkc4i7f9rqedro4caa084vuivpv97q8076v9uc0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5g6eo37c1h2bs)**
---
** 8.) Do you think that Big Tech should censor speech on the Internet?**
---
**[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z91gr9mpck7dopoujmlg13m3mg93vgijs0b2ecjo_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5g6eo37c1h2bs)[**YES**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z41b8eg9ldfeqknfa3kt649ebb5mm19pp7clfoao_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5g6eo37c1h2bs) _[**NO**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z142ueivi1g7vng7dpshpj132610o0hhunhftj08_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5g6eo37c1h2bs)**
---
** 9.) Do you think that the Federal Government should have unilateral control over digital currency?**
---
**[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zuhj9f476u30ql2eq1v9hsfi10qskv8s8n0cn8so_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5g6eo37c1h2bs)[**YES**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0dmlqkmo8fo4ejt79e3dbiv1s8a97g61uvnq6mo_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5g6eo37c1h2bs) _[**NO**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zgn9pctup9ksjf2edv6g645bh9rh954tisc9fen8_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5g6eo37c1h2bs)**
---
** 10.) Do you think that Americans are better off now than they were before Biden took office?**
---
**[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zk6ff416phldo05hfbvd89s93nkla3vkqkpr57k0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5g6eo37c1h2bs)[**YES**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zplorcbmakiiff9b365e8012hjppqb1ka9ikbmj0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5g6eo37c1h2bs) _[**NO**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zned9osnp725tbtvivgdjs7lgu5sj3l54blkiagg_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5g6eo37c1h2bs)**
---
| |
* * *
---
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zukarpjacfgusbp0m5palpgodssku325fosa5vr0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5g6eo37c1h2bs "Tom Emmer")
---

****New Message from Majority Whip Tom Emmer****

Out of a handful of Conservatives, Friend, you've been picked to represent your area for my _**[Republican Leadership Comprehensive Survey.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqrab3hjivournij9mvjecll69novpfgd3iflmvg_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5g6eo37c1h2bs "Republican Leadership Comprehensive Survey.")**_

This survey will help our Republican Majority better understand what needs to be done for the American people. So please, take a moment to answer these ten simple questions.

---
| | [BEGIN YOUR SURVEY ⏩️](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zsbfttuq6tc1jl16bgijg7tqvb6ee3c9nud8c92g_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5g6eo37c1h2bs "BEGIN YOUR SURVEY ⏩️")
---

_Thank you in advance for your participation!

- Majority Whip Tom Emmer_

name: Riley Gaines
subject: Ambushed and assaulted
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Nine PAC
body:
There is a disturbing trend on the left

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl2cfeq9704b3p1h0f5edcocv5b3j54mc2fcq9eg_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5g6eo37c1h2bs)
---
Fellow American,

There is a disturbing trend on the left-- Transgender activists are increasingly emboldened to attack those who oppose them. Time after time, we watch the left enable the rhetoric and justify the violence-- **ENOUGH IS ENOUGH!** This weekend, I was ambushed and assaulted by a transgender activist after speaking to a group of students at San Francisco State University. Students gathered wanting to hear the pro-woman side of the sports debate but were impeded by transgender activists, shouting, cursing, and threatening. This left-wing intimidation campaign won't work! This is only more evidence that I'm fighting the good fight, and proof that women need sex-protected spaces! I know what I'm doing is right. When they want you silent, speak louder. I'm on the frontlines fighting for women and girls and speaking TRUTH to all, even those who refuse to hear it. [**Will you step up and stand with me in this fight? Donate to NinePAC and help me continue to speak TRUTH where it's not welcome and FIGHT to protect the future of women's sports!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztnnckhr0rdfae88qomjqq4lajepugabf90r2bng_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5g6eo37c1h2bs)

name: Tim Scott
subject: Here’s my life story
disclaimer_text:
PAID FOR
BY TIM SCOTT PRESIDENTIAL EXPLORATORY COMMITTEE
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsb0jJDDNi

I just launched my Presidential Exploratory Committee and I want
to tell you a quick story…

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osb0jJDDNi

I just launched my Presidential Exploratory Committee and I
want to tell you a quick story…

I was just going through some old photos before this massive
decision, and it made me realize how fortunate I am to be where I
am today.

That photo was taken when I was a young boy, growing up in
North Charleston, South Carolina. Back then, I had no idea I
would one day consider running for President of the United
States.

When I was young, my grandparents took my mother, brother, and
me into their home shortly after my parents split. After that, my
mother had to work long and hard hours just to put food on the
table and a roof over our heads.

With the guidance that came from my mother and both of my
grandparents, I was taught the importance of a good education -
despite the fact that my grandfather never even knew how to read.
Yet, they knew that education was the closest thing to magic in
America and the ticket to fulfilling the American Dream.

Here's a photo of me in high school when I was on the football
team. Back then, it was my dream to play for the Dallas Cowboys
when I was old enough. With a job like that, I would be able to
repay my mom for all of the sacrifices she made for my brother
and me - and not have to worry about keeping a roof over her
head.

Simply put: football was an escape. It was my ticket out of
poverty, and to give back.

But as life often does, it took an unexpected turn - one day I
fell asleep behind the wheel of my mom's car, flipping it and
almost dying in the process. I thank my lucky stars that God had
more of a plan in store for me, because the story didn't end
there.

During college, I dedicated my life to Christ and meaningful
service, and long story short, I was able to live out my mother's
American Dream!

With the help of some key mentors along the way, I was able to
find success in business - and used it to improve the lives of
others.

After my time in business, I decided that I wanted to run for
public office and work to better the lives of people in my
community. So, I chose to run in the Charleston area - as a
Republican.

Since then, I have become the first black man elected to the
U.S. Senate from a Southern State since Reconstruction. And now,
I'm exploring a run for President of the United States. You
really could only do this in America.

What I have learned along the way is this: Every American is
capable of achieving their own American Dream when given an equal
playing field, especially if the government gets out of their way
when doing it.

That's why I'm exploring a run for President. We need to
restore faith in America and protect the American Dream for all.
It's a lot of hard work, but I have only been able to make it
this far with the help of my supporters.

Just like others on my team, I know you're reading this email
to do the same thing - to join me in standing up for all
Americans. So now, I have a short and humble request for you:
will you chip in $20, $35 or even more now to help me save the
American Dream?

HELP TIM SAVE THE AMERICAN
DREAM

Thank you, and God bless you,

HELP TIM SAVE THE AMERICAN
DREAM

I just
launched my Presidential Exploratory Committee, and I couldn't be
more excited to hit the ground and listen to more Americans about
their concerns, worries, fears, and priorities.

But the
truth is, accomplishing our goal isn't cheap. So today, I'm
humbly asking if you could please chip in $5, $10, $25, or
anything you can afford to help my team and I keep trying to
restore FAITH in America. I believe our best days are ahead of
us, but I can't do this alone. Are you with me?

I'M WITH TIM SCOTT

I was
raised in a single-parent household in North Charleston, South
Carolina. My mom worked 16-hour days to keep food on the table
and a roof over our heads. I got my first job, changing oil at a
gas station, when I was 13. I understand the value of a dollar.

I don't
take asking for money lightly. I know that every donation made is
a sacrifice, and I am forever grateful for each and every gift.

I know we
have been asking a lot lately, but it would mean so much if you
could give $5 to help us restore faith in America.

I'M WITH TIM SCOTT

PAID FOR
BY TIM SCOTT PRESIDENTIAL EXPLORATORY COMMITTEE

1405 ASHLEY RIVER
ROAD
CHARLESTON, SC 29407

After that, my mother had to work long and hard hours just to put food on the table and a roof over our heads. With the guidance that came from my mother and both of my grandparents, I was taught the importance of a good education - despite the fact that my grandfather never even knew how to read. Yet, they knew that education was the closest thing to magic in America and the ticket to fulfilling the American Dream. Here's a photo of me in high school when I was on the football team. Back then, it was my dream to play for the Dallas Cowboys when I was old enough. With a job like that, I would be able to repay my mom for all of the sacrifices she made for my brother and me - and not have to worry about keeping a roof over her head. Simply put: football was an escape. It was my ticket out of poverty, and to give back. But as life often does, it took an unexpected turn - one day I fell asleep behind the wheel of my mom's car, flipping it and almost dying in the process. I thank my lucky stars that God had more of a plan in store for me, because the story didn't end there. During college, I dedicated my life to Christ and meaningful service, and long story short, I was able to live out my mother's American Dream! With the help of some key mentors along the way, I was able to find success in business - and used it to improve the lives of others. After my time in business, I decided that I wanted to run for public office and work to better the lives of people in my community. So, I chose to run in the Charleston area - as a Republican. Since then, I have become the first black man elected to the U.S. Senate from a Southern State since Reconstruction. And now, I'm exploring a run for President of the United States. You really could only do this in America. What I have learned along the way is this: Every American is capable of achieving their own American Dream when given an equal playing field, especially if the government gets out of their way when doing it. That's why I'm exploring a run for President. We need to restore faith in America and protect the American Dream for all. It's a lot of hard work, but I have only been able to make it this far with the help of my supporters. Just like others on my team, I know you're reading this email to do the same thing - to join me in standing up for all Americans. So now, I have a short and humble request for you: will you chip in $20, $35 or even more now to help me save the American Dream? HELP TIM SAVE THE AMERICAN DREAM Thank you, and God bless you, HELP TIM SAVE THE AMERICAN DREAM I just launched my Presidential Exploratory Committee, and I couldn't be more excited to hit the ground and listen to more Americans about their concerns, worries, fears, and priorities. But the truth is, accomplishing our goal isn't cheap. So today, I'm humbly asking if you could please chip in $5, $10, $25, or anything you can afford to help my team and I keep trying to restore FAITH in America. I believe our best days are ahead of us, but I can't do this alone. Are you with me? I'M WITH TIM SCOTT I was raised in a single-parent household in North Charleston, South Carolina. My mom worked 16-hour days to keep food on the table and a roof over our heads. I got my first job, changing oil at a gas station, when I was 13. I understand the value of a dollar. I don't take asking for money lightly. I know that every donation made is a sacrifice, and I am forever grateful for each and every gift. I know we have been asking a lot lately, but it would mean so much if you could give $5 to help us restore faith in America. I'M WITH TIM SCOTT PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT PRESIDENTIAL EXPLORATORY COMMITTEE 1405 ASHLEY RIVER ROAD CHARLESTON, SC 29407

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Here’s how I’d fix things in Washington
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
It’s time to stop complaining and actually fix the problem without apology.

| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2kppc2kgovtd2g05n5pj2n95jckmt2lju3vs64g_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5g6eo37c1h2bs)
Fellow American -

Over the course of this election, I am laying my vision for an American national revival.

Here’s one promise for you: I will end the weaponization of police power in America.

Time to stop complaining and actually *fix* the problem without apology.
1. Shut down + replace the FBI
2. Shut down + replace the IRS
3. Pardon all federal defendants prosecuted based on political motives. This includes Douglass Mackey & nonviolent January 6 defendants denied due process
4. Hold Congress accountable for taxpayer $$ used as hush money for sexual harassment claims
5. Publish the Jeffrey Epstein client list: the police state can’t be weaponized to protect a select few.

Fellow American, if you agree, and want these policies debated on the main stage of the Republican Presidential Primary, then I need your help. **[Chip in $1 to build this movement toward our American revival.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zfccd3kvdo4khm6b42qveqlpbun8pdhncsa498h0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5g6eo37c1h2bs)**

Thanks,

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zducfs3qilv90rgpts9hagf6dj54grg94rd1uogo_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5g6eo37c1h2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** DONATE TODAY -> **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zik4sddti5in5h3ie8q23oeasj3kpi8ccjr81dj0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5g6eo37c1h2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4ro5halm6kd8vrnn8c6b470bo2s0hse343rjmsg_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5g6eo37c1h2bs)

---

| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zl18ic6ve0tqbcc54p1mqmamm8crlpva4jrrr7eg_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5g6eo37c1h2bs)| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zh8crd0vg2p0nmkhk3flv1csjftdh8a9tch7uclo_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5g6eo37c1h2bs)| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqkks70ks10f5aphe2773gaqnevp599t0pigk00o_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5g6eo37c1h2bs)
---|---|---

Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. name: Tom Fitton
subject: One More Win for Honest Elections!
body:
You and our other members have helped Judicial Watch take an historic leadership role in forcing states to follow federal election laws that are our last line of defense against voter fraud and corrupt elections.

| | |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

Our members’ commitment and _Judicial Watch 's_ hard work have paid off _again_!
Colorado's secretary of state has agreed to settle a Judicial Watch lawsuit that alleged Colorado failed to remove ineligible voters from its voter rolls...
This is a _huge victory_ for honest elections, because since we filed our lawsuit in October 2020, Colorado voter roll _removals_ increased by a whopping **78%**!
And as part of the settlement, Colorado will report to Judicial Watch on its yearly progress in cleaning up its voter rolls... _for the next six years_!
This is how we dig in, and use the legal system and the courts to make real, lasting change that reduces chances for voter fraud ahead of the 2024 presidential election.
**But the battle for honest elections is far from over ...and that's [why I am asking you to reactivate your membership with a special contribution today.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62944&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)**.
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62944&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

We are still pursuing our voter rolls related lawsuits against Illinois and Pennsylvania.

And our election integrity team is reviewing data to determine if more states need to be "warned" by Judicial Watch to clean up their voter rolls as required by federal law...or face a Judicial Watch lawsuit!

That's not all...

We are also developing legal strategies to fight back against the Left's efforts to destroy traditional safeguards against voter fraud and enact reckless measures like:

* Ballot harvesting

* Abolition of Voter ID

* And "all mail-in" voting

That's why [your decision to give Judicial Watch your support is so important.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62944&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62944&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

Every day, Judicial Watch lawyers are doing the job that the corrupt Biden Justice Department should be doing...but isn't...to protect honest elections in America.

This work is hard, and every one of our voter roll victories (in states including California, Kentucky, New York, North Carolina, and Ohio) takes a real commitment of time...

...for example, our successful Colorado litigation took two and a half years!

And each and every one of these investigations, "warnings" and lawsuits also come with very real price tags attached.

**[That’s why I urge you to support our work with a donation today.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62944&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)**

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62944&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

Our members and supporters are the reason that while others _complain_ about voter fraud and corrupt elections, Judicial Watch _acts and wins_ ...and _we act and win where it_ _counOur members and supporters , through the legal system and the courts_.

With your help Judicial Watch can battle even more effectively for honest elections, which are under massive assault today by the Left and the Biden administration.

And with you on our team, we can keep fighting for the rule of law (including our election laws), exposing public corruption, standing tall for the people's right to know, and holding lawless politicians in both parties accountable.

I thank you in advance for [giving us your support today.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62944&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)

Sincerely,

Thomas Fitton
President

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62944&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---
