name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: sharing this with you (do not forward)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Friend, you need to see this ASAP.
**My team just put together an internal State of the Race Memo, and I'm sharing it with a select few of my strongest supporters — including you.** Here's where things stand:
| | **2024 NEW YORK SENATE ELECTION:
_The State of the Race_**
---
* Nationally, Democrats are **on the defense in 23 states** across the country. _Republicans must only defend 11._

* Mitch McConnell **just needs to flip two seats** to take back control of the Senate. Democrats cannot leave anything to chance.

* There are warning signs for Democrats in New York — **the GOP just had their best cycle in decades** , flipping enough districts to retake the House.

* Now, the GOP is already **attacking Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand (D-NY)** in an effort to build on their momentum and retake the Senate.

* **With so many races, Democratic resources will be stretched thin** — meaning every single fundraising goal is critical.

---
**REPORT CONCLUSION:**
**[Hitting our $50,000 mid-month goal is absolutely critical to defending this seat and defending our Senate majority. Please, will you chip in now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61747791/401057640/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4046-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2Q2MTE5Yi0yM2RhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=miM0W-eiXUV63RLhdxbC6tzJ-qe7BMsYgg8UDJ_IxCY=)**
---
| | [DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61747792/401057641/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4046-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2Q2MTE5Yi0yM2RhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=miM0W-eiXUV63RLhdxbC6tzJ-qe7BMsYgg8UDJ_IxCY=)
---

name: A.G. Holder
subject: We must act with urgency and optimism.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
|
---

Friend,
I am deeply concerned about the current state of affairs in our nation. We are witnessing a deliberate and coordinated assault on our democracy, state by state.
* * *
● **Tennessee** \-- Conservatives in the state house forced out duly-elected Democratic legislators and continue to disregard the desires of Tennessee voters to address gun violence.
● **Florida** \-- Conservative lawmakers are abusing their power by advancing a new anti-democratic election bill that would impose further restrictions on voters.
● **Mississippi** \-- State conservatives are instituting dangerous legislation that threatens the very foundations of our democratic values to remove power from Black Mississippians in Jackson.
● **Virginia** \-- The re-application of a Jim Crow-era voting law in Virginia, which disproportionately impacts black voters, constitutes an anti-democratic assault on voting rights.
* * *
**These brazen actions are part of a years-long effort by conservative extremists to stifle the voice of the people and exert anti-democratic control over our nation’s ideals and infrastructures.** These efforts to bend and break the foundations of our democracy for the acquisition and maintenance of partisan power are unacceptable and must be unequivocally opposed.
**[Will you support All On The Line as we combat gerrymandering and anti-democratic assaults on our democracy?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61748745/401060898/1796693206?refcode=20230412_AOTL_P_EHHTN_RedLiteXKYXOpeners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI2YmJjMzAwLTI1ZGEtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=u_zd8o2-fOZwfA26__qu0yeQD_uAvcifuLHx17JQql4=)**

clean_body: | Friend, I am deeply concerned about the current state of affairs in our nation. We are witnessing a deliberate and coordinated assault on our democracy, state by state. ● Tennessee \-- Conservatives in the state house forced out duly-elected Democratic legislators and continue to disregard the desires of Tennessee voters to address gun violence. ● Florida \-- Conservative lawmakers are abusing their power by advancing a new anti-democratic election bill that would impose further restrictions on voters. ● Mississippi \-- State conservatives are instituting dangerous legislation that threatens the very foundations of our democratic values to remove power from Black Mississippians in Jackson. ● Virginia \-- The re-application of a Jim Crow-era voting law in Virginia, which disproportionately impacts black voters, constitutes an anti-democratic assault on voting rights. These brazen actions are part of a years-long effort by conservative extremists to stifle the voice of the people and exert anti-democratic control over our nation’s ideals and infrastructures. These efforts to bend and break the foundations of our democracy for the acquisition and maintenance of partisan power are unacceptable and must be unequivocally opposed. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = All On The Line’s work to protect fair maps and engage communities across the country is crucial at this moment. From gerrymandering to outright voter suppression and intimidation during election cycles, these dangerous, cynical tactics have been employed to limit the participation of targeted voices in our democracy. Such actions undermine confidence that our governments are accountable to the people. Our work to end gerrymandering and to protect fair maps requires dedication, persistence, and a willingness to keep going even when the odds seem stacked against us. But this work is absolutely vital as attacks on our democracy escalate. = We must act with urgency and optimism. Thank you for sticking with us. \-- Eric H. name: Sean Spicer
subject: I’m parting ways with Newsmax. Here’s what I’m up to now:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME THIS YEAR.

| |

---
| | | Hey - this is Sean Spicer:

With a heavy heart, I just announced I'm parting ways with Newsmax. My show reached millions and helped viewers see what's _really_ happening in our country. Something the Mainstream Media fails to do time and time again.

_**[But with that in the rearview mirror, I'm thrilled at what's coming next...](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z8nfv8nqcrl5vvn1grth336emb317l1o385j0lro_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5g61o72c1h2bs "But with that in the rearview mirror, I’m thrilled at what’s coming next...")**_

---
| | | [READ MY FULL STATEMENT >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zseth0jss2cgianbfkbeqipsjaib4orss49atnig_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5g61o72c1h2bs "READ MY FULL STATEMENT")
---

The 2024 election will be the single most important one in the history of our country. Joe Biden and Democrats in Congress have set our country into a tailspin. It's an emergency situation and we're running dangerously short on time to change course.

We have our work cut out for us ahead of 2024:

- Fire Joe Biden and retake the presidency
- Expand our razor-thin Majority in the House
- Win back the Senate and send Chuck Schumer into retirement

**The Democrats aren 't going to give us an inch... so we have no choice but to 1) outwork, 2) outsmart, and - most importantly - 3) outraise them. **

Unfortunately, that last point is the most important. Why? Because no one works harder than strong Conservatives like you. And Republicans are WINNING on the issues - they can't outsmart us when we're the ones fighting for freedom, defending our country and flag, and resisting their radical woke agenda.

But Democrats have a MAJOR advantage in fundraising thanks to their armies of Hollywood megadonors and woke Liberals whipping out their credit cards whenever they flip on MSNBC.

_**[Look- if we want to win in 2024, it's going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ztr1oagu0h4l7u7b15vuaqpra1fpi7p267fju0a0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5g61o72c1h2bs "Look – if we want to win in 2024, it’s going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW.")**_

That's why I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME THIS YEAR. We ran the numbers on what it'll take to outraise the Democrats and pull off an overwhelming victory.

We came to the conclusion that if every last one of you gave between $27 and $54, we would have the resources to MAX OUT all our voter contact budgets, GOTV operations, and volunteer recruitment efforts.

_In other words ... if everyone here steps up RIGHT NOW, the Democrats would suffer a defeat like nothing we've ever seen before._

**But that 's a big "if" - it requires 100% participation. **

This plan falls apart if too many folks sit out. We need everyone on board to pull this off.

So I'll cut to the chase.

_**[From the bottom of my heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution between $27 and $54? If we can pull this off, we'll make history.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z8r8d8svs9vajubjd9aqnebdbb5o0mp1u4epd9m8_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5g61o72c1h2bs "From the bottom of my heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution between $27 and $54? If we can pull this off, we’ll make history.")**_

Are you in?

---
**[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z34abavq3g0jgtumtrsgmi4985djpiat2fh5ggi8_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5g61o72c1h2bs)[**YES >>**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zardmeoepauoi0a48smj9hs4839bh0s9qca0lab0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5g61o72c1h2bs)_[**NO >>**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2za0qlu923dqd6587tf1g4c4qa8rg7e8q472l9u3g_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5g61o72c1h2bs)**
---

More from me soon,
Sean Spicer

---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zpo7dbqhdj1ln6hf539ki4ftf0d81p8dd840g9hg_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5g61o72c1h2bs "image")
---

name: The Liberty Ledger
subject: Milton Friedman: Why Government is the Problem
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.libertyledger.)
---
| | Dear Friend,The major social problems of the United States—deteriorating education, lawlessness and crime, homelessness, the collapse of family values, the crisis in medical care—all have one thing in common. They have all been produced by the well-intended actions of the government.

And yet, for some reason, more and more Americans look to government as the solution to their problems.
---
| [](http://trk.libertyledger.-HQR3zdWdJ0HPw40uGlpQ)
---
| | That’s why I want you to have **[a free digital copy of Milton Friedman’s _Why Government Is the Problem._](http://trk.libertyledger._Ulx3ozf98Hw)**

In this eBook, Friedman uses his humble and direct style to:
* **Analyze the continuing social and economic problems as government intervention increases in the U.S.**
* **Shed light on the government and its tilt toward special interests over citizen interests. **
* **Demonstrate how and why government is the problem.**

Friend, I really think you’ll get a lot out of this eBook. It’s a favorite among supporters of Hoover. And although some of the particulars have changed since he wrote this in 1993, I think you’ll find the situation is frighteningly similar today.

**[Please use this link to get access to your copy of _Why Government Is the Problem_ now.](http://trk.libertyledger._zp_Vj_HUqS7rIZNbQ5Q)**
Thank you,

Greg Greg Stamps | Online DevelopmentHoover Institution | Stanford University
---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

name: Bryce Reeves
subject: Youngkin Endorses State Senator Bryce Reeves for re-election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Bryce Reeves
body:
Today, Governor Glenn Youngkin (R-VA) announced his endorsement of State Senator Bryce...
| | | [](https://j0l1y7h.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fbrycereeves.com/1/010001877b05b202-57fb3196-9b20-4d2e-a6dc-9569b911b86c-000000/lmVn9jnnFDW0qPXeB6v37ozHq7Q=317)
---
| **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** Contact:Nick Duber nick@brycereeves.com ** Virginia Governor Glenn Youngkin endorses State Senator Bryce Reeves for re-election**
---
| | |
---
| **FREDERICKSBURG, VA – April 12, 2023 – **Today, Governor Glenn Youngkin (R-VA)**** announced his endorsement of State Senator Bryce Reeves (R-Spotsylvania) who is running for re-elction for Virginia's 28th Senate District. This endorsement continues the swelling momentum surrounding the Reeves campaign for re-election. “Bryce Reeves is a true servant leader I rely on in Richmond. He leads the fight and wins, giving us lower taxes, concealed carry, parental rights, and a better foster care system. You can trust Bryce to always fight for the military, small business owners, and the unborn. Please re-elect Bryce Reeves to the Senate so he can continue defending our God-given freedoms.” stated Virginia Governor Glenn Younkin. Bryce Reeves stated, “It has been an honor to work alongside Governor Youngkin in support of his Promises Made, Promises Kept initiatives. Whether it was cementing the largest tax cut in Virginia's history for our veterans or working on ground breaking international trade legislation, I know our Governor will always work to bring prosperity to our great Commonwealth and those who reside in it. I am humbled by his support." Bryce Reeves has also received many endorsements from numerous local, state, and federal officials. Local officials who have endorsed Bryce include: Sheriff Jeremy Falls (Fauquier), Sheriff Roger Harris (Spotsylvania), Sheriff Erik Weaver (Madison), Del. Nick Freitas (R-Culpeper) , Del. Mike Webert (R-Fauquier) and State Senator Mark Obenshain (R- Harrisonburg). Bryce has also had the pleasure to receive the endorsements of US Congresswoman Jen Kiggans (R-VA02), US Congressman Bob Good (R-VA05), Attorney General Jason Miyares (R-VA), and Lieutenant Governor Winsome Sears (R-VA). ### Bryce Reeves is a small business owner, former Army Ranger, and former Prince William County narcotics detective. Senator Reeves is running for re-election into the newly formed 28th Senate District. The counties within this district include: Orange, Culpeper, Madison, Greene, Rappahannock, Fauquier (part), and Spotsylvania (part). Senator Reeves currently serves on the Senate Committee on Rehabilitation and Social Services and sits on the Committees on Local Government, General Laws and Technology, and Privileges and Elections. In addition, Senator Reeves is the Co-chair of the Virginia General Assembly Military and Veterans Caucus. Senator Reeves resides in Spotsylvania County.
---
| |
---
|
---
| | Paid for by Friends of Bryce Reeves
---

clean_body: Today, Governor Glenn Youngkin (R-VA) announced his endorsement of State Senator Bryce... | | | | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE Contact:Nick Duber nick@brycereeves.com Virginia Governor Glenn Youngkin endorses State Senator Bryce Reeves for re-election | | | | FREDERICKSBURG, VA – April 12, 2023 – Today, Governor Glenn Youngkin (R-VA)**** announced his endorsement of State Senator Bryce Reeves (R-Spotsylvania) who is running for re-elction for Virginia's 28th Senate District. This endorsement continues the swelling momentum surrounding the Reeves campaign for re-election. “Bryce Reeves is a true servant leader I rely on in Richmond. He leads the fight and wins, giving us lower taxes, concealed carry, parental rights, and a better foster care system. You can trust Bryce to always fight for the military, small business owners, and the unborn. Please re-elect Bryce Reeves to the Senate so he can continue defending our God-given freedoms.” stated Virginia Governor Glenn Younkin. Bryce Reeves stated, “It has been an honor to work alongside Governor Youngkin in support of his Promises Made, Promises Kept initiatives. Whether it was cementing the largest tax cut in Virginia's history for our veterans or working on ground breaking international trade legislation, I know our Governor will always work to bring prosperity to our great Commonwealth and those who reside in it. I am humbled by his support." Bryce Reeves has also received many endorsements from numerous local, state, and federal officials. Local officials who have endorsed Bryce include: Sheriff Jeremy Falls (Fauquier), Sheriff Roger Harris (Spotsylvania), Sheriff Erik Weaver (Madison), Del. Nick Freitas (R-Culpeper) , Del. Mike Webert (R-Fauquier) and State Senator Mark Obenshain (R- Harrisonburg). Bryce has also had the pleasure to receive the endorsements of US Congresswoman Jen Kiggans (R-VA02), US Congressman Bob Good (R-VA05), Attorney General Jason Miyares (R-VA), and Lieutenant Governor Winsome Sears (R-VA). ### Bryce Reeves is a small business owner, former Army Ranger, and former Prince William County narcotics detective. Senator Reeves is running for re-election into the newly formed 28th Senate District. The counties within this district include: Orange, Culpeper, Madison, Greene, Rappahannock, Fauquier (part), and Spotsylvania (part). Senator Reeves currently serves on the Senate Committee on Rehabilitation and Social Services and sits on the Committees on Local Government, General Laws and Technology, and Privileges and Elections. In addition, Senator Reeves is the Co-chair of the Virginia General Assembly Military and Veterans Caucus. Senator Reeves resides in Spotsylvania County. | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Bryce Reeves | | | | | | | | | | | P.O. Box 7021 Fredericksburg, VA 22404, United States | | or | |

Nikki Haley is coming up on the TWO MONTH mark since launching her presidential campaign! Over the last two months, Nikki hit the ground running, holding more than 30 standing-room-only events across Iowa, New Hampshire, South Carolina, and more. She met with thousands of voters and shared her vision for America with people across the country. It’s no secret that Nikki Haley is a force to be reckoned with. Whether you’ve attended an event in person, followed along with our campaign updates, or given a generous contribution to Nikki, we wanted to personally say thank you. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=0bea42cbc15931b0be703004e0304d3eb82e72159fcdd3d57010ec6cf6c658bd254e1991e805d82034cc3bee393fded0218e52ba9ebef74fa5d807de8399e75c Hosting events across the country wouldn’t be possible without grassroot supporters like you showing up and giving your continued support. TAKE A LOOK: Nikki Haley announced her campaign for president just under two months ago in Charleston, SC. Since then, Nikki has hit the ground running, meeting with thousands of voters and hosting events non-stop across the country. Nikki is ready to end failed liberal policies and restore a strong and proud America. Nikki held her first campaign events in Exeter and Manchester, New Hampshire. She met with hundreds of Americans, and answered questions from proud patriots across the state. After Nikki’s first stop in New Hampshire, she headed to Iowa to meet with voters, answer questions, and host packed standing-room-only town halls. From Urbandale and Marion, to Council Bluffs to Nevada to Clive, she traveled across Iowa and spent time speaking with voters, meeting with farmers and state legislators, and sharing her mission to save America’s future. Nikki held a huge campaign rally in Myrtle Beach, SC with over a thousand patriots in attendance. Everyone was fired up. It was incredible to see the excitement and momentum for her mission to save America. Nikki traveled back to New Hampshire where she hosted town halls and meet-and-greets in Dover and Salem. Nikki spent a lot of time meeting with voters, answering questions, and sharing more about her plan to secure the border. Nikki held an exciting campaign rally in Lexington, SC where she received a warm welcome by hundreds of patriots. There wasn’t one person in attendance who wasn’t fired up to hear from Nikki on why she’s running for president, and her plans to reverse Joe Biden’s failed agenda. She didn’t leave until she had a chance to shake hands and speak with every supporter. This week, Nikki wrapped up her third campaign swing in Iowa. She hosted back-to-back events, and officially launched her Women for Nikki coalition! NOW, we have exciting news to share. Nikki will be traveling back to New Hampshire again in two weeks, where she will be hosting more town halls across the state. In less than two months, Nikki has already traveled across the country to meet with thousands of voters, and this is just the beginning. Nikki’s continuing to work non-stop to get her message out to every American. name: Team Lawler
subject: Unlock this exclusive news alert
body:

name: John Fetterman
subject: This abortion ruling is bullsh*t
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
This is nothing more than another attempt by the GOP to take away the rights of women
#
Hi Derek,
Last week, a hard-right, Trump-appointed judge ruled to block access to mifepristone, a pill used for medical abortions for the past two decades.
**This is simply _bullshit._** This is nothing more than another attempt by the GOP to take away the rights of women & implement a nationwide abortion ban.
**[I’m in the Senate to defend abortion access + I’ll block any abortion ban that comes up for a vote. To keep me there, chip in to power my work today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230413-1?refcode=em20230413-1-8334&refcode2=8334_434096_Bj3V5D&akid=8334%2E434096%2EBj3V5D)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230413-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230413-8334&refcode2=8334_434096_Bj3V5D&akid=8334%2E434096%2EBj3V5D)**
Mifepristone remains safe & 💯% legal in PA. **We will fight this, and we will win.**
Thank you,
❤️ John
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator, Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230413-8334-footer&t=1&refcode2=8334_434096_Bj3V5D&akid=8334%2E434096%2EBj3V5D)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8334%2E434096%2EBj3V5D)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8334%2E434096%2EBj3V5D)

name: Senator Nikil Saval
subject: My endorsement for Mayor of Philadelphia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Helen Gym
body:
Philadelphia is suffering from interlocking crises. We need a visionary and transformational leader. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61737347/401017714/-73022071?refcode=AU_HHG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230413_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjYyOGFkMC0wYWRhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pAszHd-KuIhARZuhnFA8NzvILDKs7Y7tAkNG3C9C2rw=)
---
Right now, Philadelphia is suffering from interlocking crises — in community violence, housing, public services, and climate change. We need a skilled and experienced leader, and a visionary and transformational one. **Helen Gym is that leader, and I ask that you join me in supporting her for Mayor of Philadelphia.** I’ll share why I believe Helen will build a safer, more vibrant Philadelphia in a moment, but I have a request before I do: [**Please click here to pitch in $20.23, or whatever you can spare, to Helen’s campaign for Philadelphia.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61737349/401017726/-73022071?amount=20.23&refcode=AU_HHG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230413_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjYyOGFkMC0wYWRhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pAszHd-KuIhARZuhnFA8NzvILDKs7Y7tAkNG3C9C2rw=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61737351/401017739/-73022071?refcode=AU_HHG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230413_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjYyOGFkMC0wYWRhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pAszHd-KuIhARZuhnFA8NzvILDKs7Y7tAkNG3C9C2rw=) | [SUPPORT HELEN →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61737353/401017748/-73022071?refcode=AU_HHG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230413_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjYyOGFkMC0wYWRhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pAszHd-KuIhARZuhnFA8NzvILDKs7Y7tAkNG3C9C2rw=)
---
I first came to know of Helen through her organizing to support public education. During a time of deep crisis for the School District of Philadelphia, she was widely known among organizers, teachers, parents, and school staff as the most impassioned and effective parent-organizer in the city.
Helen poured that same energy and intelligence into her campaign for City Council. I remember casting my vote for her with enormous expectations. In office, she more than fulfilled them.
Helen’s Fair Workweek bill brought a fundamental change to service workers’ lives. Her work on eviction diversion and rental assistance brought together low-wage workers, businesses, and every level of government — state, local, federal, and courts — to achieve lasting change that kept people housed. Her work on issues like immigration and housing uplifts those most often left out of political life.
**The most salient quality Helen brought to office was not an ideology but a skill: She was an organizer.** She could build broad coalitions inside and outside City Hall to pass ambitious legislation that no one thought possible.
It is because she has done big things in the past — bigger than any Councilmember of her generation — that I know she will do big things as Mayor, but first she needs our support to win this race.
**If you can, please make a donation of any amount to help elect my friend Helen Gym as our next mayor:**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately:_
| [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61737355/401017756/-73022071?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_HHG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230413_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjYyOGFkMC0wYWRhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pAszHd-KuIhARZuhnFA8NzvILDKs7Y7tAkNG3C9C2rw=)

[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61737368/401017774/-73022071?refcode=AU_HHG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230413_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjYyOGFkMC0wYWRhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pAszHd-KuIhARZuhnFA8NzvILDKs7Y7tAkNG3C9C2rw=)
---
Helen recognizes that the path to fighting our two worst crises — community violence and climate change — runs through making our key institutions safe and healthy: housing, libraries and recreation centers, and, above all, schools.
We won't find solutions to all these issues in the next four or eight years, but I cannot imagine a person better suited than Helen to set us on the path to get there. She is creative, intelligent, and fearless. She has been putting in the work to improve Philadelphians’ lives for 30 years, and as Mayor, she’ll deliver the change we need.
So, please join me in voting for Helen on (or before) May 16th, and if you’re able, please [volunteer](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61737372/401017777/-1112495008?refcode=AU_HHG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230413_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjYyOGFkMC0wYWRhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pAszHd-KuIhARZuhnFA8NzvILDKs7Y7tAkNG3C9C2rw=&emci=42ba8094-8ed9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=82628ad0-0ada-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=35919414) or [chip in today](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61737375/401017780/-73022071?refcode=AU_HHG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230413_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjYyOGFkMC0wYWRhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pAszHd-KuIhARZuhnFA8NzvILDKs7Y7tAkNG3C9C2rw=) to help her bring real change to our city.
Thank you,
**Senator Nikil Saval**
PA Senate, District 1
Helen Gym is a Philly mom, a school teacher, a community organizer, and former City Councilmember. She has been fighting for Philly families and communities for decades — winning more resources for our schools, safer communities, and a more affordable Philadelphia. Our efforts are supported by everyday people like you who give what they can, whenever they can, because they want to see a safer, more prosperous, equitable Philadelphia that works for all of us. name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Defunding the police is dangerous. Come hear why!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-8132972?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,
**Defunding the police is dangerous. **

Rafael Mangual, a best-selling author, will be in Jackson to explain why law enforcement needs our full support.
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=022a880546&e=5703353baa)
---
**_Click on the image above to reserve a ticket!_**
| Mangual's research shows that it is often poor, vulnerable people who pay the price for the elite's anti-police position.

He will be joined by State Auditor Shad White to discuss why Mississippi should support our law enforcement. **Tickets are available[here](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=9f921e2cc8&e=5703353baa). **

Hope to see you there!
---
|
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=8a0c5345b1&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm Regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: will you be 1 of 15?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
I hope that I can count on you to be one of them.
| | |
---
Hi there,
I can’t believe that it’s already mid-April. And while we’ve been making progress, we still have not put the 2022 campaign to bed.
To combat the deluge of GOP money in the final days before the election, my campaign took on debt. Pundits moved our race to a toss-up, and **I was getting calls from other Senators concerned that we couldn’t win.**
We _had_ to take on debt. Fortunately, it worked, and we won.
The fact that we have outstanding bills makes emails like this one extremely important. In order to pay the bills down according to schedule, I need just 15 people to donate to this email. I hope that I can count on you to be one of them. Folks like you typically give about $3, but I’d be grateful for any amount you can manage.
You’re a valuable supporter who I know understands what’s at stake: **[Will you please be one of the 15 donors who help?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61738248/401021092/-947982778?amounts=amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2256-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YWUxZGNkYS0wYmRhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A61_mevz_6RZHHJ6hZQFQlhTyjnaMBbgAEWcHwAlIHc=)**
Thanks so much. It’s already April so we really cannot fall short.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

clean_body: I hope that I can count on you to be one of them. | | | Hi there, I can’t believe that it’s already mid-April. And while we’ve been making progress, we still have not put the 2022 campaign to bed. To combat the deluge of GOP money in the final days before the election, my campaign took on debt. Pundits moved our race to a toss-up, and I was getting calls from other Senators concerned that we couldn’t win. We had to take on debt. Fortunately, it worked, and we won. The fact that we have outstanding bills makes emails like this one extremely important. In order to pay the bills down according to schedule, I need just 15 people to donate to this email. I hope that I can count on you to be one of them. Folks like you typically give about $3, but I’d be grateful for any amount you can manage. You’re a valuable supporter who I know understands what’s at stake: = Thanks so much. It’s already April so we really cannot fall short. With every good wish, Maggie Hassan | If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, =. = This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. I am honored to have the endorsement from Veterans for America First. Please take a look at their press release-

Senator Amanda Chase of Virginia has been endorsed by Veterans for America First aka Veterans for Trump for her re-election to the VA Senate announced Angie Wong VFAF national media rep.

Apr. 12, 2023 / COLONIAL HEIGHTS, Va. -- Senator Amanda Chase of Virginia has been endorsed by Veterans for America First aka Veterans for Trump for her re-election to the VA Senate announced Angie Wong VFAF national media rep.

"Senator Chase has a proven voting record that speaks for itself, she is America First and will fight for Virginia and this country. The veterans, and first responders, in this country stand with Amanda as she stands with Trump," said Stan Fitzgerald Veterans for Trump President.

From: [https://chaseforsenate.com/about/](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eBHU1HickG-SzfvEWZIhHlzWQn0Sn4_NJDbPF7iIiNB--3e2huxYDoXNRRQ5M8jzc19CT3gHq9NXYj-iZSethOueRFNZLCUAfannUk8Nivh9w-WPkNAu-vE76t9wLDY4_Oz5bojiTgFXW8OtV8H---eOii5EmD7C&c=sQpL_qr7jjpfdmMc5Rz8YPCCzRvw8SKW88BMQNGhYv8u7rDfngTpkQ==&ch=dhwxHcdgD863jUhsD8gTjywMzA6LomhmRorX2wvfPtabs86zqsMJMA==) Senator Chase knows how to get things done. In the Senate, she was the chief patron and champion of legislation that was signed into law and is in effect today, like the Red Tape Regulatory Reform legislation which reduces burdensome red tape for small businesses, the Healthcare Transparency Bill, which reduces the cost of healthcare by introducing competition created by allowing the consumer to know the estimated cost of services prior to services being performed, the historic coal ash cleanup bill, which reduces known carcinogens in our streams and rivers and legislation that would allow our elected school boards, not big business, to determine when our students should return back to school. And that's just for starters.

Read more: [https://www.digitaljournal.com/pr/news/senator-amanda-chase-of-virginia-endorsed-by-veterans-for-trump#ixzz7ymamwXvu](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eBHU1HickG-SzfvEWZIhHlzWQn0Sn4_NJDbPF7iIiNB--3e2huxYDoXNRRQ5M8jzV-K34foa1NN5UvGZMtdhKw4mHau0PSNlAgiW4pYRBplnwwIKkhUhaxkx84NYuJfFtmp7GatO2x5X-dfAhyoXg0PVg43K2-J_wAS5ezNZeY2XgJtHd2W63SvsD4f2KBpnZjjYHRAFpGog9D4_YGnxMmuAyBT2PZKwOIOz3tC55R63wIjP0J-S2HsDGKPcanic1XCpgI7svc7SF4-eMP_Zlg==&c=sQpL_qr7jjpfdmMc5Rz8YPCCzRvw8SKW88BMQNGhYv8u7rDfngTpkQ==&ch=dhwxHcdgD863jUhsD8gTjywMzA6LomhmRorX2wvfPtabs86zqsMJMA==)

name: PA Dems
subject: Our judicial candidates need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pennsylvania Democratic Party
body:
These elections are crucial
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61738447/401021904/96769238?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDdjZWM2MS0wY2RhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rW2QhRWScH3TLpl_Qo82iakTipKJk1oQ8oLHNfoo4zI=&emci=1da293d1-05da-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=dd7cec61-0cda-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=25616296)
Dear team,
Last week Wisconsin Democrats had a lot to celebrate as they were able to win [the majority in the state’s supreme court for the first time in 15 years](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61738448/401021907/116148923?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDdjZWM2MS0wY2RhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rW2QhRWScH3TLpl_Qo82iakTipKJk1oQ8oLHNfoo4zI=&emci=1da293d1-05da-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=dd7cec61-0cda-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=25616296).
**And now it’s our turn.**
Pennsylvania has its own judicial elections this year, with seats up on the state’s Supreme and Superior court. With our democracy still under attack,_** it’s critical that we have a strongly Democratic Supreme & Superior Court to act as a firewall**_ against any bogus conspiracy claims they’re sure to make in the upcoming 2024 presidential election, and protect a woman’s right to choose in Pennsylvania.
Meet the judicial candidates _**who have the official endorsement from the PA Dems**_ , and need your help to win this November:
**[Click here to donate to Judge Dan McCaffrey for Supreme Court](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61738449/401021908/195632590?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDdjZWM2MS0wY2RhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rW2QhRWScH3TLpl_Qo82iakTipKJk1oQ8oLHNfoo4zI=&emci=1da293d1-05da-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=dd7cec61-0cda-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=25616296): **
Highly recommended by the PA Bar Association, overwhelmingly endorsed by the PA Democratic Party and proudly endorsed by the PA AFL-CIO, PA State Building and Construction Trades and over 150 local unions statewide, Dan not only brings the most significant labor and Party support but is also the most experienced candidate running giving us the best path to victory in November when the real battle happens. But he can't do it alone. Voting on May 16th is going to set the course for Abortion Rights, Voter Rights, Workers’ Rights, and the policies that matter most. PA’s Supreme Court Race just became the most important race in the country. Don’t sit this one out.
**[Click here to donate to Judge Timika Lane for Superior Court:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61738450/401021911/-2094594857?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDdjZWM2MS0wY2RhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rW2QhRWScH3TLpl_Qo82iakTipKJk1oQ8oLHNfoo4zI=&emci=1da293d1-05da-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=dd7cec61-0cda-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=25616296)**
Raised in a blue-collar, union family with military roots, the importance of public service was
instilled in Judge Lane at an early age. As a public school teacher, certified child advocate, majors trial attorney, Executive Director and now Court of Common Pleas judge presiding over serious cases from Human Trafficking, Domestic Abuse, Child Abuse, Rape to Consumer Protection matters, Judge Lane brings an unique skillset.
In Pennsylvania, the Superior Court is often the final legal resort since the Supreme Court only hears a select group of cases. Judge Lane has extensive legal experience practicing and presiding over all the areas of law that come before the Superior Court. This is why she has a diverse coalition of labor and first responder support across this Commonwealth and both the Pennsylvania and Philadelphia Bar Associations rated her highly recommended to serve on the Superior Court. Judge Lane knows the responsibilities that come with being a judge and her unparalleled experience would make her an exceptional judge on the Superior Court ready to serve on day one.
[Click here to donate to Jill Beck for Superior Court](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61738451/401021914/1430888148?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDdjZWM2MS0wY2RhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rW2QhRWScH3TLpl_Qo82iakTipKJk1oQ8oLHNfoo4zI=&emci=1da293d1-05da-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=dd7cec61-0cda-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=25616296):
Jill knows firsthand that justice is served only when every person – regardless of race, ethnicity, religion, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability or income – has fair and equal access to the courts.
Jill is Highly Recommended by the Pennsylvania Bar Association, endorsed by
the PA Dems, Pennsylvania AFL-CIO, Pennsylvania State Building and Construction Trades Council, as well as numerous unions and elected officials
across the Commonwealth.
After graduating at the top of her class from Duquesne University School of Law, Jill chose to work for the nonprofit organization KidsVoice, before spending a decade on the Superior and Supreme Court where she drafted over 500 decisions of the very kind she will decide as Judge.
She is running for the Pennsylvania Superior Court to ensure that justice in Pennsylvania truly is for ALL.

* * *

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. www.padems.com

She is running for the Pennsylvania Superior Court to ensure that justice in Pennsylvania truly is for ALL.

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: Culture wars
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
Republicans across the country are fanning the flames of culture wars to distract from the fact that on health, wealth, and educational outcomes they are failing.

Friends -
Republicans across the country are fanning the flames of culture wars to distract from the fact that on health, wealth, and economic outcomes they are failing.
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/2124?t=1&akid=1277%2E4767699%2EM3dVSk)
[WATCH THE VIDEO](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/2124?t=2&akid=1277%2E4767699%2EM3dVSk)
There’s a lot of myth and a lot of BS out there coming from Republicans across the country and it is critically important that Democrats go on the offense — and I am not talking about Washington, D.C. alone.
That’s why I started the Campaign for Democracy. And why I kicked it off with visits to Alabama, Mississippi, Arkansas and Florida.
This is the United States of America, and there are a lot of states where families are hurting and rights are being rolled back by far-right Republican leaders.
We can’t give up on those Americans.
Gavin Newsom
* * *

👋🏻 **Hi.** Please don’t click away just yet. 🇺🇸
All across the country, rights are being rolled-back in real-time by Republicans with a zest for demonization. We are going to go on the road and on offense — in red states too — and take the fight to statehouses, local communities, and electoral battlegrounds to save our democracy.
If everyone reading this donated just $20, we could support every “Red State” party across the country and give Democrats a chance to win EVERYWHERE. If that sounds worth it and important to you, please donate $20 to the Campaign for Democracy today. Thank you.

subject: Franklin Graham just broke his silence

body:
| | **" That's why this is the moment to make sure that, when the Judge examines your life, you have placed your faith in Jesus Christ's death and resurrection for the forgiveness of your sins."**
In light of Trump's arrest, the great Rev. Franklin Graham just spoke out on what will guide us through any trying time.
Because at this moment, America needs God more than ever.
**Faith in God in America is already at an all-time low.**
**Democrats have just pledged $45 million to wipe out Christian Republicans.**
**And now that Trump has been arrested, they hope to take out the biggest defender of religious liberty & the unborn our country has ever seen.**
Democrats hope that if they throw Trump behind bars, Republicans will never show up to the polls again. Then they'll have free reign to trample our religious liberties.
[**So today we 're PLEADING for every faithful Christian conservative reading this message to add their name and stand with us against the WORST political Witch Hunt in American history.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62555226:6uQu94GgN:m:1:3361486117:CDB7E6CA77FCA9981628A96EA2C3EED0:r)

body:

---
| Friend
As an America-First Congresswoman, I've spent my time in the House fighting for everyday Americans who have been left behind by Joe Biden and the Radical Left. I've stood up for America's kids, fought back against unconstitutional mandates, defended your freedoms, and helped grow jobs for millions of Americans.
I've always acted in America's best interest, fighting battles that will support our freedoms, economy, and nation...
I'm determined to continue my fight until Republicans have the House, Senate, and White House, but there's only one thing on my mind right now... Friend, are you on my side?

clean_body: | | | | == | Friend As an America-First Congresswoman, I've spent my time in the House fighting for everyday Americans who have been left behind by Joe Biden and the Radical Left. I've stood up for America's kids, fought back against unconstitutional mandates, defended your freedoms, and helped grow jobs for millions of Americans. I've always acted in America's best interest, fighting battles that will support our freedoms, economy, and nation... I'm determined to continue my fight until Republicans have the House, Senate, and White House, but there's only one thing on my mind right now... Friend, are you on my side? | | == | Serving you has been, and always will be, my first priority. I ran for Congress to serve others and ensure that they were free from the expensive policies that cost my family our home and ranch. I've seen what bad leaders can do, which is why I want you to join the team! I always aim to talk and hear from all of my supporters, and signing on today will give you access to new polls, notifications on my social media, and more direct updates on what I'm doing for you in Congress. So what are you waiting for? == | | == | Thank you for joining the Team, | == Kat Cammack | | == | == == == | | | | | | | Kat for Congress | 5200 NW 43rd Street, Suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 | | == Sent by mailto:info@katforcongress.com

name: Special Elections Update (via DLCC.org)
subject: re: winning streak
body:
State Democrats make a difference – and we want to keep these victories rolling in. Can you help us get more state Democrats elected in the next few weeks? | | |

Friend,
I sat down with Tucker Carlson on Tuesday night for my FIRST INTERVIEW since I was arrested and arraigned.
_Tucker asked if there’s**ANYTHING** the Democrats could throw at me that would make me drop out of the presidential race._
Without hesitation, I said, _**“NO. I’D NEVER DROP OUT.”**_
Because the fate of America hangs in the balance - and I will _NEVER SURRENDER_ our country to the radical Left.
If an unjust, and possibly illegal, ARREST didn’t even make me flinch - then I promise you, NOTHING WILL.
**Now, I’m asking YOU to stand with me as the Left tries to throw everything they can at us to _force me out of the presidential election._**

name: VoteVets
subject: We don’t ban books here
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
This is about the kind of country we want to be.
#
Derek —
It wasn’t long ago that most people agreed on this pretty uncontroversial statement: Here in the United States, we don’t ban books.
Generations of Veterans fought for that. Our men and women on active duty defend that. And we all know what kinds of countries — what kinds of people — like to ban books.
But today, Republicans are pushing book bans wherever they can. In many cases, they’re going further. Republicans in Missouri are moving a bill that would revoke funding for public libraries entirely.
This is bigger than just the books. It’s bigger than Republicans versus Democrats. This is about the kind of country we want to be.
From local town and city races all the way up to the presidency, VoteVets is in this fight. We’ve been working to elect progressive Veterans and allies to public office for 17 years, and we’ve gotten pretty damn good at it.
And today, you have a role to play.
**[Ahead of our mid-month deadline on Saturday, donate $3 to the VoteVets PATRIOT FUND. This is what we’re going to use to run ads in swing races, turn out our voters, and beat wacko right-wing extremists in the House and Senate.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-apr23.Brw65h&refcode=em230413-1-15&t=1&akid=8163%2E3013755%2EAoIGdy)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

| | | A judge ordered that Mike Pence must testify to a federal grand jury investigating the aftermath of the 2020 election and the events of January 6th. He will have a chance to tell the story of what happened that day -- including Trump's role. And he should tell the truth -- the whole truth -- and help put Trump in jail where he belongs! But Trump is now trying to APPEAL this judge’s order and stop Pence from testifying. It’s ridiculous! Trump incited a mob to go kill Pence. And the appeal has no legal justification, it’s just an attempt by Trump to waste time and delay justice until he comes up with yet another excuse. name: Vikram Mansharamani
subject: Navigating Uncertainty - Frank Edelblut
body:
Podcast, radio show, conversations...
| | | |
---
# Speaking with Frank Edelblut
---
Dr. Mansharamani's most recent conversation was just posted earlier today and will be aired on The Pulse of New Hampshire this weekend. His guest was Frank Edelblut, a successful businessman who currently serves as New Hampshire's Commissioner of Education. You can listen to the show on the Pulse of New Hampshire app or wherever you get your podcasts (links to several sites are at the end of this email).
---
EPISODE 5: COMMISSIONER FRANK EDELBLUT
In the most recent episode of Navigating Uncertainty, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with Frank Edelblut, Commissioner of Education for the State of New Hampshire. An accountant turned successful businessman, Commissioner Edelblut shared how he has navigated uncertainty in his personal life as well as his thinking around several important education topics. Topics addressed include charter schools, education financing, parental rights, and the increasing importance of lifelong learning.
---

EPISODE 4: COMMISSIONER TAYLOR CASWELL
In the fourth episode of Navigating Uncertainty, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with Commissioner Taylor Caswell, head of the Department of Business and Economic Affairs for the State of New Hampshire. A native of Littleton, Commissioner Caswell shared his philosophy around navigating a career in the public and private sectors, his hopes for a restoration of civil civic engagement, and his love of the outdoors (and cookies)!
---

EPISODE 3: VIVEK RAMASWAMY
In episode three, Dr. Mansahramani speaks with entrepreneur, one-time stand up comic, and prolific author Vivek Ramaswamy about the American dream and what it was like growing up in Ohio. In addition to exploring the power of annoyance, they discuss the key decisions that took Vivek from the Ivy League to a very successful biotech company (with a stint as a comedian along the way)...and his recent announcement to enter the US Presidential contest as part of his quest to help restore an American identity.
---
EPISODE 2: GENERAL LORI ROBINSON
In the second episode, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with General Lori Robinson, USAF (Ret), a New Hampshire native who served as the Commander of North American Aerospace Defense Command (NORAD). General Robinson was also America's first female Combatant Commander and served as head of Northern Command. She is an awesome leader, dedicated America who has served the United States for decades, and all around amazing person. She has also faced (and successfully navigated) many forms of uncertainty on her path to becoming a four-star general.
---
EPISODE 1: MIKE ROGERS
In the first episode, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with Mike Rogers, former chair of the House Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence, and former multi-term Congressman from Michigan. Mike served in the military and also fought organized crime as a member of the Federal Bureau of Investigation. He's a class act, a first-rate thinker, and a patriotic American who cares deeply about the United States and its future.

---
| |
---
---
|
---
|
Navigating Uncertainty is a show in which acclaimed global trend-watcher and futurist Vikram Mansharamani dives into how leaders make decisions. Through long-form conversations that move beyond sound-bites, Dr. Mansharamani explores how some of the most successful people think about tough choices. Serious, irreverent, entertaining, heart-warming, and occasionally tear-jerking, Navigating Uncertainty offers listeners bite-sized authentic biographies of high-impact leaders from all walks of life.Weekly episodes are released every Thursday via Apple Podcast, Spotify and everywhere podcasts are generally available!

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: See what it’s like to learn here
body:
One of the best parts of my job at Hillsdale College is seeing Americans across the country

| This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c874576b29724d2ca487dee38c6dbc21&_e=-roDRBQTMZYM1y1-4tCYvNHxUwgenpL9e404mged59pWZapka55pOk32PneCSQkLxX0xRIE_vcBW4XUvmrq3Sw-eDiA_nna5h5sN7gru139Do6-1x_vBpC6TkjuZmt1HzniV0LOBgS7Tl6WNYRYCqQe5qxX9y1U4QFg1fgSOqMeC6wxtDLiUkY5_dY_mTMrbYKfHVG-eMoXEt9HimINVUUEbb6sGkbeElr53s5ksSQQdEmUyaz7LJJ8vZ3gEWV49ggcZtYT2gjPeOU0ZSoKcuRcN7fnjdI2lEwrVGtnfLsFP4qOyXp5c2iw3Qk6yq3duX_bVhBvqbWzgLRGb1OizECpHNo5c4fUeBL4C7L3TzgIHx1q75FD5ZfqnvFrtwcMAtG6eszWPwrxIMxoKKndpdIlTvptcIcA_40YKXnhD9rs8y-g1YKkiTRIF6QhjSM11)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, One of the best parts of my job at Hillsdale College is seeing Americans across the country engage with the profound truths of our nation's founding documents, including the Declaration of Independence and the Constitution. We care deeply about educating all Americans about our founding principles. That's why we spent months working on our course, **" Introduction to the Constitution."**
---
| | And right now, a limited number of copies of this course are available on DVD for you to add to your library or give as a gift. When you take [**" Introduction to the Constitution,"**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c874576b29724d2ca487dee38c6dbc21&_e=-roDRBQTMZYM1y1-4tCYvNHxUwgenpL9e404mged59pWZapka55pOk32PneCSQkLxX0xRIE_vcBW4XUvmrq3Sw-eDiA_nna5h5sN7gru139Do6-1x_vBpC6TkjuZmt1HzniV0LOBgS7Tl6WNYRYCqQe5qxX9y1U4QFg1fgSOqMeC6wxtDLiUkY5_dY_mTMrbYKfHVG-eMoXEt9HimINVUUEbb6sGkbeElr53s5ksSQQdEmUyaz7LJJ8vZ3gEWV49ggcZtYT2gjPeOU0ZSoKcuRcN7fnjdI2lEwrVGtnfLsFkjDcw6IN2lW9XiV_WvA67FtCsmnEWmR7o_jPDYmQwoyQHQjnIjmpz7BjpgcJH-h_2c7oRq7tZ6ieUXk6oDd0vnmHKzpw8jkI1yzXVBB_PX0AplwU2dD_9F15nvdstLQ0AqtWsLZby1H4cqXIuR6Bn) you'll learn about:
* The natural rights theory of America's founding.
* The meaning of the Declaration and Constitution.
* The crisis of the Civil War.
* The progressive rejection of the founding.
* The nature and form of modern liberalism.

This course was one of the first we recorded in a new style that allows you to look inside one of our classes and follow discussions led by Hillsdale College President Larry P. Arnn.

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: BREAKING: First Debate in Milwaukee
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
The number of grassroots donors will likely be one of the main criteria for an invitation to the first Presidential Debate.

| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665698%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UmJZxiCFvrmlVJRlEtacwA&sysid=1)
Fellow American,

**Yesterday, the RNC announced the location of the first Presidential Debate.**

I am going to put in the work EVERY DAY to make sure I am on that debate stage.

While we don't know today the criteria to be invited to the main debate stage yet, it's clear that the number of unique grassroots donors will play a major role.

To make sure I can share my vision for America on the debate stage, _**[I need your help.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665699%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cGEfhRHlUoUGAkWDZawHkA&sysid=1)**_

**[Even if it's a small amount, can I count on you to join our movement by chipping in $1, $5, or even $20 today?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665690%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hLPCA2JyLpKO8LJYSj8AwA&sysid=1)**

| [** Chip in $1 → **](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665691%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hatU8QM2eqmCyS25mrZT7g&sysid=1)
---

[** Chip in $5 → **](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665692%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=s8I2dXGSne4XPfYgePL%2bGA&sysid=1)
---

[** Chip in $10 → **](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665693%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SnMdxLYKK3sxUEm9xbPIPg&sysid=1)
---

Whatever amount you are comfortable giving will help us drive forward and get our ideas a prominent spot on the debate stage.

**[Your support today will help build our American revival and prepare for the first debate this August!](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665694%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=R1jLuIp292I8vM2UtiokMg&sysid=1)**

Thanks,

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665698%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UmJZxiCFvrmlVJRlEtacwA&sysid=1)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** DONATE TODAY → **](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665605%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GB%2fxWP4FXgtf%2fQaIl7mRRg&sysid=1)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665606%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1kym%2fc9t8uzyacH0jk%2bfRg&sysid=1)

---

| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665607%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=t7wr2F3NB3Wzk9a5sV8P8A&sysid=1) | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665608%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xtZ%2fp0q91GNrz1Oc7%2ftAZA&sysid=1) | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665609%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4B%2b0ss7ePfa4rwdhgwmbdQ&sysid=1)

name: Indiana Republican Party
subject: 100 days in
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
Congressional Republicans are delivering...
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/d8f11d95f98a1437/cc0981b7e7e8d8bac3d6b838967d376c/40313)

Hoosier Republican. We’re officially **100 days** into the 118th Congress. And the new House Republican Majority has hit the ground running, working on behalf of Hoosiers and Americans to provide vital checks on the Biden administration and deliver on their legislative agenda, the **Commitment to America**. Here’s a brief highlight of what they’ve done so far — ✅ **Repealed** 87,000 IRS agents ✅ **Reopened** the People’s House✅ **Eliminated** the military vaccine mandate✅ **Stopped** selling the Strategic Petroleum Reserve to China✅ **Nullified** Washington, D.C.’s crime bill✅ **Terminated** the national COVID emergency ✅ **Passed** H.R. 1: The Lower Energy Costs Act✅ **Passed** H.R. 5: The Parents Bill of Rights✅ **Established** a bipartisan China Select Committee Our Republican congressional delegation of **Reps.** **Rudy Yakym, Jim Banks, Jim Baird, Victoria Spartz, Greg Pence, Larry Bucshon, and Erin Houchin** are working hard every day for Hoosiers like you. **And they’re just getting started.**** ** [**Please consider chipping in a contribution today to help us send more Hoosiers to Washington, D.C. to get our country back on track!**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/d8f11d95f98a1437/c64d4dc8ad28fbb3c3d6b838967d376c/40313) — Indiana Republican Party

name: Bill Spadea
subject: [GOING LIVE] Fighting mandates & changing your mindset
body:
Peter, I'll be LIVE SOON at 4:30PM EDT for my Common Ground Podcast, and my guests for the day are New Jersey's very own Dana
| [](https://xtz223.keap-link014.com/v2/click/20c34beb0ada94a5562865afbe08c1c0/eJyNj0ELgkAQhf_LnCVRi8SbiIhoHqLOsa1DLem6rKNk4n9vrahLQdeZ732PNwKhZJLSEgK40s11PbBAIxdKoKSokcT44-uulo7nWFAJeUl00ykIxq_hNzCffd-zgAaFhthtwyhLi-SQp0VmQMW0qfhLs3Y-mngTpjlM008v1oLi3qhbCEh3OO8phdlEe10Z_kyk2sC2eVPXjTyZDlkueNUd7Ur0aARMKZTla3uGw1Mz3QGIOGKC)
---
| Peter, **I'll be LIVE SOON at 4:30PM EDT for my Common Ground Podcast, and my guests for the day are New Jersey's very own Dana Wefer and Rob Gill.** Today's show will revolve around fighting mandates and changing your mindset. As Americans, we have the right to make our own decisions about our health and well-being. We should have the right to make informed decisions about our medical treatment based on our personal beliefs, medical history, and advice from our trusted healthcare professionals. Vaccine mandates, along with other mandates, infringe upon our individual liberties and autonomy.

---
| | [CLICK HERE TO OPEN THE COMMON GROUND STREAM NOW (I'LL BE LIVE AT 4:30PM EDT)](https://xtz223.keap-link014.com/v2/click/b0b48b53091cd5c5b17a2c19d7566bd7/eJyNj8EKglAQRf9l1pKoReJOREQ0F1HrMB3qkT4fz1Ey8d8bK1wVtJ0591zuCIQylxSX4MGdHrbtgAEaC6EESgoaSXnx-tqbteVYBlRC3iLddAq88Wt4Aeaz63KEBoVMHPZ-kMRZdErjLGFQ5Zor_tJsLWfRhDs_TmGafnqxFhT2rG7BI93hvKcUvImOumL-SqRazzSLpq4beeEOWa6KqjubleiRBblSKMvP9gSHt2Z6AoakYoA=)
---
|
---
| Dana Wefer is an experienced attorney in New Jersey and New York. Dana has been fighting on behalf of workers, students, and teachers who have been victims of unlawful mandates. Her recent lawsuit against President Joe Biden and the federal government challenges the vaccine mandates imposed on federal workers and contractors. She will be coming on to share her story. After all, we have the right to make our own decisions about our health and well-being, and the covid shot in particular which has shown to be both ineffective and potentially harmful, crossed the line. Rob Gill is the Founder and CEO of EPIC Financial Strategies, and today, he will cover why having a negative attitude towards money is one of the biggest barriers to achieving financial freedom. After performing more than 23,000 cash flow analyses, Rob and his team have noticed that most people have the mindset that money is scarce and difficult to attain. This often creates a self-fulfilling prophecy, which makes it challenging for most people to achieve financial stability and success. Rob will talk about how changing your mindset is essential to overcoming these limiting beliefs and achieving financial freedom. Make sure you [**join us now (we'll be live right at 4:30PM EDT),**](https://xtz223.keap-link014.com/v2/click/9a25c92f85a1f800420e9f969cf5d1ea/eJyNj0ELgkAQhf_LnCVRC2tvEiKieYg6h61DLem6rKNk4n9vrfBU0HXme9_jDUAoc0lxAQzu9HBdDyzQyIUSKGlbS8r56-uulo7nWFAKeYt03Spgw9fwDEzntb-xgHqFhjjsg20SZ9EpjbPEgCrXpuIvje94sybcBXEK4_jTi5WgsDPqBhjpFqc9hTCb6KhLw1-JVMNsm9dVVcuL6ZDFgpft2S5Fh0aQK4Wy-GxPsH9rxieMKWKH) Bill
---
|
---

---

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: This campaign is about you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Today, I want to take a moment to tell you a little more about the campaign we’re building — and why your early support is so critical.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=159%2E35263%2EoFlPYr)
Peter, You may have seen that yesterday, I announced my reelection campaign to continue serving Wisconsin in the U.S. Senate. Today, I want to take a moment to tell you a little more about the campaign we’re building — and why your early support is so critical. **Here’s the deal: This campaign is not going to be about me — it will always be about working for you.** It will be about standing up for your families, your health care, your jobs, and your retirement. And it will be about building on the progress we’ve made together — making sure you have the leadership you deserve in Washington. That’s what my work has always been about. It’s why I proudly cast my vote to fight climate change, lower the cost of prescription drugs, and expand health care for our veterans. It’s why I’ve fought so hard to protect marriage equality for all Americans. It’s why I’ve defended Medicare and Social Security from those who want to tear those critical resources away from folks relying on them. **[You’ve been by my side in fight after fight. Now, I’m asking if you’ll stand by me once again by becoming an official Founding Donor to my reelection campaign:](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-launch23.BP3f3F&refcode=AU_STB_FR_LAU_GEN_AC_20230413_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=159%2E35263%2EoFlPYr)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2151?c0=tbe-em-launch23.kLC5-H&refcode=AU_STB_FR_LAU_GEN_AC_20230413_AM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=159%2E35263%2EoFlPYr)

[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-launch23.BP3f3F&refcode=AU_STB_FR_LAU_GEN_AC_20230413_AM1_V1_S1&t=10&akid=159%2E35263%2EoFlPYr)

We’ve got quite a long road ahead of us. National Republicans are already targeting Wisconsin, and they’ll undoubtedly spend a fortune attacking me.
But I know I won’t have to fight back alone. Your early support in this race will help ensure my team and I have the resources we’ll need to take on anything coming our way, and I couldn’t be more grateful to have you with me.
Thank you in advance for anything you’re able to pitch in today as we get this campaign started.
— Tammy
P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701
**[www.tammybaldwin.com](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=2&akid=159%2E35263%2EoFlPYr) | [INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM](mailto:INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=3&akid=159%2E35263%2EoFlPYr)**

Hi Peter — I have exciting news to share, and I wanted you to hear it from me: **I’m officially running for reelection to the United States Senate.** I know the road ahead won’t always be easy — election experts are already calling me one of the most vulnerable Senate Democrats on the ballot next year. But with you by my side, I know we can get this done and win big next November. **[Peter, will you help me start the first day of our reelection in the strongest position by splitting a donation between my campaign in Wisconsin and Eric Sorensen today?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953weKjCqk0KPLC1-cchVUPqsxtM3nKZA2D4pLe6DudnD33JBM5wP6HjQnasd5icyRZjuHv-TRUUGqQvb_caqSoOptp0mbOV323yH6q9LL369rvFxwE9zHLeLqBlSZca9AffZRAD7b7U7_dXem8Lj7lODVMTkXDxBDCzDUEXvp22lrB5-I9Vjh40BgAvtK5dYBf40PWdqfXFkmZpymbgjdA1E32b9py_eFkt-pJgFX6AaTP2weaxHsJ4qUFP2qDrq64yUqyaC2fEB1tkT34AqJ_P0a9e7VdqDQ_rmNpMjJR5pyuKEE8DeRSrkG64KLupp7194LxNF5wSuUyvEKf1If_cTgExvPOrG4dK6GUxAWZ89AAIq13UACp7mtoIZJ1apQ7xoI7DbA-iFf7mSCHVErFsp3rFLJF4Cw_OZQGHvJ1whedatyAZO2tw8HPtetGxJmWfMHDrxaq--8o8xjtEie2aw2U8I1vbZmx-DO_sxlwsJJw/3vb/QwP-HJP5TT-My8WTI_Z6Bg/h1/zvWFrkhKeau_Z4AZJ-hs8e6LMm6CvAHrHHKc0EN28bs)**

subject: championing a brighter future for the working class
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sanchez
body:
As the incoming chair of BOLD PAC, I will seek to elect Latino progressives who champion a brighter future for teachers, workers, and the entire working-class community in the US.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61743040/401040612/-1382951893?refcode=BLU-SAN-20230413-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjMwYTQ2ZC0xOGRhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YbHvQ9GK6FCxQtK2EyyC3PVjb5LnlLkTqbu-Q_UMVjw=)
---
| Peter,

So much of what we take for granted is owed to labor organizers. From industrial workers who fought for non-discriminatory labor practices to farm workers who fought for fair pay and safe working conditions, California would not be what it is today if not for their tireless efforts.

As a labor rights lawyer from a working-class background, I am proud to represent a community with such a rich labor history.

**But we can’t ignore the Republican party’s disregard for working-class communities here in California and across the country. It’s time to prioritize our working class so we can raise wages, increase funding for public schools, and protect Social Security and Medicare.**

As the incoming chair of BOLD PAC, I will seek to elect Latino progressives who champion a brighter future for teachers, workers, and the entire working-class community in the US. [_**Peter, I hope you will support my efforts by chipping in $5, $10, $15, or whatever you can to my campaign.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61743042/401040626/-1382951893?refcode=BLU-SAN-20230413-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjMwYTQ2ZC0xOGRhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YbHvQ9GK6FCxQtK2EyyC3PVjb5LnlLkTqbu-Q_UMVjw=)

Fellow American,

I know you probably receive a lot of fundraising emails in your inbox, **so I wanted to take a second to say thank you for reading this one and explain why your continued support is so critical.**

[**Running a campaign like this one is _extremely_ expensive**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=a1d0c0b4cc074066af5a15cce31f3346&_e=JQst47KWyh0kZOh8M5r3q0wRPL-g7YUZEYAC3zDk161q2LCFySvqzI-WGt2u1eb4k-HXp34OmLA4cQCan6mSM9TKDFTzdDT775RmbB_fZyZWsca0_2Snh53VCqd9EnODwZzokdxvD6_bMdBRsszR9U-ctGaCpS8FvJfVwHlZOghFIuKefu9BoHYhORlkDwvPZx8D7WqAWx7nOCvEcDEnKfcyGkxTIRwcFnLj7p93dtdI47tE7McTmI2sptKjEZi70WL9radlFr4iJGq62YWijHRTgZ_J76exwpBv1eQBHohHMZXU5bF-BLAGG-CFLpZYmCf0lKcnEzZiwhU0rdZwCVFrgeEMaeMJi_9w4WQVVLoTq5ZVQ0hk-qOCXjMzAfVPc2LR1cLLZJNeqT_q4_63fw%3D%3D) – especially with the attacks coming at me from all sides of the Democratic party.

Just take a moment to think about all the things which go into a campaign for Congress:

* Paying our staff
* Door-knocking software
* Billboard advertising
* Get-out-the-vote efforts
* Travel expenses for the team
* Pizza and coffee for volunteers
* Digital advertisements, and emails just like this one!

It really starts to add up... _and do you know how most politicians pay for it?_ They come from wealthy families!

Well Fellow American, it’s not the case for me. I pulled myself up by my bootstraps – after dropping out of high school and taking classes at a technical college to graduate, then going on to graduate from the Citadel and working my way to Congress to represent real people like you and me.

I didn’t grow up with a silver spoon in my mouth. I got by without government handouts or radical socialist policies – and I am a better woman because of it. [**So, to stay in this fight I have to build a grassroots-funded warchest – meaning donations from folks just like you.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=a1d0c0b4cc074066af5a15cce31f3346&_e=JQst47KWyh0kZOh8M5r3q0wRPL-g7YUZEYAC3zDk161q2LCFySvqzI-WGt2u1eb4k-HXp34OmLA4cQCan6mSM9TKDFTzdDT775RmbB_fZyZWsca0_2Snh53VCqd9EnODwZzokdxvD6_bMdBRsszR9U-ctGaCpS8FvJfVwHlZOghFIuKefu9BoHYhORlkDwvPZx8D7WqAWx7nOCvEcDEnKfcyGkxTIRwcFnLj7p93dtcL3Qa28-76OXViMhHR8Lm8cYwYBHof6dRWwsKUtnQUIKOUyEb92oFg-rKEnpVNQIGacfWyYfrea4op2Y911bNSY_qlSgwil67qty5joRdAcLSx39mBJp2W-wOmP3Jjvuh5XJLRKvzULiLKps7as6out48LXI0aoDsQUS_HyxXg_A%3D%3D)

[**Can you help me out today with a gift of any amount today to fund my campaign efforts?**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=a1d0c0b4cc074066af5a15cce31f3346&_e=JQst47KWyh0kZOh8M5r3q0wRPL-g7YUZEYAC3zDk161q2LCFySvqzI-WGt2u1eb4k-HXp34OmLA4cQCan6mSM9TKDFTzdDT775RmbB_fZyZWsca0_2Snh53VCqd9EnODwZzokdxvD6_bMdBRsszR9U-ctGaCpS8FvJfVwHlZOghFIuKefu9BoHYhORlkDwvPZx8D7WqAWx7nOCvEcDEnKfcyGkxTIRwcFnLj7p93dtdtZSm8KXzG5-q4x01ln6v3glXc_z7xEC5JwDJ5iSNqoWLApwK6uLX1cv_8Y7or7hAZwGoMDd78S9TACdt4mZOmjKlNImIRKcKE1oXy9HLblP5q7hW-7PRH9_vgRPvODVAEBv3-NAODNRYUnFPmB7LJrdANZUH5_L64jgVlCTe-6w%3D%3D)

[** MORE ➞ **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=a1d0c0b4cc074066af5a15cce31f3346&_e=JQst47KWyh0kZOh8M5r3q0wRPL-g7YUZEYAC3zDk161q2LCFySvqzI-WGt2u1eb4k-HXp34OmLA4cQCan6mSM9TKDFTzdDT775RmbB_fZyZWsca0_2Snh53VCqd9EnODwZzokdxvD6_bMdBRsszR9U-ctGaCpS8FvJfVwHlZOghFIuKefu9BoHYhORlkDwvPZx8D7WqAWx7nOCvEcDEnKfcyGkxTIRwcFnLj7p93dtdxXyJdzppzTqfo2XJrbPTC0Nc7xjw9EkttSUYf9-uZC2Y2pIznADx7UTLEw7KhKFX7MffhJtnZ09t8wZbgTVQ8WNHUCINzp057MmaDbKxhPD2B-7atFxr8ehzCsvfWVzoHoRo56uRUrq6aLIgGSgjy4GJGhgc7J8msPJny3BqQUg%3D%3D)

Do you know why Washington is filled to the brim with wealthy folks who think they can buy seats? [**Because they have the funds to dump millions into ultra-competitive seats just like this one.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=a1d0c0b4cc074066af5a15cce31f3346&_e=JQst47KWyh0kZOh8M5r3q0wRPL-g7YUZEYAC3zDk161q2LCFySvqzI-WGt2u1eb4k-HXp34OmLA4cQCan6mSM9TKDFTzdDT775RmbB_fZyZWsca0_2Snh53VCqd9EnODwZzokdxvD6_bMdBRsszR9U-ctGaCpS8FvJfVwHlZOghFIuKefu9BoHYhORlkDwvPZx8D7WqAWx7nOCvEcDEnKfcyGkxTIRwcFnLj7p93dtfGRooVOEb8ZgqMpI-9Ea88zF98jdS652tP0tebsUwsirnSacmELZm94CPel6bHs5M72AHvwF0tbF4AdKnDkaR9edMnxEwPnbjAQgSXFzXkVYjP2-dAy6ecNHcixlRINseMgy_QgCpx8CT7PxlVSxHCqMePugdAKynE_-Pk-YrshA%3D%3D)

Well, SC-01 is not for sale no matter how much money the ultra-wealthy Dems throw at it. [**I want to keep working for you and our family, but I need your help to keep this seat and fight back against the attacks.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=a1d0c0b4cc074066af5a15cce31f3346&_e=JQst47KWyh0kZOh8M5r3q0wRPL-g7YUZEYAC3zDk161q2LCFySvqzI-WGt2u1eb4k-HXp34OmLA4cQCan6mSM9TKDFTzdDT775RmbB_fZyZWsca0_2Snh53VCqd9EnODwZzokdxvD6_bMdBRsszR9U-ctGaCpS8FvJfVwHlZOghFIuKefu9BoHYhORlkDwvPZx8D7WqAWx7nOCvEcDEnKfcyGkxTIRwcFnLj7p93dtfEQmzPp5-6sJEb22UZ5wlwZPktz_nSfwTPXmvLKmPdTmFHMq6cdkYeQjXPqfB_x1WsfNY6Ya9D3jWBjYKAYPB9FQxqhP7J_DXcGrBVuomR2A0tKdPTa1leNmFAlB8bEWJoOqs9a3DwG0rH0dWtsc3xcn7bj9mvx3XToO2VVh6lKg%3D%3D)

For the First,

Nancy Mace

# About Nancy
---
Congresswoman Nancy Mace grew up in the Lowcountry. She is the daughter of a retired Army General and retired school teacher. She is a proud mother of two, the first female to graduate from The Citadel's Corps of Cadets, and a tough conservative who wants to save our country from the radicals who hate America! In 2020, she took SC-01 back from the Democrats and now, is fighting tooth and nail to keep it Red. [**JOIN NANCY**](go.txting.io/mEWDMy)
