name: Conservatives Give
subject: Answers to life’s persistent questions
body:
The pursuit of knowledge about the most important things has been the central activity of Hillsdale College for over 179 years.

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6ed2b21a420d445a9c6ef421d5560412&_e=qqaue_E6ttu8rUPsQitVpfmcabq1Y2Vrp42YfQc6ZjQ_ddnuef1XlXZrEj6a6fafF94Utddg-W5erpOjS6aFD3ADBZSzi9YnqI-aWIsJ7vbio23_Dd3ARGuz5bzWqHeKgj-GVIIi67qaIhy977BFHhxYF1SJsF4Tp40WO2y5jcjDezLWR-NjvGaZ1OSNi49_eTSTV-Vsoowe_XSAAAmqJ2YbXTSMFYWjfLn3dLdXnxy14eqhjZRBxy4S0yxfz6mhHwhtR4F93zIRJga2GQw0n50uw0m9sdfvCzmfcEa7S1_R-mhe-i4Ad3hyCjbCwxPNlKuhnBhMQ_AD9kD8U0tUI4klVnleK7n09ZXrkkZHmnwcW2CPxziCCZQy03WNObA0ize1x9GB5gYhXx4dQS_LnT_27s1WJT1B9APzmvhUapcmekSHrK3M1u7Iy6X7iapw) Dear Fellow American, Our **"Introduction to Western Philosophy"** course is now available on DVD. And you can reserve your copy today. Aristotle wrote: "All men by nature desire to know." The pursuit of knowledge about the most important things has been the central activity of Hillsdale College for over 179 years. In contrast, most American colleges and universities have embraced the "postmodern" idea that knowledge, like truth, is relative--that there are no real answers to questions like "What is the best kind of life?" and "What is the right way to act?" [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6ed2b21a420d445a9c6ef421d5560412&_e=qqaue_E6ttu8rUPsQitVpfmcabq1Y2Vrp42YfQc6ZjQ_ddnuef1XlXZrEj6a6fafF94Utddg-W5erpOjS6aFD3ADBZSzi9YnqI-aWIsJ7vbio23_Dd3ARGuz5bzWqHeKgj-GVIIi67qaIhy977BFHhxYF1SJsF4Tp40WO2y5jcjDezLWR-NjvGaZ1OSNi49_eTSTV-Vsoowe_XSAAAmqJ2YbXTSMFYWjfLn3dLdXnxy14eqhjZRBxy4S0yxfz6mhHwhtR4F93zIRJga2GQw0n0e1jviYsj81FhyckrDSVDzeYoLeCDCG1HH4uamBxEVI5yq0ZF6tOA5dtBuBoO7bYBKAzvDBK5eAiV57mKWhGbqZZnApcSPOGQoNNAaubvaMW_BVKQ_rVfSabOL3mnFyUsaEm2L8pIbUHOozeziRIGT0Xxi54_Wn3fdUSPhUMGCu) In 1931, Winston Churchill wrote an essay where he imagined a future where mankind had secured a life of great pleasure, wealth, and convenience. But, Churchill wondered, would that be sufficient for happiness? What did they know more than we know about the answers to the simple questions which man has asked since the earliest dawn of reason--'Why are we here? What is the purpose of life? Whither are we going?' No material progress, even though it takes shapes we cannot now conceive, or however it may expand the faculties of man, can bring comfort to his soul. Hillsdale's free online course, **" Introduction to Western Philosophy,"** examines just such questions as Churchill poses. This course pursues answers to these questions by studying the arguments of great Western philosophers such as Plato, Aristotle, Thomas Aquinas, Immanuel Kant, and C.S. Lewis. And this 14-lecture course is now available in a special DVD box set perfect for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. **The "Introduction to Western Philosophy" DVD box-set can be yours with a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Reserve your copy today using this secure link: ** **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-introduction-to-western-philosophy-dvd](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6ed2b21a420d445a9c6ef421d5560412&_e=qqaue_E6ttu8rUPsQitVpfmcabq1Y2Vrp42YfQc6ZjQ_ddnuef1XlXZrEj6a6fafF94Utddg-W5erpOjS6aFD3ADBZSzi9YnqI-aWIsJ7vbio23_Dd3ARGuz5bzWqHeKgj-GVIIi67qaIhy977BFHhxYF1SJsF4Tp40WO2y5jcjDezLWR-NjvGaZ1OSNi49_eTSTV-Vsoowe_XSAAAmqJ2YbXTSMFYWjfLn3dLdXnxy14eqhjZRBxy4S0yxfz6mhHwhtR4F93zIRJga2GQw0n4aRCA4oouJNjR7YHte3ua3lfWaucg29FwK9RkNUHFGjtOKL9QD3T4zh44TyEse2XVskQhv44lbZBGJpAru7YTcETlevqBsuQSeccEtIAtao2XAHLZCoU1KNArI57C6014I70UmPb52aPhSyYTgWGdkSkGd786IQp4eD3cgFNaLQ)** Hillsdale produces and promotes free online courses, as we do all of our work while refusing to accept government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. With your tax-deductible gift today, we can enroll thousands of Americans in **" Introduction to Western Philosophy"** and other online courses on topics such as the Constitution and American history. Please help promote Hillsdale's free online courses such as **" Introduction to Western Philosophy"** and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for America with a tax-deductible gift. And remember, when you give a gift of $100 or more today, we'll send you a special DVD box set of **" Introduction to Western Philosophy"** as our thank-you. Quantities are limited, though, and you won't find this DVD anywhere else but from Hillsdale. **You can make your tax-deductible gift in support of Hillsdale 's educational outreach efforts and receive your DVD box set using this secure link:** **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-introduction-to-western-philosophy-dvd](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6ed2b21a420d445a9c6ef421d5560412&_e=qqaue_E6ttu8rUPsQitVpfmcabq1Y2Vrp42YfQc6ZjQ_ddnuef1XlXZrEj6a6fafF94Utddg-W5erpOjS6aFD3ADBZSzi9YnqI-aWIsJ7vbio23_Dd3ARGuz5bzWqHeKgj-GVIIi67qaIhy977BFHhxYF1SJsF4Tp40WO2y5jcjDezLWR-NjvGaZ1OSNi49_eTSTV-Vsoowe_XSAAAmqJ2YbXTSMFYWjfLn3dLdXnxy14eqhjZRBxy4S0yxfz6mhHwhtR4F93zIRJga2GQw0n1tU3RT45v1aqrublX-KTxZEPBdivbUu-OTlq6lvHb-BZe8y_1MTulsxovMnl7KGoGWR7KBP3VXYb2smbew6OMQ9AkQENk8nwrABlIVdWp9qGWZNwKlog5ot4DFy5jKdyD_lB9N91Rd_Ds6AzSLgAio8ehKglZP5Cr89oqJIi780)** Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its educational mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| | Team, have a _second?_ Congress is considering the Sunshine Protection Act – a bill that would make daylight saving time (how our clocks are currently set) permanent. But some people are split on the matter. [**So, we want to know: Do you think it’s about _time_ we make daylight saving time permanent?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61743890/401043714/-1161969936?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjM2MTBjYS0xYWRhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=goemkA50dp6oTMm6TNKwj78f95_yhCBYzVEt9Y3e_c8=&emci=476e7133-77d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=423610ca-1ada-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=10997957) | | | [I support daylight saving time >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61743891/401043715/-1161969936?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjM2MTBjYS0xYWRhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=goemkA50dp6oTMm6TNKwj78f95_yhCBYzVEt9Y3e_c8=&emci=476e7133-77d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=423610ca-1ada-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=10997957)

Look, we know it may seem like a _waste of time_ debating this legislation. But, there are important arguments to be made on both sides.
Supporters of the Sunshine Protection Act argue that the ‘spring forward’ and ‘fall back’ method of our clocks is an outdated system. They also say that the additional hour of daylight saves on energy costs, benefits the economy by driving more people out to shop at later hours, and contributes to a healthier lifestyle by promoting more physical activity.
Opponents of the bill say that it’s ultimately unnecessary to make such a big change. Specifically, that darker mornings could disrupt sleeping rhythms which, in turn, could stunt productivity and lead to health problems.
**Whatever side of the fence you fall on, Susie Lee wants to hear your thoughts on the legislation.**
[**There’s not a moment to waste: Can you share whether you’re in support of the Sunshine Protection Act? It will only take a minute!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61743893/401043717/-1161969936?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjM2MTBjYS0xYWRhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=goemkA50dp6oTMm6TNKwj78f95_yhCBYzVEt9Y3e_c8=&emci=476e7133-77d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=423610ca-1ada-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=10997957)

body:

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zafn64ukj5pil5ute94alll6jsrvvqr6k5h4j7h8_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5i61pr2clh2bs "Tuttle Twins")
Friend,

Children of all ages are being brainwashed in our public schools to believe in radical ideas such as socialism is good, our Founding Fathers are bad, and the ideas of freedom are outdated or even racist.

You know what this means for our future?

It means a generation of students will grow up to accept socialism and create a less free and less prosperous society.

Not good.

**Fortunately, I have a solution ... The Tuttle Twins! These books teach children about freedom.**

The Tuttle Twins is a series of children's books teaching kids about free markets, private property rights, the Constitution, and the ideas of our Founding Fathers. [**You can help me distribute more copies of the Tuttle Twins by making a donation of any amount by clicking here!**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbothpdt5ad1b9ptv05udgq082cmbbfn47bc93fg_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5i61pr2clh2bs)

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zffk73fkjij2i1pcjv31uua6csq3uog0s1vkr7pg_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5i61pr2clh2bs)
The reason I wrote the Tuttle Twins may shock you.

I am a proud father of two children. When my kids were born, I made a promise to myself, my children, and God that I would be involved in their education and teach them about the ideas of liberty.

When I started exploring resources to teach my kids about free markets and the principles of liberty, I found NOTHING.

Sadly, government propaganda fills most of our textbooks with half-truths and big-government propaganda.

This is why I decided to launch my non-profit organization, the Libertas Institute, and write the Tuttle Twins book series. So far, we have distributed over 4 MILLION copies of the Tuttle Twins to families across the United States! My goal is to distribute another 3 MILLION copies and place them in schools, libraries, and homes across the country.

**It costs roughly $10 to print, package, and distribute each copy of the Tuttle Twins. You can use one of these links to donate and help me supply more children with our message of freedom!**
[**Donate 1 Tuttle Twins book for $10 Here >>>**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2za15g1f2ehbkmp2nst8k6uq9sddphekk8ei7pcco_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5i61pr2clh2bs)
[**Donate 2 Tuttle Twins book for $20 Here >>>**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8tpuq1jeb2aktt8cqlnig7edsv0vc8kgao5ujp8_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5i61pr2clh2bs)
[**Donate 5 Tuttle Twins book for $50 Here >>>**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4nc7ahiepjtp25i8rkq3ns07cmasntvaeenem8o_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5i61pr2clh2bs)
[**Donate 10 Tuttle Twins book for $100 Here >>>**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7hoknriur5pinma09p65hfspbl163drmv7dcs60_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5i61pr2clh2bs)
[**Donate 25 Tuttle Twins book for $250 Here >>>**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zn7orhfn25in9o73uftd7tpq5223uhpobcmnqg4o_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5i61pr2clh2bs)
[**Donate 50 Tuttle Twins book for $500 Here >>>**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7l2b1n2fbflfb7cf2aagol6p51tdqag7fckgcu0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5i61pr2clh2bs)
[**Donate 100 Tuttle Twins book for $1,000 Here >>>**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1ucu8ojuuv62gjhtcjaftp6ua0p5u76a0r2hrm0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5i61pr2clh2bs)
[**Donate Any Amount Here >>>**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztdpt4htbs9sj6lgksum89fodkovspf2l72tbelg_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5i61pr2clh2bs)
Here are a few examples of the books and what lessons they teach young students:
* _**Creature from Jekyll Island:**_ This book teaches children about the concept of inflation, reckless money printing, and the Federal Reserve.

You might be asking yourself, "Can children grasp these concepts"? I write each of these books to both entertain and educate kids. They aren't written for adults (although I'm sure plenty of adults could learn from them!). The Tuttle Twins breaks down big concepts for children to understand.

* _**12 Rules Bootcamp:**_ Jordan Peterson gave me permission to create a children's version of his famous book, "12 Rules for Life". Now, you can share Jordan Peterson's wisdom with kids!

* _**Miraculous Pencil:**_ This book breaks down Leonard Read's classic lesson on how free markets work. Parents can help their children understand why capitalism is the best economic system and why socialism fails.

The Tuttle Twins books are changing the direction of education in our country.

Before the Tuttle Twins books, parents did NOT have many alternatives to provide for their children other than the brainwashing happening in our schools...

Now, millions of students are learning the principles of free markets, personal responsibility, entrepreneurship, REAL American history, and the values you and I love and cherish about our country.

**So ... what's the next step?**

The pro-liberty non-profit organization I founded, the Libertas Institute, is on a mission to distribute 7 MILLION copies of the Tuttle Twins.

You and I can share the Tuttle Twins with families and young children across the country. My goal is to raise an additional $50,000 in the next 48 hours to deploy more books.

subject: What is really going on at our border?

body:
Will Biden ever tell the truth?| | | There's chaos at our southern border, friend! Instead of fixing the problem, Biden has resorted to his favorite tactic... lying and blaming Republicans. He recently tweeted "...Republican proposals would slash funding for border security – a move that could allow nearly 900 pounds of fentanyl into our country. We need more resources to secure the border. Not less." _[_But let's look at Biden's actual record..._](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=0a899ad0193f48d399298a3556652e7c&_m=96d3f6bf0179446b8e3f43e06a3fa3d0&_e=iLuF1YeeowGfh0G9X-J35V5RoWzYCGLjbvklQ__5-ajOqrXatbkoISwfdx7SUlQeLrpxbZI1b-HSdEDlxI5mRpRCSCauSAJMoexu17PR1Nmwvoq4-E9jUdzb7J85p8DVQi2MUNqP8IAO-g0uFgFdlFHQwLBOy9Q7v0VCdTygdk3JcMoq5YdgeA-xdFd7sPPCPsljlmoUxtrVDOhvNmspYfDSgUeQSdmf105YrY_eQGANhPGaZkzdIUs2T2Xcg4wgfLJDEqJGAVSDp9s5XijfWw%3D%3D)_ Under Joe Biden, the amount of fentanyl caught at the border was up 800% from last year. While over 14,400 pounds (enough to kill every single American twice!) were seized, there's no telling how much MORE fentanyl made it into the country. And, monthly illegal border crossings reached the highest level in recorded history under Joe Biden's watch! Biden is lying about what is really going on at our border. [**Click here to find out what's really going on.**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=0a899ad0193f48d399298a3556652e7c&_m=96d3f6bf0179446b8e3f43e06a3fa3d0&_e=iLuF1YeeowGfh0G9X-J35V5RoWzYCGLjbvklQ__5-ajOqrXatbkoISwfdx7SUlQeLrpxbZI1b-HSdEDlxI5mRpRCSCauSAJMoexu17PR1Nnl_1JmKsL6jMVSouyllIQKTGoPi-Gi2YnoPtLdMCeB3DWYhlNf50GUlIBqu64NUfRxG47Saz62NAJ7T-HJzmsjbK578BCNdeXRBOKiqUmLIxBavOP1feWcinWli1G0CORyzLMx6E8NNjrh3LyF7FYF3DPcGiYE8DjcopX3HzwG6Q%3D%3D)

body:
These corrupt politicians don’t even pretend to work for us.
#
Peter — have you seen some of the latest news coming out of Missouri this week?
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/30826?refcode=em20230413-2991&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2991%2E614464%2E17Wdfb)
After putting forward a plan that would give massive corporations their second tax cut in five years, GOP legislators voted to defund libraries in Missouri.
**You read that right: LIBRARIES.**
It doesn’t matter if they’re in Jefferson City or DC... these corrupt politicians will do anything to serve the corporate elites who bankroll them + their own careers instead of the people they were elected to serve.
**Without a cent from corporate PACs, Lucas Kunce is building the movement to fight back.** He’s on a mission to take back power from these corrupt elites and make real investments into the everyday people who make this country strong — not the massive corporations that have spent decades tearing up our communities. But he needs your help to get it done, Peter.
**[So please, will you add a donation of $10 or whatever you can afford to our grassroots campaign right now? clean_body: These corrupt politicians don’t even pretend to work for us. Peter — have you seen some of the latest news coming out of Missouri this week? After putting forward a plan that would give massive corporations their second tax cut in five years, GOP legislators voted to defund libraries in Missouri. You read that right: LIBRARIES. It doesn’t matter if they’re in Jefferson City or DC... these corrupt politicians will do anything to serve the corporate elites who bankroll them + their own careers instead of the people they were elected to serve. Without a cent from corporate PACs, Lucas Kunce is building the movement to fight back. He’s on a mission to take back power from these corrupt elites and make real investments into the everyday people who make this country strong — not the massive corporations that have spent decades tearing up our communities. But he needs your help to get it done, Peter. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: NY Attorney General Letitia James is taking one for the whole country, by deposing Trump in a lawsuit, while he stirs up his followers against her. Let’s have her back.
body:
Trump inciting hate against elected Democrats. Again.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb1108ed1-c168-4b0b-aca4-6619e8145174/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_Donald Trump's having a bad day. His lawyers had to drag the befuddled non-billionaire in front of New York Attorney General Letitia James, _**_who from the very beginning courageously pursued the orangina-colored toddler's fraud._ **_James is deposing Trump for a $250MM lawsuit for lying about the value of company properties--hugely inflating them for better loan terms, massively deflating them to rip off NY and dump his tax burden on New York residents._** _So, Trump's mad:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T870ac54c-8d67-406d-86e7-a52cfd4cc521/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _**Attorney General James refused to back down, even with his attacks and veiled threats against her leading to scores of death threats.**_ [**_Let's get her back, not let Trump end the political career of a talented, young, female, Black AG by making it so hard to campaign in public due to safety risks. Let's give $5, $10, $25 or whatever we can to Attorney General James for her courage in fighting for what's right, even at great personal risk._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbe4332f6-a068-4a46-aa42-8946e5bd7b53/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for getting the backs' of those who risk it all for democracy._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T969037b5-7206-4a2f-aa37-47d3e5921088/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: I’m running for reelection
disclaimer_text: Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC
body:
| Hi, Peter — I have exciting news to share, and I wanted you to hear it from me:

**I’m officially running for reelection to the United States Senate.**

I know the road ahead won’t always be easy — election experts are already calling me one of the most vulnerable Senate Democrats on the ballot next year. But with you by my side, I know we can get this done and win big next November.

[**Peter, will you help me start the first day of our reelection in the strongest position by splitting a donation between my campaign in Wisconsin and UniteDemocrats today? »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61744814/401047501/-1460090386?amount=10&refcode=UD_20230413_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE1NDhiMDllLTFjZGEtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7Ri3_lGuVtnUSDWT0-PvPGDLUG7szU4R9I3qnjYm9iA=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Tammy Baldwin and UniteDemocrats will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61744825/401047554/-1460090386?amount=10&amounts=10,15,20&express_lane=true&refcode=UD_20230413_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE1NDhiMDllLTFjZGEtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7Ri3_lGuVtnUSDWT0-PvPGDLUG7szU4R9I3qnjYm9iA=)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $15 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61744828/401047569/-1460090386?amount=15&amounts=10,15,20&express_lane=true&refcode=UD_20230413_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE1NDhiMDllLTFjZGEtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7Ri3_lGuVtnUSDWT0-PvPGDLUG7szU4R9I3qnjYm9iA=)
[Or a custom donation »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61744830/401047571/-1460090386?amount=20&amounts=10,15,20&refcode=UD_20230413_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE1NDhiMDllLTFjZGEtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7Ri3_lGuVtnUSDWT0-PvPGDLUG7szU4R9I3qnjYm9iA=)
I’m so proud of the progress we’ve made in the Senate over the past few years, Peter. We’ve lowered the price of prescription drugs, addressed the climate crisis with landmark investment in clean energy, expanded health care for millions of our veterans, and so much more.

A highlight of my time in the Senate was when the Respect for Marriage Act, my bipartisan bill to protect marriage equality, was signed into law late last year. That’s a moment I will never forget.

But there’s a lot more to be done, and I’m not willing to give up the fight to make things easier, better, safer, and stronger for hard-working Wisconsinites.

We have to protect Social Security and Medicare for millions of hard-working seniors who deserve the benefits they’ve spent their lives working towards.

We need to defend voting rights and protect access to the ballot box — we’ve seen the harmful impacts of right-wing extremists who try to deny election results and take away Americans’ right to safely and securely participate in elections.

And we need to re-establish protections for abortion access. After Roe v. Wade was overturned, I was devastated and angry, and I’m sure you were too. Wisconsin just took a huge first step in the right direction with our Supreme Court race last week, but we still have a long way to go toward making sure every woman has the freedom to make her own decisions no matter what zip code she lives in.

I remain hopeful that we can do all of this — and more — together. But it won’t be easy, especially if Republicans have it their way. Their views are becoming more out-of-touch and dangerous by the day, and I know for sure that they will come after my Senate seat with everything they’ve got. They’re already spending big on misleading ads attacking my record.

**But with you by my side, I know we can win. We’ve done it before, together, and I wouldn’t want to have it any other way this time around.**

[**Will you stand by me again and split a contribution between my reelection campaign and UniteDemocrats? It’d mean the world to me to have you with me from Day One. »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61744832/401047573/-1460090386?amount=10&refcode=UD_20230413_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE1NDhiMDllLTFjZGEtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7Ri3_lGuVtnUSDWT0-PvPGDLUG7szU4R9I3qnjYm9iA=)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Tammy Baldwin and UniteDemocrats will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61744845/401047585/-1460090386?amount=10&amounts=10,15,20&express_lane=true&refcode=UD_20230413_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE1NDhiMDllLTFjZGEtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7Ri3_lGuVtnUSDWT0-PvPGDLUG7szU4R9I3qnjYm9iA=)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $15 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61744846/401047589/-1460090386?amount=15&amounts=10,15,20&express_lane=true&refcode=UD_20230413_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE1NDhiMDllLTFjZGEtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7Ri3_lGuVtnUSDWT0-PvPGDLUG7szU4R9I3qnjYm9iA=)
[Or a custom donation »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61744847/401047590/-1460090386?amount=20&amounts=10,15,20&refcode=UD_20230413_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE1NDhiMDllLTFjZGEtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7Ri3_lGuVtnUSDWT0-PvPGDLUG7szU4R9I3qnjYm9iA=)
Thank you so much, Peter. I can’t wait to see you on the campaign trail, and I promise I’ll keep you updated on every step of this journey. So excited for what’s in store for us.

I’m so glad to have you on this historic team.

Let’s do this.

— Tammy

clean_body: | Hi, Peter — I have exciting news to share, and I wanted you to hear it from me: I’m officially running for reelection to the United States Senate. I know the road ahead won’t always be easy — election experts are already calling me one of the most vulnerable Senate Democrats on the ballot next year. But with you by my side, I know we can get this done and win big next November. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Tammy Baldwin and UniteDemocrats will go through immediately: | = = = I’m so proud of the progress we’ve made in the Senate over the past few years, Peter. We’ve lowered the price of prescription drugs, addressed the climate crisis with landmark investment in clean energy, expanded health care for millions of our veterans, and so much more. A highlight of my time in the Senate was when the Respect for Marriage Act, my bipartisan bill to protect marriage equality, was signed into law late last year. That’s a moment I will never forget. But there’s a lot more to be done, and I’m not willing to give up the fight to make things easier, better, safer, and stronger for hard-working Wisconsinites. We have to protect Social Security and Medicare for millions of hard-working seniors who deserve the benefits they’ve spent their lives working towards. We need to defend voting rights and protect access to the ballot box — we’ve seen the harmful impacts of right-wing extremists who try to deny election results and take away Americans’ right to safely and securely participate in elections. And we need to re-establish protections for abortion access. After Roe v. Wade was overturned, I was devastated and angry, and I’m sure you were too. Wisconsin just took a huge first step in the right direction with our Supreme Court race last week, but we still have a long way to go toward making sure every woman has the freedom to make her own decisions no matter what zip code she lives in. I remain hopeful that we can do all of this — and more — together. But it won’t be easy, especially if Republicans have it their way. Their views are becoming more out-of-touch and dangerous by the day, and I know for sure that they will come after my Senate seat with everything they’ve got. They’re already spending big on misleading ads attacking my record. But with you by my side, I know we can win. We’ve done it before, together, and I wouldn’t want to have it any other way this time around. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Tammy Baldwin and UniteDemocrats will go through immediately: = = = Thank you so much, Peter. I can’t wait to see you on the campaign trail, and I promise I’ll keep you updated on every step of this journey. So excited for what’s in store for us. I’m so glad to have you on this historic team. Let’s do this. — Tammy | | Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC (www.unitedemocrats.org) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 514 Daniels St., #286, Raleigh, NC 27605 to receive fewer emails. to update your information. It's a win-win-win. The clinic will develop and train our local workforce, create good jobs in an on-demand field, and provide vital health care services to some of the folks who need it most. = More soon, Team Hoyle | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Val Hoyle for Congress. | This email was sent by Val Hoyle for Congress PO Box 657 Springfield, OR 97477 United States Email is an important way for Val Hoyle to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Too much email? or . Questions or concerns? . |

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20WAGOP?=
subject: Join us this May!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Join us this May in Kennewick for the Republican Action Conference to hear from diverse perspectives and learn how to take back out state! | | |
---
|
---
| |
---
| | Dear Peter,
We are incredibly excited about our lineup of speakers and panels that will be speaking at our 2023 Republican Action Conference, taking place on May 5th and 6th at the Red Lion Hotel, Kennewick Columbia Center. **Don't miss the opportunity to hear from these influential and inspiring individuals, and participate in engaging panel discussions and workshops!**
---
|
---
|
## Campaigning 101: Building a Winning Campaign
---
| Learn from Consutling Experts from winning campaigns at our Campaigning 101 panels as they guide you through effective strategies and tactics to create a successful campaign.
---
|
## Grassroots Activism: Organizing for Victory
---
| Join WSRP Political Director Matthew Frohlich to learn valuable insights and how to use the proper tools to mobilize your community, build a strong support base, and drive change.
---
|
## Citizen Lobbying: Influencing Olympia
---
| Nancy Churchill and Ruth Peterson, Founders of Influencing Olympia, teach you how to make your voice heard, influence decision-makers, and effectively advocate for the issues you care about
---
|
## Ballot Collection: Get the Republican Votes
---
| State Party Strategies Political Director Thomas Smithfield and California GOP's Krista Pittman will share their knowledge and experience in ballot collection strategies they have utilized to secure the votes needed for a successful campaign.

CAGOP has seen outstanding successes in recent elections due to their ballot collection program, flipping FIVE Congressional seats from blue to red in the past two elections and we are excited to be implementing a similar program here in Washington State!
---
|
## Campaign Fundraising 101
---
| Learn from our panel of fundraising experts as they share valuable tips and strategies on how to create a compelling narrative, engage with donors, and utilize various fundraising channels.
---
|
## Digital Media: Build Your Brand
---
| Discover the latest trends, tools, and best practices for building a successful digital media strategy that can elevate your campaign and amplify your message.
---
| [More Information on our 2023 Republican Action Conference Panels!](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=dd9549f975&e=6a281f566d "More Information on our 2023 Republican Action Conference Panels!")
---
|
---
|
## Our incredible line-up of speakers includes:
---
| [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=af38275292&e=6a281f566d)
---
| By attending our lunch, banquet, along with our panels and workshops, you'll gain valuable knowledge and tools to help you create successful campaigns, mobilize your community, influence decision-makers, and much more.

[Don't miss out on this incredible event! Register now for the 2023 Republican Action Conference!](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=4d98fd366f&e=6a281f566d)
---
| [More Information on our line-up of Speakers](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=2be7e9b68d&e=6a281f566d "More Information on our line-up of Speakers")
---
| [Register for the Republican Action Conference today!](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=addbad7b2b&e=6a281f566d "Register for the Republican Action Conference today!")
---
| We look forward to seeing you at the Republican Action Conference!
To Victory, -Team WAGOP
---
| | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/wsrp/rac2023-reminder-1340908?e=6a281f566d)
---

body:
if we lose Sherrod Brown, we lose the Senate!
| **_🚨 We wanted you to be the FIRST to know: 🚨_** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/43484?t=6&akid=7099%2E878179%2EGnCuG6) Election analysts just ranked Sherrod Brown’s seat one of the MOST likely to flip red — **_and now, ANOTHER MAGA Republican has entered the race!_**

After GOP crony J.D. Vance seized Ohio’s other Senate seat last November, Sen. Brown is more vulnerable than _**ever.**_ _We can’t afford to leave this up to chance!_

[We’re fighting hard to protect vulnerable Democrats like Sherrod Brown, but we can’t do it without a surge of grassroots support! The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. body:
I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME THIS YEAR.

| |

---
| | | Hey - this is Sean Spicer:

With a heavy heart, I just announced I'm parting ways with Newsmax. My show reached millions and helped viewers see what's _really_ happening in our country. Something the Mainstream Media fails to do time and time again.

_**[But with that in the rearview mirror, I'm thrilled at what's coming next...](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f9de6f78ee3e41169c09e5d9f344ca04&_e=_gEwyX0w8BBFDQUbeOeYxF_giI9sMt7ypZd_KJ_rRAiTLHqvr5PV_CM-ouNJs6hMRMe9aQzTkR3TzFXOf1w0I7aXC5CWl82Ht3x4yrbT5Wn-JIuCk2VGZSrgyVXwIl-L1iN-lISflK_GPo6N7nTnzM1bDjx6i7UrQbOXkHmOQRrXR0Q_xgle1U_1-r0vSvFmN-qPK8N_Kh0Xlcx6mO6g7zscebJ_wgLMl99Akcd4w3o7ePJrzrDKP0cq7sJQ3mbUp9iD515HIbg0hTHWSmtE857u97LZgjldJdEegOKX-H9Sza_MFqWGzH6OGuv7IS0jnwPB3GZr4xZkOhqGy7YspTflmjL3bfvVkGKDJfC9u6Owl-7eDKleeENBKDXL7tPd7zcJSVUx9JW6wtDxvUvBdqXiayxLRYq7pCpOQRxrK-P6ZWLvD_HhAY8C6OoBf8XHOwl8lKKQO1p-xHk87sZpVA%3D%3D "But with that in the rearview mirror, I’m thrilled at what’s coming next... The 2024 election will be the single most important one in the history of our country. Joe Biden and Democrats in Congress have set our country into a tailspin. It's an emergency situation and we're running dangerously short on time to change course.

We have our work cut out for us ahead of 2024:

- Fire Joe Biden and retake the presidency
- Expand our razor-thin Majority in the House
- Win back the Senate and send Chuck Schumer into retirement

**The Democrats aren 't going to give us an inch... so we have no choice but to 1) outwork, 2) outsmart, and - most importantly - 3) outraise them. **

Unfortunately, that last point is the most important. Why? Because no one works harder than strong Conservatives like you. And Republicans are WINNING on the issues - they can't outsmart us when we're the ones fighting for freedom, defending our country and flag, and resisting their radical woke agenda.

But Democrats have a MAJOR advantage in fundraising thanks to their armies of Hollywood megadonors and woke Liberals whipping out their credit cards whenever they flip on MSNBC.

_**[Look- if we want to win in 2024, it's going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f9de6f78ee3e41169c09e5d9f344ca04&_e=_gEwyX0w8BBFDQUbeOeYxF_giI9sMt7ypZd_KJ_rRAiTLHqvr5PV_CM-ouNJs6hMRMe9aQzTkR3TzFXOf1w0I7aXC5CWl82Ht3x4yrbT5Wn-JIuCk2VGZSrgyVXwIl-L1iN-lISflK_GPo6N7nTnzM1bDjx6i7UrQbOXkHmOQRrXR0Q_xgle1U_1-r0vSvFmN-qPK8N_Kh0Xlcx6mO6g7zscebJ_wgLMl99Akcd4w3o7ePJrzrDKP0cq7sJQ3mbUp9iD515HIbg0hTHWSmtE8wPRwraQ2IYFSvQd3RhfSQEYkCL8xSJ8mDJrOKuVfTNNLDM9HAlSuVNIzTMXgrdBSiZ561zzeH91Kq8RGavu6zVN4nTszvz9idi-0MfrucxZYJO-we2OMnd9PB7bYjgDcU_BVWPagNjUe5QUkQchTpNZiKxl5meoJovYYrx_6B7VxJGgGQKGdxu7l6Is62Ogwg%3D%3D "Look – if we want to win in 2024, it’s going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW. ")**_

That's why I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME THIS YEAR. We ran the numbers on what it'll take to outraise the Democrats and pull off an overwhelming victory.

We came to the conclusion that if every last one of you gave between $27 and $54, we would have the resources to MAX OUT all our voter contact budgets, GOTV operations, and volunteer recruitment efforts.

_In other words ... if everyone here steps up RIGHT NOW, the Democrats would suffer a defeat like nothing we've ever seen before._

**But that 's a big "if" - it requires 100% participation. **

This plan falls apart if too many folks sit out. We need everyone on board to pull this off.

So I'll cut to the chase.

_**[From the bottom of my heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution between $27 and $54? If we can pull this off, we'll make history.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f9de6f78ee3e41169c09e5d9f344ca04&_e=_gEwyX0w8BBFDQUbeOeYxF_giI9sMt7ypZd_KJ_rRAiTLHqvr5PV_CM-ouNJs6hMRMe9aQzTkR3TzFXOf1w0I7aXC5CWl82Ht3x4yrbT5Wn-JIuCk2VGZSrgyVXwIl-L1iN-lISflK_GPo6N7nTnzM1bDjx6i7UrQbOXkHmOQRrXR0Q_xgle1U_1-r0vSvFmN-qPK8N_Kh0Xlcx6mO6g7zscebJ_wgLMl99Akcd4w3o7ePJrzrDKP0cq7sJQ3mbUp9iD515HIbg0hTHWSmtE8wPRwraQ2IYFSvQd3RhfSQEYkCL8xSJ8mDJrOKuVfTNNT3cT_7okJ81ie5yHwgw9xVtmO48seUHEGHRXGlUBhg8niCx7UqBsBiMM-rml8wAZp1yzuo9hzdymqzu1cMG7EztXMKUwshmmzQwZEGkpLwkh4_l8_pJ1TCKpBADrKb5JMrbkk0mzVDInXbxz5rG5pg%3D%3D "From the bottom of my heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution between $27 and $54? clean_body: I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME THIS YEAR. | | | | | Hey - this is Sean Spicer: With a heavy heart, I just announced I'm parting ways with Newsmax. My show reached millions and helped viewers see what's really happening in our country. Something the Mainstream Media fails to do time and time again. "But with that in the rearview mirror, I’m thrilled at what’s coming next... " | | | "READ MY FULL STATEMENT" The 2024 election will be the single most important one in the history of our country. Joe Biden and Democrats in Congress have set our country into a tailspin. It's an emergency situation and we're running dangerously short on time to change course. We have our work cut out for us ahead of 2024: - Fire Joe Biden and retake the presidency - Expand our razor-thin Majority in the House - Win back the Senate and send Chuck Schumer into retirement The Democrats aren 't going to give us an inch... so we have no choice but to 1) outwork, 2) outsmart, and - most importantly - 3) outraise them. Unfortunately, that last point is the most important. Why? Because no one works harder than strong Conservatives like you. And Republicans are WINNING on the issues - they can't outsmart us when we're the ones fighting for freedom, defending our country and flag, and resisting their radical woke agenda. But Democrats have a MAJOR advantage in fundraising thanks to their armies of Hollywood megadonors and woke Liberals whipping out their credit cards whenever they flip on MSNBC. "Look – if we want to win in 2024, it’s going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW. " That's why I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME THIS YEAR. We ran the numbers on what it'll take to outraise the Democrats and pull off an overwhelming victory. We came to the conclusion that if every last one of you gave between $27 and $54, we would have the resources to MAX OUT all our voter contact budgets, GOTV operations, and volunteer recruitment efforts. In other words ... if everyone here steps up RIGHT NOW, the Democrats would suffer a defeat like nothing we've ever seen before. But that 's a big "if" - it requires 100% participation. This plan falls apart if too many folks sit out. We need everyone on board to pull this off. So I'll cut to the chase. "From the bottom of my heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution between $27 and $54? If we can pull this off, we’ll make history." Are you in? name: Connor Boyack
subject: Only open this email if you want children to support freedom
body:
Children of all ages are being brainwashed in our public schools

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv29lqqq3p1vfub45398o0efrdnamigig0m5pm50_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5i69or6c1h2bs "Tuttle Twins")
Friend,

Children of all ages are being brainwashed in our public schools to believe in radical ideas such as socialism is good, our Founding Fathers are bad, and the ideas of freedom are outdated or even racist.

You know what this means for our future?

It means a generation of students will grow up to accept socialism and create a less free and less prosperous society.

Not good.

**Fortunately, I have a solution ... The Tuttle Twins! These books teach children about freedom.**

The Tuttle Twins is a series of children's books teaching kids about free markets, private property rights, the Constitution, and the ideas of our Founding Fathers. [**You can help me distribute more copies of the Tuttle Twins by making a donation of any amount by clicking here!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4u7bfnha99dm2ob6vtglkn00dfuhus9a22ug7k0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5i69or6c1h2bs)

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3qua94keospt5gcjj2q7od9t3s9rghmn0v7uuu8_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5i69or6c1h2bs)
The reason I wrote the Tuttle Twins may shock you.

I am a proud father of two children. When my kids were born, I made a promise to myself, my children, and God that I would be involved in their education and teach them about the ideas of liberty.

When I started exploring resources to teach my kids about free markets and the principles of liberty, I found NOTHING.

Sadly, government propaganda fills most of our textbooks with half-truths and big-government propaganda.

This is why I decided to launch my non-profit organization, the Libertas Institute, and write the Tuttle Twins book series. So far, we have distributed over 4 MILLION copies of the Tuttle Twins to families across the United States! My goal is to distribute another 3 MILLION copies and place them in schools, libraries, and homes across the country.

**It costs roughly $10 to print, package, and distribute each copy of the Tuttle Twins. You can use one of these links to donate and help me supply more children with our message of freedom!**
[**Donate 1 Tuttle Twins book for $10 Here >>>**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlbrt7j96f2rk9cq5p8nu26qoe0bepqsuvosp9go_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5i69or6c1h2bs)
[**Donate 2 Tuttle Twins book for $20 Here >>>**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkl7lc5vkn1o6updd32n15fs3dninn2dj1fcjpu0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5i69or6c1h2bs)
[**Donate 5 Tuttle Twins book for $50 Here >>>**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkrpft8a66rbcvrrca8tkao3bh5ulet5mmavbjbo_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5i69or6c1h2bs)
[**Donate 10 Tuttle Twins book for $100 Here >>>**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0ejqr0jbv6irdf5bs4ceqonfn8868st4hu738lo_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5i69or6c1h2bs)
[**Donate 25 Tuttle Twins book for $250 Here >>>**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuk7i77u81tmhpb1b4shm392l5nrmobpgcig8s6o_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5i69or6c1h2bs)
[**Donate 50 Tuttle Twins book for $500 Here >>>**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8btgdhf7t4fg4ic8fncos7ooo5es6jl2dc3iqog_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5i69or6c1h2bs)
[**Donate 100 Tuttle Twins book for $1,000 Here >>>**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcs6vcca9agnsa8c2d0qhhq78ipsn0v2qkd7ps30_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5i69or6c1h2bs)
[**Donate Any Amount Here >>>**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4j5cklvki132hvdr1stgnndnjkmd4gockj0smt8_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5i69or6c1h2bs)
Here are a few examples of the books and what lessons they teach young students:
* _**Creature from Jekyll Island:**_ This book teaches children about the concept of inflation, reckless money printing, and the Federal Reserve.

You might be asking yourself, "Can children grasp these concepts"? I write each of these books to both entertain and educate kids. They aren't written for adults (although I'm sure plenty of adults could learn from them!). The Tuttle Twins breaks down big concepts for children to understand.

* _**12 Rules Bootcamp:**_ Jordan Peterson gave me permission to create a children's version of his famous book, "12 Rules for Life". Now, you can share Jordan Peterson's wisdom with kids!

* _**Miraculous Pencil:**_ This book breaks down Leonard Read's classic lesson on how free markets work. Parents can help their children understand why capitalism is the best economic system and why socialism fails.

The Tuttle Twins books are changing the direction of education in our country.

Before the Tuttle Twins books, parents did NOT have many alternatives to provide for their children other than the brainwashing happening in our schools...

Now, millions of students are learning the principles of free markets, personal responsibility, entrepreneurship, REAL American history, and the values you and I love and cherish about our country.

**So ... what's the next step?**

The pro-liberty non-profit organization I founded, the Libertas Institute, is on a mission to distribute 7 MILLION copies of the Tuttle Twins.

You and I can share the Tuttle Twins with families and young children across the country. My goal is to raise an additional $50,000 in the next 48 hours to deploy more books.

Can I count on you to make a donation and help me distribute more books?

[**Please use one of these links to support the Tuttle Twins, educate the next generation about freedom, and fight for the future of our country:**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjl84fb0gm4q8e4i36slh0pcjbbjprak698smod8_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5i69or6c1h2bs)
[**Donate 1 Tuttle Twins book for $10 Here >>>**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsnhtfp6j29jpnt460ug78jk4t6du9k1rf9s7l20_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5i69or6c1h2bs)

[**Donate 5 Tuttle Twins book for $50 Here >>>**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zveb0hvgp1vprlaalbl3vo034nc7pl3gpt4skajo_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5i69or6c1h2bs)
[**Donate 10 Tuttle Twins book for $100 Here >>>**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6ccv0hvrepvc3n25dekbiko27cfptb4p2du2ph8_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5i69or6c1h2bs)
[**Donate 25 Tuttle Twins book for $250 Here >>>**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfb6a68rce76oriuhhhqm7j89q5t86ah23bl1or8_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5i69or6c1h2bs)
[**Donate 50 Tuttle Twins book for $500 Here >>>**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zboh1skotr3ko3opiphg6e202bv9gqmlmgt99040_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5i69or6c1h2bs)
[**Donate 100 Tuttle Twins book for $1,000 Here >>>**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1cs696u8nl2qkm5klo69heq6ttb6ucghqlu1pl0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5i69or6c1h2bs)
[**Donate Any Amount Here >>>**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2r1cjkbgm8vbive671erbqc44ukt72ejok17m00_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5i69or6c1h2bs)
Reminder: Our goal is to raise $50,000 in the next 48 hours.

You and I cannot wait any longer to reverse the ugly trend happening in our schools.

_Without the Tuttle Twins, young students may not have an alternative to what 's being taught in the classroom_.

I am counting on your help.

[Please click here to make your donation.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrh6m3m5431tn6u28uf3dflecr9gej9n9e89bit8_rp22sh2s8i66o74c5i69or6c1h2bs)

Thank you for everything you do for liberty and our country,>

Connor Boyack
Author, _The Tuttle Twins_
President, Libertas Institute

_The Tuttle Twins is a project of the Libertas Institute. Our mission is to change hearts, minds, and laws to build a freer society by creating and implementing innovative policy reforms and exceptional educational resources._

state legislatures matter.

Peter — _far-right supermajorities in control of state legislatures are threatening our most fundamental rights and all the progress we’ve made._ They’re passing laws that make it harder to vote and easier for domestic abusers to get their hands on guns. They’re attacking LGBTQ+ people and our public education systems. They’re banning abortion care — despite the will of the majority of Americans. **They’re expelling duly elected legislators who have the gall to fight back.** _Across the country, right-wing-controlled legislatures are abusing their power to enact dangerous laws and force the rest of us to conform to their extremist views._ **[State legislatures matter, Peter, and that’s why we’re doing everything possible to elect legislators we can count on to fight for our rights and deliver progress in 2024. Click here to donate to help>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61746249/401052325/676408098?amount=20.24&refcode=ea.3ef610ed-1eda-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ms=ea.3ef610ed-1eda-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWY2MTBlZC0xZWRhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v0gF2tLQIiM-5lSQhwwv7JsaDcj_YWr7qrQa6DHiDy4=)** But this is not just happening in states like Tennessee. It’s going to happen here in North Carolina, too. Republicans in the General Assembly have made it clear that their priority is not serving the people; it’s serving their own partisan agenda. And they’ve gerrymandered the legislative maps so aggressively over the years that they feel they can just get away with it. Ahead of the midterm elections, our team directly supported a dozen legislative candidates in key races. **Seven of them won.** Ahead of 2024, we have to do more. **We’re laying the groundwork now for an all-out fight for the General Assembly, and we need you with us, Peter.[Can Roy count on you to donate $20.24 (or any amount that works for you) right now to support Democratic candidates across North Carolina in 2024?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61746250/401052326/676408098?amount=20.24&refcode=ea.3ef610ed-1eda-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ms=ea.3ef610ed-1eda-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWY2MTBlZC0xZWRhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v0gF2tLQIiM-5lSQhwwv7JsaDcj_YWr7qrQa6DHiDy4=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61746251/401052327/676408098?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.3ef610ed-1eda-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ms=ea.3ef610ed-1eda-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWY2MTBlZC0xZWRhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v0gF2tLQIiM-5lSQhwwv7JsaDcj_YWr7qrQa6DHiDy4=)

clean_body: state legislatures matter. | Peter — far-right supermajorities in control of state legislatures are threatening our most fundamental rights and all the progress we’ve made. They’re passing laws that make it harder to vote and easier for domestic abusers to get their hands on guns. They’re attacking LGBTQ+ people and our public education systems. They’re banning abortion care — despite the will of the majority of Americans. They’re expelling duly elected legislators who have the gall to fight back. Across the country, right-wing-controlled legislatures are abusing their power to enact dangerous laws and force the rest of us to conform to their extremist views. = But this is not just happening in states like Tennessee. It’s going to happen here in North Carolina, too. Republicans in the General Assembly have made it clear that their priority is not serving the people; it’s serving their own partisan agenda. And they’ve gerrymandered the legislative maps so aggressively over the years that they feel they can just get away with it. Ahead of the midterm elections, our team directly supported a dozen legislative candidates in key races. Seven of them won. Ahead of 2024, we have to do more. We’re laying the groundwork now for an all-out fight for the General Assembly, and we need you with us, Peter.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = Thank you, Team Cooper ****=** **=** Send donations via check to: Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Thank you! mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. Bad guys don't care about rules. So we can add laws, rules, and restrictions all day long but the bad people don't." Should we not license drivers, register vehicles, wear seatbelts, or regulate the auto industry because drunk drivers "don't care"? The implication is that criminal legislation doesn't work, so we should throw all efforts to the wayside. The logic against the rule of law is absurd. Is he against laws and rules that combat criminal behavior? Bergman's disregard for our criminal code is unbecoming of a Representative. Lawmakers create laws. Do your job, or get out of the way. Help me retire and de-elect Jack Bergman. We need commonsense representation. Donate now.

name: Team Cori
subject: Add your Name: Support Trans Athletes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
Join us in calling for the immediate reversal of the Biden administration's exclusionary proposed Title IX rule changes.
#
Peter,
Last week, the Department of Education proposed a new set of guidelines that would allow for "targeted restrictions" on the participation of trans athletes in public schools.
[](https://act.coribush.org/sign/protect-trans-athletes/?source=em20230413&t=1&akid=2505%2E1082990%2EiIkHe7)
**This is disappointing and indefensible.** The Biden administration has since tried to portray its proposed rule change as a necessary step to confront the wave of anti-trans legislation coming from state legislatures. But let's be clear, Peter: if this proposed rule goes into effect, it will **only legitimize the exclusion of trans athletes.**
As we continue to witness the disturbing trend of anti-LGBTQIA2S+ extremism by the far-right, we must fight back.
We must redouble in our efforts to fight to protect trans athletes and the trans community from these unrelenting attacks. We cannot allow this hateful vitriol go unchecked.
[**Will you add your namee today calling on the Department of Education to support trans athlete and cancel its proposed rule change?**](https://act.coribush.org/sign/protect-trans-athletes/?source=em20230413&t=2&akid=2505%2E1082990%2EiIkHe7)
**[Add your name](https://act.coribush.org/sign/protect-trans-athletes/?source=em20230413&t=3&akid=2505%2E1082990%2EiIkHe7)**
Thank you for taking action today.
In solidarity,
Team Cori

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-20230413?refcode=em20230413-2505-footer&t=4&refcode2=2505_1082990_iIkHe7&akid=2505%2E1082990%2EiIkHe7) **

clean_body: Join us in calling for the immediate reversal of the Biden administration's exclusionary proposed Title IX rule changes. Peter, Last week, the Department of Education proposed a new set of guidelines that would allow for "targeted restrictions" on the participation of trans athletes in public schools. This is disappointing and indefensible. The Biden administration has since tried to portray its proposed rule change as a necessary step to confront the wave of anti-trans legislation coming from state legislatures. But let's be clear, Peter: if this proposed rule goes into effect, it will only legitimize the exclusion of trans athletes. As we continue to witness the disturbing trend of anti-LGBTQIA2S+ extremism by the far-right, we must fight back. We must redouble in our efforts to fight to protect trans athletes and the trans community from these unrelenting attacks. We cannot allow this hateful vitriol go unchecked. Thank you for taking action today. In solidarity, Team Cori Follow us on , , , and . This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Student protestors shouted down Fifth Circuit appellate judge Stuart Kyle Duncan as he tried to speak on campus. When Duncan asked for an administrator to restore order, Tirien Steinbach, the school's diversity dean, arrived and delivered a "bizarre therapy session from hell."

**The diversity dean not only held a "struggle session" against Judge Duncan, but she was also instrumental in helping organize the protest against a conservative speaker.**

These D.E.I. officers wield great power and use it to promote Marxist policies.

**And the D.E.I. movement is growing -- nearly 80% of Arizona's faculty job postings require applicants to pledge fealty at the altar of "wokeness."**

Team, In case you missed Wes’ email on Tuesday, the Maryland legislative session is officially over, and we accomplished A LOT. **All ten out of ten bills that Wes introduced were passed by both chambers of the General Assembly — so far as Governor, he’s batting 1.000!** | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61747200/401055544/2098035812?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230413icymi_tmm_180da_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODI4MDkxZS0yMmRhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sLJvqy8aq9ffkRxROS8OD1qb4xHFdx5iivtluzgefXg=)
---
This week, Wes proudly signed bills into law to raise the state minimum wage to $15 one year sooner than scheduled, end childhood poverty by extending and expanding tax breaks for families, and allow more survivors of childhood sexual abuse to sue their abusers.
Wes and Aruna weren’t kidding around when they said they’d get to work on Day 1 and deliver on their promises. _Together, we are making historic change and moving Maryland forward for all._
**[With the end of the legislative session also comes the end of our almost three-month fundraising freeze. name: Laura Friedman HQ
subject: re: Recent attacks on abortion rights.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61747257/401055768/62647395?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmMwYjhiNjUtMjJkYS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=bfMu6tnnoxjsruudvRaWVcMoj115aVWeaG6WXrjONxk=) Friend,

If there was ever a doubt that today's GOP is hell-bent on destroying reproductive rights, the news from this past week should put that to rest.
| **» Last Friday, Republicans celebrated a ruling by a Trump-appointed federal judge in Texas that stripped FDA approval for mifepristone** \-- a safe and effective pill used in _over half of all U.S. abortions_.

**» This week, Florida's state Senate passed legislation that would ban most abortions after six weeks.** Governor Ron DeSantis has already signaled plans to sign this into law if it passes the state's GOP-led House.
---

Thankfully, the Biden Administration filed an appeal in response to Friday’s ruling out of Texas, but it’s clear this election cycle has taken on a new meaning when it comes to choice. It's never been more urgent to send pro-choice women to Congress who won’t waver in reinstating our reproductive rights.

**Laura has been on the frontlines in the fight to defend abortion access. In the aftermath of the _Roe v. Wade_ decision, Laura co-authored a constitutional amendment to protect reproductive freedom -- including enshrining the fundamental right to an abortion and access to contraceptives.**

**[If elected to Congress, Laura would be a fierce advocate for passing the same legislation federally. clean_body: | = Friend, If there was ever a doubt that today's GOP is hell-bent on destroying reproductive rights, the news from this past week should put that to rest. | » Last Friday, Republicans celebrated a ruling by a Trump-appointed federal judge in Texas that stripped FDA approval for mifepristone \-- a safe and effective pill used in over half of all U.S. abortions. » This week, Florida's state Senate passed legislation that would ban most abortions after six weeks. Governor Ron DeSantis has already signaled plans to sign this into law if it passes the state's GOP-led House. Thankfully, the Biden Administration filed an appeal in response to Friday’s ruling out of Texas, but it’s clear this election cycle has taken on a new meaning when it comes to choice. It's never been more urgent to send pro-choice women to Congress who won’t waver in reinstating our reproductive rights. Laura has been on the frontlines in the fight to defend abortion access. In the aftermath of the Roe v. Wade decision, Laura co-authored a constitutional amendment to protect reproductive freedom -- including enshrining the fundamental right to an abortion and access to contraceptives. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: **= | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thanks, Team Laura | | Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress Laura's campaign doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs and completely relies on grassroots supporters like you! clean_body: | | | | I have great news to share – Senator Bob Casey of Pennsylvania has recently confirmed that he's running for re-election in 2024. And even better: Today is his birthday! = Bob is a fearless leader in the Democratic party. And he is facing a tough reelection campaign. It might even be the most important Senate race in the nation in 2024. You remember 2022 – Pennsylvania was the swingiest swing state in the country, and the grassroots powered John Fetterman all the way to the Senate, over Trump ally Dr. Oz. Pennsylvania delivered our one-seat majority, and we can't lose it now, especially not in Pennsylvania! = = Bob has championed programs to improve children's health and education. He has fought to build a better economy that works for everyone and not just a few Wall Street fat cats. And Senator Casey has never been afraid to stand up to Donald Trump and his MAGA allies. MAGA Republicans are coming to take the Senate next year and to do that they have to take down Senator Casey. But we won't let that happen. = Happy Birthday, Bob! subject: Son of George Soros scoring easy White House access, records show

A son of billionaire George Soros has quietly become a de-facto White
House “ambassador,” making at least 14 visits there on behalf of
the far-left kingmaker since President Joe Biden took office, records
reviewed by The Post show.

A son of billionaire George Soros has quietly become a de-facto
White House “ambassador,” making at least 14 visits there on
behalf of the far-left kingmaker since President Joe Biden took
office, records reviewed by The Post show.

Alexander Soros — a prolific Democratic fundraiser in his own right
who likes to boast about his relationships with world leaders on
social media — scored at least a dozen meetings with White House
officials in 2022, according to recently updated White House visitor
logs. Soros, 37, also participated in two other confabs there in late
2021, the records show.

subject: I’m so humbled by all that we’veaccomplished together
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Hi, Peter, it’s Brandon Johnson. I’m a teacher, organizer, and public servant — and in just a few weeks, I’ll be sworn in as the Mayor of Chicago. My team and I are excited to get to work to build a stronger Chicago for everyone. **But first, Peter, I wanted to take a moment to say thank you.** United Working Families members in Chicago and Working Families Party supporters nationwide were crucial to building the multiracial progressive movement we needed to win this election. Whether you donated to fund our grassroots campaign, volunteered to reach voters about our vision for the city, or shared your support within your circles, your help made the difference. Together, we beat back MAGA extremists and special interests that outspent us 2 to 1, and showed the world the power of hope, the strength of organizing, and the might of our collective voice. **[The election may be over, but this is just the beginning. If you want to make sure we can keep building a Chicago for the many — and replicate victories like mine across the country — I’m asking you to make a split donation to my campaign and the Working Families Party today:](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUXb9581h-jMfPyQYcmSYEzVhiJ4Y7P68axJK1rgfm7qiKjYFc78oiEjbuDxIc-pGzYKYpEfwN3hX4WT1I_sItVYalvEe-rhjZl0WRrFGDiePopbTR3xN2N8EayqfESQrtp25mDyZPr81bpKdhepNrXjmTLAKkf34n91y7TM0L5CbqbCsiAeHAKy2WJ5dLOGYWTfDiWsZ8gWsfJKoqD442w2XSnnVg4eNaQ_2EgDnzsp50i7uAHxsZTOth39kpDnJRmNsPoTlVt_npdVCt73ugNrQyfSmuKSIcmyVlb5QASnqPx16aFyh0x6rJeaJPKlPMt19QZh1sk1uPJbhfJ_phQomYfTOlEOzTrB3jIubeDIrSPg4zYc3N_0kkkZE0wuT5VBWWa-16O5DRSgU3557tAEOcdpJu3kJgQUR86ABm7DEb2rOdRjWn_1sHIUXL-WprhtNDV7IRM8LYeUHiVDzsJ5HcuJWQ0LxNjbdmrGpX2vxGpXrr7YLTsaUSZX3ZZJhX/3vb/YfQO6xK5S_Wk2iaN6FBPnw/h0/C1fOvketqbCywHBJ5UjG_g6ym3UIxEBZ76M-I4IbymY)** **[Contribute $10 »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUXb9581h-jMfPyQYcmSYEzVhiJ4Y7P68axJK1rgfm7qiKjYFc78oiEjbuDxIc-pGzYKYpEfwN3hX4WT1I_sItVUff7tt69aILQad07-GA3k-vFSLbC04Ir7u73qGabdTHXsBhvHFc4xmWlgzKDxd8RJeBhNH7lK64bcSW2SJaCigzCgPiBAwbHkW3vv2HI_FhAFaGgddgUs8Iq2PG9_vhMRZhb2fDwM2ouGhLG_WiP6O9CFwX5h2mlbSDEcc4t3oaxk7utUbVqsR2Hh-aTjuq-FPt-NZXhDGwZ0JV9XEwTp-GdVbS9lMly4MzWtzkiqAUQTpMc-SGsSOiVhodTFXJP8hK8GSt74FKnd0ZNHT5VoZkeNUZ-OX2JDTPaFjxPYUd_EKQM209YAkxxpn---dr1tAjUtNmIpf-vjMDqI19rjY6qtfmIrC8u96KuEKifkSnOEy1l0DzREQSV6F9q1RISFuyjD_YsxSpwu7h6P7W837KlwRHi1-3FNgsUT4iq3PB/3vb/YfQO6xK5S_Wk2iaN6FBPnw/h1/EA_7SG_5Y9vyuNUhtFNRz4iVM2eRv_Oayh6_cP-M1FU)** **Peter, with our voices and our votes, last week we ushered in a new chapter in the history of the city of Chicago.** A city where you can thrive regardless of who you love, or how much money you have in your bank account. A city that’s truly safer for everyone, by investing in what actually works to prevent crime — youth employment and mental health centers and ensuring law enforcement has the resources to solve and prevent crimes. A city that respects the workers who keep it running, and supports the entrepreneurs that keep it growing. A city where the trains run on time, and where no one is too poor to live in one of the richest cities in the richest country in the history of the world. A city where public schools have the resources to meet the needs of every child across our city. In other words, it’s the beginning of a Chicago that truly invests in the people. **I’m so humbled by all we have accomplished and all we have yet to do in the months and years to come. But we know that MAGA Republicans and corporate interests aren’t going to make any of it easy.** **[Split a donation between my campaign and the Working Families Party today so that we can continue growing our movement together — and to make sure that we have the resources to face whatever comes our name: Riley Gaines
subject: Ambushed and assaulted
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Nine PAC
body:
There is a disturbing trend on the left

| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ba4e2f5185514d0c82582ec96dc0f9ec&_e=f8Kb4TivhqA1Nbft-0yl74mDA3Lh4QgsT-wCChSPoueE9ld8qhlQKmtv1A8_wRkRLCDKbcJxZFaTes2tuBctSgDCjF--TTwB4IqcwBp1lA9Ucy26uQoe4zOHj5D0CjjBeuA2dgb0XYIPe-Nam0hhfpdNDMIJmMJqNJ0q_Qy3a6gy_REjZ3oJITcJn8tuIhOoKtKJKod6cF252V08Y3yDfBK57V14J_b0uExdEK-BsiCiJX_I4nKEqOW5Mo35IBFQJPGKSfYcm-8zU-wQlZSaiQ%3D%3D)
---
Fellow American,

There is a disturbing trend on the left-- Transgender activists are increasingly emboldened to attack those who oppose them. Time after time, we watch the left enable the rhetoric and justify the violence-- **ENOUGH IS ENOUGH!** This weekend, I was ambushed and assaulted by a transgender activist after speaking to a group of students at San Francisco State University. Students gathered wanting to hear the pro-woman side of the sports debate but were impeded by transgender activists, shouting, cursing, and threatening. This left-wing intimidation campaign won't work! This is only more evidence that I'm fighting the good fight, and proof that women need sex-protected spaces! I know what I'm doing is right. When they want you silent, speak louder. I'm on the frontlines fighting for women and girls and speaking TRUTH to all, even those who refuse to hear it. [**Will you step up and stand with me in this fight? Donate to NinePAC and help me continue to speak TRUTH where it's not welcome and FIGHT to protect the future of women's sports!**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ba4e2f5185514d0c82582ec96dc0f9ec&_e=f8Kb4TivhqA1Nbft-0yl74mDA3Lh4QgsT-wCChSPoueE9ld8qhlQKmtv1A8_wRkRLCDKbcJxZFaTes2tuBctSgDCjF--TTwB4IqcwBp1lA9Ucy26uQoe4zOHj5D0CjjBuVzKWW6RYSD4wkYpcZENcKV8tWMUi7jH6TNHSW1WIDXQcLqFigPWD6KgC5PIMpaRZyorabs7uWThpcH3bh8ty3q59MyHkmPFR-Yujv3j8bS_igZx8-Bfcr23XwPhaw9DoUZ5d1oW6bHXSRkkuZFVFw%3D%3D)

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | — The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Mifepristone
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Late last week, a GOP-appointed federal judge in Texas blocked the FDA's
approval of mifepristone, a safe, effective, and essential medication for
abortion care that has been in use for more than 20 years.

Abortion access can already be a matter of life and death — we need
leaders nationwide willing to stand up and fight to make sure abortion
medication remains available.

Fellow American,

I know you probably receive a lot of fundraising emails in your inbox, **so I wanted to take a second to say thank you for reading this one and explain why your continued support is so critical.**

[**Running a campaign like this one is _extremely_ expensive**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4b416b2a4b354638855945803eb8d572&_e=dfHWzqDNQ2yLIjnP1lEV7nVd7owxXx5SYS9LoxI9MgKbcXhTEZiBud3tkEl9LQy93ziSIBx_IccxpceCV3ZXjWQBERU0_0ud4b7rG7PvhWqhi9psI-aNDex0nEazObU73S743aGX7XLeZJ0PwV0aR58YV2iRpTOtkpvjPTfu7xw5E_eoO2vyB-guWsLUor7ffd_zNQhlkGJkXJvC45zbPBTdfbHAW6kfzhmrd4YqmAGhPF15-ErP0qESYzvzlMm16EMZbpju6bARAgmzZAyW535XTZYsbzQI25lnNVjHdGJ3QqBjy1YIFpc7V-QXbbAE_VbcvKw_JEyc1BkvMNg2dFkHl513FgVE9cN1eDt8sy_RSawVfgJL4iW8GPHO3T-26NK_HpuggaTOCInTzn17Uw%3D%3D) – especially with the attacks coming at me from all sides of the Democratic party.

Just take a moment to think about all the things which go into a campaign for Congress:

* Paying our staff
* Door-knocking software
* Billboard advertising
* Get-out-the-vote efforts
* Travel expenses for the team
* Pizza and coffee for volunteers
* Digital advertisements, and emails just like this one!

It really starts to add up... _and do you know how most politicians pay for it?_ They come from wealthy families!

Well Fellow American, it’s not the case for me. I pulled myself up by my bootstraps – after dropping out of high school and taking classes at a technical college to graduate, then going on to graduate from the Citadel and working my way to Congress to represent real people like you and me.

I didn’t grow up with a silver spoon in my mouth. I got by without government handouts or radical socialist policies – and I am a better woman because of it. [**So, to stay in this fight I have to build a grassroots-funded warchest – meaning donations from folks just like you.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4b416b2a4b354638855945803eb8d572&_e=dfHWzqDNQ2yLIjnP1lEV7nVd7owxXx5SYS9LoxI9MgKbcXhTEZiBud3tkEl9LQy93ziSIBx_IccxpceCV3ZXjWQBERU0_0ud4b7rG7PvhWqhi9psI-aNDex0nEazObU73S743aGX7XLeZJ0PwV0aR58YV2iRpTOtkpvjPTfu7xw5E_eoO2vyB-guWsLUor7ffd_zNQhlkGJkXJvC45zbPBTdfbHAW6kfzhmrd4YqmAGjYYC78AaLW-zjwCcoZzfWojud6W0dLo_YyVzLi8cVcmiUbKWSCs73xG0ZyF0iP5XN_c58Xhz6c0LfDhiviGSDZf7RDnKdppm6w9ctv8CbrbJkIUKoQoS2qidyHAa-SQKG0Ul4nN7dsUe9hRUssiY3yAHy6mvmUeJTOt-91J_aTQ%3D%3D)

[**Can you help me out today with a gift of any amount today to fund my campaign efforts?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4b416b2a4b354638855945803eb8d572&_e=dfHWzqDNQ2yLIjnP1lEV7nVd7owxXx5SYS9LoxI9MgKbcXhTEZiBud3tkEl9LQy93ziSIBx_IccxpceCV3ZXjWQBERU0_0ud4b7rG7PvhWqhi9psI-aNDex0nEazObU73S743aGX7XLeZJ0PwV0aR58YV2iRpTOtkpvjPTfu7xw5E_eoO2vyB-guWsLUor7ffd_zNQhlkGJkXJvC45zbPBTdfbHAW6kfzhmrd4YqmAF_RB6r9lJ1hGTL6cgNZM6glmpRXitRojkZxob31ii8fhnYiS_JduRv3pZ9v3oB0K06dJZgNkt52q3TuPNVU5hNwoeKon-hOV9JLJqvT4D8UU7VY-d4kSey0Dj3l7CTBOMF25GFrWiJwv_gki-yu3-Y_80pn2GbdiMp23pMqvnKQQ%3D%3D)

[** MORE ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4b416b2a4b354638855945803eb8d572&_e=dfHWzqDNQ2yLIjnP1lEV7nVd7owxXx5SYS9LoxI9MgKbcXhTEZiBud3tkEl9LQy93ziSIBx_IccxpceCV3ZXjWQBERU0_0ud4b7rG7PvhWqhi9psI-aNDex0nEazObU73S743aGX7XLeZJ0PwV0aR58YV2iRpTOtkpvjPTfu7xw5E_eoO2vyB-guWsLUor7ffd_zNQhlkGJkXJvC45zbPBTdfbHAW6kfzhmrd4YqmAHDncpgJg_0qozIRLHu-HgvE3NDYgdBKI4pI5xLBhz5HF0TEhfmHwjplFqwfchqxxWlUY1sAPsXcKWxGrXCZPslr18ia4ZXL2f7JNeC3kbVHDbAIkh1yyCfnUiUANdA21--HF8f-eJG-GIjJ-lmX0CA_WwjGrLqG167dKCS1iKZ4Q%3D%3D)

Do you know why Washington is filled to the brim with wealthy folks who think they can buy seats? [**Because they have the funds to dump millions into ultra-competitive seats just like this one.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4b416b2a4b354638855945803eb8d572&_e=dfHWzqDNQ2yLIjnP1lEV7nVd7owxXx5SYS9LoxI9MgKbcXhTEZiBud3tkEl9LQy93ziSIBx_IccxpceCV3ZXjWQBERU0_0ud4b7rG7PvhWqhi9psI-aNDex0nEazObU73S743aGX7XLeZJ0PwV0aR58YV2iRpTOtkpvjPTfu7xw5E_eoO2vyB-guWsLUor7ffd_zNQhlkGJkXJvC45zbPBTdfbHAW6kfzhmrd4YqmAEV14zZidS5ic3NKUJIbF7v0KwayHA0gFRP1ZtkkFqgLA3I2EFljyGrQ36J8eUPDrZjM7M0VMBC-xy_DmSYf8xjPSNAj5Vl_IPG1e9Yvw2QSAcrfy7nEvpfKZ82TGgLEqgmZrOYXU5bhxuKnfNS29ITiUVjZRMzVfaytU0xbWm5ig%3D%3D)

[**I want to keep working for you and our family, but I need your help to keep this seat and fight back against the attacks.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4b416b2a4b354638855945803eb8d572&_e=dfHWzqDNQ2yLIjnP1lEV7nVd7owxXx5SYS9LoxI9MgKbcXhTEZiBud3tkEl9LQy93ziSIBx_IccxpceCV3ZXjWQBERU0_0ud4b7rG7PvhWqhi9psI-aNDex0nEazObU73S743aGX7XLeZJ0PwV0aR58YV2iRpTOtkpvjPTfu7xw5E_eoO2vyB-guWsLUor7ffd_zNQhlkGJkXJvC45zbPBTdfbHAW6kfzhmrd4YqmAEXlMdUeALkqIWnSAmrl95w66Y-gLUNg0GFeBlIBflFD0QyHMfCT2tgqfaQY3WpRWJ7dQ85vRX85GOH8D-sn_80wLbabuz9ufQWjrHXFHWpm3q6th7HSK4cfzZ_98Y4TSQdU0yaAJalxqJ0GtCvHFE0LTnnIs3uVKNzjTnXTpYSfg%3D%3D)

# About Nancy
---
Congresswoman Nancy Mace grew up in the Lowcountry. She is the daughter of a retired Army General and retired school teacher. She is a proud mother of two, the first female to graduate from The Citadel's Corps of Cadets, and a tough conservative who wants to save our country from the radicals who hate America! In 2020, she took SC-01 back from the Democrats and now, is fighting tooth and nail to keep it Red. [**JOIN NANCY**](go.txting.io/mEWDMy)

My first interview since I was arrested and arraigned.
| | | [ ](https://email.info.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kc1u2zAQhJ-Gukmgln_KQYemrIHCQC45pOnFWJOUvS5JCRIVw29fyLBz_WawmA-LaYo03HpmXhnAmfzCAJj4wQD28vXPm95_7G39BZfP2molr1sKPxlAuU3hu_q40oSEFDdqbOV7fZSt8VXoW921kr8Y3VXnXg_onDYOpT4aOfAXI1sw_HgMHfe8UxX1wEFw2Yq2a5WCxqERHFFy13oE4ZnklIex8WPG6C9lXtPUuDFVsT-XMi33TTsGuyW4dQ7NlfIc_NbYGH6FGlOYyWF9GSmXelizn5EWyqfajSlRKSEw2GUXlQsKOWjXKqWl0Ezs1pIOKXhaExP2Iaw3uIzr7AIT1tEBH8xhmpBOmQn7lHomYy4hFyZsp_UGDzmSZ8Iqv4r36_vy63aH95cI-_HZ_ftt3v7Gau79dKUYadGGSX7aFmxu_wMAAP__q7iNeQ)
