Friend,
I sat down with Tucker Carlson on Tuesday night for my FIRST INTERVIEW since I was arrested and arraigned.
_Tucker asked if there’s**ANYTHING** the Democrats could throw at me that would make me drop out of the presidential race._
Without hesitation, I said, _**“NO. I’D NEVER DROP OUT.”**_
Because the fate of America hangs in the balance – and I will _NEVER SURRENDER_ our country to the radical Left.
If an unjust, and possibly illegal, ARREST didn’t even make me flinch – then I promise you, NOTHING WILL.
**Now, I’m asking YOU to stand with me as the Left tries to throw everything they can at us to _force me out of the presidential election._**

**But she isn’t giving up.** Justice Sotomayor says she'll keep fighting for us every single day, and we MUST follow her example!

We’ve launched an URGENT petition to show that Democrats won’t back down. We’ll ALWAYS fight for reproductive freedoms. And with Republicans doing everything they can to take away our rights, _now is the time to step up._ **Let's stand with Justice Sotomayor TODAY:**

**[Sign our MASSIVE Democratic petition to show that you stand for reproductive freedoms at this critical moment in American history >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/11610?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230413-SupremeCourtUpdate-SotomayorQuoteReboot-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230413-SupremeCourtUpdate-SotomayorQuoteReboot-Pros-sl1&akid=10385%2E9716520%2E9wRnb1)**

name: Kash Patel
subject: BREAKING - J6 Choir tops music charts
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=30151efd70cb4f6c870c0c347faf41bf&_e=0NONpTXkttu6owVxCHEeTOGA_cjquw_mrVulKeJe5Vd0P7pQuHS92OhJaMRwiY7_hmqOKYw2CvNsSQ3vxJvQzrkvpnLedQKqAP4JMIpHaFBFLN8Wtd0g9UFeGX2UblMx8b3IcAuXzLUXVYnP9h2sO_mXamLlqp0AzD3R9YjAAjcEWXhrahhv8GON3l6TCOkh04Pi2icg0bP5MVhfn8-lDTpbJPLUdzurG6sto5Mu7h23xGxkIBc4XpTaxJkwDBPokaVKrMg0BMPsyor2Bnt56Q%3D%3D)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=30151efd70cb4f6c870c0c347faf41bf&_e=0NONpTXkttu6owVxCHEeTOGA_cjquw_mrVulKeJe5Vd0P7pQuHS92OhJaMRwiY7_hmqOKYw2CvNsSQ3vxJvQzrkvpnLedQKqAP4JMIpHaFBFLN8Wtd0g9UFeGX2UblMxyavn7Jk3OqRJXIQ2fdEshJ8rdBPG7GjSDi0VVvnuHe8rMKhTBmQbFmhc7DCc6DJRXT_6kObnzBf91fG4_H_-_cxqQ01Bff75Kk72_MOuE1vmk2WKW05uotXniCoXbHW-KUXCtvo05VD81l3-W4T_3Q%3D%3D)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=30151efd70cb4f6c870c0c347faf41bf&_e=0NONpTXkttu6owVxCHEeTOGA_cjquw_mrVulKeJe5Vd0P7pQuHS92OhJaMRwiY7_hmqOKYw2CvNsSQ3vxJvQzrkvpnLedQKqAP4JMIpHaFBFLN8Wtd0g9UFeGX2UblMx-OYmDYq8qhI8DQkZBGp3AQUIGGSlpTTkf0oid07vhlNw1tkIumrtm_rxf97-n1T59XXhOAGjbMVIgViwF1D5eQuoQ9JWIz8H4K5ZNFNJZXBMYa1THiBbCXA8CkUYY_VI-eWSHuYohZbNyWU6uvcZeg%3D%3D)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[** _Donate Now >>_**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=30151efd70cb4f6c870c0c347faf41bf&_e=0NONpTXkttu6owVxCHEeTOGA_cjquw_mrVulKeJe5Vd0P7pQuHS92OhJaMRwiY7_hmqOKYw2CvNsSQ3vxJvQzrkvpnLedQKqAP4JMIpHaFBFLN8Wtd0g9UFeGX2UblMxpH0CWs9pSA0umFygd0SISv5VsTkEf7o7HTGjrWzxk5PAWU3etonirCFIOm931WKS_VB4Utlp25dWP6xkaXsg6R_pemdn52wksD1kSJZ_wJmq4xfNKP6_YvDrGDooXq80DtPFwJfUfh7JHTHIClP8WQ%3D%3D)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

clean_body: Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? Friend, Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? They sing the national anthem. And they have sung this song proudly every night for more than 700 straight nights. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag. We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need. The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts! We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them. But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them. Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no " deadly insurrection." The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before. It's time to act and help to support these families. My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families? Click below to show your support today! Support the January 6th Families Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com Donor Status: MISSING Goal: 1,000 Donors I launched the Kash Foundation to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself. I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out. Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. Please hurry. And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored. For Freedom, Kash Patel The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible. Reclaiming American Freedom 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Senator Heidi Campbell
subject: 🚨 Nashville's House members endorsed us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Campbell for Mayor
body:

Peter,
I’ve been endorsed by some of the most amazing leaders in Tennessee!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230413_em_fr_b1_HC_initial [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230413_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
Peter, this is a big deal: these esteemed representatives each know how hard I’ll work for Nashville residents. Can you join Rep. Johnson, Rep. Freeman, Rep. Mitchell, and Rep. Clemmons in supporting my campaign with a contribution today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230413_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
SUPPORT HEIDI [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230413_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
Peter, I have been defending Nashville for the last 15 years – as a vice-mayor and a mayor of a Nashville community, as a state senator, as a longtime Nashvillian, and as a Mom. I’ve protected our city from outside special interests, the state government's hostile takeover, and threats to our fundamental rights.
The next mayor of Nashville will wake up to some big challenges, and we need someone with the experience and temperament to take the reins.
I want everyone from Hermitage to Bordeaux to Bellevue to know that I will be fighting for your best interests every single day.
I am beyond grateful to Rep. Johnson, Rep. Freeman, Rep. Mitchell, and Rep. Clemmons for standing beside me as I made my launch announcement, and even more grateful for their continued support.
Peter, I’m excited to continue building this grassroots coalition. Will you chip in any amount now to join these esteemed TN Representatives in endorsing my campaign and help elect a real fighter for Nashville? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230413_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
CHIP IN NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230413_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
With gratitude,
Heidi
Heidi Campbell is a Nashville native, Mom, former music industry executive and the first female mayor of the city of Oak Hill.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230413_em_fr_b1_HC_initial [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230413_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
As mayor, Heidi established a track record for fiscal discipline, balancing the budget every year of her Mayorship, eliminating my own salary, and returning $2M to my city’s reserves.
Heidi was elected in November of 2020 to represent District 20 in the Tennessee State Senate. Since then, she’s been an outspoken advocate for science, the LGBTQ community, public education, local control, women's and kids' issues, Medicaid expansion, and the environment.
Heidi sponsored or co-sponsored over 100 pieces of legislation in her first year in the senate, including legislation to allow cities to offer paid family leave, increase funding for school counselors and reading interventionists, and make it easier to cast a vote.
Heidi is focused on sustainable infrastructure, economic development and job creation, fully funding our public schools and supporting educators, expanding access to affordable healthcare, investing in suicide prevention, making certain that vulnerable children in state custody are not falling through the cracks, and ensuring that every Tennessean - regardless of ethnicity, gender, sexual orientation, age or ability - can achieve the American Dream.
Election Day is Thursday, August 3, 2023.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to:
Campbell for Mayor
P.O. Box 330302
Nashville, Tennessee 37203

name: Rick Larsen
subject: Supporting our veterans and their families
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61751503/401065610/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Mzk4ZjU3Ny0yOWRhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hx5-2f6nJbsUMFJVpDnTb-6luzbiOSoHskAHHmfyhr8=&emci=80e6349d-f7d7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=4398f577-29da-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=9494239)
---

| | I represent nearly 51,000 veterans in the 2nd Congressional District. So many veterans have made enormous sacrifices to serve and fight for our country. They have earned our deepest gratitude and our unfaltering support. I am focused on breaking down barriers and building opportunities for veterans and their families — and**ensuring they receive the benefits they earned.** Last year, I supported a bill to provide more than a half-billion dollars in VA Supportive Housing. These funds have been used nationwide to serve veterans. **In our district alone, these funds helped more than 420 veterans find housing and access case management and clinical services.** Additionally, I am working with members of Congress to ensure that the commitment we made to our veterans does not end when their service does. So last year I helped sponsor a bill with Senators Patty Murray and Tammy Duckworth to help veterans start families. Right now, service members can receive some fertility treatments. But due to a ban passed in Congress in 1992, the VA is prohibited from covering the cost of some fertility treatments. **The Veteran Families Health Services Act will cover treatments, such as in vitro fertilization (IVF) and fertility counseling** —both while they are serving, and after they leave their military service. I am committed to helping veterans and their families take full advantage of these benefits and to serving them just as they did for us. More updates soon. _Rick_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | clean_body: | | | | I represent nearly 51,000 veterans in the 2nd Congressional District. So many veterans have made enormous sacrifices to serve and fight for our country. They have earned our deepest gratitude and our unfaltering support. I am focused on breaking down barriers and building opportunities for veterans and their families — andensuring they receive the benefits they earned. Last year, I supported a bill to provide more than a half-billion dollars in VA Supportive Housing. These funds have been used nationwide to serve veterans. In our district alone, these funds helped more than 420 veterans find housing and access case management and clinical services. Additionally, I am working with members of Congress to ensure that the commitment we made to our veterans does not end when their service does. So last year I helped sponsor a bill with Senators Patty Murray and Tammy Duckworth to help veterans start families. Right now, service members can receive some fertility treatments. But due to a ban passed in Congress in 1992, the VA is prohibited from covering the cost of some fertility treatments. The Veteran Families Health Services Act will cover treatments, such as in vitro fertilization (IVF) and fertility counseling —both while they are serving, and after they leave their military service. I am committed to helping veterans and their families take full advantage of these benefits and to serving them just as they did for us. More updates soon. The tighter restrictions will make it even harder to receive abortion care in the South, where access is already scarce. name: Robert Garcia
subject: My very first bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61753448/401066960/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2E3Zjc0OS0yYmRhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UgyDdmJEV5vEWrM4YuFGfa6vnjjhMRs-wHBR_lH8RPk=)
Team —
Recently, Senator Ed Markey and I introduced the _International Human Rights Defense Act_ — legislation to strengthen America’s role in protecting and promoting LGBTQ+ rights globally.
**_As the first LGBTQ+ immigrant in Congress, this bill is personal._**
Uganda just passed one of the world’s most homophobic laws which would imprison those convicted of identifying as LGBTQ+ and even sentence some to death. But it doesn't stop there. 67 countries have national laws that criminalize same-sex relationships, and many more are proposing new legislation.
This is my first bill as a Congressman for a reason. This work matters to me, it matters to our country, and it matters to LGBTQ+ people around the world, who deserve to be protected regardless of nationality. As a proud, gay immigrant — the first openly gay immigrant ever in Congress — this is incredibly personal for me. And I’m honored to fight for our community in Congress.
So it’s time we stand up for LGBTQ+ rights not just at home — but abroad because LGBTQ+ rights are human rights. And that’s why I proposed the International Human Rights Defense Act.
[**If you agree and would like to continue to support my work in Congress, can you please contribute $3 so I can continue fighting for the LGBTQ+ community? I need to have the resources to continue this movement.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61753450/401066962/28553130?refcode2=83a7f749-2bda-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&refcode=em230413-1-t2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2E3Zjc0OS0yYmRhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UgyDdmJEV5vEWrM4YuFGfa6vnjjhMRs-wHBR_lH8RPk=)
Thank you for being a part of this team.
Robert Garcia
**[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61753453/401066964/28553130?refcode2=83a7f749-2bda-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&refcode=em230413-1-t2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2E3Zjc0OS0yYmRhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UgyDdmJEV5vEWrM4YuFGfa6vnjjhMRs-wHBR_lH8RPk=)**

* * *
Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress

subject: I need your help to get on the debate stage

body:
The number of grassroots donors will likely be one of the main criteria for an invitation to the first Presidential Debate.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=c289fde8d0914f258f49ca59acb5ab2a&_t=HMwACm8yNtNpXbIfozK8R2Dfmuw3yg_fIzYEwo_OLPHaWn6AqsXLLptKz-EUazgdhLFM4nRxpZp539_M8EWQEFxuQYBN5peIVZL8X07vgi8%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=c289fde8d0914f258f49ca59acb5ab2a&_t=HMwACm8yNtNpXbIfozK8R2Dfmuw3yg_fIzYEwo_OLPHaWn6AqsXLLptKz-EUazgdhLFM4nRxpZp539_M8EWQEFxuQYBN5peIVZL8X07vgi8%3D)

Fellow American,

**Yesterday, the RNC announced the location of the first Presidential Debate.**

I am going to put in the work EVERY DAY to make sure I am on that debate stage.

While we don't know today the criteria to be invited to the main debate stage yet, it's clear that the number of unique grassroots donors will play a major role.

To make sure I can share my vision for America on the debate stage, _**[I need your help.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c289fde8d0914f258f49ca59acb5ab2a&_e=z2IBYs7D_zm4rtzxfn1WDXHKNg2KmJhmx-8xvKXEICAXxrz2jka_HM3ynlZK7ouesUKeokTKz3giFgg7Cq2Lndj1pOfcUeREOfe_u3LFsLMxF0YHs7pIRWkxMfOQDTlng1ynT6QDcPq5ocCKiipX6WylTjWoElMhVZD729z-dBjobhB27mR_Ghl5ISoMitsnazwAEujcWQiv9wgBdgIl75ZOHNzknuB4KY4EyarmS-7DtCb06EhzVeHQV-M0LefLbfe9HonGUPxKi7IKuivU2iUk5GzFChJKKJs985LBEUrSDpkf87q4hHS6-aod3oDxK6Y0ywGGh0N1j8aD60z78ykoai_sqf8cJIvq5dV7Jq9XgCtqLSla04lR9T0THSA5PzCrvV8XOt-jLGCKxh4HpSKyXbJVfyQYjCwsLJw60-fG6w8rISweVFDs7Vu8_LgO)**_

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

---

name: The GIFFORDS Team
subject: Change is coming
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
The tides are turning in our movement to end gun violence.
#

Do you feel it?
The tides are turning in our movement to end gun violence.
This morning, Michigan Governor Gretchen Whitmer signed transformative universal background checks and safe storage legislation into law. And just a few hours later, the Michigan House passed an extreme risk—aka “red flag”—bill.
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-apr23.fjJHm6&refcode=em230413-1-15&t=1&akid=5098%2E3935704%2E-p5O87)
Earlier this week, Tennessee Governor Bill Lee signed an executive order focused on strengthening background checks for firearm purchases, and has also called for lawmakers to pass an order of protection law to keep guns away from dangerous individuals.
We applaud Governor Lee for transcending partisanship and having the courage to act in the wake of last month’s tragedy at Nashville’s Covenant School. This is an important step forward for Tennessee—a state which historically has had some of the weakest gun laws in the nation.
The only way we can end gun violence in our country is if leaders at every level of government take action to keep their constituents safe. Michigan is a prime example of what we can achieve when we elect a state legislature that prioritizes gun safety. Because of the legislature’s courage to act, Michigan will now be safer with stronger background check and safe storage requirements.
We must keep up the fight until every state in America elects leaders who will work to pass strong gun laws.
[**Will you contribute $3 to GIFFORDS PAC today to help us keep up our work to elect gun safety champions up and down the ballot?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-apr23.fjJHm6&refcode=em230413-1-15&t=2&akid=5098%2E3935704%2E-p5O87)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17016?c0=giffords-em-apr23.7BzXPA&refcode=em230413-1-15&t=21&akid=5098%2E3935704%2E-p5O87)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-apr23.Phu1VU&refcode=em230413-1-15&t=22&akid=5098%2E3935704%2E-p5O87)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-apr23.6sNEa3&refcode=em230413-1-15&t=23&akid=5098%2E3935704%2E-p5O87)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-apr23.OKouW1&refcode=em230413-1-15&t=24&akid=5098%2E3935704%2E-p5O87)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-apr23.7su2Eh&refcode=em230413-1-15&t=25&akid=5098%2E3935704%2E-p5O87)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-apr23.kgvFSZ&refcode=em230413-1-15&t=26&akid=5098%2E3935704%2E-p5O87)**
---
****
We know that waiting for change is difficult. But we hope today you’ll join us in acknowledging the progress we’ve seen in Michigan and Tennessee this week.
Never forget: You are a part of this positive change. Thank you.
Onward,
The GIFFORDS Team

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=5098%2E3935704%2E-p5O87) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Pramila Jayapal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Our movement has come a long way, and we will not allow the hard-fought progress we've made to be reversed by the narrow Republican majority in the House.
#
Peter,
We’re almost halfway through the month of April and my team has just told me that **we're $4,056 behind our mid-month fundraising goal.**
In staying true to upholding the progressive values that unite our grassroots movement, I have never accepted a dime in corporate money. **Our movement's work is wholly fueled by the generosity of our grassroots supporters.**
[**So today I'm asking: will you be one of the 200 supporters we need to fuel our people-powered movement before our deadline on Saturday at midnight?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41536?c0=20230413.Kgf6lD&refcode=em20230413-2373&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2373%2E420207%2Ef6dQ5h)
**[Pitch in $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41536?c0=20230413.Kgf6lD&refcode=em20230413-2373&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=2373%2E420207%2Ef6dQ5h)**
Our movement is invested in improving the lives of working class people across the country. We know what is possible when we're able to effectively organize and mobilize around the issues that impact our communities the most. Every donation is **_key**_ in our efforts to build a new political consensus that is working toward the bold solutions we need to solve these issues.
At a time when Republicans are coming for our bodily autonomy, when they are shunning the democratic process by expelling progressive leaders, and then siding with the NRA while our children are murdered in schools, we cannot allow ourselves to submit to the status quo.
Our movement has come a long way, and **we will not allow the hard-fought progress we've made to be reversed by the narrow Republican majority in the House.**
[**And that's why we're asking: will you be one of the 200 supporters we need to chip in to our progressive movement today to help us keep fighting for progress?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41536?c0=20230413.Kgf6lD&refcode=em20230413-2373&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=2373%2E420207%2Ef6dQ5h)
**[Chip in $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41536?c0=20230413.Kgf6lD&refcode=em20230413-2373&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2373%2E420207%2Ef6dQ5h)**
In solidarity,
Pramila

clean_body: Our movement has come a long way, and we will not allow the hard-fought progress we've made to be reversed by the narrow Republican majority in the House. Peter, We’re almost halfway through the month of April and my team has just told me that we're $4,056 behind our mid-month fundraising goal. In staying true to upholding the progressive values that unite our grassroots movement, I have never accepted a dime in corporate money. Our movement's work is wholly fueled by the generosity of our grassroots supporters. Our movement is invested in improving the lives of working class people across the country. We know what is possible when we're able to effectively organize and mobilize around the issues that impact our communities the most. Every donation is key in our efforts to build a new political consensus that is working toward the bold solutions we need to solve these issues. At a time when Republicans are coming for our bodily autonomy, when they are shunning the democratic process by expelling progressive leaders, and then siding with the NRA while our children are murdered in schools, we cannot allow ourselves to submit to the status quo. Our movement has come a long way, and we will not allow the hard-fought progress we've made to be reversed by the narrow Republican majority in the House. In solidarity, Pramila | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

subject: I’m parting ways with Newsmax. Here’s what I’m up to now:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME THIS YEAR.

| |

---
| | | Hey - this is Sean Spicer:

With a heavy heart, I just announced I'm parting ways with Newsmax. My show reached millions and helped viewers see what's _really_ happening in our country. Something the Mainstream Media fails to do time and time again.

_**[But with that in the rearview mirror, I'm thrilled at what's coming next...](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9a19ec85c19548f1a61d34c4520d8c72&_e=afsW5bGEpHdWqQC76V58zdRFVk3NBL0vWHmJy3ZSp_wWmKMVyNVdps9zow8ZYroi9H1PLY2MkJRIHEwNkVzgGe2MVkq2jh6F2ZAS6mE7JKO4zFSEyBVA4-cWUBFe_g7LynTixEcOq_F1a7-cZFmHJUlC5JzaJWIxNK0qNZFe97KKtNag7-nqZoIsiOGpY1Gdxe7mLfczEgS7teWn7YO2XO8YgwLj_fUN1qQu_wYfd5xz3L2i3T1Ccdz1I3vPytZTVkK04nY35rXM_vaESktFILIlaTROeMriI0zttWcTA0vZON8LcbUk5uSIGMo0gvlM4Kzjs8TLx2fyrFaUj5WyHvrX2eHg90hlasNJi49wSQ2xjfvffkxCk37Vt4VGSjLXv7PUhAGHtoI_fXuilvvzCufxK8mBSOl-R0A1SrgvlUpWvyB0GkV5tpUZnqCZTYJg0PPVX8fyMwKJj4skJVwqRg%3D%3D "But with that in the rearview mirror, I’m thrilled at what’s coming next... ---

The 2024 election will be the single most important one in the history of our country. Joe Biden and Democrats in Congress have set our country into a tailspin. It's an emergency situation and we're running dangerously short on time to change course.

We have our work cut out for us ahead of 2024:

- Fire Joe Biden and retake the presidency
- Expand our razor-thin Majority in the House
- Win back the Senate and send Chuck Schumer into retirement

**The Democrats aren 't going to give us an inch... so we have no choice but to 1) outwork, 2) outsmart, and - most importantly - 3) outraise them. **

Unfortunately, that last point is the most important. Why? Because no one works harder than strong Conservatives like you. And Republicans are WINNING on the issues - they can't outsmart us when we're the ones fighting for freedom, defending our country and flag, and resisting their radical woke agenda.

But Democrats have a MAJOR advantage in fundraising thanks to their armies of Hollywood megadonors and woke Liberals whipping out their credit cards whenever they flip on MSNBC.

_**[Look- if we want to win in 2024, it's going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9a19ec85c19548f1a61d34c4520d8c72&_e=afsW5bGEpHdWqQC76V58zdRFVk3NBL0vWHmJy3ZSp_wWmKMVyNVdps9zow8ZYroi9H1PLY2MkJRIHEwNkVzgGe2MVkq2jh6F2ZAS6mE7JKO4zFSEyBVA4-cWUBFe_g7LynTixEcOq_F1a7-cZFmHJUlC5JzaJWIxNK0qNZFe97KKtNag7-nqZoIsiOGpY1Gdxe7mLfczEgS7teWn7YO2XO8YgwLj_fUN1qQu_wYfd5xz3L2i3T1Ccdz1I3vPytZTVkK04nY35rXM_vaESktFIBGDfVxfLZS2DxelvkkTlP_8sm6qGaIUietqFJsrmwZiRe0SXQMzh4cYvVsJnMXmf2tezY9GhnM7eXi9Xok9URWab7CnkSfX_BnFThB5RGDRt-Y6_MWe8fTJtfzxm5ptGUXP74nm71UFfv6W3dJIxuWdKyz-k_6S7Q0hJpsPKDC1wjNvDiCymaaUtOw_xPncwA%3D%3D "Look – if we want to win in 2024, it’s going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW. ")**_

That's why I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME THIS YEAR. We ran the numbers on what it'll take to outraise the Democrats and pull off an overwhelming victory.

We came to the conclusion that if every last one of you gave between $27 and $54, we would have the resources to MAX OUT all our voter contact budgets, GOTV operations, and volunteer recruitment efforts.

_In other words ... if everyone here steps up RIGHT NOW, the Democrats would suffer a defeat like nothing we've ever seen before._

**But that 's a big "if" - it requires 100% participation. **

This plan falls apart if too many folks sit out. We need everyone on board to pull this off.

So I'll cut to the chase.

_**[From the bottom of my heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution between $27 and $54? If we can pull this off, we'll make history.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9a19ec85c19548f1a61d34c4520d8c72&_e=afsW5bGEpHdWqQC76V58zdRFVk3NBL0vWHmJy3ZSp_wWmKMVyNVdps9zow8ZYroi9H1PLY2MkJRIHEwNkVzgGe2MVkq2jh6F2ZAS6mE7JKO4zFSEyBVA4-cWUBFe_g7LynTixEcOq_F1a7-cZFmHJUlC5JzaJWIxNK0qNZFe97KKtNag7-nqZoIsiOGpY1Gdxe7mLfczEgS7teWn7YO2XO8YgwLj_fUN1qQu_wYfd5xz3L2i3T1Ccdz1I3vPytZTVkK04nY35rXM_vaESktFIBGDfVxfLZS2DxelvkkTlP_8sm6qGaIUietqFJsrmwZie5QUI_7wohujWxDkFipZihNKPYYqSf28JSZGFF5EDxPtsErqnN6kHWfaM8s-RzyEOhkxlSJsezYe9yP5b1pFtQ9dtYdmkW4rnlM-ASBrQj2k_dRspCsu4PDFS2tNmvU3s4sYLCFycFUqYqpTpXl7Qw%3D%3D "From the bottom of my heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution between $27 and $54? If we can pull this off, we’ll make history.")**_

Are you in?

rest of the working class.

It’s not rocket science, we need to tax the rich and invest in education,
school meals, child care, and our future.

subject: RE: Tucker Carlson

body:
My first interview since I was arrested and arraigned.

| | | [ ](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3b4bd42947c84cadb5bd90d4021170d1&_e=JsDfVEVhwMRcc2iRO1kU-QcDhSCGYfMOpS3YrQcAbDFZmB19yD8jy6iuhOoH4YxPJvhDyReTVS7Z8OaCARCnyElgvRQm9FOzZo6MDsZ_h1QoiRU4-kqT2qmQYNyaIiwLVWfwf7uhuVMYVyl7-uQKhWi_wyjXO181CsiArlg_Ssd4jWPoxslUL3pDT6R9EhU8NVB1F7RmplBKScoEp56qlRqp7MfIrRVCSGY25Kofp3yWnKtLS1Qde4yf5G6svT1x964zMS-SVMZfiZAhLIPsj9ocp6yhdajUH67ford5-uX76ykIh4ZeC7g2OSgPtWFRKCV1QjZ9BnXRdyjAGKIj0uMDOTRnSHK7QKZN_cOu_9DsOE9qITjbplJqbYty3-2ef-Bn5_B0rCwYga3WTw4Xig%3D%3D)
---
Friend,
I sat down with Tucker Carlson on Tuesday night for my FIRST INTERVIEW since I was arrested and arraigned.
_Tucker asked if there 's **ANYTHING** the Democrats could throw at me that would make me drop out of the presidential race._
Without hesitation, I said, _**" NO. I'D NEVER DROP OUT."**_
Because the fate of America hangs in the balance - and I will _NEVER SURRENDER_ our country to the radical Left.
If an unjust, and possibly illegal, ARREST didn't even make me flinch - then I promise you, NOTHING WILL.

clean_body: My first interview since I was arrested and arraigned. | | | Friend, I sat down with Tucker Carlson on Tuesday night for my FIRST INTERVIEW since I was arrested and arraigned. Tucker asked if there 's ANYTHING the Democrats could throw at me that would make me drop out of the presidential race. Without hesitation, I said, " NO. I'D NEVER DROP OUT." Because the fate of America hangs in the balance - and I will NEVER SURRENDER our country to the radical Left. If an unjust, and possibly illegal, ARREST didn't even make me flinch - then I promise you, NOTHING WILL. Now, I 'm asking YOU to stand with me as the Left tries to throw everything they can at us to force me out of the presidential election. | Thank you, | Donald J. subject: Two days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | Peter, As you may know, our race is going to be one of the closest watched in 2024. I’m a top target for the Left.

That means we need all hands on deck, and that starts with YOU.

I don’t know about you, but the more the Biden Administration is failing, the more I’m FIRED UP to take back our country.

I’m just as committed to defending our national security, defeating the Washington establishment, and taking back our culture from the radical Left as ever, and I know you are too.

But here’s the reality, Peter. The more steadfast we are in our values, the more the Democrats are going to attack us, and that means this campaign is going to get expensive.

I don’t have billionaire big tech or Hollywood on my side like my opponent does, but I do have one powerful secret weapon: YOU.

**Our mid-month deadline is just two days away, and we need your support if we’re going to set the groundwork to win in 2024. Whether you can contribute $1 or $100, every dollar counts. **

name: Helene (Kirsten's daughter)
subject: My mom's announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
Hi! My name is Helene and my mom is Kirsten Engel.
Yesterday, she made a big announcement: my mom is officially running for Congress again.
My mom believes that every child who grows up in Arizona should have the opportunity to find a good-paying job, raise a family, and get ahead. And when she saw how Republican spending cuts were hurting Arizona public schools like mine, she knew she had to get involved.
My mom spent years in the AZ legislature fighting to protect our water supply, support our teachers, and defend our fundamental rights.
Now, she's running for Congress so she can take our fight to DC.
Last year, my mom lost this race by a tiny margin. We can win in 2024, but we'll need support from folks like you. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_041323_FoundingDonor_B] Will you become a Founding Donor by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_041323_FoundingDonor_B]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Donate $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=X_041323_FoundingDonor_B_25] Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=X_041323_FoundingDonor_B_100]
Donate $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=X_041323_FoundingDonor_B_250] Donate $1500 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?express_lane=true&amount=1500&refcode=X_041323_FoundingDonor_B_1500]
Donate other [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?express_lane_other=true&refcode=X_041323_FoundingDonor_B_other]
Building a better future means a lot of things: investing in our public schools, passing common sense gun control laws, protecting our reproductive rights, and taking action to fight climate change.
I'm so proud of my mom for fighting for the issues that matter most.
Flipping this seat blue is going to take a lot of broad grassroots support. Can we count on you to help us build a better Arizona by becoming a Founding Donor now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_041323_FoundingDonor_B]
Thank you so much!
— Helene
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_041323_FoundingDonor_B [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_041323_FoundingDonor_B] Kirsten is a mom, an environmental attorney, and a former State Legislator who has spent the past six years fighting to restore funding to public schools, protect Arizona's natural resources, and make our communities safer.
She’s ready to take that fight to Washington to find common-sense solutions to the challenges we’re facing here in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District.
In 2022, Kirsten lost her race by one of the smallest margins in the country. Will you make sure she can build a winning campaign early by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_041323_FoundingDonor_B]

She’s ready to take that fight to Washington to find common-sense solutions to the challenges we’re facing here in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District. In 2022, Kirsten lost her race by one of the smallest margins in the country. Will you make sure she can build a winning campaign early by chipping in now? Donald J. Trump April 13th, 2023
**Mar-a-Lago, FL—** In a new Agenda47 policy video, President Donald J. Trump pledged to restore justice in America and end the corrupt weaponization of our justice system by dangerous Marxist prosecutors.
“There is no more dire threat to the American Way of Life than the corruption and weaponization of our Justice System—and it’s happening all around us,” President Trump said. “If we cannot restore the fair and impartial rule of law, we will not be a free country.”
[ ](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8jzFvwyAQhX8N3rCOMwYzeGgaZWikrs1K4BzTQuwCaZp_X7mqut736d57Nq0xTI-R6R1DnIMvDJF1TwzxKHenV3V8O-75ScsXvle9vG8Unxlifaz0r_59aSnZELer3jd-7HES0NAo1CCkUAB9M489aDRm0saoYVASdYdOqsGQ7eAMgE0YEbADKTph-kGI1hjltTVOnTtwjnomwVP5WCa_XG307zXf0tq6JTVxnGtdy2-nA8NDvqVzpA0xPHxhgPhJ3F7o6q3UfAo5XC-8zsSz9cHZyJPN36FUvualkLvVJRfuqdS8PDbVJsrB2XauKTZ59Os9xBiK0kzCZZu-Rf0EAAD__xqUZ7o)
[ Watch President Trump’s plan to end the weaponization of the justice system. ](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8jzFvwyAQhX8N3rCOMwYzeGgaZWikrs1K4BzTQuwCaZp_X7mqut736d57Nq0xTI-R6R1DnIMvDJF1TwzxKHenV3V8O-75ScsXvle9vG8Unxlifaz0r_59aSnZELer3jd-7HES0NAo1CCkUAB9M489aDRm0saoYVASdYdOqsGQ7eAMgE0YEbADKTph-kGI1hjltTVOnTtwjnomwVP5WCa_XG307zXf0tq6JTVxnGtdy2-nA8NDvqVzpA0xPHxhgPhJ3F7o6q3UfAo5XC-8zsSz9cHZyJPN36FUvualkLvVJRfuqdS8PDbVJsrB2XauKTZ59Os9xBiK0kzCZZu-Rf0EAAD__xqUZ7o)
President Trump will also appoint 100 U.S. Attorneys who will be the “polar opposite of the Soros District Attorneys” who are destroying the rule of law in America, overhaul the Department of Justice and order sweeping civil rights investigations into Marxist local district attorneys.
“As part of this effort, there should be a federal inquiry into the Soros prosecutor in Austin, Texas, who charged a veteran with murder for defending himself against a threat by a heavily armed member of a radical left mob,” President Trump continued.
When President Trump returns to the White House, he will order the Department of Justice to establish a task force on protecting the right to self-defense.
The new plan will also confront the radicalization of America’s law schools and fight the purge of Conservatives at law firms.
** TRANSCRIPT **
There is no more dire threat to the American Way of Life than the corruption and weaponization of our Justice System—and it’s happening all around us. If we cannot restore the fair and impartial rule of law, we will not be a free country.
As President, it will be my personal mission to restore the scales of justice in America. We will have fairness and equality under the law.
To that end, I will appoint U.S. Attorneys who will be the polar opposite of the Soros District Attorneys and others that are being appointed throughout the United States. Very unfair to our population. Very unfair to our country.
They will be the 100 most ferocious legal warriors against crime and Communist corruption that this country has ever seen.
As we completely overhaul the federal Department of Justice and FBI, we will also launch sweeping civil rights investigations into Marxist local District Attorneys. And that’s what we have—they are Marxist in many cases.
By refusing to charge countless crimes, these Soros prosecutors appear to be engaging in selective enforcement based on illegal racial discrimination.
In Chicago, San Francisco, Los Angeles, and every other city where these maniacs have taken over, the DA’s offices should face federal subpoenas of their staff, their emails, and their records to determine whether they have blatantly violated federal Civil Rights law.
As part of this effort, there should be a federal inquiry into the Soros prosecutor in Austin, Texas, who charged a veteran with murder for defending himself against a threat by a heavily armed member of a radical left mob. I will also order the Department of Justice to establish a task force on protecting the right to self-defense, which is under siege nationwide.
In addition, we will have a complete investigation into the use of police state tactics by federal authorities to arrest conservatives and Christians. We will find out who ordered it, and we will hold them totally accountable.
There is much more that we must do. We have to confront this radicalized law in schools. You take a look at what they’ve done to our schools, our beautiful schools.
We have to reform the far-left Bar Associations and stop the purge of Conservative lawyers from major law firms. I will do whatever it takes to save our legal system—among the greatest achievements of Western Civilization—from the Marxist barbarians who seek to destroy it. And we will do that, we will save it.
Thank you very much.

** Letitia James made clear that “ getting Trump ” was the motivating force behind her campaign for attorney general. **
* In a 2018 video, James [ stated ](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kM1u6yAQhZ8G72wxA8ZhweLmRl40UrfNFgOOJ8U_CrRu3r4iiro5izmfvhmNnbdI48Ow7sgQJ_KJITLxjyGe5fHyrs4f51N96eRbfVKt3EuL_xlifmzhD31ZmjBbimXanSpvWhyBV8GAOoAExXlbTUZLieDCoQsanLVjGGAQI2gfwFtAUZFBjoJLEKDbA0CjtfKd1U4NgjsXWia5D-lzHf262Ohv-f41b41b5yqaKectPW_qGfb7vjduWUrHsEcOmmHPoYRg2G9rpEwuMewzpamOIVMmW9_sHNIrn_Kalu-QMl1tpnUpPC0-_DRTnmN1N37bKUZKqmOSX8sLysbfAAAA___Me2mH) , “I’m running for attorney general, because I will never be afraid to challenge this illegitimate president when our fundamental rights are at stake . He [Trump] should be charged with obstructing justice. I believe that the president of these United States can be indicted for criminal offenses and we would join with law enforcement and other attorneys general across this nation in removing this president from office ... It’s important that everyone understand that the days of Donald Trump are coming to an end .”
* Letitia James [ announced ](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8j8GOsyAcxJ8Gbxj4C4gHDl-_podtstftFQGVFsUADfHtN242e52ZzMxPr3vw06FQf0EAi7cZAaDuHwK4s8vjU9y_7lf86NkHvgrO6unCfwRQjt39RX9bWrdqH061vzZWcZgoaZyiQlJGBSG8WZQ0mktqpBCjZpOx2knajaPshpEIPk2NV0CgI4x2dOCS0nYYhO31YMTYEWMcR4xYl19xsnHTwT5Leq97a-LaBLWUsuefTzcEt1pra3w58DO-06ZDG9OM4La5io-YXljPOLjii9f4qVeXsc9Yj-_stxkvLuE9VpeapOxefQg-ix4xMp-M59x3AAAA__-WVmDY) that as Attorney General, she “look[ed] forward to going into the office of Attorney General every day, suing [President Trump] . . . and then going home!”
* During her 2018 campaign, Letitia James [ vowed ](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8j81q6zAQhZ9mvEuYGf3ZCy1urvEiga4KzVaW5Fqt3ZhIweTti0rpbpjv8HGOW7clTU8L5gTMcwoZmEH8A-aLPF1f9OXt0h-uRp4PvVZyr5T_A3N5bvEv-ms5xtWlpX5N3wSreCJsoiXdkiSNqJrZahqDUOyZxYjkePJaeo1uRGOIYtcky8gCJQnqVEt07DodjOu8HgV6HxVIDDF_3qZw-3JL-Cj3x7od_W1tFjuXsuWfTgPwUPZUSrxXBjy8pjyf3Roz8JCLK496EKrWiFazQTLYGSYNYsggesbmbsO2p2VJWRuQ-F7XVdl3AAAA___V5Vhz) , “ As the next Attorney General of New York I will be a voice for the powerless and take on President Trump . ”
* James [ sa i d ](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kLGOszAQhJ9m6Yzsxdi4oPjzRxQX6dpL6-AlOLEBxY4s3v7E6XTl7nyaGY2NW_DT3oM-AeLsXQJEaP4B4kWerp_q8nU5s6uWH-ysWlkOFf8DYt43-kN_XWqK1ofjq8-V61ucBK-oF6oTUijO22ruR661lWScMZ2-dZKcslrgpBFvCoWpfI8cGy5FI0zbCVEbo5y2ZlS3ho8jtSC5o_RcJ7cuNrhHfr3jVo9rrEI_57yln04D4FBKqYtNs1_ueV2yj5QODnBYqCTAATkKwCHa_TgU4BAo--wte9hIiS1U2L6-nszeWbZ-yYmNNhErFAJz6_iOtAAO1at3W_Eh-KQ0SH4_ZjiSvgMAAP__SkFqTw) , “The president of the United States has to worry about three things; Mueller, Cohen , and Tish James . We’re all closing in on him.”
* James [ admitted ](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8j0FvhCAQhX_NeNPACCgHDt1uOHSTXrtXFFjZghqhMf77xrbpdb7J994zaY3BHwq6CyBOwWZAhPYFEG_scn8Xt4_btb537K2-Cs72k-IrIJZjdf-vf5bGJRPiee2ulVUcPSWVU1T0lFFBCK8mxbikfhi85IJ5z3sc2dD3kngmmHXcVkEhwZYw2lLJe0obKYXtjBzF0JJxdBwYsS5_Lt4us4n2WbavtDbjkqqoplLW_NNJA-p935v5KCG5fHJAjYT2gJoioG4poJ6PzT3CMgPqEvJUP01yuTalLNvsjvrhZreZWP9mTCXFalN23UOMIYsOGHmck0_7dwAAAP__MhdjbQ) that her desire to take down Trump , more than helping the people of New York, motivated her run for attorney general.

It was about the people, but mostly it was about that man in the White House who can’t go a day without threatening our fundamental rights .”

Trump by U.S. Senator Ted Budd Read the endorsement . | ---|--- Donald J. Trump April 13th, 2023 Mar-a-Lago, FL— In a new Agenda47 policy video, President Donald J. Trump pledged to restore justice in America and end the corrupt weaponization of our justice system by dangerous Marxist prosecutors. “There is no more dire threat to the American Way of Life than the corruption and weaponization of our Justice System—and it’s happening all around us,” President Trump said. “If we cannot restore the fair and impartial rule of law, we will not be a free country.” President Trump will also appoint 100 U.S. Attorneys who will be the “polar opposite of the Soros District Attorneys” who are destroying the rule of law in America, overhaul the Department of Justice and order sweeping civil rights investigations into Marxist local district attorneys. “As part of this effort, there should be a federal inquiry into the Soros prosecutor in Austin, Texas, who charged a veteran with murder for defending himself against a threat by a heavily armed member of a radical left mob,” President Trump continued. When President Trump returns to the White House, he will order the Department of Justice to establish a task force on protecting the right to self-defense. The new plan will also confront the radicalization of America’s law schools and fight the purge of Conservatives at law firms. TRANSCRIPT There is no more dire threat to the American Way of Life than the corruption and weaponization of our Justice System—and it’s happening all around us. If we cannot restore the fair and impartial rule of law, we will not be a free country. As President, it will be my personal mission to restore the scales of justice in America. We will have fairness and equality under the law. To that end, I will appoint U.S. Attorneys who will be the polar opposite of the Soros District Attorneys and others that are being appointed throughout the United States. Very unfair to our population. Very unfair to our country. They will be the 100 most ferocious legal warriors against crime and Communist corruption that this country has ever seen. As we completely overhaul the federal Department of Justice and FBI, we will also launch sweeping civil rights investigations into Marxist local District Attorneys. And that’s what we have—they are Marxist in many cases. By refusing to charge countless crimes, these Soros prosecutors appear to be engaging in selective enforcement based on illegal racial discrimination. In Chicago, San Francisco, Los Angeles, and every other city where these maniacs have taken over, the DA’s offices should face federal subpoenas of their staff, their emails, and their records to determine whether they have blatantly violated federal Civil Rights law. As part of this effort, there should be a federal inquiry into the Soros prosecutor in Austin, Texas, who charged a veteran with murder for defending himself against a threat by a heavily armed member of a radical left mob. I will also order the Department of Justice to establish a task force on protecting the right to self-defense, which is under siege nationwide. In addition, we will have a complete investigation into the use of police state tactics by federal authorities to arrest conservatives and Christians. We will find out who ordered it, and we will hold them totally accountable. There is much more that we must do. We have to confront this radicalized law in schools. You take a look at what they’ve done to our schools, our beautiful schools. We have to reform the far-left Bar Associations and stop the purge of Conservative lawyers from major law firms. I will do whatever it takes to save our legal system—among the greatest achievements of Western Civilization—from the Marxist barbarians who seek to destroy it. And we will do that, we will save it. Fellow Conservative,

My name is Mark Lamb – I’m a husband, father, God-fearing American, and proud Sheriff of Pinal County in the great state of Arizona.

**_“Fear Not; Do Right”_**
This phrase has shaped my ideals and convictions to love America. Through every hardship, win, and loss, I am determined to rise above the challenge and lead from the front – in Law Enforcement _and_ Politics.

**On Tuesday, I announced my candidacy for the United States Senate to fight for our shared American values.** [**Washington needs a new Sheriff in town.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1aee823a67ed47e89e98b84f79807e2d&_e=PrB9scVVRIf-XuxDT7KUtpk_6qlehDH6LGOtOb7V4q1tnhRFxmcYuhB8AUZqoINlmCwIMgd8MQeQUHiGNOiUe8eJcToCxEGfM3DQsRGZIj6UfWDt8GFVwaio88J7k5sk-4E0tUKus8qqXBKhRmh2CZsrRvUT8j1S7uESyKVF1JbU6F9iHWAxYWOLhJ9GLq20vCIHLp8eI42JWayDRBxoSPlutiJWwS7AdJ6fTpBl0bFcdlJ06RAo92zfZqnym2wiTn8JWTghKkcJtUzlMfCtvdAGcC7Ct6kkSIJWr2lNHMgY4XAvzgW9NwIsNDMg4NWKeS5BOKCfRf7vzI5yf_LBvTWHzjzHb3gF5Tezk2b79h9eA2OMGaeTQ3Pm9noIRXTB71m07iE_POP0ipaRpBCf0g%3D%3D)

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1aee823a67ed47e89e98b84f79807e2d&_e=PrB9scVVRIf-XuxDT7KUtpk_6qlehDH6LGOtOb7V4q1tnhRFxmcYuhB8AUZqoINlmCwIMgd8MQeQUHiGNOiUe8eJcToCxEGfM3DQsRGZIj6UfWDt8GFVwaio88J7k5sk-4E0tUKus8qqXBKhRmh2CZsrRvUT8j1S7uESyKVF1JbU6F9iHWAxYWOLhJ9GLq20vCIHLp8eI42JWayDRBxoSPlutiJWwS7AdJ6fTpBl0bFcdlJ06RAo92zfZqnym2wi8CJ_kSh7sEEL3S6j1JIhHAIM7t0HaX6yZ0pCNax3BON4wik7YX98KAuIShSojoNFIpd_dedAogFWdRYM3asgUtCPf2Xvqw7W1e5tUW-DUKywFRiaP9jmCkHnSL-HZdGcQ8O7149SBlqyNP2tyMS1yA%3D%3D)
[**SEND THE SHERIFF TO WASHINGTON »**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1aee823a67ed47e89e98b84f79807e2d&_e=PrB9scVVRIf-XuxDT7KUtpk_6qlehDH6LGOtOb7V4q1tnhRFxmcYuhB8AUZqoINlmCwIMgd8MQeQUHiGNOiUe8eJcToCxEGfM3DQsRGZIj6UfWDt8GFVwaio88J7k5sk-4E0tUKus8qqXBKhRmh2CZsrRvUT8j1S7uESyKVF1JbU6F9iHWAxYWOLhJ9GLq20vCIHLp8eI42JWayDRBxoSPlutiJWwS7AdJ6fTpBl0bFcdlJ06RAo92zfZqnym2wi-YlbQLVTnsrV8PJfXFzh8HS5t7DWLj5ecUk413DMKkbkMJotxwIVJGS6kOw4O4FFgSuyqeC9JCBOiLx82dJeI6gICBuW_52xrjfzKW_ldrJ-TcBNCJ4iTvpq1m5T6eNbYarUkJ86VXBDSBUYdv3A5Q%3D%3D)

As a constitutional conservative, I have strong convictions and am courageous in fighting for the citizens I serve in Pinal County.

Our sliver of Arizona is home to more than 420,000 Americans spread over 5,000+ square miles; it’s a vast, arid, sundrenched landscape on the frontline of several conflicts. We are fighting a war on illegal narcotics and simultaneously an immigration battle.

As the top law-enforcement officer in the area, I’m responsible for the safety and well-being of every man, woman, and child who calls this place home. Unlike the career politicians in Washington, D.C., and Phoenix, **I know that the buck stops with me in Pinal County – _which is why I take my job so seriously._**

**I have personally carried dead bodies from the ditches, rescued children from sex trafficking, and arrested gang members and drug dealers.**

I know what deadly drugs and the criminals peddling them are doing to families and communities. **_I know what it did to my family._**

We lost our son and our one-year-old granddaughter eight days before Christmas. No pain compares to losing a child, let alone a grandbaby. During my son’s life, he struggled with drug addiction; he even spent time in my jail for using fentanyl. I am acutely aware that families across Arizona – _and America_ – are being touched by the drug crisis.

Each day I get up and put my Sheriff’s badge on, I remind myself that I’m no better than any man or woman who works for me; I have been, and continue to be, on the frontlines of the opioid epidemic and border fight.

At home in Arizona and across America, lives are on the line. **We must FIGHT if we’re going to save them. I need strong patriots like yourself on my team to win this battle.[Will you commit to the fight by donating any amount to my campaign today?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1aee823a67ed47e89e98b84f79807e2d&_e=PrB9scVVRIf-XuxDT7KUtpk_6qlehDH6LGOtOb7V4q1tnhRFxmcYuhB8AUZqoINlmCwIMgd8MQeQUHiGNOiUe8eJcToCxEGfM3DQsRGZIj6UfWDt8GFVwaio88J7k5sk-4E0tUKus8qqXBKhRmh2CZsrRvUT8j1S7uESyKVF1JbU6F9iHWAxYWOLhJ9GLq20vCIHLp8eI42JWayDRBxoSPlutiJWwS7AdJ6fTpBl0bFcdlJ06RAo92zfZqnym2wiGOJ5QLQxtCpr3MbA5-gSUx3tGu3hpUr9SywuqToVcE8_U3eomqYByrfsOSFGmC6K_xPcePy2fEzn7htPTcYC6ggIZw2rcijQyJhLPKChdG7wMLUQgXLwRRcQBF3AgXKBMGa2p6FqGPtvUzj_E5oxPg%3D%3D)**

[**SEND THE SHERIFF TO WASHINGTON »**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1aee823a67ed47e89e98b84f79807e2d&_e=PrB9scVVRIf-XuxDT7KUtpk_6qlehDH6LGOtOb7V4q1tnhRFxmcYuhB8AUZqoINlmCwIMgd8MQeQUHiGNOiUe8eJcToCxEGfM3DQsRGZIj6UfWDt8GFVwaio88J7k5sk-4E0tUKus8qqXBKhRmh2CZsrRvUT8j1S7uESyKVF1JbU6F9iHWAxYWOLhJ9GLq20vCIHLp8eI42JWayDRBxoSPlutiJWwS7AdJ6fTpBl0bFcdlJ06RAo92zfZqnym2wiA5Q2Ozf_jnA-Wv0e8u5IklwrXXe85hphi8Z2rI5O28zGgFucBWZ8Bt0O91OaHhVd6TQWgcyZJugNZ-vHSIO9Ir9u4pZEFs5aO8R3GYr37VIYcCya6sna-qHeJQCUI-NPs2hBVNz_kVWfFcP-axXteA%3D%3D)

We need leaders in this country who aren’t too politically correct to protect us, and [**that’s why I’m running for the United States Senate.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1aee823a67ed47e89e98b84f79807e2d&_e=PrB9scVVRIf-XuxDT7KUtpk_6qlehDH6LGOtOb7V4q1tnhRFxmcYuhB8AUZqoINlmCwIMgd8MQeQUHiGNOiUe8eJcToCxEGfM3DQsRGZIj6UfWDt8GFVwaio88J7k5sk-4E0tUKus8qqXBKhRmh2CZsrRvUT8j1S7uESyKVF1JbU6F9iHWAxYWOLhJ9GLq20vCIHLp8eI42JWayDRBxoSPlutiJWwS7AdJ6fTpBl0bFcdlJ06RAo92zfZqnym2wiYebbCvu1ylsyj8vOAaRMMxA6HxDKiNTgGMa0o-2yAKS5VstIKUYFhvHXGhbBzAMhBSyxmxCLtkC5UhKxgXhPEFq03lK1U-06_Bzhvsqh48T6HAcjCaw8ADzmZQNwTKWwg22RTnbMyszihI_EtUouwQ%3D%3D)

The people of Pinal County, Arizona, elected me to be their top Law Enforcement official because they know that _**I’m tougher than a $2 steak.**_ The voters who gave me the honor of the Sheriff’s badge I wear on my lapel know that my only interest in elected office is their safety.

[**I’ll stand up to the woke left and the weak political establishment in Washington.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1aee823a67ed47e89e98b84f79807e2d&_e=PrB9scVVRIf-XuxDT7KUtpk_6qlehDH6LGOtOb7V4q1tnhRFxmcYuhB8AUZqoINlmCwIMgd8MQeQUHiGNOiUe8eJcToCxEGfM3DQsRGZIj6UfWDt8GFVwaio88J7k5sk-4E0tUKus8qqXBKhRmh2CZsrRvUT8j1S7uESyKVF1JbU6F9iHWAxYWOLhJ9GLq20vCIHLp8eI42JWayDRBxoSPlutiJWwS7AdJ6fTpBl0bFcdlJ06RAo92zfZqnym2wiEBRtECYnRisXfNAaClAJWE9erbTEQDk1vyIsVKL35Ke3WqkJqw7Qlgd8ECxjDzlftpRcEwe-JjPsLBuKQZk9_nZRxCOGl4yFV5_S1kTXxadnp2c9krwzYb3Fou0sKPc78NIJV0wLNveImyRAWrFdeA%3D%3D) I’ll work 24/7 to do everything in my purview to secure the southern border and provide our law enforcement officers with the resources they need to succeed as our first responders.

I will defend our Second Amendment and the right to life. I’ll work to cut wasteful spending, fight inflation, and put more money back in your pocket. [**These are the fights we must win, Fellow Conservative.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1aee823a67ed47e89e98b84f79807e2d&_e=PrB9scVVRIf-XuxDT7KUtpk_6qlehDH6LGOtOb7V4q1tnhRFxmcYuhB8AUZqoINlmCwIMgd8MQeQUHiGNOiUe8eJcToCxEGfM3DQsRGZIj6UfWDt8GFVwaio88J7k5sk-4E0tUKus8qqXBKhRmh2CZsrRvUT8j1S7uESyKVF1JbU6F9iHWAxYWOLhJ9GLq20vCIHLp8eI42JWayDRBxoSPlutiJWwS7AdJ6fTpBl0bFcdlJ06RAo92zfZqnym2wict62hPYnFkaJzurzMqKduUQAXWWQIRWFLL2Ey57oJKvG2f1WgLZhCniPynYxooJe4DuGzrAZl8OUsXFiBwPAmKSDfk_N-kjKsd_9fGdD-FIf05LV4r56ToFwiIatE4kSNKYuiwd6eNfe4jUKQNLmiQ%3D%3D)

**_Washington needs a new Sheriff in town._**

**I’m Mark Lamb, and I’m ready to lay down the law** – [**are you with me?**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1aee823a67ed47e89e98b84f79807e2d&_e=PrB9scVVRIf-XuxDT7KUtpk_6qlehDH6LGOtOb7V4q1tnhRFxmcYuhB8AUZqoINlmCwIMgd8MQeQUHiGNOiUe8eJcToCxEGfM3DQsRGZIj6UfWDt8GFVwaio88J7k5sk-4E0tUKus8qqXBKhRmh2CZsrRvUT8j1S7uESyKVF1JbU6F9iHWAxYWOLhJ9GLq20vCIHLp8eI42JWayDRBxoSPlutiJWwS7AdJ6fTpBl0bFcdlJ06RAo92zfZqnym2wiw8ICdJls-31tB_zeQqF-5QiGUdzVqE05tE2BGFRKJHOXbfzGezutftB_rhWcI0R50dXkHgpKaJsojHD2jW8SZ21refR9YkAptK9g-fSlLcuRLCXQX9OG8_t2mMv7KOdP70-KQNldIqVtBVigJT8P9g%3D%3D)

Thank you,

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1aee823a67ed47e89e98b84f79807e2d&_e=PrB9scVVRIf-XuxDT7KUtpk_6qlehDH6LGOtOb7V4q1tnhRFxmcYuhB8AUZqoINlmCwIMgd8MQeQUHiGNOiUe8eJcToCxEGfM3DQsRGZIj6UfWDt8GFVwaio88J7k5sk-4E0tUKus8qqXBKhRmh2CZsrRvUT8j1S7uESyKVF1JbU6F9iHWAxYWOLhJ9GLq20vCIHLp8eI42JWayDRBxoSPlutiJWwS7AdJ6fTpBl0bFcdlJ06RAo92zfZqnym2wipmGw5NZAI3jlX6LzdlGjilIETxH596QuvT6_K_dCfzWD4HXGrNOgE2LkGiyMUcZWMHuyOoVHIWQYYzrIelr6CecpCTgji6MyYcyehpp7FQ01BDnMeAWPN6wQsaJPs--ksRzb-4W8B1EdzVvkTbZEFA%3D%3D)

**Meet Sheriff Lamb:** | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM.

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year.

[ **HELP ME FLIP ARIZONA 'S SENATE SEAT RED ➞ **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1aee823a67ed47e89e98b84f79807e2d&_e=PrB9scVVRIf-XuxDT7KUtpk_6qlehDH6LGOtOb7V4q1tnhRFxmcYuhB8AUZqoINlmCwIMgd8MQeQUHiGNOiUe8eJcToCxEGfM3DQsRGZIj6UfWDt8GFVwaio88J7k5sk-4E0tUKus8qqXBKhRmh2CZsrRvUT8j1S7uESyKVF1JbU6F9iHWAxYWOLhJ9GLq20vCIHLp8eI42JWayDRBxoSPlutiJWwS7AdJ6fTpBl0bFcdlJ06RAo92zfZqnym2wimr15Zltf2myie_NNvB1iZli-FjnTKTHozujoEs_5swWqnlyaJBqzqHxuCQkk3X9yqCLuJ4Msu_uLtMYWXXb2PxohGAarwCF5BFnUWlS3rIuEHbStpspd0T8NaHLyzoA3aBE2I2cBzfJzRwPBxslCUw%3D%3D)

clean_body: On Tuesday, I announced my candidacy for the United States Senate to fight for our shared American values. | | Fellow Conservative, My name is Mark Lamb – I’m a husband, father, God-fearing American, and proud Sheriff of Pinal County in the great state of Arizona. “Fear Not; Do Right” This phrase has shaped my ideals and convictions to love America. Through every hardship, win, and loss, I am determined to rise above the challenge and lead from the front – in Law Enforcement and Politics. On Tuesday, I announced my candidacy for the United States Senate to fight for our shared American values. As a constitutional conservative, I have strong convictions and am courageous in fighting for the citizens I serve in Pinal County. Our sliver of Arizona is home to more than 420,000 Americans spread over 5,000+ square miles; it’s a vast, arid, sundrenched landscape on the frontline of several conflicts. We are fighting a war on illegal narcotics and simultaneously an immigration battle. As the top law-enforcement officer in the area, I’m responsible for the safety and well-being of every man, woman, and child who calls this place home. Unlike the career politicians in Washington, D.C., and Phoenix, I know that the buck stops with me in Pinal County – which is why I take my job so seriously. I have personally carried dead bodies from the ditches, rescued children from sex trafficking, and arrested gang members and drug dealers. I know what deadly drugs and the criminals peddling them are doing to families and communities. I know what it did to my family. We lost our son and our one-year-old granddaughter eight days before Christmas. No pain compares to losing a child, let alone a grandbaby. During my son’s life, he struggled with drug addiction; he even spent time in my jail for using fentanyl. I am acutely aware that families across Arizona – and America – are being touched by the drug crisis. Each day I get up and put my Sheriff’s badge on, I remind myself that I’m no better than any man or woman who works for me; I have been, and continue to be, on the frontlines of the opioid epidemic and border fight. At home in Arizona and across America, lives are on the line. We must FIGHT if we’re going to save them. I need strong patriots like yourself on my team to win this battle. We need leaders in this country who aren’t too politically correct to protect us, and The people of Pinal County, Arizona, elected me to be their top Law Enforcement official because they know that I’m tougher than a $2 steak. The voters who gave me the honor of the Sheriff’s badge I wear on my lapel know that my only interest in elected office is their safety. I’ll work 24/7 to do everything in my purview to secure the southern border and provide our law enforcement officers with the resources they need to succeed as our first responders. I will defend our Second Amendment and the right to life. I’ll work to cut wasteful spending, fight inflation, and put more money back in your pocket. Washington needs a new Sheriff in town. I’m Mark Lamb, and I’m ready to lay down the law – Thank you, Sheriff Mark Lamb Republican for U.S. Senate Follow Sheriff Lamb On Social Media Meet Sheriff Lamb: | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM. Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity. Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year. | Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: The number of grassroots donors will likely be one of the main criteria for an invitation to the first Presidential Debate. | Fellow American, Yesterday, the RNC announced the location of the first Presidential Debate. I am going to put in the work EVERY DAY to make sure I am on that debate stage. While we don't know today the criteria to be invited to the main debate stage yet, it's clear that the number of unique grassroots donors will play a major role. To make sure I can share my vision for America on the debate stage, | Whatever amount you are comfortable giving will help us drive forward and get our ideas a prominent spot on the debate stage. - Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

Peter,

Earlier this week, I attended an emergency meeting of the Pro-Choice Caucus to discuss the terrible ruling of a rogue Trump-appointed judge to ban Mifepristone, the leading abortion medication in the United States.

This is just the latest step by MAGA Republicans to ban abortion nationwide, and we know they’ll stop at nothing to get it done — but we can fight back.

We have to elect a pro-choice majority to Congress in 2024 so we can halt any GOP efforts to advance anti-abortion legislation at the federal level — and electing a pro-choice majority starts right here in Rhode Island. [As we look to 2024, will you help us build up our campaign by making a grassroots contribution today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61760687/401082715/-1524014841?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_SM_20230413_FR_abortion.1.1_0_6MO_sethmagaziner_NA_NA_abortion&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWU3NDQ0Yy0zN2RhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_EWglmgiWiWFEx-GNgTBruGJec31EgtSocvYWQTvoI0=)

name: Jane Fonda
subject: Another oil drilling project

body:
The science is clear — every new drilling project like this guarantees more deadly planet-warming pollution will be pumped into the atmosphere.

| Hi, it’s Jane Fonda. I wanted to make sure you didn’t miss this important message from my team.

After the approval of ‘Willow’ – a drilling project in Alaska – the Biden administration is now set to auction off _**73.3 million**_ acres in the Gulf of Mexico for oil and drilling projects.

The science is clear — every new drilling project like this guarantees more deadly planet-warming pollution will be pumped into the atmosphere.

I started the Jane Fonda Climate PAC to eliminate the fossil fuel industry’s stranglehold on our political system. The unfortunate reality is projects like these are only approved because of their influence.

_**I need your support to fight like hell against Big Oil.**_

Your support will not only help us elect climate champions this year, but also helps us send a strong message that ending the era of fossil fuels is what voters expect in 2024 and beyond.

[_**Will you contribute $10 today to help us fight back and end the reign of the fossil fuel industry?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61760780/401083154/931978131?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230413-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY3YzcxZjczLTM3ZGEtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fEyy5pVCtwqc5kRfCa4niJtSYC_CdrCH8fvT0Ounbko=)

The Biden administration put an enormous _**73.3 million**_ acres in the Gulf of Mexico up for auction for oil and gas drilling. This project is estimated to extract 1 billion barrels of oil over the next 50 years, according to the U.S. federal government.

This is the second controversial oil and gas drilling project in the span of the last few weeks President Biden has approved. Willow, a new oil drilling project in Alaska, was approved just two weeks ago and will add dangerous consequences to the ongoing climate crisis.

We need to hold President Biden accountable to his campaign promises to act on the science to avoid the worst effects of the climate crisis. We know that he has the ability to step up and be the kind of leader the American people expect him to be, and we need to send a strong signal that ending the era of fossil fuels is not only good policy, but good politics.

clean_body: The science is clear — every new drilling project like this guarantees more deadly planet-warming pollution will be pumped into the atmosphere. | Hi, it’s Jane Fonda. I wanted to make sure you didn’t miss this important message from my team. After the approval of ‘Willow’ – a drilling project in Alaska – the Biden administration is now set to auction off 73.3 million acres in the Gulf of Mexico for oil and drilling projects. The science is clear — every new drilling project like this guarantees more deadly planet-warming pollution will be pumped into the atmosphere. I started the Jane Fonda Climate PAC to eliminate the fossil fuel industry’s stranglehold on our political system. The unfortunate reality is projects like these are only approved because of their influence. I need your support to fight like hell against Big Oil. Your support will not only help us elect climate champions this year, but also helps us send a strong message that ending the era of fossil fuels is what voters expect in 2024 and beyond. = | = Read more from my team here: = | | US puts Italy-sized chunk of Gulf of Mexico up for auction for oil drilling \- The Guardian | = The Biden administration put an enormous 73.3 million acres in the Gulf of Mexico up for auction for oil and gas drilling. This project is estimated to extract 1 billion barrels of oil over the next 50 years, according to the U.S. federal government. This is the second controversial oil and gas drilling project in the span of the last few weeks President Biden has approved. Willow, a new oil drilling project in Alaska, was approved just two weeks ago and will add dangerous consequences to the ongoing climate crisis. We need to hold President Biden accountable to his campaign promises to act on the science to avoid the worst effects of the climate crisis. We know that he has the ability to step up and be the kind of leader the American people expect him to be, and we need to send a strong signal that ending the era of fossil fuels is not only good policy, but good politics. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Every dollar you contribute helps us elect leaders who will put climate first when they’re elected. And the more support we bring to the table for our endorsed candidates, the stronger signal we send that climate is going to be a voting issue in this election, and the next. That isn’t the only reason to support our work though – we need your support to elect climate champions at every level of government. Local elections play a crucial role in climate decisions and have the power to stop new fossil fuel projects. = | = Let’s protect our planet together, Jane Fonda Climate PAC | | = Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.
