He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: Connor Boyack
subject: These books teach children about freedom
body:
Children of all ages are being brainwashed in our public schools

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=986e262f9e4541858a77b605ea2d0fc0&_e=l4VjN8GV-w26appiVnQhK8CqfZ8tlA8GpNuiWRGNl1E-ztQsh-M528YkrpYBbNpBG5q1VIEtVaqe9rqKuXLH03fKUwktqPUwbeq72lbkrCWQ7QCufHs4DTNIl0kAGguMU6VGOqzv9kgqwfw5B0CVtrS12FmWjuHdyTztewBsd_T8wYnLtx5sviq8EANHpL0P7B79xo55vSql3Cn85HlJkgDskPdGQEID1CHczQ2wrzgEV-oWEPjNUz7gjZJw9I6Y8p0JbwePr-I_Pz9etx_zy-58TemD87dE595dFLHZcLc%3D "Tuttle Twins")
Friend,

Children of all ages are being brainwashed in our public schools to believe in radical ideas such as socialism is good, our Founding Fathers are bad, and the ideas of freedom are outdated or even racist.

You know what this means for our future?

It means a generation of students will grow up to accept socialism and create a less free and less prosperous society.

Not good.

**Fortunately, I have a solution ... The Tuttle Twins! These books teach children about freedom.**

The Tuttle Twins is a series of children's books teaching kids about free markets, private property rights, the Constitution, and the ideas of our Founding Fathers. [**You can help me distribute more copies of the Tuttle Twins by making a donation of any amount by clicking here!**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=986e262f9e4541858a77b605ea2d0fc0&_e=l4VjN8GV-w26appiVnQhK8CqfZ8tlA8GpNuiWRGNl1E-ztQsh-M528YkrpYBbNpBG5q1VIEtVaqe9rqKuXLH03fKUwktqPUwbeq72lbkrCWQ7QCufHs4DTNIl0kAGguMpZ5EP1R0-a_Azci5uEjXX6CaKY-AUNtt4Vulv-E6enIDK_8SjDLNRNhNWY8NuXiJ0S_vJcrz-fetogF_8rqm4odIOx8WGoq8bIu9CQTiHj6gYtuxTi9Np_rwfPHlrb3HK6lxVtTUrb6JSNI1JhvRhnwqgQ6o_2lAq7Pb2yEEUto%3D)

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=986e262f9e4541858a77b605ea2d0fc0&_e=l4VjN8GV-w26appiVnQhK8CqfZ8tlA8GpNuiWRGNl1E-ztQsh-M528YkrpYBbNpBG5q1VIEtVaqe9rqKuXLH03fKUwktqPUwbeq72lbkrCWQ7QCufHs4DTNIl0kAGguMtgHl2UMpakMNiBL0yez0XmOhUQHoEUijkNoHTDfDLQqmdTzFbk73Q7lpG7h0nVLcNkbqPG0juDe6ObQ-M8ZaCr7DWr4h-_vuk45IQRjkZpcYTDTQLb9fbUnPD-MpFzSk3bDldMy5ZmMf6EXOPdtjGiKCAVuYElnvX2tFL8kUNOg%3D)
The reason I wrote the Tuttle Twins may shock you.

I am a proud father of two children. When my kids were born, I made a promise to myself, my children, and God that I would be involved in their education and teach them about the ideas of liberty.

When I started exploring resources to teach my kids about free markets and the principles of liberty, I found NOTHING.

Sadly, government propaganda fills most of our textbooks with half-truths and big-government propaganda.

This is why I decided to launch my non-profit organization, the Libertas Institute, and write the Tuttle Twins book series. So far, we have distributed over 4 MILLION copies of the Tuttle Twins to families across the United States! My goal is to distribute another 3 MILLION copies and place them in schools, libraries, and homes across the country.

**It costs roughly $10 to print, package, and distribute each copy of the Tuttle Twins. You can use one of these links to donate and help me supply more children with our message of freedom!**
[**Donate 1 Tuttle Twins book for $10 Here >>>**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=986e262f9e4541858a77b605ea2d0fc0&_e=l4VjN8GV-w26appiVnQhK8CqfZ8tlA8GpNuiWRGNl1E-ztQsh-M528YkrpYBbNpBG5q1VIEtVaqe9rqKuXLH03fKUwktqPUwbeq72lbkrCWQ7QCufHs4DTNIl0kAGguMJtQ5PC8FGbg_uGDcSG2YmTjL6E6w2uJPlUo3Tab8TzuZLutu-D12KLOs_NKnXojhsu2vVSEF3bPSWzr3U6Ezy-vN5QVE0mZX8wnC_cSkDzKBGF7m8-7QJ7fq6gsb8RPLGxw84QiLl4jzJH7ilX2QNofgj4LosaTz0DMQFlg6ym0%3D)

Here are a few examples of the books and what lessons they teach young students:
* _**Creature from Jekyll Island:**_ This book teaches children about the concept of inflation, reckless money printing, and the Federal Reserve.

You might be asking yourself, "Can children grasp these concepts"? I write each of these books to both entertain and educate kids. They aren't written for adults (although I'm sure plenty of adults could learn from them!). The Tuttle Twins breaks down big concepts for children to understand.

* _**12 Rules Bootcamp:**_ Jordan Peterson gave me permission to create a children's version of his famous book, "12 Rules for Life". Now, you can share Jordan Peterson's wisdom with kids!

* _**Miraculous Pencil:**_ This book breaks down Leonard Read's classic lesson on how free markets work. Parents can help their children understand why capitalism is the best economic system and why socialism fails.

The Tuttle Twins books are changing the direction of education in our country.

Before the Tuttle Twins books, parents did NOT have many alternatives to provide for their children other than the brainwashing happening in our schools...

Now, millions of students are learning the principles of free markets, personal responsibility, entrepreneurship, REAL American history, and the values you and I love and cherish about our country.

**So ... what's the next step?**

The pro-liberty non-profit organization I founded, the Libertas Institute, is on a mission to distribute 7 MILLION copies of the Tuttle Twins.

Fortunately, I have a solution ... The Tuttle Twins! These books teach children about freedom. The Tuttle Twins is a series of children's books teaching kids about free markets, private property rights, the Constitution, and the ideas of our Founding Fathers. The reason I wrote the Tuttle Twins may shock you. I am a proud father of two children. When my kids were born, I made a promise to myself, my children, and God that I would be involved in their education and teach them about the ideas of liberty. When I started exploring resources to teach my kids about free markets and the principles of liberty, I found NOTHING. Sadly, government propaganda fills most of our textbooks with half-truths and big-government propaganda. This is why I decided to launch my non-profit organization, the Libertas Institute, and write the Tuttle Twins book series. So far, we have distributed over 4 MILLION copies of the Tuttle Twins to families across the United States! My goal is to distribute another 3 MILLION copies and place them in schools, libraries, and homes across the country. Reports are now surfacing that Biden’s White House may very well have granted a “special access request” that led to the FBI RAID on my home. And after the Soros-funded prosecutor in Manhattan had me arrested and arraigned for committing NO CRIME, the true hierarchy of the Deep State is beginning to unravel. The TRUTH is: this witch hunt is outright election interference orchestrated by Biden’s cronies to weaponize our justice system and secure him a second term. But what they fail to understand is that our MAGA movement is the most resilient movement in HISTORY. Because we have something they NEVER will: more than 74 MILLION American patriots with an unbreakable resolve to SAVE our country. No matter how many lies, attacks, or phony witch hunts they throw our way, we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! | Thank you and God bless you, | Donald J. # [Our Freedom Caucuses Are Under Attack](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1424602&post_id=114595324&utm_source=post-email-title&isFreemail=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTE0NTk1MzI0LCJpYXQiOjE2ODE0MTc1NzYsImV4cCI6MTY4NDAwOTU3NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0MjQ2MDIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.kMBknr7w4LzDXEcqpq65iG2Bobx-ruGfpR8wlRrRrbc)
### We need your help to fight back.
| | [Andy Roth](https://substack.com/redirect/47c6b631-3b58-43b3-a09d-0643d7f75ddb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

| Apr 13

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/47c6b631-3b58-43b3-a09d-0643d7f75ddb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
---
| | | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZmNuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wL291ci1mcmVlZG9tLWNhdWN1c2VzLWFyZS11bmRlci1hdHRhY2s_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1zdWJzdGFjayZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJmFjdGlvbj1yZXN0YWNrLWNvbW1lbnQiLCJwIjoxMTQ1OTUzMjQsInMiOjE0MjQ2MDIsImYiOnRydWUsInUiOjkwNTAxMTkyLCJpYXQiOjE2ODE0MTc1NzYsImV4cCI6MTY4NDAwOTU3NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTAiLCJzdWIiOiJsaW5rLXJlZGlyZWN0In0.HBd19D9NfTpJO9w9DP2L4pthiJCo8bZpXhAxS7Y0ixo?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
Friends,
Our state Freedom Caucuses have been making noise and disrupting the status quo in their respective states. Naturally, the Republican Establishment is worried and now they're making plans to go after our people.
Recently, an anonymous dark money Super PAC has [formed](https://substack.com/redirect/6be25454-367e-4900-995f-e2682bac2f3a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in South Carolina to target SC Freedom Caucus members in their own districts. Why? Because they refuse to bend the knee to the liberals pretending to be conservatives that are running the SC House GOP. In fact, [only Hawaii](https://substack.com/redirect/f474c9b2-cc66-4275-bc79-9f78a5b3acfe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) has more liberal Republican legislators than South Carolina.
This is happening all over the country. From Wyoming to Georgia, RINO-polluted state GOPs are getting ready to go after Freedom Caucus members. We're in for a fight against the establishment in 2024 and we cannot win it without you.
If you want to take back your country, it starts by building robust leadership in red states. That is what we are doing every single day.
**We URGE you to help.** As Glenn Beck said about our state freedom caucuses, "If we abandon them now, we deserve what we get. These people are brave enough to stand. We must support them."
So please donate to [State Freedom Caucus Action](https://substack.com/redirect/b64f5ccf-3cf2-45a5-80b6-c57c84152133?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) so that we can defend our State Freedom Caucus members and go after the liberal Republicans all across the country who are refusing to represent you.
[DONATE](https://substack.com/redirect/d260480b-765c-4dfe-a282-f3fe06832197?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
We're proud to have the support of patriots from all over America and we're ready for the challenges that are coming our way.
**Keep fighting,**

**Andy Roth**
_President

clean_body: We need your help to fight back. | | ---|---|--- | | | or ? ? We need your help to fight back. | | | Apr 13 | | | | Friends, Our state Freedom Caucuses have been making noise and disrupting the status quo in their respective states. Naturally, the Republican Establishment is worried and now they're making plans to go after our people. Recently, an anonymous dark money Super PAC has in South Carolina to target SC Freedom Caucus members in their own districts. Why? Because they refuse to bend the knee to the liberals pretending to be conservatives that are running the SC House GOP. In fact, has more liberal Republican legislators than South Carolina. This is happening all over the country. From Wyoming to Georgia, RINO-polluted state GOPs are getting ready to go after Freedom Caucus members. We're in for a fight against the establishment in 2024 and we cannot win it without you. If you want to take back your country, it starts by building robust leadership in red states. That is what we are doing every single day. We URGE you to help. As Glenn Beck said about our state freedom caucuses, "If we abandon them now, we deserve what we get. These people are brave enough to stand. We must support them." So please donate to so that we can defend our State Freedom Caucus members and go after the liberal Republicans all across the country who are refusing to represent you. We're proud to have the support of patriots from all over America and we're ready for the challenges that are coming our way. Keep fighting, Andy Roth President State Freedom Caucus Network P.S. Your help is critical in building out a network of patriots and freedom fighters throughout our nation's state capitols and in your home state. name: Replace Sinema
subject: ADD YOUR NAME: Keep Sinema FAR from the Judiciary Committee
body:
We can’t trust Sinema, tell Schumer: do NOT appoint Sinema | | | Peter - **We’ve all seen recently how important judges are to protecting our fundamental rights** \- or **how one bad judge can cause chaos** across the country with a single decision — like the one to ban abortion pills. Unfortunately**, Senator Dianne Feinstein’s health-related absences have caused a logjam** **in getting President Biden’s judges confirmed,** while Trump judges continue on an ideological rampage. But today, Feinstein announced that she’s stepping away from the Judiciary Committee so that another Senator can take her place and keep the nation’s business moving. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkd9OMAk9omA_9FkVRYGSEh3yB8ByeI9rwpNvDRA3mUXEygVxAHcGZ8fslNU5MDEQFeaqdIf4NlobbBDvbCDdqnNwe--XEzmj8KiiSDL3n93eMYEfFlz8h0H32IOJWXkEffRiZMS3oRx7xUpm-Jb50wSdGOFAhIq_DRc1RLHwpsXlxMg1myPIl5rMsxde5hVSVoAtOVDyNrvKMwd_A97iFqw4YGhqC7exivX2PhwaOARPgewq_pnIEx5hdnd3hOVqDD9d6SAvoXalnGkRioA9aUqlpi-hYGEXjD1gVtim5G7yz9OuF7JbWj6GDF5CB8LSFdgvfG1rgap_0-QPt30z-1dcEnimIJTZsYZxamgk04Qw/3vb/JWqkwygrQtmLzSyfJsshYQ/h0/zq_0CeiAftnK-CiOUO5zL0mZ_0e3LybGiQM6BsyuqUY) **We need to tell Leader Schumer now: Do not give this important job to Kyrsten Sinema. She cannot be trusted.** **Sign our petition to Leader Schumer here:** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkd9OMAk9omA_9FkVRYGSEh3yB8ByeI9rwpNvDRA3mUXEygVxAHcGZ8fslNU5MDEQFeaqdIf4NlobbBDvbCDdqnNwe--XEzmj8KiiSDL3n93eMYEfFlz8h0H32IOJWXkEfNP8Oye2qMedfoAvPhXv_bh6OP1cdxJ4HMYjMtnO_Zrp_YSwTt5osG87YG41usJ_-YT_RalutUeWq28IxRHPONf2TGSzRFZslvYZze9CC7VWGFhNxfJh4pEjayJytYjfDbfI0hI0HZyo_a8EBD2nAx3Z4byJ70T6FUiHbRP-E-bL78XjFtN5xg_1bYDWGSGvyDMgbfoQ5dcFsWhN-TNssFhXuWFlRWQjDNmdkiuIvGUw/3vb/JWqkwygrQtmLzSyfJsshYQ/h1/UQZzHp9DcMkjoA3fFzbSxJbq8rOYfSCW_xPRG72KCmw)We have no doubt Sinema is jockeying for this role, as she is always looking to assert more influence and find new ways to obstruct Democrats’ agendas. In fact, she’s already helped to block a number of President Biden’s high-profile nominees. Of course, **Sinema also voted to confirm over 80 Trump judges.** We simply cannot trust her to sit on the Judiciary Committee. **** **[Please sign our petition and tell Leader Schumer that Sinema does not belong on the Judiciary Committee >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkd9OMAk9omA_9FkVRYGSEh3yB8ByeI9rwpNvDRA3mUXEygVxAHcGZ8fslNU5MDEQFeaqdIf4NlobbBDvbCDdqnNwe--XEzmj8KiiSDL3n93eMYEfFlz8h0H32IOJWXkEeOosY6UsgkSB7jze8Jy82rmN-IlucUBTz1Mquj0KMaqg51wm1zx44Ke1BApbgm2Zvg04qOeQzibUG4N1nU1Bkvwh062ae1craGg4krH7abKstBc5l7TB-SJu9ud-M0I3-Jlej06pJWDhln8HW1SeTq8fjW_FmZBbAxAcjsbp6LquC9KfiUUfKfugtyDASUWJX8iNw3iCkhTk-l8fHKUkQLMoP7Op2FgjvSTB1sFK2NPg/3vb/JWqkwygrQtmLzSyfJsshYQ/h2/_peIJ7ID1JFrPO15_jS1sTpQ-5uJqXYT60x7LWf0XRw)** We appreciate your help, -Replace Sinema & Change for Arizona 2024

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: It’s official
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC
body:
| Hi Peter— I have exciting news to share, and I wanted you to hear it from me:

**I’m officially running for reelection to the United States Senate.**

I know the road ahead won’t always be easy — election experts are already calling me one of the most vulnerable Senate Democrats on the ballot next year. But with you by my side, I know we can get this done and win big next November.

[**Peter, will you help me start in the strongest position by splitting a donation between my campaign in Wisconsin and Upset the Setup today?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61761848/401087098/-1352133226?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=UTS_20230413_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM4N2I4NjBmLTNjZGEtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=df5iMN_bSKJCg3QMh1h_qsoX3nCmBnuBWvoN7vO3NIQ=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Tammy Baldwin and Upset the Setup will go through immediately: | **[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61761849/401087099/-1352133226?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&refcode=UTS_20230413_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM4N2I4NjBmLTNjZGEtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=df5iMN_bSKJCg3QMh1h_qsoX3nCmBnuBWvoN7vO3NIQ=)**

I’m so proud of the progress we’ve made in the Senate over the past few years, Peter. We’ve lowered the price of prescription drugs, addressed the climate crisis with landmark investment in clean energy, expanded health care for millions of our veterans, and so much more.

A highlight of my time in the Senate was when the _Respect for Marriage Act,_ my bipartisan bill to protect marriage equality, was signed into law late last year. That’s a moment I will never forget.

But there’s a lot more to be done, and I’m not willing to give up the fight to make things easier, better, safer, and stronger for hard-working Wisconsinites.

We have to protect Social Security and Medicare for millions of hard-working seniors who deserve the benefits they’ve spent their lives working towards.

We need to defend voting rights and protect access to the ballot box — we’ve seen the harmful impacts of right-wing extremists who try to deny election results and take away Americans’ right to safely and securely participate in elections.

And we need to re-establish protections for abortion access. After _Roe v. Wade_ was overturned, I was devastated and angry, and I’m sure you were too. Wisconsin just took a huge first step in the right direction with our Supreme Court race last week, but we still have a long way to go toward making sure every woman has the freedom to make her own decisions no matter what zip code she lives in.

I remain hopeful that we can do all of this — and more — together. But it won’t be easy, especially if Republicans have it their way. Their views are becoming more out-of-touch and dangerous by the day, and I know for sure that they will come after my Senate seat with everything they’ve got. They’re _already_ spending big on misleading ads attacking my record.

**But with you by my side, I know we can win. We’ve done it before, together, and I wouldn’t want to have it any other way this time around.**

[**Will you stand by me again and split a contribution between my reelection campaign and Upset the Setup? It’d mean the world to me to have you with me from Day One.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61761854/401087105/-1352133226?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=UTS_20230413_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM4N2I4NjBmLTNjZGEtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=df5iMN_bSKJCg3QMh1h_qsoX3nCmBnuBWvoN7vO3NIQ=)

name: Becca Balint
subject: 100 Days

body:
House Republicans have shown their true colors.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61761870/401087124/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjdiODYwZi0zY2RhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OyG3JHzfGpoReCPFKjlCh5crytmED3ZBrHC-kihZktQ=&emci=dd1b3c3a-30da-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=327b860f-3cda-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272) | Peter, It’s been 100 days since we kicked off the 118th Congress, and I’ve been busy! In my time in the House so far, I have cosponsored the Women’s Health Protection Act, been named Vice Ranking Member of an Oversight subcommittee, joined the Progressive Caucus leadership and Equality Caucus leadership, recruited a diverse and experienced staff, hosted our first town hall on housing, and met with over 1800 Vermonters. But I know there’s further progress we could make if the House weren’t in the hands of Republicans. House Republicans have shown their true colors by turning down key legislation that would help millions of Americans. [_**Will you make a contribution to help me hit my mid-month fundraising goal and stand with me as I fight for progress in Congress?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61761871/401087125/-2010650714?refcode=E20917-20230413-100Days-SL-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjdiODYwZi0zY2RhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OyG3JHzfGpoReCPFKjlCh5crytmED3ZBrHC-kihZktQ=) **With their majority, House Republicans have stalled Congress to argue about who should be their Speaker, gutted the Office of Congressional Ethics, pushed forward anti-choice legislation, and passed a bill to attack our LGBTQ communities and youth. The House GOP is pushing corruption, chaos, and extremism at every turn.** Despite all of that, I remain committed to making sure we pass progressive, bold, and meaningful legislation that addresses the priorities of Americans. [_**But Peter, I need you with me and I need to reach my mid-month fundraising goal. clean_body: House Republicans have shown their true colors. | | Peter, It’s been 100 days since we kicked off the 118th Congress, and I’ve been busy! In my time in the House so far, I have cosponsored the Women’s Health Protection Act, been named Vice Ranking Member of an Oversight subcommittee, joined the Progressive Caucus leadership and Equality Caucus leadership, recruited a diverse and experienced staff, hosted our first town hall on housing, and met with over 1800 Vermonters. But I know there’s further progress we could make if the House weren’t in the hands of Republicans. House Republicans have shown their true colors by turning down key legislation that would help millions of Americans. = With their majority, House Republicans have stalled Congress to argue about who should be their Speaker, gutted the Office of Congressional Ethics, pushed forward anti-choice legislation, and passed a bill to attack our LGBTQ communities and youth. The House GOP is pushing corruption, chaos, and extremism at every turn. Despite all of that, I remain committed to making sure we pass progressive, bold, and meaningful legislation that addresses the priorities of Americans. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, Becca Balint = If you'd like to receive fewer emails and only see our most important updates, **If you'd rather not stay up to date with Becca's work, you can . If you prefer to contribute by check, you are welcome to send a contribution to the campaign at the address below. To comply with Federal law, we must use our best efforts to obtain, maintain and submit the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle. Thank you in advance for including that information along with your check. | Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont, P.O. Box 291, Burlington, VT Becca for Vermont P.O. body:

Friend,
---
We need your help.
---
Radical liberal Tammy Baldwin – _who has voted for Biden’s disastrous agenda over 95% of the time_ – has just announced she is running for re-election for Wisconsin’s Senate seat.
---
_As Biden’s agenda continues to fail at every turn we can’t let someone who aids and supports his policies continue to harm our great state and country._
---
**Baldwin is not the Senator that Wisconsin needs.**
---
But with the Senate majority on the line and eyes on Wisconsin as the top battleground state, Democrats will be pouring millions of dollars into trying to BUY Baldwin a win.
---
_That’s why we are counting on you to help us build up our funds and resources to be able to combat the Left’s upcoming attacks and FIGHT for a Republican Senate in 2024._
---
[**We’re launching our Topple Tammy Fund today and need you to be one of our founding supporters, so we can defeat Baldwin to secure a conservative win for Wisconsin’s Senate seat and help Republicans take back the Senate majority.**](https://links.wisconsinrepublicanparty.com/u/click?_t=d8e9586dc433414d81114a9282924d1e&_m=a53a9064298144a0a66f418b56f77b4b&_e=VlmMrFmJKlAb415abJedA1ygkApim1outNMHLZSxSlzPJyuNNadF5rkb0uj2zYkqEmb9QKuAp6CLs1Ql-qXna7_ByIJMQwqN11Ry-KLA5w-eZumVVxRd6-RVnIlP8wAvjyTsf4G63l2uvwZZu9XFMtc-mCRlxmre85ZMUoCRCXZm9yo-VAG8f_SVgJZklIj61oJhzTqK9gvLu8FOnVWBWdiIFAieP_M4pxBftA2dxhzr2QH3N-NJsKkFjw6RpyEnay18KJgj-rVOBQ0kvadAbDezVWz7KKOd0jkwJPSmuNt1pQJz5mW9dAa4Q6wVTcjkNrRj1YIDQuDPziDmu6t_3hfcO7xhyUO1Hjd8O-U6SSA%3D)

clean_body: Help us defeat Baldwin and secure a conservative win. | Friend, We need your help. Radical liberal Tammy Baldwin – who has voted for Biden’s disastrous agenda over 95% of the time – has just announced she is running for re-election for Wisconsin’s Senate seat. As Biden’s agenda continues to fail at every turn we can’t let someone who aids and supports his policies continue to harm our great state and country. Baldwin is not the Senator that Wisconsin needs. But with the Senate majority on the line and eyes on Wisconsin as the top battleground state, Democrats will be pouring millions of dollars into trying to BUY Baldwin a win. That’s why we are counting on you to help us build up our funds and resources to be able to combat the Left’s upcoming attacks and FIGHT for a Republican Senate in 2024. According to a CNN poll, 2⁄3 of Americans don’t believe Biden deserves to be re-elected in 2024 due to his extensive list of failures. The same should go for Biden’s hand-picked puppet, Baldwin, who stood by him and aided his agenda every step of the way. She has shown that she will continue to put Wisconsin voters LAST as they suffer due to these failed policies she supported. We have the next 18 months to expose the truth about Baldwin to voters and ensure a conservative Senator is elected to save our state and our country. But we can’t do it alone. Since 2016 we have seen a surge in youth turnout, young working people running for office, and the future generations of America stepping up to lead the conversations on climate justice, civil rights, and economic equality. Our leaders in Washington haven’t lived through the experiences of growing up in this century – from watching economic boom to bust, becoming saddled with student loans to face limited job prospects, to a housing market that has become virtually impossible to reach. And if you look at their actions (which speak louder than words), they don’t care about the struggles of our generation, younger generations, and future generations. As a (grizzled) Millennial currently serving in elected office, I want to let you in on a [secret](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61762550/401089808/-1340325773?is_from_webapp=1&web_id=7205335445929559598&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQyMzEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWUwOWJmMjctM2VkYS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=1ql-gZTxdyjInQbW8FBJZ3wspEfhMqdr4aEzR5CIXis=&emci=7bc00731-fbd9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=ae09bf27-3eda-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=10498376) that most politicians won’t say out loud: Ever since I first ran for Mayor – other politicians told me, “Don’t focus on the youth vote”. _What a terrible piece of advice, Peter._ **Young people – Millennials, Gen Z, and beyond – are fighting for the next 100 years of change. We're fighting to roll back conservative attacks on women’s rights, protect the climate, defend LGBTQI+ rights, promote economic equality, and ensure that housing and healthcare are human rights. It’s time to stand with a new generation of voters and help bring younger electeds into the fold.** [_**If you stand with our Democratic Primary campaign for U.S. Senate in New Jersey and you support subject: Ron DeSantis is in Ohio spreading his dangerous politics
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
While extremist DeSantis is spreading his dangerous message across our state, Ohio Dems are hard at work fueling our signature-gathering efforts for a reproductive rights ballot measure.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61762578/401089900/-438463598?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTA5YmYyNy0zZWRhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fkd_0WxLcZKg02RyWbA3XBGf8bGr5kM-LFSa071E2G4=) | Team,

Today, Florida Governor Ron DeSantis is making his rounds in Summit County and Butler County.

**His extreme record matches what so many of the Republican candidates running here in Ohio want to achieve — including cuts to Social Security and Medicare and radical abortion bans.**

We're fighting like hell to defend our rights and make sure none of the GOP extremists running for higher office are successful. That's why Ohio Democrats are proudly supporting a reproductive rights ballot initiative.

name: Sheriff Mark Lamb
subject: Fear Not. Do Right.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate
body:
On Tuesday, I announced my candidacy for the United States Senate to fight for our shared American values.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=28abdfb771c4437889174920d2408302&_t=faG2hHnN6GPjRAHGRttoFWccuHMvDDJ020kuGgaXAcT49IP9VdCTW4XkdBi3FKPWO7MexLCdoD5dssxcQyMsL5BQU4Hk3d46jxsp1EoM-Oo%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=28abdfb771c4437889174920d2408302&_t=faG2hHnN6GPjRAHGRttoFWccuHMvDDJ020kuGgaXAcT49IP9VdCTW4XkdBi3FKPWO7MexLCdoD5dssxcQyMsL5BQU4Hk3d46jxsp1EoM-Oo%3D)

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=28abdfb771c4437889174920d2408302&_e=ymzzKKje36xPO-sypNaJV7njZ2Qo3NXoNNNX2DJpTGF1_DDxbOLR7n6VVOiUJ5x4b_8eXAL0UHRyDIzSI5g1rMQ67yqhlXaeqw-1b23COi8rbgaCogpJbhISdQ0RJxqdWHwtv9miy93YfQmGFSBOgOdxVTDa-iarptpV2ddgF-b5kc2ogPX_rcMZtqTgGgM7iriuyzFZAs7MfESE2pg8jkXIsnwAtZou6eM61AOHiSwhtQDdkKfumX45VJnbmnKVBZU4hyU-3VjvssS3ZegFmzwET3YPuWp7mFyTrmzjqZlAruPY4fwq4q6H03hZILAOnzgDnmMfeA4B4o5nQo8lGSQxz5YMrG_UvNH5UvVPAYV_1KnuV62Fd7KV4euWEqpU_ggHA60CZPFFNvTlt6gaRg%3D%3D)
|
Fellow Conservative,

My name is Mark Lamb – I’m a husband, father, God-fearing American, and proud Sheriff of Pinal County in the great state of Arizona.

**_“Fear Not; Do Right”_**
This phrase has shaped my ideals and convictions to love America. Through every hardship, win, and loss, I am determined to rise above the challenge and lead from the front – in Law Enforcement _and_ Politics.

**On Tuesday, I announced my candidacy for the United States Senate to fight for our shared American values.** [**Washington needs a new Sheriff in town.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=28abdfb771c4437889174920d2408302&_e=ymzzKKje36xPO-sypNaJV7njZ2Qo3NXoNNNX2DJpTGF1_DDxbOLR7n6VVOiUJ5x4b_8eXAL0UHRyDIzSI5g1rMQ67yqhlXaeqw-1b23COi8rbgaCogpJbhISdQ0RJxqdWHwtv9miy93YfQmGFSBOgOdxVTDa-iarptpV2ddgF-b5kc2ogPX_rcMZtqTgGgM7iriuyzFZAs7MfESE2pg8jkXIsnwAtZou6eM61AOHiSz4w5uwi6_QG5ED9GJqS2Cu-VGprDxzYYFcnQti0w1-laL-VX6VbOnpt0a_ofuL-9MJJ84aknBnXcK9Phj5aJgEaSQPfpDWCXiJ2_T20kUMxZaurky_N5mJrtXh8u1gtzGnxfMCfU0Jj3JOP-LKwaVGdQV3_qx5WZQgth49WBdpUQ%3D%3D)

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=28abdfb771c4437889174920d2408302&_e=ymzzKKje36xPO-sypNaJV7njZ2Qo3NXoNNNX2DJpTGF1_DDxbOLR7n6VVOiUJ5x4b_8eXAL0UHRyDIzSI5g1rMQ67yqhlXaeqw-1b23COi8rbgaCogpJbhISdQ0RJxqdWHwtv9miy93YfQmGFSBOgOdxVTDa-iarptpV2ddgF-b5kc2ogPX_rcMZtqTgGgM7iriuyzFZAs7MfESE2pg8jkXIsnwAtZou6eM61AOHiSxe1X3-z0a8_Muk7x-Q84Ho3tmghCXTOv7Ej1Cqn7wOHSGKN-MotntXdoNff2ll6XcpArqj2WCp3Gd7GzE1O7Msx4blcHCLAYPs735LQHZW7HkE37hCKAKsCcyL2TjHIipNffmHO9_1cfB-rh4XaMVInZqQsx4nhzkvMiw91wuz7Q%3D%3D)
[**SEND THE SHERIFF TO WASHINGTON »**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=28abdfb771c4437889174920d2408302&_e=ymzzKKje36xPO-sypNaJV7njZ2Qo3NXoNNNX2DJpTGF1_DDxbOLR7n6VVOiUJ5x4b_8eXAL0UHRyDIzSI5g1rMQ67yqhlXaeqw-1b23COi8rbgaCogpJbhISdQ0RJxqdWHwtv9miy93YfQmGFSBOgOdxVTDa-iarptpV2ddgF-b5kc2ogPX_rcMZtqTgGgM7iriuyzFZAs7MfESE2pg8jkXIsnwAtZou6eM61AOHiSwSmBoxxeUObNnRgerJZLJn-0E4BFa4tmc03gvW7q8-UbdkbQogPWFWwk_fFkK-D5gOaDdSgyp25-r7IVZBxyUCvf6pR72sKo-dT1kpmPNAUr2SNP_y0PaVaegqudRwXmfowrn8nnk7bObhpjhdxFrEa31oAlwixDA-xT-AGACBPw%3D%3D)

As a constitutional conservative, I have strong convictions and am courageous in fighting for the citizens I serve in Pinal County.

Our sliver of Arizona is home to more than 420,000 Americans spread over 5,000+ square miles; it’s a vast, arid, sundrenched landscape on the frontline of several conflicts. We are fighting a war on illegal narcotics and simultaneously an immigration battle.

As the top law-enforcement officer in the area, I’m responsible for the safety and well-being of every man, woman, and child who calls this place home. Unlike the career politicians in Washington, D.C., and Phoenix, **I know that the buck stops with me in Pinal County – _which is why I take my job so seriously._**

**I have personally carried dead bodies from the ditches, rescued children from sex trafficking, and arrested gang members and drug dealers.**

I know what deadly drugs and the criminals peddling them are doing to families and communities. **_I know what it did to my family._**

We lost our son and our one-year-old granddaughter eight days before Christmas. No pain compares to losing a child, let alone a grandbaby. During my son’s life, he struggled with drug addiction; he even spent time in my jail for using fentanyl. I am acutely aware that families across Arizona – _and America_ – are being touched by the drug crisis.

Each day I get up and put my Sheriff’s badge on, I remind myself that I’m no better than any man or woman who works for me; I have been, and continue to be, on the frontlines of the opioid epidemic and border fight.

At home in Arizona and across America, lives are on the line. **We must FIGHT if we’re going to save them. I need strong patriots like yourself on my team to win this battle.[Will you commit to the fight by donating any amount to my campaign today?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=28abdfb771c4437889174920d2408302&_e=ymzzKKje36xPO-sypNaJV7njZ2Qo3NXoNNNX2DJpTGF1_DDxbOLR7n6VVOiUJ5x4b_8eXAL0UHRyDIzSI5g1rMQ67yqhlXaeqw-1b23COi8rbgaCogpJbhISdQ0RJxqdWHwtv9miy93YfQmGFSBOgOdxVTDa-iarptpV2ddgF-b5kc2ogPX_rcMZtqTgGgM7iriuyzFZAs7MfESE2pg8jkXIsnwAtZou6eM61AOHiSzBo4NOUwkdWWbC_cm95apSG0mkkpoQMOF_rlOuqx7dr9s6MR3tMTxdM0hj7PI53E6i1_LaEczTRQLTok5FibMtVsamz0teyIpPlQyBaU039N8usZaqa9QOkeME-OIBcJrPx6oKhlWAeT8PL0rBohRb4F19zhfbnPXqA0BpU2YnmQ%3D%3D)**

[**SEND THE SHERIFF TO WASHINGTON »**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=28abdfb771c4437889174920d2408302&_e=ymzzKKje36xPO-sypNaJV7njZ2Qo3NXoNNNX2DJpTGF1_DDxbOLR7n6VVOiUJ5x4b_8eXAL0UHRyDIzSI5g1rMQ67yqhlXaeqw-1b23COi8rbgaCogpJbhISdQ0RJxqdWHwtv9miy93YfQmGFSBOgOdxVTDa-iarptpV2ddgF-b5kc2ogPX_rcMZtqTgGgM7iriuyzFZAs7MfESE2pg8jkXIsnwAtZou6eM61AOHiSxddc9z1gYwJDgMyEDqZIpzbNmHJyDcugTfJYtnGumnQ5g8m5E00vQQOoPSjQf-pwZduyicFQSGPTp9hefwQag9SOgHZAwc3qV3VVgIVrq6oKN_PFO5B77kMVLUvzz1gLSdaO_5ikOi5vNGwFQED_ysybFlSa7QS2fSj6FaEZFC0A%3D%3D)

We need leaders in this country who aren’t too politically correct to protect us, and [**that’s why I’m running for the United States Senate.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=28abdfb771c4437889174920d2408302&_e=ymzzKKje36xPO-sypNaJV7njZ2Qo3NXoNNNX2DJpTGF1_DDxbOLR7n6VVOiUJ5x4b_8eXAL0UHRyDIzSI5g1rMQ67yqhlXaeqw-1b23COi8rbgaCogpJbhISdQ0RJxqdWHwtv9miy93YfQmGFSBOgOdxVTDa-iarptpV2ddgF-b5kc2ogPX_rcMZtqTgGgM7iriuyzFZAs7MfESE2pg8jkXIsnwAtZou6eM61AOHiSynm18nmZ-WT1N_65rpzfF_Z2EqL3Kvnh6TVPEXVY4vXzDmS9Ua_a7oBLngnsioKhGFAdrs2L-SaTJJfpDV0smWj3koU2DRyOLebZvpku5eNfzXajo4BXPg8DMuG4FEr9y9UJZ5Aemgc-QsMCO8MGlboEBkdCF8MsSWYCGDlhk_TA%3D%3D)

The people of Pinal County, Arizona, elected me to be their top Law Enforcement official because they know that _**I’m tougher than a $2 steak.**_ The voters who gave me the honor of the Sheriff’s badge I wear on my lapel know that my only interest in elected office is their safety.

[**I’ll stand up to the woke left and the weak political establishment in Washington.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=28abdfb771c4437889174920d2408302&_e=ymzzKKje36xPO-sypNaJV7njZ2Qo3NXoNNNX2DJpTGF1_DDxbOLR7n6VVOiUJ5x4b_8eXAL0UHRyDIzSI5g1rMQ67yqhlXaeqw-1b23COi8rbgaCogpJbhISdQ0RJxqdWHwtv9miy93YfQmGFSBOgOdxVTDa-iarptpV2ddgF-b5kc2ogPX_rcMZtqTgGgM7iriuyzFZAs7MfESE2pg8jkXIsnwAtZou6eM61AOHiSwbOtzRfxvvSNg-66Eh__db7j6LbG60lCiugoyO05mBKDY5x6Qc7EB3i2B4cg4EbdmeU_6HtqYtwd4J1ycCYvI1AXd0bFwntC45HPdCbSRiNRQXH6_OEVi7PdRYNLKro0b6NuaA70ywAUZW0Rn3m7oeIk8N6nSGLlnRyPZnzCrhLw%3D%3D) I’ll work 24/7 to do everything in my purview to secure the southern border and provide our law enforcement officers with the resources they need to succeed as our first responders.

I will defend our Second Amendment and the right to life. I’ll work to cut wasteful spending, fight inflation, and put more money back in your pocket. [**These are the fights we must win, Fellow Conservative.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=28abdfb771c4437889174920d2408302&_e=ymzzKKje36xPO-sypNaJV7njZ2Qo3NXoNNNX2DJpTGF1_DDxbOLR7n6VVOiUJ5x4b_8eXAL0UHRyDIzSI5g1rMQ67yqhlXaeqw-1b23COi8rbgaCogpJbhISdQ0RJxqdWHwtv9miy93YfQmGFSBOgOdxVTDa-iarptpV2ddgF-b5kc2ogPX_rcMZtqTgGgM7iriuyzFZAs7MfESE2pg8jkXIsnwAtZou6eM61AOHiSzYu3IW3vOB2mhvJFNaql0aonXooO3mAUgiUeeqQN5ehgJOtLbqLfW828iVw7O82mhQ3f6Ouq_r5dkmyk8pEdAVKQ3cE8m3b5-Iw3sjHzaoVIRB7cMgPIaDZe813Ey9wq44nlXMDdi5EDUV4o4aDruRUqWkyhk0nI25ehj9EB6SgQ%3D%3D)

**_Washington needs a new Sheriff in town._**

**I’m Mark Lamb, and I’m ready to lay down the law** – [**are you with me?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=28abdfb771c4437889174920d2408302&_e=ymzzKKje36xPO-sypNaJV7njZ2Qo3NXoNNNX2DJpTGF1_DDxbOLR7n6VVOiUJ5x4b_8eXAL0UHRyDIzSI5g1rMQ67yqhlXaeqw-1b23COi8rbgaCogpJbhISdQ0RJxqdWHwtv9miy93YfQmGFSBOgOdxVTDa-iarptpV2ddgF-b5kc2ogPX_rcMZtqTgGgM7iriuyzFZAs7MfESE2pg8jkXIsnwAtZou6eM61AOHiSwVBuIz_oJjaGmPTTNVBHUXQ30F8gGAL6WGJ3QTHSBKkoXsV_SDFhjI7U7dbe1u4iMiJNw14xcA_9l6le-ZN7sgqEQQfzz_I-b2DZEFQcwCP81_49bYVFujP_SLMduYYImJD8cglWY6IRS9jeoEBHtL_JuKsylR0RbBaXreGrlWQA%3D%3D)

Thank you,

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year.

clean_body: On Tuesday, I announced my candidacy for the United States Senate to fight for our shared American values. | | Fellow Conservative, My name is Mark Lamb – I’m a husband, father, God-fearing American, and proud Sheriff of Pinal County in the great state of Arizona. “Fear Not; Do Right” This phrase has shaped my ideals and convictions to love America. Through every hardship, win, and loss, I am determined to rise above the challenge and lead from the front – in Law Enforcement and Politics. On Tuesday, I announced my candidacy for the United States Senate to fight for our shared American values. As a constitutional conservative, I have strong convictions and am courageous in fighting for the citizens I serve in Pinal County. Our sliver of Arizona is home to more than 420,000 Americans spread over 5,000+ square miles; it’s a vast, arid, sundrenched landscape on the frontline of several conflicts. We are fighting a war on illegal narcotics and simultaneously an immigration battle. As the top law-enforcement officer in the area, I’m responsible for the safety and well-being of every man, woman, and child who calls this place home. Unlike the career politicians in Washington, D.C., and Phoenix, I know that the buck stops with me in Pinal County – which is why I take my job so seriously. I have personally carried dead bodies from the ditches, rescued children from sex trafficking, and arrested gang members and drug dealers. I know what deadly drugs and the criminals peddling them are doing to families and communities. I know what it did to my family. We lost our son and our one-year-old granddaughter eight days before Christmas. No pain compares to losing a child, let alone a grandbaby. During my son’s life, he struggled with drug addiction; he even spent time in my jail for using fentanyl. I am acutely aware that families across Arizona – and America – are being touched by the drug crisis. Each day I get up and put my Sheriff’s badge on, I remind myself that I’m no better than any man or woman who works for me; I have been, and continue to be, on the frontlines of the opioid epidemic and border fight. At home in Arizona and across America, lives are on the line. We must FIGHT if we’re going to save them. I need strong patriots like yourself on my team to win this battle. We need leaders in this country who aren’t too politically correct to protect us, and The people of Pinal County, Arizona, elected me to be their top Law Enforcement official because they know that I’m tougher than a $2 steak. The voters who gave me the honor of the Sheriff’s badge I wear on my lapel know that my only interest in elected office is their safety. I’ll work 24/7 to do everything in my purview to secure the southern border and provide our law enforcement officers with the resources they need to succeed as our first responders. I will defend our Second Amendment and the right to life. I’ll work to cut wasteful spending, fight inflation, and put more money back in your pocket. Washington needs a new Sheriff in town. I’m Mark Lamb, and I’m ready to lay down the law – Thank you, Sheriff Mark Lamb Republican for U.S. Senate Follow Sheriff Lamb On Social Media Meet Sheriff Lamb: | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM. Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity. Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year. | Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate

name: Wisconsin Senate Update (via Tammy Baldwin for Senate)
subject: Is Paul Ryan going to challenge Tammy?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Now that Tammy has announced she’s running for reelection, we’re expecting Republican challengers to announce.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=161%2E35263%2E6hoKJa)
Peter — Tammy Baldwin announced yesterday that she’s running for reelection to the U.S. Senate! But now that she’s announced, the door is open for Republican challengers to enter the race... and we’re not sure which of these potential opponents is the worst. One potential challenger? **Paul Ryan**. Yep, the former Speaker of the House, who helped usher Trump’s MAGA agenda through Congress. He tried to cut Social Security while Speaker and would certainly try again if he made it to the Senate. If you’ve heard of Sheriff David Clarke Jr., you know how terrible he would be for Wisconsin. But if you haven’t heard of him, here’s what you need to know: he supported Steve Bannon’s scam to “build the wall,” defended January 6 insurrectionists, and is so extreme that he was even banned from _Fox News_! There are also not one but**TWO** incredibly wealthy candidates considering a run for the Senate. These far-right candidates could fund their campaigns themselves, making our grassroots team all the more important. **Let’s face it — no matter who challenges Tammy, there’s no way they have a record of fighting for hard-working Wisconsin families the way she does. But one thing they will have? Unlimited dark money dollars coming in from shady Republican super PACs. That’s why we’re asking:** **[To make sure Tammy has the resources to stand up to Republican attacks and defeat whichever of these far-right opponents challenges her, will you pitch in $10 or any amount to her reelection?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-launch23.BP3f3F&refcode=AU_STB_FR_LAU_GEN_AC_20230413_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=161%2E35263%2E6hoKJa)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2151?c0=tbe-em-launch23.kLC5-H&refcode=AU_STB_FR_LAU_GEN_AC_20230413_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=161%2E35263%2E6hoKJa)

clean_body: | Now that Tammy has announced she’s running for reelection, we’re expecting Republican challengers to announce. Peter — Tammy Baldwin announced yesterday that she’s running for reelection to the U.S. Senate! But now that she’s announced, the door is open for Republican challengers to enter the race... and we’re not sure which of these potential opponents is the worst. One potential challenger? Paul Ryan. Yep, the former Speaker of the House, who helped usher Trump’s MAGA agenda through Congress. He tried to cut Social Security while Speaker and would certainly try again if he made it to the Senate. If you’ve heard of Sheriff David Clarke Jr., you know how terrible he would be for Wisconsin. But if you haven’t heard of him, here’s what you need to know: he supported Steve Bannon’s scam to “build the wall,” defended January 6 insurrectionists, and is so extreme that he was even banned from Fox News! There are also not one butTWO incredibly wealthy candidates considering a run for the Senate. These far-right candidates could fund their campaigns themselves, making our grassroots team all the more important. Let’s face it — no matter who challenges Tammy, there’s no way they have a record of fighting for hard-working Wisconsin families the way she does. But one thing they will have? Unlimited dark money dollars coming in from shady Republican super PACs. That’s why we’re asking: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | Thank you, Peter. | Hi,

The USPS is one of the most important federal agencies in our nation. That’s why I’m working with Democrats and Republicans to hold the USPS accountable when mail delivery is slow or delayed in Kansas.

Last year, I voted for bipartisan legislation that would improve the USPS, but so far, Trump-appointed Postmaster General Louis DeJoy has failed to implement many of the legislation’s provisions.

**A reliable and efficient USPS is necessary for seniors to receive their prescriptions, families to receive their packages, and voters to receive their ballots.**

name: Jameson Ellis
subject: Re: You are being tracked
body:
| | | |
---
**FELLOW PATRIOT:**
As a proud conservative running for Congress, I am committed to protecting our individual rights and liberties.

I want to bring your attention to a recent [article](
https://jamesonellis.lt.acemlna.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ3d3cudGhlZXBvY2h0aW1lcy5jb20lMkZoZWFsdGglMkZ0aGUtZmVkZXJhbC1nb3Zlcm5tZW50LWlzLXRyYWNraW5nLXRoZS11bnZhY2NpbmF0ZWRfNTA1NjMxMy5odG1s&sig=43AT6xgmFCBaV162wsRuTEwCQXcGw2p1rQ8XV5p9jAwT&iat=1681421189&a=%7C%7C611311006%7C%7C&account=jamesonellis%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN3wmAYvUauNNb%2BM61tN%2FfIuk%3D&s=cabcbe31a720242486b887158a77876f&i=179A202A1A1533
) from The Epoch Times, which reveals that the federal government is tracking unvaccinated Americans. This level of government intrusion on our personal medical choices is a clear sign of medical tyranny.

As your congressional candidate, I am dedicated to fighting against this growing threat to our freedom. But I can't do it alone. I need your support to stand against medical tyranny and advocate for protecting our liberties.

Please consider contributing today to help me continue this critical fight.

Together, we can ensure that our government remains accountable to the people and respects our right to make our own medical decisions.

Contribute Now: [https://secure.anedot.com/jamesonellisforcongress/donate](
https://jamesonellis.lt.acemlna.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZzZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbSUyRmphbWVzb25lbGxpc2ZvcmNvbmdyZXNzJTJGZG9uYXRl&sig=BMzt92QejrghqboVhEgzyZFfLM8iDgw81Gxor46Hcw6e&iat=1681421189&a=%7C%7C611311006%7C%7C&account=jamesonellis%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN3wmAYvUauNNb%2BM61tN%2FfIuk%3D&s=cabcbe31a720242486b887158a77876f&i=179A202A1A1523
)

Thank you for contributing to our cause to preserve the values and freedoms that make our nation great. It also goes a long way to hitting our $30k end of month deadline.

Together, we will prevail!
[CONTRIBUTE NOW](

MAGA Republican Gov. Ron DeSantis is the worst Governor in America and an utter nightmare for Floridians. He is relentless in his praise for Donald Trump, he completely botched Florida's pandemic response and put lives at risk, and he gave scarce COVID vaccines to his major campaign donors instead of the most vulnerable Floridians. name: Michael Bennet
subject: Here's what we can do right now to fight for abortion rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61763805/401094291/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWIzNTI1NC00MmRhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kyRj-bkKACLA6rxIPkHqrdC4uyHGBwbguc_l-a7ONZg=)
Folks, First, the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , overturning nearly 50 years of precedent and making prescription abortion medication more important than ever. Then, last Friday, a Texas judge ruled that mifepristone — an FDA-approved medication used by millions of women in need of abortion care for over 20 years — should be banned. This was a decision with no basis in scientific or medical evidence. Now, an Appeals Court has allowed the drug to be prescribed, but blocked it from being mailed to women who need it. More than fifty percent of women seeking an abortion choose a medication abortion. And it is critical for people everywhere, especially in states with draconian abortion bans or states like Colorado, where many rural communities have more limited access to in-person care. **That's why we must protect _every _woman's right to reproductive health care.** [**Add your name today if you agree that women nationwide should have full access to medication abortion. No one should be denied care because of their zip code.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61763806/401094292/1569690111?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWIzNTI1NC00MmRhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kyRj-bkKACLA6rxIPkHqrdC4uyHGBwbguc_l-a7ONZg=&emci=2cb1c24a-1dda-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=b5b35254-42da-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=1295540) A woman's health care decisions should be between herself and her doctor, not the government. Colorado is a safe haven for women seeking reproductive care. That's why I worked with my colleagues to introduce the EACH Act, which would guarantee abortion coverage without restrictions for those who rely on Medicaid and other federal health plans. [**Click here to join me in this fight to restore the right to choose nationwide and to protect critical medications like mifepristone >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61763807/401094293/1569690111?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWIzNTI1NC00MmRhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kyRj-bkKACLA6rxIPkHqrdC4uyHGBwbguc_l-a7ONZg=&emci=2cb1c24a-1dda-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=b5b35254-42da-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=1295540) As always, thank you for your support, team, Michael |

**Kirk Penner, State Board of Education Vice Chair and Member** **representing District 5, is being framed as a bully** for defending the right of our children to receive a quality education without the woke transgender agenda. Renee Jones, 2023 Nebraska Teacher of the Year, made this accusation when Penner criticized her for promoting Drag Queen Story Hour and books such as The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. This particular book targets children from ages 1-6 with messaging from an author who has written an article entitled Drag Pedagogy. In this article, the author admits that the goal of the movement is to disrupt the nuclear family and monogamous marriage.
Kirk Penner recently discussed this with Jim Lambley on his radio show _Free Speech Zone_ , which can be heard [here](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=7dd3f95890&e=25844e23a8).**At the April 14th State Board of Education meeting in Lincoln** , Renee Jones will be present to make demands that Kirk Penner be reprimanded to address her claims over being bullied by him.
**We have an opportunity to support the stand Penner has taken to defend children from being exposed to developmentally inappropriate topics in school.**
**If you have the ability to support Kirk Penner in person, the**[**meeting**](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=4a8ced5f4a&e=25844e23a8)**will take place at:**
**The Graduate, Scarlet Ballroom****141 N. 9th St.****Lincoln, NE 68508****Friday, April 14th****Beginning at 9am****Public commentary begins at 1pm**[**Live video stream available here**](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=11b83b82b4&e=25844e23a8)
If you are not able to attend in person, please consider emailing or calling Nebraska State Board of Education Members with a cordial message of support for Kirk Penner.

name: Team Panetta
subject: Let’s protect puppies from cruel breeders
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jimmy Panetta for Congress 2024, FEC ID# C00592154
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61763998/401094943/-2113420158?refcode=EM_NBI_JP_20230413_PT_PuppyMill_0_3MO_TeamPanetta_NA_NA_PuppyMill&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjdiN2M4MS00M2RhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zyR9YIIVIzYyNUoBmtSnt_mWy8AteZG7LrDBq4sM4iU=&emci=e299677b-43da-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=1f7b7c81-43da-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=6108787) | Peter,

We have a puppy mill problem in America.

Puppy mills are **high-volume dog breeding facilities** where mother dogs spend most of their life in **cramped cages** with little to no personal attention.

It is estimated that nearly **500,000 dogs** are kept solely for breeding purposes in **10,000 puppy mills** across America.

That’s why **Jimmy** helped **author** and **introduce** the **Puppy Protection Act** (H.R. 1624).

This legislation would improve federal standards for commercial breeders so that they provide the _minimal_ protections for dogs to live a healthy life.

[If you believe that dogs deserve better, please add your name now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61763999/401094945/1735933390?refcode=EM_NBI_JP_20230413_PT_PuppyMill_0_3MO_TeamPanetta_NA_NA_PuppyMill&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjdiN2M4MS00M2RhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zyR9YIIVIzYyNUoBmtSnt_mWy8AteZG7LrDBq4sM4iU=&emci=e299677b-43da-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=1f7b7c81-43da-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=6108787)

Despite the progress we’ve made with the Animal Welfare Act, far too many dogs continue to be treated inhumanely and kept in cruel living conditions solely for breeding purposes. Show your support for Jimmy’s legislation to crack down on bad actors and strengthen protections for all dogs by adding your name now.

Thank you,

Team Panetta
---

Instead of focusing on improving the lives of the American people, Jim Jordan, the chairman of the House Judiciary Committee, has decided to come to my district to hold a “field hearing” at the behest of Donald Trump to continue to weaponize Congress to obstruct an ongoing, non-federal criminal prosecution.
Jordan claims the hearing will focus on “victims of violent crime” in New York City — never mind the fact that all major crime categories are lower in Manhattan now than they were last year.
If Jordan truly cared about public safety, he’d be having a field hearing in Nashville, Tennessee or Louisville, Kentucky, where the most recent of the daily mass shootings have killed more innocent Americans — _including three 9-year-old children_ — to emphasize the national public health emergency caused by assault weapons.
**Chairman Jordan is not welcome in my district for this political stunt that is simply a further waste of taxpayer money to support Donald Trump’s legal defense.**

Friend, After recent violent raids on West Bank villages, the Israeli armed forces did it again. They attacked Palestinians at a holy site during Ramadan and then bombed the captive refugee population in Gaza. **For multiple days last week, the violent Israeli forces wounded and arrested hundreds of Palestinian worshippers at the Al Aqsa mosque** —which is situated in illegally occupied Palestine. They completely destroyed the medical clinic and prevented medics from entering. **Then, the military fired bombs on Gaza, where millions of Palestinians are trapped and suffering under a years-long blockade that prevents critical access to life-sustaining necessities.** The bombs damaged a children’s hospital, terrifying the patients and traumatizing nearby families. To be clear: U.S. taxpayers are funding these horrific human rights abuses against Palestinians. **The U.S. is the top provider of military aid to Israel.** Recently I met with Dr. Abu-Jamei of the Gaza Community Mental Health Program, who let me know about how almost all Gazan children experience anxiety and depression after years of trauma. And outside of Gaza, Palestinians also endure daily trauma living under the illegal military occupation. **As the only Palestinian-American in Congress, I understand the urgency of ending U.S. complicity in the Israeli apartheid regime.** **Our President as well as every single one of my colleagues in Congress should also be calling this horrific violence out. Too many are silent, but I continue to speak up.** We need to keep the spotlight and the pressure on until Palestinians’ humanity and equal rights are finally recognized—and we need leaders who will sustain this push. [**Can you chip in today to support my unwavering advocacy for Palestinian rights in Congress?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xjrmb0NObjSzB3nxiqUcYL8SOBq5Ms03E_ccvtFWHJ1c5L0TH3ToHRwGKeDv8aO01vx8naYUJUU1VVXe1HcnNtUFC0NqbF5cplEXLsE4C1o8tCPdZ8lat_RopZJUz6L5P9BoVHiSvZa-tbSVfCjMDzSi6UoXaz9nPkuR8Bbz6CAL6uAHjlk9VHo4VU7cYSlQnHXgRxDQ2edIP2bmls9Fwlo5RAu015dmwMQ5NM7snnOtqlQcaq1YanWK4h3RhUP-NVqZ7-RQ8HsLBeGAUu3w4-iMpSsk_4r25LEbMN94oMKv02myiE-EFiRyJAHpBS3Cw8DDEjXbqLDLlg1FYLl2Tp5uctfdJ_X-xfrmwRNQ4GpQ/3vb/VsegNzj8S_u37NQil3WpFQ/h1/AATkCAQCXRCvaPVoklzxkopVqgMxyvI0slSnrTdKnfQ) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 now](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xjrmb0NObjSzB3nxiqUcYL8SOBq5Ms03E_ccvtFWHJ1YIr1lxuRXYRh_eJgKOQhKitawtcYDW0gTPPnvn7V7X8I1gIkpcbpa4hJLepUSFGQbEc-MY5Tde2AaJz0BCeRUEEbk_XYygJyg3aM1COUQ4sMNuoWvB550diMTestqjK1h38A9ILP05k4dIqcioBYh8SLFHvytiU9rGP-VasmP75rgwEkzyUqXKtx1m8lvB3il73J81IrvDo-qKKv2RRsRhsBNhm2HdpZf96UQnc7TGMliSn8LryyzVFhTHiIziXb5qFSvEmufw_QZAuHIbsJ768vEGpJKslWMlh68fYyECrfy2Vd3ArWdE2DX6ucD1l6E3sGoHpffi9ZZbf2AfGMSi1O8F-JUZm0GZSrkpUYKnQ/3vb/VsegNzj8S_u37NQil3WpFQ/h2/zvleUrCHRX1BUCU3V6JLxJ5Of4DUUKpZi0LYGGViWcQ)

They attacked Palestinians at a holy site during Ramadan and then bombed the captive refugee population in Gaza. For multiple days last week, the violent Israeli forces wounded and arrested hundreds of Palestinian worshippers at the Al Aqsa mosque —which is situated in illegally occupied Palestine. They completely destroyed the medical clinic and prevented medics from entering. Then, the military fired bombs on Gaza, where millions of Palestinians are trapped and suffering under a years-long blockade that prevents critical access to life-sustaining necessities. The bombs damaged a children’s hospital, terrifying the patients and traumatizing nearby families. To be clear: U.S. taxpayers are funding these horrific human rights abuses against Palestinians. The U.S. is the top provider of military aid to Israel. Recently I met with Dr. Abu-Jamei of the Gaza Community Mental Health Program, who let me know about how almost all Gazan children experience anxiety and depression after years of trauma. And outside of Gaza, Palestinians also endure daily trauma living under the illegal military occupation. As the only Palestinian-American in Congress, I understand the urgency of ending U.S. complicity in the Israeli apartheid regime. Our President as well as every single one of my colleagues in Congress should also be calling this horrific violence out. Too many are silent, but I continue to speak up. We need to keep the spotlight and the pressure on until Palestinians’ humanity and equal rights are finally recognized—and we need leaders who will sustain this push. **About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

clean_body: We can do better. We need to get out the vote in every election, twice a year. = | Fellow activist, Looking at the results from our recent voter preparedness survey email, we can see there’s still a lot of work to get done by the Commonwealth’s May 16 Municipal/Local/Judicial Primary. A truly unfortunate amount of voters turn out just once every four years for Presidential Elections, and our survey results reflected that unfortunate trend. This year, we need to do better because the upcoming Municipal/Local/Judicial Elections will be vital to protecting our rights and democracy – all the way from the Pennsylvania Supreme Court down to county election board members, the officials we elect will hold crucial roles. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = In solidarity, Team NPP = | The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. name: Abigail Spanberger

body:
There’s still so much to do!

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61764381/401096211/1394223873?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230413-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDk0NWFkNDQtNDVkYS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=i74IDXv4FyTLkATcZKAYBnqMvsPnjWeGAI2w3W_QOGA=)
---
| Peter,

In 2018, we flipped VA-07 blue for the first time since 1968, and I’ve been hard at work in Congress ever since, working hard to achieve real progress on the issues that matter most to the communities I represent.

In that time, I’ve expanded rural broadband internet access, brought infrastructure investments home to Virginia, lowered the cost of prescription drugs, and gotten legislation I have written signed into law to support those struggling with addiction, assist retirees, and support veterans, just to name a few initiatives.

_**Just take a look at some recent achievements and initiatives I’m proud to have been part of:**_
---
| | _**Lawmakers aim to train more truck drivers, ease supply chain issues through bipartisan bill**_

_“Spanberger in her own statement said the bill would ‘help bring more drivers into the fold, keep them on the highway, and reward them for their loyalty’ displayed during pandemic-related shutdowns.”_

\- CNBC

**_Spanberger to hold farm bill summit, telephone town hall this week_**

_“U.S. Rep. Abigail Spanberger will host a Farm Bill Summit on Tuesday to hear from Virginia crop and livestock producers about their priorities as Farm Bill negotiations continue ... Spanberger will share her outlook as the only Virginian on the U.S. House Agriculture Committee.”_

\- The Free Lance Star

_**In Wake of Texas Judge Ruling, Spanberger Urges Appeals Court to Protect Mifepristone Access**_

_“The consequences of the district court’s remedy could extend far beyond mifepristone, for it undermines the science-based, expert-driven process that Congress designed for determining whether drugs are safe and effective.” - Abigail Spanberger_

\- Blue Virginia
---
None of these initiatives would be possible without the support of people like you, and I’m so grateful for all you’ve done to support my campaign.

But there’s still so much to do!

I’m working to pass my bill to ban Members of Congress, their spouses, and dependent children from trading individual stock. It’s a commonsense measure that would affirm to the American people that we are working for them, not our stock portfolio.

I’m driven to keep our communities safe by passing long overdue gun reforms.

And I will always advocate to lower costs for Virginia families.

But to do any of it, we need to build a strong campaign now – and that starts with your support.

[_**With that in mind, will you consider contributing to my campaign today so I can keep up my important work in Congress?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61764386/401096215/1394223873?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230413-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDk0NWFkNDQtNDVkYS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=i74IDXv4FyTLkATcZKAYBnqMvsPnjWeGAI2w3W_QOGA=)
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61764389/401096219/1394223873?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230413-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDk0NWFkNDQtNDVkYS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=i74IDXv4FyTLkATcZKAYBnqMvsPnjWeGAI2w3W_QOGA=)

Abigail

Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. clean_body: There’s still so much to do! | = | Peter, In 2018, we flipped VA-07 blue for the first time since 1968, and I’ve been hard at work in Congress ever since, working hard to achieve real progress on the issues that matter most to the communities I represent. In that time, I’ve expanded rural broadband internet access, brought infrastructure investments home to Virginia, lowered the cost of prescription drugs, and gotten legislation I have written signed into law to support those struggling with addiction, assist retirees, and support veterans, just to name a few initiatives. Just take a look at some recent achievements and initiatives I’m proud to have been part of: | | Lawmakers aim to train more truck drivers, ease supply chain issues through bipartisan bill “Spanberger in her own statement said the bill would ‘help bring more drivers into the fold, keep them on the highway, and reward them for their loyalty’ displayed during pandemic-related shutdowns.” \- CNBC Spanberger to hold farm bill summit, telephone town hall this week “U.S. Rep. Abigail Spanberger will host a Farm Bill Summit on Tuesday to hear from Virginia crop and livestock producers about their priorities as Farm Bill negotiations continue ... Spanberger will share her outlook as the only Virginian on the U.S. House Agriculture Committee.” \- The Free Lance Star In Wake of Texas Judge Ruling, Spanberger Urges Appeals Court to Protect Mifepristone Access “The consequences of the district court’s remedy could extend far beyond mifepristone, for it undermines the science-based, expert-driven process that Congress designed for determining whether drugs are safe and effective.” - Abigail Spanberger \- Blue Virginia None of these initiatives would be possible without the support of people like you, and I’m so grateful for all you’ve done to support my campaign. But there’s still so much to do! I’m working to pass my bill to ban Members of Congress, their spouses, and dependent children from trading individual stock. It’s a commonsense measure that would affirm to the American people that we are working for them, not our stock portfolio. I’m driven to keep our communities safe by passing long overdue gun reforms. And I will always advocate to lower costs for Virginia families. But to do any of it, we need to build a strong campaign now – and that starts with your support. = | = Grateful to have you in my corner, Abigail * | | = Paid for by Spanberger for Congress Spanberger for Congress P.O. Box 3112 Fredericksburg, VA 22402 United States | | | ---|---|--- Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature Is Needed: STOP the cruise industry from destroying coral reefs
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1720222?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | _**Once upon a time...**_ There was a serene aquatic spot nested among soft sand, abundant with vibrant and colorful biodiversity living harmoniously together in tranquility, among ancient corals, beneath limestone cliffs, overlooking sparkling turquoise waters. Although this enchanted place sounds like something straight out of a Disney movie, Lighthouse Point exists at the southernmost tip of the island Eleuthera in the Bahamas. But sadly, this real-life story doesn't have a fairy tale happy ending. **Enter the villain: Disney itself! ** _**Disney Cruise,**_ to be exact. Yes, that's right -- the corporate curator of magical wonders is responsible for **DECIMATING** this treasured coral reef habitat with the construction of its _$250 MILLION_ cruise ship pier, demolishing precious marine resources and **threatening the several endangered species** that flourish there. Coral reefs around the world are vanishing quickly. Still, for the cruise industry, corporate profits come first, Friend, so Friends of the Earth is committed to defending these iconic underwater colonies from suffering the same fate as Lighthouse Point. **_But we can't SAVE coral reefs without strong public support from environmentalists like you._[Will you let the cruise industry continue to destroy the rest of our precious coral reefs -- OR will you step up and take action right now?](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1720223?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1720224?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Coral reefs are known as the rainforests of the sea due to their _**critical role**_ in the ocean ecosystem. Home to bright, tropical aquatic life, these stunning destinations attract tourists from all over the world -- _**that's exactly why Big Cruise wants to EXPLOIT these natural wonders for cash.**_
When cruise ships invade, they bring in massive vessel traffic, emit harmful **pollutants,** dump toxic**waste,** and carelessly **bulldoze** over these magnificent structures -- _with no regard for the damage to our oceans, our environment, marine life, and local communities. _
_**More coral reefs are in URGENT DANGER of vanishing, Friend.**_ That's why Friends of the Earth is fighting back against these corporate bullies to protect our oceans and defend coral reefs. We're demanding that Big Cruise is held accountable for its environmental destruction and industrial-scale pollution _IMMEDIATELY._ _**But we won't have a meaningful impact unless we can demonstrate strong public support. **_
_**Here's where environmentalists like you are absolutely CRITICAL to the fight:[We need 5,401 more signatures by 11:59 P.M. to DEMAND that the EPA rein in cruise ship pollution NOW. We're counting on you to step up today before the last of our ocean's coral reefs are WIPED OUT by Big Cruise's corporate greed. Are you with us, Friend?](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1720225?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**_
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1720224?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thanks for protecting our oceans and coral reefs,
Friends of the Earth**
|
