subject: Attack on Christians and the First Amendment
body:
They can't handle the truth. No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-e-qujldz-trhiujldw-yh/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujldz-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Happy Thursday. We're so glad you're here! Thank you for choosing us to be your daily place to become informed. You are not alone!**
[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujldz-trhiujldw-y/) **Grow your organization and keep the momentum going with our powerful platform.** [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujldz-trhiujldw-j/) **Attack on Christians and the First Amendment** Republican lawmakers demand to know why the **[Pentagon sent a cease and desist letter to Catholic priests](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujldz-trhiujldw-t/)** , stopping them from providing care during Holy Week. **Words Hurt** You'll want to be careful which words you use on social media sites other than CaucusRoom.[ **The FBI has released a new list of words that indicate you are an extremist. **](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujldz-trhiujldw-i/) **Italy has a Illegal Migrant Problem** Italy's government has **[declared a six-month national state of emergency to help it cope with a surge of migrants](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujldz-trhiujldw-d/) **arriving on the country's southern shores. **They Can't Handle the Truth** The New York Times has **[declared it may be in no one's interest to reveal more about who is responsible for sabotaging the Nord Stream](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujldz-trhiujldw-h/) **pipeline. _Why would that be?_ **GOP Primary Debate** Fox News has announced **[they will host the first GOP presidential primary debate](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujldz-trhiujldw-k/)** in the 2024 cycle, and Rumble has partnered **[to stream it.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujldz-trhiujldw-u/)** **Tim Scott for President?** Senator Tim Scott has announced an exploratory committee for president. **[Do you think he will end up running in 2024?](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujldz-trhiujldw-o/)**

**Biden's Foreign Policy is a Failure** Ted Cruz has **[responded to the French President's stunning decision to back China](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujldz-trhiujldw-x/)** despite Biden's pandering. **Calling All Moms!** Are you a mom? If so, **[Moms for America, hosts some really great webinars centered around freedom](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujldz-trhiujldw-m/).** Registration is free. **Let****'s [have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujldz-trhiujldw-c/)!**
* **[Nowhere](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujldz-trhiujldw-q/)** to be found.
* Let this **[poor man go](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujldz-trhiujldw-a/)** on vacation.
* Enter **[at your own](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujldz-trhiujldw-f/)** risk.
* This candle **[smells bad](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujldz-trhiujldw-z/)**.

**[We are looking for your feedback](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujldz-trhiujldw-v/)** to understand your first impression of our messaging. | | Hi, it’s Ashley Barth, Finance Director for Gottheimer for Congress.

As Josh’s Finance Director, it’s my job to ensure that we show our strength and have the resources to fight back against the NRCC attacks **_we know are coming._**

As the extremist attacks on women’s rights ramp up across the country, bipartisan problem solvers like Josh become top targets. Josh’s fight for Jersey Values and bipartisan progress is the **_opposite_** of the agenda of division and extremism that the NRCC supports.

[We’re facing our first fundraising deadline since an extremist judge in Texas struck a blow to abortion rights across the country. That’s why it’s so critical that we show our strength at this moment. Will you chip in $10 or more to stand in this fight with Josh?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61765202/401098875/235237855?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_JG_20230413_FR_mmfr1.1_0_3MO_AshleyBarth_NA_NA_mmfr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNGZiYTFiYS00NmRhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ekVIlDFuTa8bISrxGDtyt0ZeKgzmCQW3Ljk9iKcIdvI=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

Unlike extremists who are working to erode people’s rights, Josh is focused on furthering bipartisan solutions and putting Jersey Values first. He has **_zero tolerance_** for extremism in New Jersey, our nation, or anywhere. We need to protect Josh’s seat and all the bipartisan progress he has made and will continue to make — for NJ-05 and beyond.

Peter,

My name is Mark Lamb – I’m a husband, father, God-fearing American, and proud Sheriff of Pinal County in the great state of Arizona.

**_“Fear Not; Do Right”_**
This phrase has shaped my ideals and convictions to love America. Through every hardship, win, and loss, I am determined to rise above the challenge and lead from the front – in Law Enforcement _and_ Politics.

**On Tuesday, I announced my candidacy for the United States Senate to fight for our shared American values.** [**Washington needs a new Sheriff in town.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=3ec8312e930a4a6e8cccd8fdb52c35f3&_e=65SU0iD0K5erAziG6JfnOaCU9AC-prDKiqlIyDSORI7njnWinqaIVldIXsx9dG5eA2EUPnMdCDo6ce6tCH8G2GgtM8RlrojRPGbz6FDIG2niuhEPBhXYLnbPxt5E69TcdkVk4Id6yShUVx84DOLQaIuEm8YUwclbQ4rIYWzRrDr21mlQ_GCFy7ApwbCjrVuaG9RF4k5mDgmrwUy03AlV00ZLCKtqJ02LlP-zUNjqo1YvboaUPFOsXWsIKgsw9KsDsAvkrzhiDDfJiIUSB7OBO-2Zy31X5fO-kuimA0wm53hNvSUAHFdkMnIXBlagHtwKKdatxdRjMDBI1DCUp0-XmsB_VCle7fqxjwTWE_8hJ_rEddMMN5h3GYWtEzgBWzKuGDT2Yb_ZIZAhFuyzjwF_Mg%3D%3D)

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=3ec8312e930a4a6e8cccd8fdb52c35f3&_e=65SU0iD0K5erAziG6JfnOaCU9AC-prDKiqlIyDSORI7njnWinqaIVldIXsx9dG5eA2EUPnMdCDo6ce6tCH8G2GgtM8RlrojRPGbz6FDIG2niuhEPBhXYLnbPxt5E69TcdkVk4Id6yShUVx84DOLQaIuEm8YUwclbQ4rIYWzRrDr21mlQ_GCFy7ApwbCjrVuaG9RF4k5mDgmrwUy03AlV00ZLCKtqJ02LlP-zUNjqo1Z_LxEZ1jbh63F3bTGv0H48hb9UPaHae_K2STVc01rQTVxCJtqe4zILKvpn7hmf1TjPInhtyqPzO7AxLj0Qly15gD9IHpMpY2K6JtT-vYjt99vTs6vMSZ03ckVEqEwqQ5kB6qs82fCeuEkAmNBVRJOLItC8yU6j41pZ6rV9_abeMQ%3D%3D)
[**SEND THE SHERIFF TO WASHINGTON »**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=3ec8312e930a4a6e8cccd8fdb52c35f3&_e=65SU0iD0K5erAziG6JfnOaCU9AC-prDKiqlIyDSORI7njnWinqaIVldIXsx9dG5eA2EUPnMdCDo6ce6tCH8G2GgtM8RlrojRPGbz6FDIG2niuhEPBhXYLnbPxt5E69TcdkVk4Id6yShUVx84DOLQaIuEm8YUwclbQ4rIYWzRrDr21mlQ_GCFy7ApwbCjrVuaG9RF4k5mDgmrwUy03AlV00ZLCKtqJ02LlP-zUNjqo1bqNcYw0xFMuw9ot6JvvQYgYIoXIDKAXmvEumTyqg26RfLfWKxIexXB7X8CHsJRCGyal-IcEJHNjx5WiDOTN07VrAjN1qR1B9rju_qlLajTkkaBGReyABpXQsKbhSW-4FmxYRlk-jq0b-V7ZNmPLSm82NBcK4NZzLxHZDJyN9zx4Q%3D%3D)

As a constitutional conservative, I have strong convictions and am courageous in fighting for the citizens I serve in Pinal County.

Our sliver of Arizona is home to more than 420,000 Americans spread over 5,000+ square miles; it’s a vast, arid, sundrenched landscape on the frontline of several conflicts. We are fighting a war on illegal narcotics and simultaneously an immigration battle.

As the top law-enforcement officer in the area, I’m responsible for the safety and well-being of every man, woman, and child who calls this place home. Unlike the career politicians in Washington, D.C., and Phoenix, **I know that the buck stops with me in Pinal County – _which is why I take my job so seriously._**

**I have personally carried dead bodies from the ditches, rescued children from sex trafficking, and arrested gang members and drug dealers.**

I know what deadly drugs and the criminals peddling them are doing to families and communities. **_I know what it did to my family._**

We lost our son and our one-year-old granddaughter eight days before Christmas. No pain compares to losing a child, let alone a grandbaby. During my son’s life, he struggled with drug addiction; he even spent time in my jail for using fentanyl. I am acutely aware that families across Arizona – _and America_ – are being touched by the drug crisis.

Each day I get up and put my Sheriff’s badge on, I remind myself that I’m no better than any man or woman who works for me; I have been, and continue to be, on the frontlines of the opioid epidemic and border fight.

At home in Arizona and across America, lives are on the line. **We must FIGHT if we’re going to save them. I need strong patriots like yourself on my team to win this battle.[Will you commit to the fight by donating any amount to my campaign today?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=3ec8312e930a4a6e8cccd8fdb52c35f3&_e=65SU0iD0K5erAziG6JfnOaCU9AC-prDKiqlIyDSORI7njnWinqaIVldIXsx9dG5eA2EUPnMdCDo6ce6tCH8G2GgtM8RlrojRPGbz6FDIG2niuhEPBhXYLnbPxt5E69TcdkVk4Id6yShUVx84DOLQaIuEm8YUwclbQ4rIYWzRrDr21mlQ_GCFy7ApwbCjrVuaG9RF4k5mDgmrwUy03AlV00ZLCKtqJ02LlP-zUNjqo1ZLq3tndXXQqOzVqgyOwrVnQcj_EB8r5r9DwGO3Xiv1sA4sQOhuKeMggVJ3hG-aTzaDXlgLkxi9B8NWf62b_wtqA-TY2XAHot6ZRafYmC9r-4M13UHFOsbFte0ux9zi8AMyk0bcpOd5GjL_GBRKtDw1iX0H77x7inFA7kRmOdGrXA%3D%3D)**

[**SEND THE SHERIFF TO WASHINGTON »**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=3ec8312e930a4a6e8cccd8fdb52c35f3&_e=65SU0iD0K5erAziG6JfnOaCU9AC-prDKiqlIyDSORI7njnWinqaIVldIXsx9dG5eA2EUPnMdCDo6ce6tCH8G2GgtM8RlrojRPGbz6FDIG2niuhEPBhXYLnbPxt5E69TcdkVk4Id6yShUVx84DOLQaIuEm8YUwclbQ4rIYWzRrDr21mlQ_GCFy7ApwbCjrVuaG9RF4k5mDgmrwUy03AlV00ZLCKtqJ02LlP-zUNjqo1Yd_XWq-Peb-9CBhqWGaqCXFF04bELdp1R94GO1C_nd0OQJs1x71Fal6OTgG0gdbj7OWgXt32n-NJ9pPwXFyG4HJ7c-zP1arAvNhbkGRa8D9wtdnM_OZfF1KCxEKr2ama6mMM4ReOycJCW7MQFQoWz3foYv3zw-5yLzhHRoAmekaA%3D%3D)

We need leaders in this country who aren’t too politically correct to protect us, and [**that’s why I’m running for the United States Senate.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=3ec8312e930a4a6e8cccd8fdb52c35f3&_e=65SU0iD0K5erAziG6JfnOaCU9AC-prDKiqlIyDSORI7njnWinqaIVldIXsx9dG5eA2EUPnMdCDo6ce6tCH8G2GgtM8RlrojRPGbz6FDIG2niuhEPBhXYLnbPxt5E69TcdkVk4Id6yShUVx84DOLQaIuEm8YUwclbQ4rIYWzRrDr21mlQ_GCFy7ApwbCjrVuaG9RF4k5mDgmrwUy03AlV00ZLCKtqJ02LlP-zUNjqo1ZplBUnN4WP1daRQD2vtN4ISzpbugId1_Y5K_yUKG7j_H1m4OFCyRN8p0whtgEiEFrDRsOkqzWCBggbY7AJhe5sF2kmQbbJB_cS0GKIvd8vCwYOKPbsU_wAhpZm5831Oj9hmgQKSGwhw61m06sJdnmUwvOYk1bD37QT0v4WFXdmCQ%3D%3D)

The people of Pinal County, Arizona, elected me to be their top Law Enforcement official because they know that _**I’m tougher than a $2 steak.**_ The voters who gave me the honor of the Sheriff’s badge I wear on my lapel know that my only interest in elected office is their safety.

[**I’ll stand up to the woke left and the weak political establishment in Washington.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=3ec8312e930a4a6e8cccd8fdb52c35f3&_e=65SU0iD0K5erAziG6JfnOaCU9AC-prDKiqlIyDSORI7njnWinqaIVldIXsx9dG5eA2EUPnMdCDo6ce6tCH8G2GgtM8RlrojRPGbz6FDIG2niuhEPBhXYLnbPxt5E69TcdkVk4Id6yShUVx84DOLQaIuEm8YUwclbQ4rIYWzRrDr21mlQ_GCFy7ApwbCjrVuaG9RF4k5mDgmrwUy03AlV00ZLCKtqJ02LlP-zUNjqo1btdyZaAB75uHgAr3iVftuAUNJg91kwlNbI8KX5zPBKxt4z0unZNgIte2SfqVVLq_KUdilM91frEW3MjJWSI539OQyiHRcoPu6XoI1NX9bIqQfybVT_ZX-WWucE6n2Ww6pR3NL55zm2YmA-Zn6EakFs6sOmyTy431iS2M5tUIbXEQ%3D%3D) I’ll work 24/7 to do everything in my purview to secure the southern border and provide our law enforcement officers with the resources they need to succeed as our first responders.

I will defend our Second Amendment and the right to life. I’ll work to cut wasteful spending, fight inflation, and put more money back in your pocket. [**These are the fights we must win, Peter.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=3ec8312e930a4a6e8cccd8fdb52c35f3&_e=65SU0iD0K5erAziG6JfnOaCU9AC-prDKiqlIyDSORI7njnWinqaIVldIXsx9dG5eA2EUPnMdCDo6ce6tCH8G2GgtM8RlrojRPGbz6FDIG2niuhEPBhXYLnbPxt5E69TcdkVk4Id6yShUVx84DOLQaIuEm8YUwclbQ4rIYWzRrDr21mlQ_GCFy7ApwbCjrVuaG9RF4k5mDgmrwUy03AlV00ZLCKtqJ02LlP-zUNjqo1alh7iRfJLexFDSR3MVkNldBHm9AWfLFMMQ3aJpcT5pB0MCdrFUw2QsdyDiMntGG73JXTY1zS8_nJOyDDUiwwxZM5jv4Xtg5a2vZZIKfNFq38oyNJejk4x3pnm7BrJMXexHk5ImgDjyMpuGqFDJapRtrW_D6NMPSPeZA3MULy3u6Q%3D%3D)

**_Washington needs a new Sheriff in town._**

**I’m Mark Lamb, and I’m ready to lay down the law** – [**are you with me?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=3ec8312e930a4a6e8cccd8fdb52c35f3&_e=65SU0iD0K5erAziG6JfnOaCU9AC-prDKiqlIyDSORI7njnWinqaIVldIXsx9dG5eA2EUPnMdCDo6ce6tCH8G2GgtM8RlrojRPGbz6FDIG2niuhEPBhXYLnbPxt5E69TcdkVk4Id6yShUVx84DOLQaIuEm8YUwclbQ4rIYWzRrDr21mlQ_GCFy7ApwbCjrVuaG9RF4k5mDgmrwUy03AlV00ZLCKtqJ02LlP-zUNjqo1blGe3ZIrAjaGzC2rkIGg7Oo2XiLzcXMARrprM5UYUwGrd05UYKClRWETGmvkxOR89UtolOxSKHiC3nXiMlMzG345BGe0Wyu1EGs8EKt7fi1BAvqlMWkyt3sqWb2eJ-4UpszIdPlO7u5fwkWvflWgWBS3mWLISFKT7MlSXcg2g3XQ%3D%3D)

Thank you,

**Meet Sheriff Lamb:** | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM.

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year.

[ **HELP ME FLIP ARIZONA 'S SENATE SEAT RED ➞ **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=3ec8312e930a4a6e8cccd8fdb52c35f3&_e=65SU0iD0K5erAziG6JfnOaCU9AC-prDKiqlIyDSORI7njnWinqaIVldIXsx9dG5eA2EUPnMdCDo6ce6tCH8G2GgtM8RlrojRPGbz6FDIG2niuhEPBhXYLnbPxt5E69TcdkVk4Id6yShUVx84DOLQaIuEm8YUwclbQ4rIYWzRrDr21mlQ_GCFy7ApwbCjrVuaG9RF4k5mDgmrwUy03AlV00ZLCKtqJ02LlP-zUNjqo1ZUD1BaHcjNuj6NPcRyv3VkSLGJRBhur_9NQ5uZzZnWx7Kcsd50uZGD0rmSxiN0XbQe36rOJYfALBTzTcn9TziZd86SnIjgtgso_zW_pDHgsaVa5rIOhpY1tYHzsULNOI1plb3Luo96RzuqITOeHgCls5DU_cdTjD63J2YAwza7kQ%3D%3D)

clean_body: On Tuesday, I announced my candidacy for the United States Senate to fight for our shared American values. | | Peter, My name is Mark Lamb – I’m a husband, father, God-fearing American, and proud Sheriff of Pinal County in the great state of Arizona. “Fear Not; Do Right” This phrase has shaped my ideals and convictions to love America. Through every hardship, win, and loss, I am determined to rise above the challenge and lead from the front – in Law Enforcement and Politics. On Tuesday, I announced my candidacy for the United States Senate to fight for our shared American values. As a constitutional conservative, I have strong convictions and am courageous in fighting for the citizens I serve in Pinal County. Our sliver of Arizona is home to more than 420,000 Americans spread over 5,000+ square miles; it’s a vast, arid, sundrenched landscape on the frontline of several conflicts. We are fighting a war on illegal narcotics and simultaneously an immigration battle. As the top law-enforcement officer in the area, I’m responsible for the safety and well-being of every man, woman, and child who calls this place home. Unlike the career politicians in Washington, D.C., and Phoenix, I know that the buck stops with me in Pinal County – which is why I take my job so seriously. I have personally carried dead bodies from the ditches, rescued children from sex trafficking, and arrested gang members and drug dealers. I know what deadly drugs and the criminals peddling them are doing to families and communities. I know what it did to my family. We lost our son and our one-year-old granddaughter eight days before Christmas. No pain compares to losing a child, let alone a grandbaby. During my son’s life, he struggled with drug addiction; he even spent time in my jail for using fentanyl. I am acutely aware that families across Arizona – and America – are being touched by the drug crisis. Each day I get up and put my Sheriff’s badge on, I remind myself that I’m no better than any man or woman who works for me; I have been, and continue to be, on the frontlines of the opioid epidemic and border fight. At home in Arizona and across America, lives are on the line. We must FIGHT if we’re going to save them. I need strong patriots like yourself on my team to win this battle. We need leaders in this country who aren’t too politically correct to protect us, and The people of Pinal County, Arizona, elected me to be their top Law Enforcement official because they know that I’m tougher than a $2 steak. The voters who gave me the honor of the Sheriff’s badge I wear on my lapel know that my only interest in elected office is their safety. I’ll work 24/7 to do everything in my purview to secure the southern border and provide our law enforcement officers with the resources they need to succeed as our first responders. I will defend our Second Amendment and the right to life. I’ll work to cut wasteful spending, fight inflation, and put more money back in your pocket. Washington needs a new Sheriff in town. I’m Mark Lamb, and I’m ready to lay down the law – Thank you, Sheriff Mark Lamb Republican for U.S. Senate Follow Sheriff Lamb On Social Media Meet Sheriff Lamb: | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM. Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year. | Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate

body:

# FREEDOM PROJECT USA
# IS BRINGING INNOVATION TO CONNECTICUT ELECTIONS WITH
# THE LAUNCH OF 2WINCT
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
April 13, 2023

CONTACT
Matt Wylie
[press](mailto:press@freedomprojectusa.com)[@freedomprojectusa.com](mailto:info@freedomprojectusa.com)

AUBURN, NH- Freedom Project USA announces the launch of 2WINCT - a new initiative that will bring innovation to Connecticut Elections. Dominic Rapini will serve as Chair of 2WINCT and Chris Coyle will serve as its COO.

“Connecticut is plagued by out-of-touch leaders who are willing destroy the economy, ignore the middle class, disregard parental rights, and leave people feeling less safe,” said Matt Wylie president of FPUSA. "This is no way to run a state. I am excited to have Dominic and Chris lead this initiative so we can educate the next generation of leaders and restore economic sanity.”

2WINCT’s focus is on the fundamental principles of our Founding Fathers and The Constitution. What makes us different is our new, modern approach and commitment to winning.

“Having run for office in Connecticut, 2WINCT is exactly what candidates need to truly be competitive,” said Dominic Rapini. “We are going to modernize the campaign playbook. 2WINCT will bring innovation across all campaign tactics and strategies so candidates will have the tools they need to win elections and change Connecticut.”

“Our focus is on identifying, recruiting, and educating candidates that are committed to defending individual rights and the constitutional freedoms, said Chris Coyle. “We are the ‘Constitution State’ and our voters deserve elected leaders who put citizens as their first priority.”

**Dominic Rapini** is a life long Connecticut native; a husband, a father, and a fighter committed to our fundamental freedoms and liberties.. Dominic is a former science teacher and lifelong veteran of the Consumer Electronics industry with strong experience in storefront and online retail. In 2022 Mr. Rapini was the 2022 Republican candidate for Secretary of the State. The time is now for innovation, new ideas, and systematic approach to engaging voters with the right messages, the right candidates, and of course, the best possible outcomes.

**Chris Coyle** is a Connecticut native and has been active in our state for decades as a high school teacher and coach, law school graduate, volunteer for police and fire departments, and other entrepreneurial activities. Chris's professional experience includes helping companies bring new technology innovations to market and win major contracts. In this role, Chris refined his expertise in developing and implementing creative strategies for winning, more effective writing and coaching presenters to break through. More recently, Chris has applied his experience and creativity to helping candidates who seek to return our state to its citizens based on our nation's founding values and constitutional principles.

_Founded in 2019, Freedom Project USA’s mission is to defend liberty and free market principles. We advocate, involve, and educate lawmakers, job creators, and the American public about free market principles, personal responsibility, and economic freedom to allow everyone equal opportunity to pursue success.__###_

clean_body: Uniting conservative voices and candidates in a 'Blue' state | | | | | | | FREEDOM PROJECT USA IS BRINGING INNOVATION TO CONNECTICUT ELECTIONS WITH THE LAUNCH OF 2WINCT FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE April 13, 2023 CONTACT Matt Wylie mailto:press@freedomprojectusa.commailto:info@freedomprojectusa.com AUBURN, NH- Freedom Project USA announces the launch of 2WINCT - a new initiative that will bring innovation to Connecticut Elections. Dominic Rapini will serve as Chair of 2WINCT and Chris Coyle will serve as its COO. “Connecticut is plagued by out-of-touch leaders who are willing destroy the economy, ignore the middle class, disregard parental rights, and leave people feeling less safe,” said Matt Wylie president of FPUSA. "This is no way to run a state. I am excited to have Dominic and Chris lead this initiative so we can educate the next generation of leaders and restore economic sanity.” 2WINCT’s focus is on the fundamental principles of our Founding Fathers and The Constitution. What makes us different is our new, modern approach and commitment to winning. “Having run for office in Connecticut, 2WINCT is exactly what candidates need to truly be competitive,” said Dominic Rapini. “We are going to modernize the campaign playbook. 2WINCT will bring innovation across all campaign tactics and strategies so candidates will have the tools they need to win elections and change Connecticut.” “Our focus is on identifying, recruiting, and educating candidates that are committed to defending individual rights and the constitutional freedoms, said Chris Coyle. “We are the ‘Constitution State’ and our voters deserve elected leaders who put citizens as their first priority.” Dominic Rapini is a life long Connecticut native; a husband, a father, and a fighter committed to our fundamental freedoms and liberties.. Dominic is a former science teacher and lifelong veteran of the Consumer Electronics industry with strong experience in storefront and online retail. In 2022 Mr. Rapini was the 2022 Republican candidate for Secretary of the State. The time is now for innovation, new ideas, and systematic approach to engaging voters with the right messages, the right candidates, and of course, the best possible outcomes. Chris Coyle is a Connecticut native and has been active in our state for decades as a high school teacher and coach, law school graduate, volunteer for police and fire departments, and other entrepreneurial activities. Chris's professional experience includes helping companies bring new technology innovations to market and win major contracts. In this role, Chris refined his expertise in developing and implementing creative strategies for winning, more effective writing and coaching presenters to break through. More recently, Chris has applied his experience and creativity to helping candidates who seek to return our state to its citizens based on our nation's founding values and constitutional principles. Founded in 2019, Freedom Project USA’s mission is to defend liberty and free market principles. We advocate, involve, and educate lawmakers, job creators, and the American public about free market principles, personal responsibility, and economic freedom to allow everyone equal opportunity to pursue success.### | | | | | | ---|--- | | | Copyright (C) 2023 Dominic For CT. All rights reserved._ You have signed up to be a support of mine. Our mailing address is: Dominic For CT4 Mariners WayBranford, CT 06405-4481 Want to change how you receive these emails? The Republican Majority Makers Fund is targeting 3 of the MOST vulnerable Democrat-controlled Senate seats in the Country to take back the Senate Majority.

🔴 **THE BAD NEWS -- These three Democrat Senators are sitting on a combined war chest of $15.8 MILLION.**

We only need to **flip TWO of these seats** to retake the majority and end the Democrats’ catastrophic leadership in Washington.

[**DONATE TO RETAKE THE MAJORITY**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c00af5fbb848480aae0b619015345cb6&_e=rMpPjthbqIHlu7BXwNypmmR9YmT4iBkgZHBhrNzz30XDiErQR78vFIQTn6b2Jv10TlZl0p3AHJ33WwrfB41B71UaPJmBcjGg5HJlldmDSz1TeTSDHS1UMLqhbSq2t2VjgV_DKsXDG5iivTm1xuAx9ff608Vg8uebh81iO0JKZtmiNqwy4OIgPg3lzbeEN0eIhrsH1g0CfJjLcSrJ8MxPByd8YJLzv3B_QEp_AlIZp_pS26L_HjIWIcdUwyFDB7tM78d65RftODV6Qs2gQu1C9N15aOLarPlhY9hWQum4m8_RFr90o_NJahkbkIrIKGknmXvDKCe7clcbfYaP5uyV5_WXQNGTXaennxGSXuV50Y0q8nYyGk0pAH4sCFErPsXzWHt1SDF33KcQWSQHn9YNpNVJUiXHt1oHXxOso5cGx38%3D)

Friend,

Jim Banks has my full endorsement. He is undoubtedly the strongest candidate that Indiana could ask for to represent them in the US Senate.

Republicans need to take back the Senate so we can get our country back on track and that work starts in Indiana. Jim Banks has a proven track record of delivering conservative results and standing up to Joe Biden and the Democrats' reckless agenda.

Jim served our country honorably in Afghanistan, and I'm grateful he's raising his hand to serve in the Senate. I'm proud to endorse Jim Banks for Senate; he has my full support.

body:
You’ve probably heard the news about a judge blocking the FDA’s approval of mifepristone, a commonly used abortion medication. I wanted to reach out to explain what’s happening and why it matters. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61766123/401101633/657127102?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2E3ZTUzNGQtNGFkYS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6d7FH8lLjv-Jkzbl3-IduTVRBJQk6iZdJYYlNVgoMUE=) | _Disclaimer: Abortion medication is still legal and accessible in California._ Peter, You’ve probably heard the news about a judge blocking the FDA’s approval of mifepristone, a commonly used abortion medication. I wanted to reach out to explain what’s happening and why it matters. **What’s happened so far:** Last week a Trump-appointed judge in Texas blocked the FDA’s approval of mifepristone, one of two medications used in the most common abortion regimen. Doctors have safely prescribed mifepristone to women for 22 years. Late last night a federal Appeals court ruled mifepristone could still be approved, but could not be used after seven weeks and could not be sent in the mail. The case will head to the Supreme Court, but in the interim there is wide uncertainty on implementation. **Why this matters:** If the Supreme Court agrees to suspend mifepristone, access to abortion _in all 50 states_ would be severely limited. This would be the biggest blow to abortion access since the overturning of Roe v. Wade. This is an appalling attempt by one judge in Texas to exert his political extremism on every single American woman. It also threatens the core role of the FDA in our public health system and could have far-reaching effects even outside of reproductive health. I am deeply concerned about what’s next. Republicans around the country are already passing laws to ban abortion and defund Planned Parenthood, now they’re entering a whole new frontier in their attack on women’s rights in this country. We have to show we’re fighting back right now. You are a big part of our resistance. name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Can I explain something?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
They removed me from the House Intelligence Committee where I have served as Chairman and the top Democrat for years. |
---
_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61766270/401102099/-246429796?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGI5MjEwMC00YmRhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a7HDIVN4rcrJg2bKI_CjuGUt6-WvHPWxbA9OKuhzVOM=)
Hi there — Senator Tammy Baldwin here! **[In a moment, I’m going to ask you to split a donation between my campaign for Senate in 2024 and Eric.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61766271/401102100/-1055645004?refcode=E20916-20230413-BaldwinSplit-SL-SurrogateNational-RegTemplate-CampaignNews-NA&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGI5MjEwMC00YmRhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a7HDIVN4rcrJg2bKI_CjuGUt6-WvHPWxbA9OKuhzVOM=)** But first, I hope you will give me a chance to explain the stakes of this race, and why your support is so important, especially right now. Winning in Wisconsin isn’t easy. As you may remember, our state gave Donald Trump the final electoral votes he needed to secure the presidency in 2016. He won by less than one point. Then in 2020, President Biden won our state by just 0.6%. And last November, Republican Senator Ron Johnson won by just 1%. So it comes as no surprise that political pundits and pollsters are forecasting that our Senate race in 2024 will be one of the most competitive in the nation. **In fact,_The Hill_ has already named me one of the most vulnerable Senate incumbents in 2024. ** So as Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans begin plotting their path to flip the Senate majority, rest assured that my seat will be one of their top targets. And with the White House also on the ballot, you can bet dollars to doughnuts that the GOP and their mega-donors will spend whatever it takes to try and flip our state red. We’ve got a tough fight ahead of us, and it will take a lot of time and resources to build the campaign we’ll need to win. I know this team has what it takes to beat right-wing mega-donors at their own game (_we’ve done it before!_) but it’s going to take all of us working together, which is why I’m asking: [_**Can you split a donation of $10 or more between my reelection campaign and Eric? It’d mean the world to us to have your support on Day One.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61766272/401102101/-1055645004?refcode=E20916-20230413-BaldwinSplit-SL-SurrogateNational-RegTemplate-CampaignNews-NA&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGI5MjEwMC00YmRhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a7HDIVN4rcrJg2bKI_CjuGUt6-WvHPWxbA9OKuhzVOM=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: They removed me from the House Intelligence Committee where I have served as Chairman and the top Democrat for years. | Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. = Hi there — Senator Tammy Baldwin here! = But first, I hope you will give me a chance to explain the stakes of this race, and why your support is so important, especially right now. Winning in Wisconsin isn’t easy. As you may remember, our state gave Donald Trump the final electoral votes he needed to secure the presidency in 2016. He won by less than one point. Then in 2020, President Biden won our state by just 0.6%. And last November, Republican Senator Ron Johnson won by just 1%. So it comes as no surprise that political pundits and pollsters are forecasting that our Senate race in 2024 will be one of the most competitive in the nation. In fact,The Hill has already named me one of the most vulnerable Senate incumbents in 2024. So as Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans begin plotting their path to flip the Senate majority, rest assured that my seat will be one of their top targets. And with the White House also on the ballot, you can bet dollars to doughnuts that the GOP and their mega-donors will spend whatever it takes to try and flip our state red. We’ve got a tough fight ahead of us, and it will take a lot of time and resources to build the campaign we’ll need to win. name: JoeBiden.com
subject: ✈️ Do you want a FREE trip to the 2024 Dem Convention for you and a friend, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www
body:
Did you hear? The 2024 Democratic National Convention will be held in Chicago next August, and you (and a friend!) can enter to win a chance to join Democrats from across the country in the Windy City. | | |
---
Did you hear, Peter? **The 2024 Democratic National Convention will be held in Chicago next August, and you can enter to win a chance to join Democrats from across the country in the Windy City.** The winner will get two tickets to the convention (bring a friend or loved one, Peter!), travel to and from Chicago, and a fully covered hotel stay. The 2024 Democratic National Convention will be held in Chicago next August, and you (and a friend!) can enter to win a chance to join Democrats from across the country in the Windy City. | | | Did you hear, Peter? The 2024 Democratic National Convention will be held in Chicago next August, and you can enter to win a chance to join Democrats from across the country in the Windy City. The winner will get two tickets to the convention (bring a friend or loved one, Peter!), travel to and from Chicago, and a fully covered hotel stay. Grassroots supporters like you are the heart of our party. In appreciation of all you do, we want every Democrat to have the chance to witness this historic moment in person! | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | We hope to see you there! The Democrats Contributions to the DNC will be spent on DNC activities and programs as the DNC determines within its sole discretion and will not be earmarked for any particular candidate or purpose. | |

Since _Roe v. Wade_ was overturned, North Carolina is one of the few states in the Southeast that still has legal abortions. Women from bordering states have come to North Carolina, and criminalizing abortion would impact women from the entire region. We must take action. Help us send a message that North Carolinians believe women should have the freedom to make their own decisions about their health care and their futures. **[Sign on today, and join Wiley and our entire team in this fight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61766474/401102782/481796613?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzY4Y2M2NS00Y2RhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w4V-UOG3vZxO02IX8y2uWdU8INow0QbjdYEvB-2NgV8=&emci=8a68cc65-4cda-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=9368cc65-4cda-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=28008880)** Thanks, Team Wiley Wiley Nickel is the Congressman for NC-13. Last month, NC House Republicans filed a bill banning abortions with only an exception for an ectopic pregnancy or miscarriage. Peter,

From the Russia Hoax to multiple failed investigations and impeachments, to the latest legal actions from NYC, the left has been trying to destroy Donald Trump every day since 2015.

**But today, the stakes just got higher...**

That’s because the same District Attorney who is using his prosecutorial power to destroy Joe Biden’s likely opponent **HAS JUST SUED ME!**

**He wants to intimidate us!**

That’s right - instead of fighting actual crime in New York City, **Alvin Bragg appears to be using federal tax dollars to target Trump.** And now he’s targeting me!

But what Bragg or other Soros-backed liberals might not know about me: I’ve squared off against MUCH bigger and tougher opponents in my career. I didn’t back down then...and I’m not backing down now!

[**HELP ME FIGHT THE LEFT'S POLITICAL TARGETING
CHIP IN A COUPLE DOLLARS TODAY»» **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7f502e6f7997418190fc832b64c30cd5&_e=dsUYZNMjVBssruFM3FcpE5I1zXpXwycpq2XoEzgy2_sYq3nzG2zyMCIY3RSRfm98AWgt6EMSycIG4oUZpcfupytuv6nwZRfCvgmTb3ut5zZS0KTyNWRCvMj6vpJquZqDpBlLKpVCjfYBdp43cB45Mks7Q3uvbaM28MJlFBD23QE7Ts767-WSiy_fVVWdNExhe-HP2TIyAGlNceySEljpxCa7Vz1zHufxrxfks-KZQxbHQXnvcMu28QEHlM4cK1WrqC47hOzldQALwpdluB2GFHIyFoTKoG97xUHL6XOEvveJi3ZajC1xWj9CvOZZJPTqL2tOvSqWPYKK1umXTI99k4NGemtTjm5kKS1qcrnd6RObFvmdZcrYq6PiqCZ82Jwh1LZs-WJOTNaY580O1G89UuQS4uMHglhng2EQpY8tY8_GGIqP5vP0bDCQj7b4m-zA)

[**LET ME KNOW YOU'RE WITH ME » »**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7f502e6f7997418190fc832b64c30cd5&_e=dsUYZNMjVBssruFM3FcpE5I1zXpXwycpq2XoEzgy2_sYq3nzG2zyMCIY3RSRfm98AWgt6EMSycIG4oUZpcfupytuv6nwZRfCvgmTb3ut5zZS0KTyNWRCvMj6vpJquZqDpBlLKpVCjfYBdp43cB45Mks7Q3uvbaM28MJlFBD23QE7Ts767-WSiy_fVVWdNExhe-HP2TIyAGlNceySEljpxCa7Vz1zHufxrxfks-KZQxbHQXnvcMu28QEHlM4cK1WrqC47hOzldQALwpdluB2GFHIyFoTKoG97xUHL6XOEvvcGwYu4iIhA9Ml91uXey7C79O59l5Ox9KmEsNtIEaooSiOlXV2VLwimo79v_WHhpvgESUKzS_q5j64waFcbPTrN6c74wGNV3LUCkd06aw1dCZJNznC8iRcw2vL-sxgvr1or2OgwXet7_yeXztgRqK3B)

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7f502e6f7997418190fc832b64c30cd5&_e=dsUYZNMjVBssruFM3FcpE5I1zXpXwycpq2XoEzgy2_sYq3nzG2zyMCIY3RSRfm98AWgt6EMSycIG4oUZpcfupytuv6nwZRfCvgmTb3ut5zZS0KTyNWRCvMj6vpJquZqDpBlLKpVCjfYBdp43cB45Mks7Q3uvbaM28MJlFBD23QE7Ts767-WSiy_fVVWdNExhe-HP2TIyAGlNceySEljpxCa7Vz1zHufxrxfks-KZQxbHQXnvcMu28QEHlM4cK1WrqC47hOzldQALwpdluB2GFHIyFoTKoG97xUHL6XOEvvet2F176Xdmr3aU7LIjznxqLnMkqwVnj7FNBvtTFOhBVyPdV6ogPmVZ45Dd_ajJWJ4QnWXsHbgQvRwxoxn9hamr9wAi1M7EPnawCccEyPL-SJNeoJuHoLdkkGTz8UR1NQUFPvzjtkkyLxfU9GFtnhsx)

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

Like 133 million Americans, I know what it's like to have the label "pre-existing condition" attached to my care

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61766543/401103025/222231941?amount=10&refcode=MTFC_20230413_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjkwNWIzYy00ZGRhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Bv9qCwNXDCw85cibQ1Mq0Q8AGBjoA6F_1viCKj_o-_4=) Hi Peter — Tammy Baldwin here with some big news: **I’m officially running for reelection to the US Senate.** If you have a minute or two today, I wanted to take a moment to tell you a little more about myself, why I’m running, and why our campaign in Wisconsin is so important.

When I was a child, I was diagnosed with a serious illness and spent three months in the hospital. When I got better, my grandparents who raised me began to look for an insurance policy that would cover me in the future.

However, because of my previous illness, they couldn’t find such a policy. Not from any insurer. Not at any price. They had to pay for my health care out of pocket — and they had to make enormous sacrifices to do so — all because I was a child who had been labeled with those words: **“pre-existing condition.”**

Peter, I got into public service because I saw my grandparents stay up late at night, worried sick that I would fall ill again and they wouldn't be able to afford my care. No one should ever have to go through that.

**Like 133 million Americans, I know what it's like to have the label "pre-existing condition" attached to my care — and before the _Affordable Care Act_ was passed, many of us could be denied coverage.**

Today, insurance companies can no longer discriminate against someone based on their pre-existing condition. I championed that health reform and fought to allow young people to stay on their parent’s insurance plans up to age 26. These policy changes have led to millions more Americans getting the health insurance they need.

So, you can imagine my frustration whenever Republicans launch a new attack on our health care or threaten protections for folks with pre-existing conditions. **And if Mitch McConnell and his Republican mega-donors flip my seat in Wisconsin and take hold of the Senate majority next election, countless Americans could find themselves in a place where insurance companies, once again, write all the rules.**

I’ll never back down, Peter, but we’ve got a tough fight ahead of us to protect this seat, so I’ll need your support every step of the way.

[**Will you split a donation today between my reelection campaign in Wisconsin and Mark Takano's? I’ll never stop fighting to ensure every American has access to quality, affordable health care — regardless of whether or not they have a pre-existing condition — and it’d mean a lot to me to have your support in that fight. »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61766544/401103026/222231941?amount=10&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=MTFC_20230413_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjkwNWIzYy00ZGRhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Bv9qCwNXDCw85cibQ1Mq0Q8AGBjoA6F_1viCKj_o-_4=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Tammy Baldwin and Mark Takano will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61766545/401103027/222231941?amount=10&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&refcode=MTFC_20230413_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjkwNWIzYy00ZGRhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Bv9qCwNXDCw85cibQ1Mq0Q8AGBjoA6F_1viCKj_o-_4=)

subject: Have you heard of the Farm Bill?

Peter,

As a member of the Agriculture Committee, I know how important it is to support local farmers, defend SNAP benefits, and keep our food safe and affordable.

**The most important way we do that is by influencing the Farm Bill,** a must-pass piece of legislation that comes around every 5 years or so, and covers everything from supporting farmers to providing food assistance to those who need it.**Creating a better Farm Bill the reason I asked to be on the Agriculture Committee in the first place!

So as this bill moves through Congress, I’m kicking off our __2023 Farm to Congress Tour__ to meet with folks from across Texas’s 35th District to talk about the Farm Bill. **

**[Can you chip in $10, $20, or whatever you can, to support Team Casar as we fight to ensure the Farm Bill supports local farmers and working families? **Peter, ****the Farm Bill may be the most important piece of legislation you’ve never heard about. Let me explain:**

Every few years, Congress must pass a huge piece of legislation called the Farm Bill that shapes how our food is grown, how we invest in local farms and rural communities, how we care for our food and animals, and the food assistance we provide to those who need it.

But we’re already hearing from Republicans on the Agriculture Committee that they want to slash SNAP benefits – which would force so many Texans and Americans to go hungry.

I'm ready to defend SNAP and ensure the farm bill that supports small and local farms, invests in nutrition assistance, supports rural communities, protects workers, and focuses on feeding families, instead of padding corporate pockets.

As this bill moves through our committee, I’m traveling across Texas’s 35th District on my 2023 Farm to Congress Tour to visit local farms, meet with constituents, and tour places like food banks that depend on a robust and equitable Farm Bill.

I hope you’ll join me along the way. **[And if you can, consider chipping in $10, $20, or whatever you can, to support Team Casar as we fight for a Farm Bill that supports farms and working families.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61766600/401103254/990145659?refcode2=377139c8-4dda-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzcxMzljOC00ZGRhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gvn6qpbTduwACnftjA4AI9m9zp0FBD8IEXxswfplpv4=)**
Thank you,
-Greg

Greg Casar

clean_body: Peter, As a member of the Agriculture Committee, I know how important it is to support local farmers, defend SNAP benefits, and keep our food safe and affordable. The most important way we do that is by influencing the Farm Bill, a must-pass piece of legislation that comes around every 5 years or so, and covers everything from supporting farmers to providing food assistance to those who need it.Creating a better Farm Bill the reason I asked to be on the Agriculture Committee in the first place! So as this bill moves through Congress, I’m kicking off our 2023 Farm to Congress Tour to meet with folks from across Texas’s 35th District to talk about the Farm Bill. = = **= Peter, **the Farm Bill may be the most important piece of legislation you’ve never heard about. Let me explain: Every few years, Congress must pass a huge piece of legislation called the Farm Bill that shapes how our food is grown, how we invest in local farms and rural communities, how we care for our food and animals, and the food assistance we provide to those who need it. But we’re already hearing from Republicans on the Agriculture Committee that they want to slash SNAP benefits – which would force so many Texans and Americans to go hungry. I'm ready to defend SNAP and ensure the farm bill that supports small and local farms, invests in nutrition assistance, supports rural communities, protects workers, and focuses on feeding families, instead of padding corporate pockets. As this bill moves through our committee, I’m traveling across Texas’s 35th District on my 2023 Farm to Congress Tour to visit local farms, meet with constituents, and tour places like food banks that depend on a robust and equitable Farm Bill. I hope you’ll join me along the way. = Thank you, -Greg ** Greg Casar Congressman Texas Congressional District 35 ****=** | ****** ---|---

Many of the same lawmakers who are pushing to repeal red flag laws, remove background check requirements, and expand access to guns in the Commonwealth will sail through the primaries to the November election unopposed. Some Republicans, like the delegate who told the families of victims of gun violence that legislation wouldn’t fix anything, are taking their fight to the state Senate. _**[Virginia has a choice this year. We can stop the gun lobby and Virginia Republicans in their tracks and elect a Democratic majority in both houses of the General Assembly. Contribute $5 now to help Mark make it happen.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61767492/401105449/1243776673?refcode=mw_em_230413_1_a&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmQ4N2IzNy00ZmRhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RL_bV_NnCPs2IHP5kBsGA1ceJAqSSBFaSXOB5ehnCCY=)**_ Mark Warner is working day in and day out to pass commonsense gun reforms in a divided U.S. Senate. Hi Peter – Senator Tammy Baldwin here! **[In a moment, I’m going to ask you to split a donation between my campaign for Senate in 2024 and Patty Murray.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61767621/401105833/560479937?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk13-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDkyNTE5Yy00ZmRhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tgUq2HsIQHnFSr50gN6BgAI-HmFtwhKZZVwp-Ta0n1M=)** But first, I hope you will give me a chance to explain the stakes of this race, and why your support is so important, especially right now.

Winning in Wisconsin isn’t easy.

As you may remember, our state gave Donald Trump the final electoral votes he needed to secure the presidency in 2016. He won by less than one point. Then in 2020, President Biden won our state by just 0.6%. And last November, Republican Senator Ron Johnson won by just 1%.
So it comes as no surprise that political pundits and pollsters are forecasting that our Senate race in 2024 will be one of the most competitive in the nation. **In fact,****The Hill****has already named me one of the most vulnerable Senate incumbents in 2024.**

So as Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans begin plotting their path to flip the Senate majority, rest assured that my seat will be one of their top targets. And with the White House also on the ballot, you can bet dollars to doughnuts that the GOP and their mega-donors will spend whatever it takes to try and flip our state red.
We’ve got a tough fight ahead of us, and it will take a lot of time and resources to build the campaign we’ll need to win. I know this team has what it takes to beat right-wing mega-donors at their own game (we’ve done it before!) but it’s going to take all of us working together, which is why I’m asking:

**[Can you split a donation of $5 or more between my reelection campaign and Patty Murray? It’d mean the world to us to have your support on Day One.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61767623/401105839/560479937?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk13-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDkyNTE5Yy00ZmRhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tgUq2HsIQHnFSr50gN6BgAI-HmFtwhKZZVwp-Ta0n1M=)**

**** 25,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED BY MIDNIGHT ****
This isn’t the first time Justice Thomas has used his power on the Supreme Court for personal gain.

After President Biden’s 2020 victory, his own wife attempted to OVERTURN the election results — _and he tried to cover it up!_

**Justice Thomas has attacked voting rights, destroyed _Roe v. Wade_ , and abused his power for his own gain. _He MUST be impeached!!_**

[**But his MAGA allies are fighting tooth and nail to defend him, so we need a massive wave of support to kick him off the Supreme Court. Please, join 25,000 top Democrats and add your name to the petition to impeach Clarence Thomas! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/impeach-thomas/?source=VPP_20230413_EMPET_E4_T0_AC&t=8&akid=7102%2E878179%2EVRUjTq)

name: URD HQ
subject: Peter, the GOP is attacking public schools.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United Rural Democrats](https://click
body:
Backpacks are supposed to get kids to school—not take them away | | | Hi Peter – Backpacks are supposed to get kids to school—not take them away. In case you haven’t heard, the GOP is pursuing legislation in Ohio, Texas, Oklahoma, and other states to offer families vouchers for sending their kids to private schools. **The “Backpack Bill,” as it’s been called in Ohio, would cost an estimated $1.13 billion in tax-funded money during the first year of implementation in Ohio alone.** Besides the enormous cost that this tax would pass on to taxpayers, the bill would actually fail to provide vouchers that fully cover private school tuition and would also gut the state’s public school and transportation funding. **Our representatives should be fighting for an education system that supports all children—not just those that can afford to choose private schools.** At URD, we’re fighting to elect Democrats who understand that the priority should be making sure that public schools can give our children quality, affordable, and accessible education. **_[Will you chip in $5 or more to elect Democrats and fight against the GOP’s anti-education agenda?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNG6r6b6yi4Uz9vCRXD2Gcp0e33F97uPEMNmDY9BlDPC83Vtfke-cHpBoh2BAii8PQrPCQRbPpeHJguHSWywUiIzG8NISqpMubbVykUZC5uM9way0Si4WXRpbp7Owp0t4d_wdU2dW6BYzaSctruQpXvnVwfare3IiuPucmMlmM6mzWkzzF1lL-VBlCFv9XkLROteGEOjXewuYUTnAXC-_gwAQq8u-FTO6a84Pxgao1Xv5s6W1pLMgCA1F2CLz0QrXYrt6Cj2RvTBywTyh1pj_nYoSCgJqUgjsLQpSEDDTfZ7ulq01PMTGMkOFEPyM-ah-QfGUO-hWz9T3pY4B_lZHkMoIUy_BtrnLUadM7ucR3C2X-HJlrEY9rBzGy6R0vKTi3h21qwNASoA0JHMvX0-eaFcVMuReMwgW0inTKH4GiHw/3vb/HsQg4WyfRviJ5l3g-CxsTQ/h0/z_jqMAvsTFQX4OnTI6uIAZ-aac-C3BrxbyxvBN262Ew)_** name: Katie Porter
subject: CA will decide the House majority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=21139%2E3422442%2Ef6sdLz)
Derek,
Democrats need to win just five seats to take the speaker's gavel from Kevin McCarthy—**and the majority could very well be decided in California alone.[Our campaign will help boost Democrats across the state, can you chip in today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230413-1?amount=36&refcode=EMAG13_1_HMJ_20230413_V1_F&refcode2=21139_3422442_f6sdLz&akid=21139%2E3422442%2Ef6sdLz)
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230413-1?refcode=EMAG13_1_HMJ_20230413_V1_F&refcode2=21139_3422442_f6sdLz&akid=21139%2E3422442%2Ef6sdLz)**
Here's a recent quote from the LA Times: _Wasserman said Democrats' strategic decisions have historically teetered between the need to win House seats in states like California and the cost of campaigning in areas with such expensive media markets. In the November election, the party suffered some of the consequences for not spending big in California races and losing some close races._
The best pick-up opportunities for Democrats are California districts, but we need to do serious work to organize in these communities, run ads, and turnout voters. Running campaigns here in California is more expensive than in most other places, so we have to get started early.
**Having a Senate candidate at the top of the ticket who can energize and turnout voters will be critical to taking back the House and building a durable majority.** As the candidate in this race who has recently won in a tough, purple district, I know what it takes to support down-ballot candidates.
Thanks to supporters like you, I flipped an Orange County seat in 2018. We defended it in 2020 and 2022, despite super PACs spending millions against me. Because of the work we've done, I'm confident a progressive Democrat will hold my current House seat in once red Orange County, and I'm ready to help replicate our success all across the state.
Our campaign relies on supporters like you. **[Your support will help us run a robust campaign that reaches millions of Californians and helps deliver the House majority.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230413-1?amount=36&refcode=EMAG13_1_HMJ_20230413_V1_F&refcode2=21139_3422442_f6sdLz&akid=21139%2E3422442%2Ef6sdLz)
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230413-1?refcode=EMAG13_1_HMJ_20230413_V1_F&refcode2=21139_3422442_f6sdLz&akid=21139%2E3422442%2Ef6sdLz)**
Thanks so much for considering,
Katie

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAG13_1_HMJ_20230413_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=21139_3422442_f6sdLz&akid=21139%2E3422442%2Ef6sdLz)**
---

* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=21139%2E3422442%2Ef6sdLz)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=21139%2E3422442%2Ef6sdLz)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)

**Friend – Donald Trump just attacked me on Truth Social, calling me "one of the worst in the Senate!"** It's never been more clear: The GOP is doing everything it can to replace me with a Trump yes-man and flip the Senate red.
To be clear, I'm not scared of their attacks. But I do know that where Trump goes GOP dark money follows – and if I'm being attacked this early in the race, we're in for a long, challenging, and expensive road ahead.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: A powerful message
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| Just hours before I announced my campaign, Kevin McCarthy removed me from the Intelligence Committee, where I’ve served as Chairman and top Democrat for years. All because I held Trump and MAGA Republicans accountable.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=2103%2E5257348%2EJ3UQUQ)
Derek,
In a moment, I’m going to ask if you can **[pitch in to support my campaign for U.S. Senate](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=apr2023_abs_em.S8d4Hr&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC30_20230413_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=2103%2E5257348%2EJ3UQUQ)** ahead of Saturday’s mid-month fundraising deadline. But first, can I explain why this deadline is so important?
Just hours before I announced my campaign, Kevin McCarthy removed me from the Intelligence Committee, where I’ve served as Chairman and top Democrat for years. All because I held Trump and MAGA Republicans accountable.
As it turned out, that was just the beginning. Ever since I started running to serve Californians in the Senate, McCarthy, Matt Gaetz, Tucker Carlson, and the entire Fox News machine have attacked me nearly every day.
Earlier this month, McCarthy claimed that a Republican could win this Senate race in California and also said they needed to make sure I didn’t win.
**It’s clear that McCarthy and his right-wing allies are going to do everything they can to prevent me from becoming California’s next Senator. That’s why it’s so important we hit Saturday’s mid-month fundraising goal and send a powerful message: I’m not going anywhere.**
**[Pitch in now to help:](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=apr2023_abs_em.eR9sXr&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC30_20230413_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=2103%2E5257348%2EJ3UQUQ)**

Friend,
I wanted to reach out personally to remind you that Minnesota’s Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program reset at the beginning of the year. That means you can make a $50 contribution to my campaign and be eligible to receive a _**full refund**_ from the State of Minnesota.
Here’s how to claim your refund:
1. Make your refundable $50 (or $100 for couples) contribution to my campaign.
2. My team will mail you a receipt and a PCR application.
3. Fill out the application and mail it to the Minnesota Department of Revenue.
4. Receive your refund in the mail or by direct deposit, however you choose!

When you activate your supporter record, you’re powering the work I do day in and day out to help people afford their lives and live with dignity, safety, and respect.

I know our team has been emailing you quite a bit over the past week, so I wanted to take a moment to _explain why._

**Early fundraising is _crucial_ to a campaign like ours.
**
We don’t have a rolodex of mega-donors to cut checks for us.
We don’t take a dime from dark money super pacs.

**What I do have though, is grassroots superstars like you, and I need your help today.** [**_Look, National Republicans are foaming at the mouth to flip this seat and widen their House Majority. clean_body: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. Friend, it’s Raul. I know our team has been emailing you quite a bit over the past week, so I wanted to take a moment to explain why. Early fundraising is crucial to a campaign like ours. We don’t have a rolodex of mega-donors to cut checks for us. We don’t take a dime from dark money super pacs. And I don’t have the time to beg for campaign checks over the phone. What I do have though, is grassroots superstars like you, and I need your help today. | It cannot be overstated just how far Kevin McCarthy and his extreme caucus will go if they expand their fragile Majority. With their current majority, they’ve already passed extreme abortion bans, reversed and delayed key programs, and have their sights set on other fundamental freedoms. And I know that the 2024 Election seems impossibly far in the future. But National Republicans are doing everything they can (and spending nearly everything they have!) to flip each and every House district across the country. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: I can’t thank you enough for fighting with me and standing up for working families across our district, and across the country. Together we can stand up for fundamental rights and flip the House Majority blue. Thank you! Raul Ruiz | | Paid for by Dr. Raul Ruiz For Congress Committee P.O.
